title: Tuscan Chicken and Ricotta Rotolos (Marry Me Chicken Lasagna Roll-Ups)
description: A delicious Italian-inspired dish where lasagna noodles are rolled with a flavorful chicken and ricotta filling, then baked to perfection.
ingredients_text: lasagna noodles, chicken, ricotta cheese, marinara sauce, mozzarella cheese, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook lasagna noodles according to package instructions. 3. Mix cooked chicken with ricotta and herbs. 4. Roll the mixture in lasagna noodles. 5. Place rolls in a baking dish and cover with marinara sauce. 6. Top with mozzarella cheese. 7. Bake until bubbly and golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Mexican Quinoa, Corn, Avocado & Mango Salad
description: A super nutritious and refreshing salad that combines quinoa, corn, avocado, mango, and pan-fried halloumi, finished with a delightful honey, jalapeno, and lime dressing.
ingredients_text: quinoa, corn, avocado, mango, halloumi, honey, jalapeno, lime
instructions_text: 1. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 2. Pan-fry halloumi until golden brown. 3. In a bowl, combine cooked quinoa, corn, diced avocado, and mango. 4. In a separate bowl, mix honey, jalapeno, and lime juice for dressing. 5. Pour dressing over the salad and toss gently. 6. Top with pan-fried halloumi. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad!

title: Summer Shrimp Bowls with Mango Salsa
description: These summer shrimp bowls are packed with fresh flavors featuring a vibrant mango salsa and a creamy jalapeno sauce—perfect for a refreshing and easy weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: shrimp, mango, jalapeno, lime, cilantro, onion, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook shrimp until pink and opaque. 2. Dice mango, jalapeno, onion, and cilantro. 3. Mix mango salsa ingredients in a bowl. 4. Prepare creamy jalapeno sauce. 5. Assemble bowls with shrimp and salsa. 6. Drizzle with jalapeno sauce. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your refreshing meal.

title: Caesar Pasta Salad
description: A veggie friendly version of Caesar pasta salad with a homemade dressing. Feel free to swap for chicken and to add in some of those classic anchovies too.
ingredients_text: pasta, romaine lettuce, cherry tomatoes, homemade dressing, optional chicken, optional anchovies
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a bowl, mix romaine lettuce and cherry tomatoes. 3. Prepare the homemade dressing. 4. Combine cooked pasta with the salad mixture. 5. Add dressing and toss well. 6. If desired, add chicken or anchovies. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your veggie-friendly Caesar pasta salad!

title: Mini Chicken Pot Pies
description: Delicious and easy-to-make mini chicken pot pies using just six ingredients, perfect for a family meal.
ingredients_text: 6 ingredients
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the pie crust. 3. Mix chicken and filling ingredients. 4. Fill mini pie crusts with the mixture. 5. Cover with another layer of crust. 6. Bake until golden brown. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Blackened Cajun Chicken Alfredo
description: A cozy and indulgent dish featuring juicy Cajun-spiced chicken over creamy Parmesan Alfredo sauce, tossed with Mafaldine noodles.
ingredients_text: Cajun-spiced chicken, Mafaldine noodles, Parmesan cheese, Alfredo sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook Mafaldine noodles according to package instructions. 2. Season chicken with Cajun spices. 3. Sear chicken in a hot skillet until cooked through. 4. Prepare Alfredo sauce in a separate pan. 5. Combine cooked noodles with Alfredo sauce. 6. Slice the chicken and place on top of the noodles. 7. Garnish with extra Parmesan if desired. 8. Serve warm and enjoy.

title: High-Protein Chicken Edamame Salad
description: A sweet, nutty and crunchy salad with shredded chicken, edamame, quinoa, and a creamy sweet chili yogurt dressing. Perfect for meal prep and refreshing weekday lunches.
ingredients_text: shredded chicken, edamame, quinoa, creamy sweet chili yogurt dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 2. Boil edamame until tender. 3. In a bowl, combine shredded chicken, quinoa, and edamame. 4. Prepare the creamy sweet chili yogurt dressing. 5. Drizzle dressing over the salad. 6. Toss to combine. 7. Serve immediately or store for meal prep. 8. Enjoy as a refreshing lunch.

title: Creamy Tuscan White Bean and Chicken Sausage Skillet
description: A cozy one-pan Tuscan dish packed with protein and nutrients, featuring spicy Italian chicken sausage, creamy bone broth sauce, sundried tomatoes, and kale.
ingredients_text: spicy Italian chicken sausage, creamy bone broth, sundried tomatoes, kale
instructions_text: 1. Cook the chicken sausage in a skillet until browned. 2. Add sundried tomatoes and kale, sautéing until kale wilts. 3. Pour in the creamy bone broth and stir to combine. 4. Simmer for a few minutes until heated through. 5. Season to taste. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your cozy meal! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Thai Style Butternut Squash Soup
description: This simple butternut squash soup is such an easy soup recipe to make at home. You roast off the butternut squash with red curry paste to give it loads of flavour and then mix it with creamy coconut milk and lime juice. This soup recipe is simple, easy and tastes amazing.
ingredients_text: butternut squash, red curry paste, coconut milk, lime juice
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the butternut squash. 2. Toss the squash with red curry paste. 3. Roast the squash until tender. 4. Blend the roasted squash with coconut milk and lime juice. 5. Adjust seasoning as needed. 6. Serve warm. 7. Garnish if desired. 8. Enjoy your soup.

title: Thai Basil Chicken Stir-fry
description: A fast, flavour-packed Thai basil chicken stir-fry that's better than takeaway.
ingredients_text: chicken, Thai basil, soy sauce, garlic, bell pepper, onion, vegetable oil, chili
instructions_text: 1. Heat oil in a pan. 2. Add garlic and onion, sauté until fragrant. 3. Add chicken and cook until browned. 4. Stir in bell pepper and cook for a few minutes. 5. Add soy sauce and Thai basil, mix well. 6. Cook until basil wilts. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Buffalo Chicken Wrap
description: This quick and flavorful wrap is perfect for a satisfying lunch or dinner, combining spicy buffalo chicken, creamy ranch, and crisp veggies.
ingredients_text: spicy buffalo chicken, creamy ranch, crisp veggies, wraps
instructions_text: 1. Cook the buffalo chicken on stovetop until heated through. 2. Prepare the wraps by laying out the tortillas. 3. Spread ranch dressing on each tortilla. 4. Add the spicy buffalo chicken on top. 5. Layer with crisp veggies. 6. Roll the tortillas tightly to form wraps. 7. Slice in half for serving. 8. Enjoy your flavorful buffalo chicken wraps.

title: Mini Warm Butter Sourdough Apple Cakes
description: Indulge in these mini cakes packed with tart Granny Smith apples and infused with a rich warm butter soak - a perfect fall treat.
ingredients_text: Granny Smith apples, warm butter, sugar, flour, eggs, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Prepare mini cake molds with butter. 3. In a bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt. 4. In another bowl, whisk eggs and sugar until fluffy. 5. Fold in the dry ingredients and warm butter. 6. Add diced apples and mix gently. 7. Pour batter into molds and bake for 30 minutes. 8. Allow to cool before serving.

title: Fiery Chilli Garlic Prawns
description: A spicy and satisfying dish of prawns cooked in a chilli garlic sauce, inspired by Kerala style prawns. This recipe is high in protein and low in calories, making it a healthy choice for those watching their diet.
ingredients_text: prawns, chilli garlic sauce
instructions_text: 1. Heat oil in a pan. 2. Add prawns and sauté until pink. 3. Stir in chilli garlic sauce. 4. Cook for a few minutes until well coated. 5. Season to taste. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Butter Chicken
description: A delicious recipe for butter chicken, marinated in a blend of spices and yogurt, then cooked in a rich butter sauce.
ingredients_text: chicken, spices, yogurt, butter
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in spices and yogurt. 2. Heat butter in a pan. 3. Add marinated chicken and cook until browned. 4. Pour in remaining marinade and simmer. 5. Stir occasionally until chicken is cooked through. 6. Adjust seasoning as needed. 7. Serve hot with rice or naan. 8. Enjoy your delicious butter chicken.

title: Garlic Chicken Tikka Slider Buns
description: Enjoy your weekend with these easy and quick to make Garlic Chicken Tikka Slider Buns loaded with mozzarella cheese, garlic mayo and brushed with garlic butter.
ingredients_text: chicken, mozzarella cheese, garlic mayo, garlic butter, slider buns
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the chicken with garlic and spices. 3. Mix garlic mayo. 4. Assemble sliders with chicken, cheese, and mayo. 5. Brush buns with garlic butter. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your sliders!

title: Apple Pie Baked Oats
description: It’s apple season, and this is the perfect easy and nourishing breakfast to add to your Fall rotation. Simple ingredients, single serve and easy to customize to your liking. You can add some protein powder for a boost of protein!
ingredients_text: oats, apples, protein powder, cinnamon, milk, sweetener, egg
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. In a bowl, mix oats, chopped apples, protein powder, and cinnamon. 3. Add milk and sweetener, then stir in the egg. 4. Pour mixture into a baking dish. 5. Bake for 25-30 minutes until set. 6. Let cool slightly. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your nourishing breakfast!

title: Fall Chicken And Orzo Soup
description: A cozy and nourishing soup brimming with lots of veggies and filled with protein thanks to the chicken, with a little comfort food vibes thanks to the orzo. This soup is fantastic to freeze or make a double batch of, and simply defrost and warm in the pot when you're ready to serve.
ingredients_text: chicken, orzo, assorted vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Boil chicken in a pot until cooked through. 2. Remove chicken, shred it, and set aside. 3. In the same pot, add chopped veggies and cook until tender. 4. Stir in orzo and cook until al dente. 5. Return shredded chicken to the pot. 6. Simmer for a few minutes to combine flavors. 7. Season to taste. 8. Serve warm.

title: White Lasagna Soup
description: A creamy, cheesy white lasagna soup made with pancetta, Italian sausage, mushrooms, and a ricotta mixture. Perfect for the fall season.
ingredients_text: pancetta, Italian sausage, mushrooms, ricotta, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook pancetta and Italian sausage in a pot. 2. Add mushrooms and sauté until soft. 3. Stir in ricotta and cheese. 4. Pour in broth and bring to a simmer. 5. Add lasagna noodles and cook until tender. 6. Season to taste. 7. Serve hot, garnished with extra cheese. 8. Enjoy your creamy white lasagna soup.

title: Cheesy Autumn Vegetable Bake
description: A comforting vegetarian dish featuring roasted butternut squash, broccoli, cabbage, and leeks, topped with a gooey, golden, mustardy cheese sauce. Perfect for a Sunday roast or a midweek dinner.
ingredients_text: butternut squash, broccoli, cabbage, leeks, mustard, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Roast the butternut squash and broccoli until tender. 3. Sauté cabbage and leeks until soft. 4. Prepare the mustardy cheese sauce. 5. Combine vegetables in a baking dish. 6. Pour cheese sauce over the vegetables. 7. Bake until golden and bubbly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Creamy Chicken Noodle Soup
description: Cozy, creamy, and one of y’all’s favorites from last year!
ingredients_text: chicken, noodles, cream, vegetables, broth, spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken in a pot until browned. 2. Add vegetables and sauté until soft. 3. Stir in broth and bring to a boil. 4. Add noodles and cook until tender. 5. Mix in cream and season to taste. 6. Simmer for a few minutes. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your cozy soup!

title: Crispy Rice With Eggs And Chili Crisp
description: A quick and satisfying dish that brings new life to leftover rice with a kick of chili crisp. Topped with furikake and scallions, this dish is perfect for a quick breakfast or brunch.
ingredients_text: leftover rice, chili crisp, furikake, scallions, eggs
instructions_text: 1. Heat a pan and add leftover rice. 2. Fry until crispy. 3. In a separate pan, fry eggs to your liking. 4. Top crispy rice with chili crisp. 5. Add furikake and chopped scallions. 6. Place fried eggs on top. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your quick breakfast!

title: Creamy Tuscan Spaghetti Squash
description: Creamy Tuscan Spaghetti Squash is a delicious fall meal. Shallots, garlic, sundried tomatoes and parmesan come together in a dreamy sauce that gets tossed with spinach and topped off with an extra sprinkle of cheese. It’s healthy plant-forward food you’ll want to eat on repeat.
ingredients_text: spaghetti squash, shallots, garlic, sundried tomatoes, parmesan, spinach
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and bake the spaghetti squash until tender. 2. Sauté shallots and garlic in a pan. 3. Add sundried tomatoes and spinach, cooking until wilted. 4. Mix in cooked spaghetti squash and parmesan. 5. Stir until well combined. 6. Serve topped with extra cheese. 7. Enjoy your creamy dish! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Crispy Gnocchi With Sausage And Brussels
description: A one-pan, 30-minute dish featuring crispy pan-seared gnocchi, savory Italian turkey sausage, and caramelized Brussels sprouts in a tangy maple-cider sauce with garlic and rosemary.
ingredients_text: gnocchi, Italian turkey sausage, Brussels sprouts, maple-cider sauce, garlic, rosemary
instructions_text: 1. Heat a pan over medium heat. 2. Add the sausage and cook until browned. 3. Add gnocchi and sauté until crispy. 4. Stir in Brussels sprouts and cook until caramelized. 5. Pour in maple-cider sauce and mix well. 6. Add garlic and rosemary, cooking for a few more minutes. 7. Season to taste. 8. Serve warm.

title: Creamy Cauliflower Gnocchi with Chicken Sausage & Spinach
description: This low-carb, satisfying meal combines crispy chicken sausage, spinach, and a creamy sauce made with coconut milk or half-and-half. A comfort dish that’s both healthy and delicious.
ingredients_text: chicken sausage, spinach, coconut milk or half-and-half, cauliflower gnocchi
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken sausage until crispy. 2. Add spinach and sauté until wilted. 3. Stir in coconut milk or half-and-half. 4. Add cauliflower gnocchi and mix well. 5. Simmer until heated through. 6. Season to taste. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your creamy dish!

title: Honey BBQ Chicken Bites
description: Delicious crispy chicken bites coated in a homemade honey BBQ glaze, perfect as an appetizer or snack.
ingredients_text: chicken bites, honey, BBQ sauce, flour, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven or fryer. 2. Coat chicken bites in flour and seasoning. 3. Fry or bake until crispy. 4. Mix honey and BBQ sauce. 5. Toss chicken in the glaze. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy as an appetizer or snack.

title: Nigerian Chicken Shawarma
description: Juicy marinated chicken breast, crispy toasted sausage, crunchy shredded cabbage and carrots, all wrapped in soft pocket pita and drizzled with a creamy mayo-ketchup-chili sauce. The definitive home-made version of Nigeria's favourite street-food wrap.
ingredients_text: chicken breast, sausage, cabbage, carrots, pita bread, mayo, ketchup, chili sauce
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken breast and grill until cooked. 2. Toast sausage until crispy. 3. Shred cabbage and carrots. 4. Mix mayo, ketchup, and chili sauce. 5. Assemble by placing chicken, sausage, cabbage, and carrots in pita. 6. Drizzle with sauce. 7. Wrap tightly. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Jollof Spaghetti
description: Spaghetti cooked directly in a rich, spiced tomato-pepper sauce until it absorbs every drop of flavour — exactly like jollof rice but in pasta form. Served with crispy fried chicken for a full party-style plate.
ingredients_text: spaghetti, tomato sauce, pepper, spices, chicken
instructions_text: 1. Cook spaghetti in a spiced tomato-pepper sauce until tender. 2. Fry chicken until crispy. 3. Serve spaghetti topped with fried chicken. 4. Garnish with herbs if desired.

title: Nigerian Fried Rice
description: Classic Nigerian fried rice loaded with colourful mixed vegetables, curry-seasoned long-grain rice, and juicy fried chicken drumsticks. A staple at parties, celebrations, and weeknight dinners across Nigeria.
ingredients_text: long-grain rice, mixed vegetables, curry powder, chicken drumsticks, oil, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Cook the rice with curry powder. 2. Fry the chicken drumsticks until golden brown. 3. Sauté mixed vegetables in oil. 4. Combine rice and vegetables. 5. Serve with fried chicken on top.

title: Moi Moi (Nigerian Bean Cake)
description: Savory, fluffy, and soft Nigerian steamed bean pudding made from peeled black-eyed peas blended with peppers, crayfish, fish, and boiled eggs. A beloved comfort food — rich in protein and endlessly customisable.
ingredients_text: peeled black-eyed peas, peppers, crayfish, fish, boiled eggs
instructions_text: 1. Soak the black-eyed peas and blend with peppers. 2. Mix in crayfish and fish. 3. Add boiled eggs to the mixture. 4. Pour into a steaming dish. 5. Steam for 45 minutes. 6. Allow to cool slightly. 7. Slice and serve. 8. Enjoy as a comfort food.

title: Smoky Jollof Rice
description: The ultimate Nigerian party jollof rice — smoky, rich, and deeply flavoured with tomato paste, white pepper, and butter. Cooked low and slow on the hob for that iconic party taste.
ingredients_text: rice, tomato paste, white pepper, butter, onions, garlic, bell peppers, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Rinse the rice and set aside. 2. Sauté onions and garlic until fragrant. 3. Add tomato paste and bell peppers, cooking until thick. 4. Stir in rice and seasonings. 5. Add water and bring to a boil. 6. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer until rice is cooked. 7. Allow to cool slightly for a smoky flavor. 8. Serve garnished with chopped herbs.

title: Maple Dijon Chicken with Roasted Winter Vegetables
description: A succulent chicken dish glazed with maple Dijon sauce, complemented by a medley of roasted winter vegetables.
ingredients_text: chicken, maple syrup, Dijon mustard, winter vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix maple syrup and Dijon mustard. 3. Coat chicken with the glaze. 4. Arrange winter vegetables on a baking sheet. 5. Place chicken on the sheet. 6. Roast in the oven for 40 minutes. 7. Check chicken for doneness. 8. Serve hot.

title: Pumpkin Pie Breakfast Bowl
description: Saturday mornings in October call for pumpkin pie breakfast bowls. Combine the warm flavors of pumpkin pie with honey vanilla yogurt and you’ve got a creamy, dreamy bowl with a taste of early autumn vibes. This bowl comes together in minutes and it’s going to be your new fall crave.
ingredients_text: pumpkin puree, honey vanilla yogurt
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, combine pumpkin puree with honey vanilla yogurt. 2. Mix until creamy and smooth. 3. Serve in a bowl. 4. Optionally, top with nuts or seeds. 5. Enjoy your breakfast bowl warm. 6. Perfect for a cozy autumn morning.

title: Gochujang Chicken Salad
description: A delicious chicken salad with a spicy, sweet, and tangy gochujang dressing, served on toasted bread with thinly sliced cabbage.
ingredients_text: chicken, gochujang, cabbage, bread
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken until fully done. 2. Prepare gochujang dressing. 3. Shred cabbage. 4. Toast bread slices. 5. Mix chicken with dressing and cabbage. 6. Serve mixture on toasted bread. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your salad.

title: Asian Spice Chicken Tenders
description: Sweet and savory with a hint of spiciness, inspired by Wingstop.
ingredients_text: chicken tenders, Asian spices, sweet sauce, oil
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven or heat oil for frying. 2. Season chicken tenders with Asian spices. 3. Coat tenders with sweet sauce. 4. Bake or fry until golden brown. 5. Serve with extra sauce if desired. 6. Garnish with sesame seeds. 7. Enjoy with a side of vegetables. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Honeynut Squash Brown Butter Squash Pasta
description: A delicious fall pasta dish featuring honeynut squash, brown butter, sage, and ricotta, topped with crispy sourdough sage breadcrumbs.
ingredients_text: Honeynut squash, brown butter, sage, ricotta, crispy sourdough, breadcrumbs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and prepare honeynut squash. 2. Roast squash until tender. 3. In a pan, melt butter and add sage. 4. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 5. Combine pasta with roasted squash and brown butter. 6. Mix in ricotta. 7. Top with crispy sourdough sage breadcrumbs. 8. Serve warm.

title: White Rice, Ofada Stew & Plantain
description: Nigerian Ofada stew made with peppers, iru, and assorted meat, served with white rice and golden fried plantain.
ingredients_text: white rice, peppers, iru, assorted meat, plantain, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Cook white rice until tender. 2. Blend peppers and iru for the stew. 3. Cook assorted meat with seasoning until tender. 4. Add blended pepper mix to the meat and simmer. 5. Slice plantain and fry until golden. 6. Serve rice with Ofada stew and fried plantain. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Creamy Chicken Fajita Pasta
ingredients_text: pasta, chicken, bell peppers, onion, cream, cheese, spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, sauté chicken until cooked through. 3. Add sliced bell peppers and onion, cooking until tender. 4. Stir in cream and cheese, mixing until melted. 5. Combine cooked pasta with the chicken mixture. 6. Season with spices to taste. 7. Serve hot, garnished with additional cheese if desired. 8. Enjoy your creamy chicken fajita pasta.

title: Honey Pistachio Olive Oil Cake
description: A gooey, sticky, and perfectly moist honey pistachio olive oil cake, the perfect fall dessert.
ingredients_text: honey, pistachios, olive oil, flour, eggs, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Grease a cake pan. 3. In a bowl, mix honey and olive oil. 4. Add eggs and whisk until combined. 5. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. 6. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet mixture. 7. Fold in chopped pistachios. 8. Pour batter into the pan and bake for 40 minutes.

title: Crispy Chicken Cutlets With Tomato-Mozzarella Salad
description: Crispy chicken cutlets served with a fresh tomato-mozzarella salad, drizzled with homemade basil oil and a squeeze of lemon.
ingredients_text: chicken cutlets, tomatoes, mozzarella, basil oil, lemon
instructions_text: 1. Prepare chicken cutlets by seasoning and breading. 2. Heat oil in a pan and fry the cutlets until golden brown. 3. Slice tomatoes and mozzarella for the salad. 4. Drizzle basil oil over the salad. 5. Squeeze lemon juice on top. 6. Serve the cutlets with the tomato-mozzarella salad. 7. Garnish with additional basil if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Crispy Rice Salmon Cucumber Salad with Creamy Asian Dressing
description: A fulfilling salad that features crispy rice, succulent salmon, crisp cucumbers, and a luscious creamy Asian dressing. Perfect for when you want something fresh yet satisfying.
ingredients_text: crispy rice, salmon, cucumbers, creamy Asian dressing
instructions_text: 1. Prepare crispy rice by frying cooked rice until golden. 2. Cook salmon until flaky. 3. Slice cucumbers thinly. 4. Mix ingredients for creamy Asian dressing. 5. Assemble salad with crispy rice, salmon, and cucumbers. 6. Drizzle with dressing. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve fresh.

title: Honey Mustard Glazed Salmon with Pomegranate Salsa
description: A vibrant and festive dish featuring flaky salmon glazed with a tangy-sweet honey mustard sauce, topped with a colorful pomegranate salsa.
ingredients_text: salmon fillets, honey, mustard, pomegranate, onion, cilantro, lime juice, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the grill or oven. 2. Mix honey and mustard in a bowl. 3. Brush the mixture over the salmon fillets. 4. Grill or bake the salmon for 15 minutes. 5. Prepare the pomegranate salsa by combining pomegranate, onion, cilantro, lime juice, salt, and pepper. 6. Serve the glazed salmon topped with pomegranate salsa. 7. Enjoy your vibrant dish! 8. Garnish with extra cilantro if desired.

title: Spicy Salmon Hand Rolls
description: Spicy tinned salmon (or tuna!) is a fast track to flavor in these simple hand rolls—particularly when mashed with some oil from the can and a slick of mayo.
ingredients_text: spicy tinned salmon, oil from the can, mayo, nori sheets, rice, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Mash the spicy tinned salmon with oil and mayo. 2. Prepare nori sheets. 3. Place a small amount of rice on each nori sheet. 4. Add the salmon mixture on top of the rice. 5. Add vegetables as desired. 6. Roll the nori tightly around the filling. 7. Slice into pieces if desired. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Sweet Potato Quinoa Salad
description: A vibrant and hearty salad featuring smoky chipotle lime sweet potatoes and a tangy-sweet maple cilantro dressing. Perfect as a side dish or topped with grilled chicken or shrimp for a complete meal.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, quinoa, chipotle, lime, maple syrup, cilantro
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and prepare a baking sheet. 2. Cube sweet potatoes and toss with chipotle and lime. 3. Roast sweet potatoes until tender. 4. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 5. Whisk together maple syrup and cilantro for dressing. 6. Combine roasted sweet potatoes and quinoa in a bowl. 7. Drizzle with dressing and toss to combine. 8. Serve as a side or topped with grilled chicken or shrimp.

title: Marry Me Chicken and Potatoes
description: A comforting dish with succulent chicken and crispy potatoes, blended in a creamy and flavorful sauce. Perfect for a romantic dinner or a family meal!
ingredients_text: chicken, potatoes, creamy sauce, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Season the chicken and potatoes. 3. Sear the chicken until golden. 4. Add potatoes and sauce to the pan. 5. Bake until chicken is cooked through. 6. Let rest before serving. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Roasted Chicken with Cranberry Balsamic Glaze and Sage Brown Butter Mashed Potatoes
description: Inspired by the classic Thanksgiving turkey, this roasted chicken is paired with a sweet-tart cranberry balsamic glaze and indulgent sage-infused mashed potatoes.
ingredients_text: whole chicken, cranberry balsamic glaze, potatoes, sage, butter, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the chicken. 2. Coat the chicken with cranberry balsamic glaze. 3. Roast the chicken until cooked through. 4. Boil potatoes until tender. 5. Mash potatoes with sage and butter. 6. Season mashed potatoes with salt and pepper. 7. Let the chicken rest before carving. 8. Serve chicken with mashed potatoes on the side.

title: Creamy Pesto Rice with Lemon Pepper Salmon
description: A flavorful blend of creamy pesto rice and zesty lemon pepper salmon, garnished with asparagus, lemon zest, and chili flakes for a delightful meal.
ingredients_text: creamy pesto rice, lemon pepper salmon, asparagus, lemon zest, chili flakes
instructions_text: 1. Cook the creamy pesto rice according to package instructions. 2. Season salmon with lemon pepper. 3. Grill or pan-sear the salmon until cooked through. 4. Blanch asparagus in boiling water. 5. Plate the creamy pesto rice. 6. Top with grilled salmon. 7. Garnish with asparagus, lemon zest, and chili flakes. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Tortellini Salad with Arugula
description: A refreshing tortellini salad featuring arugula, artichoke hearts, sundried tomatoes, Castelvetrano olives, and shaved Parmesan, dressed in a tangy vinaigrette. Perfect as a standalone dish or as part of a meal.
ingredients_text: tortellini, arugula, artichoke hearts, sundried tomatoes, Castelvetrano olives, shaved Parmesan, vinaigrette
instructions_text: 1. Cook tortellini according to package instructions. 2. Drain and cool. 3. In a large bowl, combine arugula, artichoke hearts, sundried tomatoes, and olives. 4. Add cooled tortellini. 5. Drizzle with vinaigrette and toss gently. 6. Top with shaved Parmesan. 7. Serve immediately or chill before serving. 8. Enjoy as a standalone dish or part of a meal.

title: Classic BLT Sandwich
description: This Classic BLT Sandwich is a timeless favorite and a quick, easy option for breakfast, lunch, or dinner. The combination of crispy bacon, fresh lettuce, and juicy tomatoes, all on toasted bread with a touch of mayonnaise, makes for a delicious, satisfying meal.
ingredients_text: crispy bacon, fresh lettuce, juicy tomatoes, toasted bread, mayonnaise
instructions_text: 1. Cook the bacon until crispy. 2. Toast the bread slices. 3. Spread mayonnaise on one side of each slice. 4. Layer lettuce, tomatoes, and bacon on one slice. 5. Top with the second slice of bread, mayo side down. 6. Cut the sandwich in half. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your classic BLT!

title: Cilantro Lime Chicken
description: A high-protein, low-carb meal with marinated chicken thighs, served over your choice of rice, topped with avocado salsa and pickled shallots.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, cilantro, lime, rice, avocado, shallots
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken thighs in cilantro and lime. 2. Grill the chicken until cooked through. 3. Prepare rice as per your choice. 4. Make avocado salsa. 5. Pickle shallots. 6. Serve grilled chicken over rice. 7. Top with avocado salsa and pickled shallots. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Whipped Feta with Roasted Potatoes and Tomatoes
description: A delightful side dish or appetizer featuring creamy whipped feta, roasted potatoes, and sweet roasted tomatoes. Topped with fresh parsley and chili-infused olive oil for the perfect blend of flavors.
ingredients_text: whipped feta, roasted potatoes, roasted tomatoes, fresh parsley, chili-infused olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Cut potatoes into cubes and toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper. 3. Spread potatoes on a baking sheet and roast for 25 minutes. 4. Add tomatoes to the baking sheet and roast for an additional 15 minutes. 5. In a bowl, whip feta until creamy. 6. Serve roasted potatoes and tomatoes topped with whipped feta. 7. Drizzle with chili-infused olive oil. 8. Garnish with fresh parsley.

title: Loaded Scalloped Potatoes
description: Plain scalloped potatoes are good but loaded like a baked potato–with scallions, sour cream, cheddar, and bacon–they’re exponentially better.
ingredients_text: potatoes, scallions, sour cream, cheddar, bacon
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven. 2. Slice potatoes thinly. 3. Layer potatoes in a baking dish. 4. Mix sour cream, cheddar, and scallions. 5. Pour mixture over potatoes. 6. Top with bacon. 7. Cover and bake. 8. Uncover and bake until golden.

title: Crispy Smashed Potatoes with Salsa Verde
description: Smashed potatoes that are golden and crispy on the outside and perfectly tender inside, topped with a zesty Spanish-inspired salsa verde. Ideal for any meal or occasion.
ingredients_text: potatoes, olive oil, salt, pepper, salsa verde
instructions_text: 1. Boil potatoes until tender. 2. Drain and let cool slightly. 3. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). 4. Smash each potato gently on a baking sheet. 5. Drizzle with olive oil, salt, and pepper. 6. Bake until crispy and golden, about 25-30 minutes. 7. Top with salsa verde before serving. 8. Enjoy warm.

title: Prosciutto, Peach & Burrata Sandwich
description: A delightful sandwich with creamy burrata, sweet ripe grilled peaches, a drizzle of Busy Bee honey, salty prosciutto, and fresh basil, all brought together with a touch of balsamic glaze.
ingredients_text: burrata, grilled peaches, Busy Bee honey, prosciutto, fresh basil, balsamic glaze
instructions_text: 1. Grill the peaches until caramelized. 2. Slice the burrata and prosciutto. 3. Assemble the sandwich with burrata, grilled peaches, and prosciutto. 4. Drizzle with honey and balsamic glaze. 5. Add fresh basil leaves. 6. Close the sandwich and press gently. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your delightful sandwich.

title: Lemony Avocado Herb Egg Salad over Goat Cheese Sourdough Toast
description: A fresh and creamy egg salad that's perfect for a healthy breakfast or lunch. The combination of softer boiled eggs, creamy avocado, and a hint of lemon atop goat cheese sourdough toast offers a delightful taste.
ingredients_text: soft boiled eggs, avocado, lemon juice, goat cheese, sourdough bread, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Boil eggs until soft. 2. Mash avocado in a bowl. 3. Mix in lemon juice, salt, and pepper. 4. Peel and chop boiled eggs, then add to avocado mixture. 5. Toast sourdough bread. 6. Spread goat cheese on toast. 7. Top with egg salad. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Garlicky Soy Chicken Rice
description: A simple and delicious Chinese-style one-pot chicken dish with beautifully infused garlic and soy flavors. Serve it with a fried egg for a complete meal that's both quick and satisfying.
ingredients_text: chicken, garlic, soy sauce, rice, fried egg
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in soy sauce and minced garlic. 2. Heat oil in a pot. 3. Add marinated chicken and cook until browned. 4. Stir in rice and water. 5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cover. 6. Cook until rice is tender. 7. Fry an egg in a separate pan. 8. Serve chicken rice topped with fried egg.

title: Salmon Coconut Rice Bowl
description: A deliciously fresh and tropical dish with savory salmon, coconut rice, and a vibrant mango salsa.
ingredients_text: salmon, coconut rice, mango salsa
instructions_text: 1. Cook the coconut rice according to package instructions. 2. Season the salmon with salt and pepper. 3. Grill the salmon until cooked through. 4. Prepare the mango salsa by mixing diced mango, onion, and cilantro. 5. Fluff the coconut rice and place it in bowls. 6. Top with grilled salmon and mango salsa. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your tropical dish!

title: Ensalada Rusa
description: Ensalada Rusa is a delightful and colorful potato salad made with mixed vegetables, hard-boiled eggs, and a creamy dressing. It's perfect for any occasion and can be enhanced with fun toppings and pickled garnishes.
ingredients_text: potatoes, mixed vegetables, hard-boiled eggs, creamy dressing
instructions_text: 1. Boil potatoes until tender. 2. Chop mixed vegetables. 3. Hard-boil eggs and chop. 4. Mix potatoes, vegetables, and eggs in a bowl. 5. Add creamy dressing and stir gently. 6. Season to taste. 7. Chill in the refrigerator. 8. Serve with toppings and garnishes.

title: Chicken Pot Pie Twice Baked Potatoes
description: A cozy fusion of chicken pot pie and twice-baked potatoes, creating a delightful dish that's both comforting and easy to prepare.
ingredients_text: chicken, potatoes, cream, cheese, vegetables, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Bake potatoes until tender. 3. Scoop out the insides and mix with chicken, cream, and cheese. 4. Refill potato skins with the mixture. 5. Bake again until golden. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your comforting dish!

title: Maple Roasted Sweet Potatoes with Candied Pecans
description: A delightful dish that combines the natural sweetness of roasted sweet potatoes with the crunchy goodness of candied pecans, finished with a hint of maple and cinnamon.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, pecans, maple syrup, cinnamon
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Peel and cube sweet potatoes. 3. Toss sweet potatoes with maple syrup and cinnamon. 4. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 25-30 minutes. 5. In a separate pan, toast pecans until golden. 6. Combine toasted pecans with a bit of maple syrup to candy them. 7. Once sweet potatoes are done, mix in candied pecans. 8. Serve warm.

title: Crisp Pear and Candied Walnut Salad
description: A festive salad perfect for the holidays, combining crunchy textures with sweet, salty, and fresh flavors. Ideal for Christmas Day and easily presented as a decorative wreath.
ingredients_text: crisp pears, candied walnuts, mixed greens, feta cheese, balsamic vinaigrette
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the mixed greens in a large bowl. 2. Slice the crisp pears and add them to the greens. 3. Sprinkle candied walnuts and feta cheese on top. 4. Drizzle with balsamic vinaigrette. 5. Toss gently to combine. 6. Arrange the salad in a decorative wreath shape. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy as a festive holiday dish.

title: Green Beans with Creamy Tahini & Hot Sauce
description: Smoky and charred green beans with a creamy tahini and hot sauce drizzle, garnished with toasted hazelnuts and jalapeños. A perfect grilled or skillet-cooked dish.
ingredients_text: green beans, tahini, hot sauce, hazelnuts, jalapeños
instructions_text: 1. Preheat grill or skillet. 2. Toss green beans with oil and seasonings. 3. Grill or sauté until charred. 4. In a bowl, mix tahini with hot sauce. 5. Drizzle tahini sauce over green beans. 6. Garnish with toasted hazelnuts and jalapeños. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your smoky green beans!

title: Golden Halloumi and Lentil Salad
description: A vibrant and flavorful salad featuring golden halloumi, nourishing lentils, and creamy avocado. Perfect as a showstopping side for any gathering.
ingredients_text: golden halloumi, lentils, creamy avocado
instructions_text: 1. Cook lentils according to package instructions. 2. Grill halloumi until golden brown. 3. Slice avocado. 4. Combine lentils, halloumi, and avocado in a bowl. 5. Drizzle with olive oil. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve as a side dish.

title: Peanut Chicken Pad Thai
description: A delicious and super easy dinner idea that’s on your table in under 30 minutes! Tasty noodles, vegetables, and tender chicken thigh stir-fried and tossed in a peanut pad thai sauce, perfect for a busy weeknight.
ingredients_text: tasty noodles, vegetables, chicken thigh, peanut pad thai sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook the noodles according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, stir-fry the chicken thighs until cooked through. 3. Add vegetables and stir-fry until tender. 4. Toss in the cooked noodles. 5. Pour in the peanut pad thai sauce and mix well. 6. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Salmon with Basil Risotto
description: A sophisticated dish pairing seared salmon fillets with a creamy basil-infused risotto, bringing together fresh basil flavors and rich salmon.
ingredients_text: salmon fillets, basil, rice, cream, broth, garlic, onion, parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Sear salmon fillets in a hot pan until cooked through. 2. In another pot, sauté garlic and onion until translucent. 3. Add rice and toast for a minute. 4. Gradually add broth, stirring until absorbed. 5. Stir in cream and parmesan until creamy. 6. Mix in fresh basil. 7. Serve salmon on top of risotto. 8. Garnish with additional basil if desired.

title: French Onion Chicken with Cauliflower Potato Mash
description: A cozy and comforting dish that combines the flavors of French onion soup with juicy herb chicken, all topped with caramelized onions and melty cheese. Served alongside a creamy cauliflower and potato mash.
ingredients_text: chicken, onions, cheese, cauliflower, potatoes, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Sauté onions until caramelized. 3. Season chicken and sear in a pan. 4. Top chicken with onions and cheese, then bake. 5. Boil cauliflower and potatoes until tender. 6. Mash cauliflower and potatoes together. 7. Serve chicken with mash on the side. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Honey Butter Sweet Potato Cornbread
description: A deliciously moist cornbread made with mashed sweet potatoes, perfect for a warm and cozy meal. Serve it with honey butter for an extra touch of sweetness.
ingredients_text: mashed sweet potatoes, cornmeal, flour, baking powder, salt, milk, eggs, honey, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix mashed sweet potatoes with milk and eggs. 3. In another bowl, combine cornmeal, flour, baking powder, and salt. 4. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet mixture. 5. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish. 6. Bake for 30 minutes or until golden. 7. Let cool slightly before serving. 8. Serve warm with honey butter.

title: Creamy Cheesy Onion and Potato Gratin
description: A rich and indulgent potato gratin with caramelized onions and a creamy, cheesy sauce, perfect for the holiday season.
ingredients_text: potatoes, onions, cheese, cream, butter, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Slice the potatoes and onions. 3. Caramelize the onions in butter. 4. Layer potatoes and onions in a baking dish. 5. Pour cream over the layers. 6. Sprinkle cheese on top. 7. Bake until golden and bubbly. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Grilled Halloumi Peach Sandwich
description: A sweet & savory sandwich made with toasted ciabatta, broiled honey peaches, grilled halloumi, creamy ricotta, arugula, pistachios, and hot honey.
ingredients_text: toasted ciabatta, honey peaches, grilled halloumi, creamy ricotta, arugula, pistachios, hot honey
instructions_text: 1. Broil the peaches until caramelized. 2. Grill the halloumi until golden. 3. Toast the ciabatta. 4. Spread ricotta on the ciabatta. 5. Layer with grilled halloumi, arugula, and broiled peaches. 6. Drizzle with hot honey. 7. Sprinkle with pistachios. 8. Close the sandwich and serve.

title: Carne Guisada con Papas
description: This stewed beef is a reliable meal in many Salvadoran homes. It is very affordable and adaptable in that you can use many different kinds of vegetables, such as potatoes, carrots, or even green beans. The sauce is particularly delicious with rice, creating a substantial, flavorful meal.
ingredients_text: beef, potatoes, carrots, green beans, rice
instructions_text: 1. Cut beef into cubes and season. 2. Brown the beef in a pot. 3. Add chopped vegetables and sauté. 4. Pour in water or broth and bring to a boil. 5. Simmer for 60-70 minutes until tender. 6. Serve with rice. 7. Adjust seasoning as needed. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Chipotle Honey Chicken Tacos
description: Delightful tacos combining chipotle-marinated chicken with a sweet honey glaze, topped with fresh guacamole and creamy queso. Perfect for any taco night!
ingredients_text: chipotle-marinated chicken, honey, guacamole, queso, taco shells
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in chipotle sauce. 2. Grill or cook chicken until done. 3. Prepare honey glaze and drizzle over chicken. 4. Warm taco shells. 5. Assemble tacos with chicken, guacamole, and queso. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy with your favorite toppings. 8. Perfect for taco night!

title: Roasted Parmesan Carrot Salad with Crispy Chickpeas and Creamy Lemon Dressing
description: A seasonal transition meal, merging the freshness of summer with a touch of fall, featuring roasted parmesan carrots and crispy chickpeas dressed in a creamy lemon dressing.
ingredients_text: parmesan cheese, carrots, chickpeas, lemon, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Toss carrots and chickpeas with olive oil, salt, and pepper. 3. Spread on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes. 4. Meanwhile, mix lemon juice with olive oil for the dressing. 5. Once roasted, combine carrots and chickpeas in a bowl. 6. Drizzle with creamy lemon dressing. 7. Top with grated parmesan. 8. Serve warm or at room temperature.

title: Sweet Potato Cobbler
description: This classic Southern dessert features tender, caramelized sweet potatoes baked into syrupy perfection in a rich, buttery brown sugar sauce. The dish is topped with a super flaky pie crust, making it a cozy treat you'll crave.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, brown sugar, butter, pie crust
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Peel and slice sweet potatoes. 3. Cook sweet potatoes until tender. 4. Mix sweet potatoes with brown sugar and butter. 5. Pour mixture into pie crust. 6. Cover with another layer of pie crust. 7. Bake until golden brown. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Fully Loaded Potato Skins with Chipotle Southwest Guacamole
description: Yummy cheesy potatoes… with fried eggs and bacon.
ingredients_text: potatoes, cheese, eggs, bacon, chipotle, guacamole
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the potatoes. 2. Bake the potatoes until tender. 3. Scoop out the insides and mix with cheese. 4. Fill the skins with the mixture. 5. Fry the eggs and cook the bacon. 6. Top the filled skins with eggs and bacon. 7. Prepare the chipotle guacamole. 8. Serve warm.

title: Honey Glazed Salmon Bowls
description: A nourishing and flavorful dinner featuring honey glazed salmon, a refreshing cucumber avocado salad, and a high protein spicy sauce that makes it a complete meal.
ingredients_text: honey, salmon, cucumber, avocado, spicy sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat grill. 2. Glaze salmon with honey. 3. Grill salmon until cooked. 4. Prepare cucumber avocado salad. 5. Mix spicy sauce. 6. Assemble bowls with salmon and salad. 7. Drizzle with spicy sauce. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Green Tahini Crunchy Chicken Focaccia Sandwich
description: A delicious picnic-ready sandwich featuring crispy panko chicken, fresh salad with 7UP Tangy Salad Dressing, and addictive green tahini sauce, all packed in a grilled focaccia.
ingredients_text: crispy panko chicken, fresh salad, 7UP Tangy Salad Dressing, green tahini sauce, grilled focaccia
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the crispy panko chicken. 2. Mix fresh salad with 7UP Tangy Salad Dressing. 3. Make the green tahini sauce. 4. Grill the focaccia until golden. 5. Assemble the sandwich with chicken, salad, and tahini. 6. Cut into halves. 7. Serve immediately or pack for a picnic. 8. Enjoy your delicious sandwich!

title: Orange Pepper Chicken
description: Sticky, citrusy, grilled chicken coated in a homemade orange and black pepper pan sauce.
ingredients_text: chicken, orange juice, black pepper, salt, garlic, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in orange juice, black pepper, salt, and garlic. 2. Preheat grill. 3. Grill chicken until cooked through. 4. In a pan, combine remaining marinade and reduce to a sauce. 5. Coat grilled chicken with the sauce. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish with orange slices if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Huevos Rancheros
description: A traditional Mexican breakfast dish featuring crispy tortillas topped with beans, eggs, salsas, and a variety of fresh toppings.
ingredients_text: crispy tortillas, beans, eggs, salsas, fresh toppings
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the crispy tortillas. 2. Cook the beans until heated through. 3. Fry or boil the eggs to your preference. 4. Assemble by placing beans on tortillas. 5. Top with eggs. 6. Add salsas and fresh toppings. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Sweet Potato Cobbler
description: A Southern classic with tender, caramelized sweet potatoes in a rich, buttery brown sugar sauce, topped with a super flaky pie crust. Perfect for cozy gatherings.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, brown sugar, butter, pie crust
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Peel and slice sweet potatoes. 3. Cook sweet potatoes in a saucepan until tender. 4. Mix sweet potatoes with brown sugar and butter. 5. Pour mixture into a baking dish. 6. Cover with pie crust. 7. Bake until crust is golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Pabellón Criollo
description: A traditional Venezuelan dish consisting of shredded beef, black beans, white rice, and fried plantains for a delicious and balanced meal.
ingredients_text: shredded beef, black beans, white rice, fried plantains
instructions_text: 1. Cook the beef until tender and shred it. 2. Prepare black beans by boiling until soft. 3. Cook white rice according to package instructions. 4. Fry plantains until golden brown. 5. Serve shredded beef with black beans, rice, and fried plantains. 6. Garnish as desired. 7. Enjoy your meal. 8. Store leftovers in the refrigerator.

title: Cranberry and Pecan Chicken Salad
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make chicken salad with cranberries and pecans, accented with fresh dill and tarragon. Perfect for meal prep and high in protein.
ingredients_text: chicken, cranberries, pecans, fresh dill, tarragon
instructions_text: 1. Cook the chicken until fully cooked. 2. Allow the chicken to cool and chop it into bite-sized pieces. 3. In a bowl, combine chicken, cranberries, and pecans. 4. Add fresh dill and tarragon to the mixture. 5. Mix well to combine all ingredients. 6. Serve immediately or refrigerate for meal prep. 7. Enjoy as a salad or in a sandwich. 8. Garnish with additional herbs if desired.

title: Zesty Beetroot Salad
description: A vibrant and tangy beetroot salad rich in iron, helping with blood circulation. Perfect for pairing with your favorite mains!
ingredients_text: beetroot, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper, mixed greens, nuts
instructions_text: 1. Cook the beetroot until tender. 2. Let it cool and peel the skin. 3. Slice the beetroot into thin rounds. 4. In a bowl, mix olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. 5. Toss the beetroot with the dressing. 6. Serve on a bed of mixed greens. 7. Top with nuts for crunch. 8. Enjoy as a refreshing salad.

title: Cucumber Focaccia Sandwich
description: A refreshing focaccia sandwich featuring marinated cucumbers, creamy cream cheese, and toasted sesame seeds. Perfect for a spicy hot day!
ingredients_text: focaccia bread, marinated cucumbers, cream cheese, toasted sesame seeds
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven if necessary. 2. Slice the focaccia bread. 3. Spread cream cheese on one side of each slice. 4. Layer marinated cucumbers on top of the cream cheese. 5. Sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds. 6. Close the sandwich with another slice of focaccia. 7. Optionally, toast the sandwich in the oven for a few minutes. 8. Cut into halves and serve.

title: Cheesy Chicken Enchiladas Verdes
description: These cheesy chicken enchiladas verdes are a part of your Taco Tuesday fun. With only six ingredients and nearly 20 grams of protein per serving, this is easy weeknight comfort food you can feel good about.
ingredients_text: cheese, chicken, enchilada sauce, tortillas, sour cream, green onions
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook chicken and shred it. 3. Mix chicken with cheese and enchilada sauce. 4. Fill tortillas with the mixture. 5. Roll and place in a baking dish. 6. Top with remaining sauce and cheese. 7. Bake until bubbly. 8. Garnish with sour cream and green onions.

title: White Chocolate Pistachio Crispy Bars
description: Crispy and creamy White Chocolate Pistachio Crispy Bars make for a heavenly treat that balances indulgence with delightful textures. Perfect for any pistachio lover!
ingredients_text: white chocolate, pistachios, crispy rice cereal, butter, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Melt white chocolate and butter together. 2. Stir in vanilla extract. 3. Mix in crispy rice cereal and chopped pistachios. 4. Press mixture into a lined baking dish. 5. Refrigerate until set. 6. Cut into bars. 7. Serve chilled. 8. Enjoy your treat!

title: Garlic Butter Chicken Meatballs with Creamy Orzo
description: Flavorful crockpot meatballs slow-cooked in garlic butter and broth, served alongside rich, creamy orzo pasta for a comforting meal.
ingredients_text: meatballs, garlic butter, broth, orzo pasta
instructions_text: 1. Prepare meatballs and place them in the crockpot. 2. Add garlic butter and broth. 3. Cover and cook on low for 180 minutes. 4. Cook orzo pasta separately. 5. Once meatballs are cooked, serve with creamy orzo. 6. Garnish as desired. 7. Enjoy your meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Casarecce with Cime di Rapa and Ricotta Salata
description: An authentic Italian pasta dish featuring the earthy flavors of broccoli rabe and the savory notes of anchovy, topped with delicate ricotta salata.
ingredients_text: casarecce pasta, broccoli rabe, anchovy, ricotta salata, olive oil, garlic, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook casarecce pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat olive oil and sauté garlic. 3. Add anchovy and cook until dissolved. 4. Stir in broccoli rabe and cook until tender. 5. Combine pasta with the broccoli mixture. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve topped with ricotta salata. 8. Enjoy your dish warm.

title: Mezze Penne with Baby Squid on a Navy Bean Purée
description: A delightful combination of mezze penne pasta with tender baby squid served on a creamy navy bean purée.
ingredients_text: mezze penne pasta, baby squid, navy beans, cream, garlic, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook the mezze penne according to package instructions. 2. Sauté garlic in olive oil until fragrant. 3. Add baby squid and cook until tender. 4. Prepare navy bean purée by blending cooked navy beans with cream, salt, and pepper. 5. Plate the navy bean purée and top with mezze penne. 6. Arrange the squid on top. 7. Drizzle with olive oil. 8. Serve warm.

title: Creamy White Wine Mushroom Stuffed Shells
description: Delicious and cheesy stuffed pasta shells with a creamy white wine and mushroom sauce, perfect for holiday gatherings.
ingredients_text: stuffed pasta shells, white wine, mushrooms, cheese, cream
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the pasta shells until al dente. 3. Sauté mushrooms in white wine until tender. 4. Mix mushrooms with cheese and cream. 5. Stuff the shells with the mixture. 6. Place in a baking dish and cover with sauce. 7. Bake until bubbly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Vegetarian Pumpkin and Ricotta Stuffed Shells
description: Large pasta shells stuffed with creamy ricotta and pumpkin filling, baked in a savory marinara sauce.
ingredients_text: large pasta shells, ricotta cheese, pumpkin, marinara sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook pasta shells until al dente. 3. Mix ricotta and pumpkin in a bowl. 4. Stuff shells with the mixture. 5. Spread marinara sauce in a baking dish. 6. Place stuffed shells in the dish. 7. Top with more marinara sauce. 8. Bake until heated through.

title: Butternut Squash Baked Feta Pasta
description: A fall-inspired twist on the classic viral baked feta pasta, featuring creamy butternut squash, earthy sage, and a touch of heat from hot honey.
ingredients_text: butternut squash, feta cheese, sage, hot honey, pasta
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cut butternut squash and place in a baking dish. 3. Add feta cheese and sage. 4. Drizzle with hot honey. 5. Bake until squash is tender. 6. Cook pasta separately. 7. Combine baked ingredients with pasta. 8. Serve warm.

title: Pipe Rigate with Shrimp and Tomato
description: A delightful and quick-to-prepare pasta dish featuring succulent shrimp and fresh tomatoes, elevated with a touch of brandy.
ingredients_text: pipe rigate pasta, shrimp, fresh tomatoes, brandy
instructions_text: 1. Cook pipe rigate pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, sauté shrimp until pink. 3. Add fresh tomatoes and cook until softened. 4. Pour in brandy and let it simmer. 5. Combine cooked pasta with the shrimp and tomato mixture. 6. Season to taste. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Fajita Chicken Mac n Cheese
description: A delicious fusion of fajita flavors with creamy mac and cheese, making a spicy, cheesy delight.
ingredients_text: fajita chicken, macaroni, cheese, spices, cream
instructions_text: 1. Cook macaroni according to package instructions. 2. Sauté fajita chicken with spices until cooked. 3. Mix cooked macaroni with chicken and cheese. 4. Stir in cream for creaminess. 5. Transfer to a baking dish. 6. Bake until golden and bubbly. 7. Let cool slightly before serving. 8. Enjoy your spicy, cheesy delight!

title: One-Pan Creamy Tuscan Pasta with Sausage
description: A delicious and easy-to-make creamy Tuscan pasta dish featuring hot Italian sausage, sun-dried tomatoes, and fresh spinach, all cooked in a single pan!
ingredients_text: hot Italian sausage, sun-dried tomatoes, fresh spinach, pasta
instructions_text: 1. Cook the sausage in a pan until browned. 2. Add sun-dried tomatoes and spinach. 3. Stir in the pasta and enough water to cook. 4. Simmer until pasta is al dente. 5. Add cream and mix well. 6. Cook until creamy. 7. Season to taste. 8. Serve warm.

title: Lemony Asparagus Pasta
description: Bright from lemon and fresh with basil, this easy asparagus pasta recipe from L.A.-based pastaiolo Evan Funke tastes like springtime in Italy.
ingredients_text: pasta, asparagus, lemon, basil, olive oil, garlic, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Blanch asparagus in boiling water. 3. In a pan, heat olive oil and sauté garlic. 4. Add blanched asparagus and cooked pasta. 5. Squeeze lemon juice and add basil. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Toss to combine. 8. Serve warm.

title: Chili Garlic Butter Shrimp
description: Succulent Argentinian Red Shrimp cooked with a deliciously spicy and buttery garlic sauce, perfect when paired with pasta or crusty bread.
ingredients_text: Argentinian Red Shrimp, garlic, butter, chili flakes, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Melt butter in a skillet over medium heat. 2. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. 3. Stir in chili flakes and cook for another minute. 4. Add the shrimp and season with salt and pepper. 5. Cook until shrimp are pink and opaque. 6. Serve hot over pasta or with crusty bread. 7. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired. 8. Enjoy your spicy garlic butter shrimp!

title: Three-Cheese Fusilli with Pink Peppercorns
description: A quick and creamy pasta dish with a blend of three cheeses and a hint of spiciness from pink peppercorns. Perfect for a quick gourmet meal.
ingredients_text: fusilli pasta, three cheeses, pink peppercorns, cream
instructions_text: 1. Boil fusilli pasta until al dente. 2. In a separate pan, melt the three cheeses with cream. 3. Stir in crushed pink peppercorns. 4. Drain pasta and combine with cheese sauce. 5. Mix well until coated. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish with extra peppercorns if desired. 8. Enjoy your gourmet meal.

title: Mini Matilda Chocolate Cake
description: A rich and decadent mini chocolate cake for true chocolate lovers, featuring a hint of espresso to enhance the chocolate flavor and layered with sumptuous chocolate fudge frosting.
ingredients_text: chocolate, espresso, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, chocolate fudge frosting
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the cake pans. 2. Melt chocolate and mix with espresso. 3. Combine flour, sugar, and eggs in a bowl. 4. Add melted chocolate mixture and mix well. 5. Pour batter into pans and bake. 6. Let cakes cool completely. 7. Layer with chocolate fudge frosting. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Baked Spinach and Spicy Mushroom Rigatoni
description: A creamy and spicy pasta bake with spinach and mushrooms, perfect for a cozy dinner.
ingredients_text: rigatoni pasta, spinach, mushrooms, cream, cheese, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook rigatoni until al dente. 3. Sauté mushrooms and spinach. 4. Mix pasta with sautéed vegetables, cream, and cheese. 5. Transfer to a baking dish. 6. Top with more cheese. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Creamy Cheesy Maple Bacon and Broccoli Bucatini
description: A deliciously creamy and cheesy pasta delight, accentuated with maple bacon and fresh broccoli, perfect for a comforting meal.
ingredients_text: bucatini pasta, maple bacon, broccoli, cream, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook bucatini pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, cook maple bacon until crispy. 3. Add chopped broccoli to the pan and sauté. 4. Stir in cream and cheese until melted. 5. Combine the pasta with the creamy mixture. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your creamy cheesy pasta!

title: Marry Me Chicken Soup
description: A delicious and high-protein, low-carb chicken soup that's perfect for a cozy meal during soup season. Easy to make in one pot with seasoned chicken thighs, creamy broth, and low-carb pasta.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, creamy broth, low-carb pasta, seasonings
instructions_text: 1. Season chicken thighs and brown in a pot. 2. Add broth and bring to a simmer. 3. Stir in low-carb pasta. 4. Cook until pasta is tender. 5. Adjust seasoning to taste. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish if desired. 8. Enjoy your cozy meal.

title: Harissa Tzatziki Lentil Bowl
description: An inventive and flavorful bowl featuring Harissa-spiced Tzatziki with roasted sweet potatoes and beets, lentils, cucumber, pistachios, and dill. Perfect for a creative lunch or dinner.
ingredients_text: Harissa, Tzatziki, sweet potatoes, beets, lentils, cucumber, pistachios, dill
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and roast sweet potatoes and beets. 2. Cook lentils according to package instructions. 3. Prepare Harissa-spiced Tzatziki. 4. Chop cucumber and dill. 5. Combine roasted vegetables, lentils, cucumber, and dill in a bowl. 6. Top with Harissa Tzatziki. 7. Sprinkle with pistachios. 8. Serve warm or at room temperature.

title: Sausage Tortellini Soup
description: This lighter take on hearty sausage soups is cozy with chicken sausage, delicate tortellini, fennel, and fresh or frozen vegetables.
ingredients_text: chicken sausage, tortellini, fennel, fresh or frozen vegetables
instructions_text: 1. In a large pot, cook the chicken sausage until browned. 2. Add fennel and sauté until softened. 3. Pour in broth and bring to a simmer. 4. Stir in tortellini and cook until tender. 5. Add fresh or frozen vegetables and cook until heated through. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve hot, garnished with herbs if desired. 8. Enjoy your cozy soup!

title: Spinach Stuffed Shells
description: Creamy, cheesy, meaty, and unbelievably good spinach stuffed shells. A little boujee? Yes. With a lot of flavor, trust me, they’ll disappear fast!
ingredients_text: spinach, stuffed shells, cheese, meat, cream
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the stuffed shells according to package instructions. 3. In a bowl, mix spinach, cheese, and meat. 4. Stuff the shells with the mixture. 5. Place stuffed shells in a baking dish. 6. Pour cream over the shells. 7. Bake until bubbly and golden. 8. Serve hot.

title: Hummingbird Cake
description: This delicious hummingbird cake combines tropical flavors of banana, pineapple, and coconut, with a hint of cinnamon and a crunchy pecan bite. Topped with a rich cream cheese frosting, it's a delightful treat for any occasion.
ingredients_text: banana, pineapple, coconut, cinnamon, pecans, cream cheese frosting
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix mashed bananas, crushed pineapple, and coconut. 3. Add cinnamon and chopped pecans. 4. Combine with flour and sugar. 5. Pour into cake pans. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Cool and frost with cream cheese frosting. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Seabass Crudo with Peach, Apricot, and Verbena Oil
description: A refreshing summertime dish that pairs delicate seabass with the sweetness of peach and apricot, heightened by fragrant verbena oil.
ingredients_text: seabass, peach, apricot, verbena oil
instructions_text: 1. Slice the seabass into thin pieces. 2. Dice the peach and apricot. 3. Drizzle verbena oil over the fish. 4. Arrange the seabass on a plate. 5. Top with diced peach and apricot. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Let it marinate for a few minutes. 8. Serve chilled.

title: Cinnamon Brown Sugar Bars
description: Sweet and delicious cinnamon Brown Sugar Pop-Tart bars made with brown sugar and cinnamon icing.
ingredients_text: brown sugar, cinnamon, icing, flour, butter, egg
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix brown sugar and cinnamon. 3. Prepare the dough with flour and butter. 4. Roll out the dough and cut into bars. 5. Fill with cinnamon mixture. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Prepare icing and drizzle over bars. 8. Allow to cool before serving.

title: High Protein Mango Sticky Rice
description: A macro-friendly version of the classic Thai dessert, mango sticky rice, modified to include high protein for a nutritious breakfast option.
ingredients_text: mango, sticky rice, protein powder, coconut milk, sugar, salt
instructions_text: 1. Cook sticky rice according to package instructions. 2. In a saucepan, heat coconut milk with sugar and salt. 3. Mix in protein powder until well combined. 4. Once rice is cooked, stir in the coconut mixture. 5. Slice mango into thin pieces. 6. Serve sticky rice topped with mango slices. 7. Drizzle with extra coconut milk if desired. 8. Enjoy as a nutritious breakfast or dessert.

title: Chicken Spicy Caesar Schnitzel
description: Crispy chicken schnitzel paired with a spicy twist on Caesar dressing, featuring Calabrian chilies and Parmigiano Reggiano.
ingredients_text: chicken schnitzel, Calabrian chilies, Parmigiano Reggiano, Caesar dressing
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the chicken schnitzel by coating it in breadcrumbs. 2. Heat oil in a frying pan. 3. Fry the schnitzel until golden brown and crispy. 4. In a bowl, mix Caesar dressing with Calabrian chilies. 5. Serve the schnitzel topped with the spicy dressing. 6. Garnish with additional Parmigiano Reggiano. 7. Pair with a side salad if desired. 8. Enjoy your spicy twist on a classic dish.

title: Matcha White Chocolate Pistachio Butter Cups
description: A simple and delightful treat with the rich flavors of matcha and pistachio butter layered within creamy white chocolate.
ingredients_text: matcha powder, white chocolate, pistachio butter
instructions_text: 1. Melt white chocolate in a bowl. 2. Mix in matcha powder until combined. 3. Pour a layer of chocolate into cups. 4. Add a layer of pistachio butter. 5. Top with more white chocolate. 6. Chill until set. 7. Remove from cups. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Lemon Poppyseed Pancakes with Warm Blueberry Syrup
description: Fresh and zesty lemon poppyseed pancakes served with a warm blueberry syrup, perfect for a cozy Sunday brunch.
ingredients_text: pancake mix, lemon zest, poppy seeds, eggs, milk, blueberries, sugar, water
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix pancake mix, lemon zest, and poppy seeds. 2. Add eggs and milk, stir until smooth. 3. Heat a skillet and pour batter to form pancakes. 4. Cook until bubbles form, then flip. 5. For syrup, heat blueberries, sugar, and water until warm. 6. Serve pancakes topped with warm blueberry syrup. 7. Enjoy your cozy brunch! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Sticky Maple Date Oats
description: A deliciously sticky and sweet high-protein oat breakfast with dates and maple syrup to start your day right.
ingredients_text: oats, dates, maple syrup
instructions_text: 1. Cook oats according to package instructions. 2. Stir in chopped dates and maple syrup. 3. Cook for an additional minute until sticky. 4. Serve warm. 5. Optionally, top with nuts or fruits.

title: Fluffy Golden Brown Strawberry Biscuits
description: These fluffy and golden brown strawberry biscuits are delightfully easy to make with just five ingredients. Perfect for anyone starting their cooking journey.
ingredients_text: 5 ingredients
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix the ingredients. 3. Shape the dough into biscuits. 4. Place on a baking sheet. 5. Bake until golden brown. 6. Let cool slightly. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your biscuits.

title: Spinach And Ricotta Lasagne
description: A delicious veggie lasagne with spinach and ricotta, sweet tomato basil sauce, and lots of cheese.
ingredients_text: spinach, ricotta cheese, tomato basil sauce, lasagne sheets, mozzarella cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). 2. Cook spinach until wilted. 3. Mix ricotta with spinach and season. 4. Layer lasagne sheets, spinach mixture, and tomato sauce in a baking dish. 5. Repeat layers, finishing with cheese on top. 6. Bake for 45 minutes until golden. 7. Let cool slightly before serving. 8. Enjoy your delicious lasagne!

title: Carrot Cake Cookies
description: Delight in the flavors of carrot cake in cookie form, complete with a creamy cinnamon frosting and optional walnut decoration.
ingredients_text: carrots, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, baking powder, cinnamon, walnuts, cream cheese, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and cinnamon. 3. In another bowl, cream butter and sugar, then add eggs and grated carrots. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients. 5. Scoop dough onto a baking sheet. 6. Bake for 15-20 minutes. 7. Let cool, then frost with cream cheese frosting. 8. Decorate with walnuts if desired.

title: Whipped Brie Honey Butter Toast
description: A delicious appetizer variation of the viral honey butter toast from Arôme bakery, featuring whipped brie cheese and floral lavender salt for a savory and sweet experience.
ingredients_text: whipped brie cheese, honey, lavender salt, bread
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Whip the brie cheese until smooth. 3. Mix in honey and lavender salt. 4. Spread the mixture on slices of bread. 5. Bake until golden. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy as an appetizer. 8. Garnish if desired.

title: Basil & Scallion Oil Noodles
description: A simple, ten minute bowl of noodles that is fresh, vibrant, and bursting with an intensity of herby flavors.
ingredients_text: noodles, basil, scallions, oil
instructions_text: 1. Boil noodles according to package instructions. 2. Drain and set aside. 3. In a bowl, mix chopped basil and scallions with oil. 4. Combine the noodles with the herb oil. 5. Toss well to coat. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Optionally, garnish with extra herbs. 8. Enjoy your vibrant bowl of noodles.

title: Caramelized Banana and Butter Date Ice Cream
description: A delightful dessert featuring caramelized bananas and butter-fried dates over creamy vanilla ice cream, finished with a hint of olive oil and flaky sea salt.
ingredients_text: bananas, butter, dates, vanilla ice cream, olive oil, flaky sea salt
instructions_text: 1. Caramelize sliced bananas in a pan with butter. 2. Fry chopped dates in butter until golden. 3. Serve vanilla ice cream in bowls. 4. Top with caramelized bananas and fried dates. 5. Drizzle with olive oil. 6. Sprinkle with flaky sea salt. 7. Enjoy immediately.

title: Gambas Al Ajillo
description: A classic Spanish dish featuring juicy shrimp sautéed in garlic and olive oil, with a hint of spice and a touch of sherry.
ingredients_text: shrimp, garlic, olive oil, sherry, spices
instructions_text: 1. Heat olive oil in a pan. 2. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. 3. Add shrimp and cook until pink. 4. Stir in sherry and spices. 5. Cook for an additional minute. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy with bread.

title: Rosemary Garlic Focaccia Muffins
description: Soft on the inside, golden and crispy on the outside, these shareable focaccia muffins topped with a buttery rosemary and garlic topping are the perfect side dish for Thanksgiving dinner.
ingredients_text: focaccia dough, rosemary, garlic, butter, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Prepare muffin tin with cooking spray. 3. Mix melted butter, minced garlic, and chopped rosemary. 4. Fill muffin cups with focaccia dough. 5. Top with garlic-rosemary mixture. 6. Bake for 20 minutes until golden. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm as a side dish.

title: Chewy Pumpkin Cheesecake Cookies
description: A recipe for chewy pumpkin cheesecake cookies, perfect for the Halloween season.
ingredients_text: pumpkin puree, cream cheese, sugar, flour, eggs, vanilla extract, baking powder, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix pumpkin puree and cream cheese until smooth. 3. Add sugar, eggs, and vanilla, mixing well. 4. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and spices. 5. Gradually add dry ingredients to the pumpkin mixture. 6. Drop spoonfuls onto a baking sheet. 7. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until set. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Honey Sriracha Shrimp Rice Bowl
description: A simple yet flavor-packed dish that combines succulent shrimp with a sweet and spicy honey sriracha sauce, fresh cucumbers, and sweet peppers over a bed of rice. Perfect for a quick meal prep or a delicious weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: shrimp, honey, sriracha sauce, cucumbers, sweet peppers, rice
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. In a bowl, mix honey and sriracha sauce. 3. Heat a pan over medium heat and add shrimp. 4. Pour the honey sriracha mixture over the shrimp. 5. Cook until shrimp are pink and cooked through. 6. Slice cucumbers and sweet peppers. 7. Serve shrimp over rice, topped with cucumbers and sweet peppers. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Cinnamon Roll Focaccia
description: A twist on classic focaccia, this cinnamon roll focaccia combines the fluffy texture of focaccia with the gooey sweetness of cinnamon rolls, with half the effort.
ingredients_text: flour, sugar, yeast, cinnamon, butter, eggs, milk, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). 2. Prepare the dough by mixing flour, sugar, yeast, and salt. 3. Add warm milk, melted butter, and eggs; knead until smooth. 4. Roll out the dough and spread cinnamon and sugar mixture. 5. Roll into a log and cut into pieces. 6. Place in a greased baking dish and let rise. 7. Bake for 25-30 minutes until golden. 8. Drizzle with icing before serving.

title: Old-Fashioned Chocolate Donut Holes
description: Delightful chocolate donut holes with a soft, fluffy interior and a crispy exterior, coated with a salted chocolate hazelnut glaze.
ingredients_text: chocolate, flour, sugar, eggs, milk, baking powder, salt, hazelnuts, butter
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the donut dough by mixing dry ingredients. 2. Add wet ingredients and mix until smooth. 3. Shape the dough into small balls. 4. Heat oil in a fryer and fry the donut holes until golden brown. 5. Prepare the salted chocolate hazelnut glaze. 6. Coat the fried donut holes in the glaze. 7. Let them cool slightly. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Sticky Banana Bread Pudding Cake
description: Warm, cozy, and packed with comforting banana-cinnamon flavor. The toffee sauce soaks in and makes every bite melt-in-your-mouth good.
ingredients_text: bananas, bread, eggs, milk, sugar, cinnamon, toffee sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mash bananas and mix with eggs, milk, and sugar. 3. Tear bread into pieces and combine with banana mixture. 4. Add cinnamon and mix well. 5. Pour into a baking dish. 6. Bake until set. 7. Drizzle with toffee sauce. 8. Serve warm.

title: No-Flip Blueberry Oven Pancake
description: A fun and simple no-flip giant pancake loaded with blueberries. It's baked in the oven for a fuss-free breakfast that's perfect for sharing.
ingredients_text: blueberries, flour, eggs, milk, sugar, baking powder, salt, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt. 3. In another bowl, whisk eggs, milk, and sugar. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients. 5. Fold in blueberries. 6. Pour batter into a greased baking dish. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Greek Orange Syrup Cake
description: A luscious Greek orange cake that's drenched in a sweet, aromatic syrup - perfect for dessert lovers looking for something unique.
ingredients_text: oranges, sugar, flour, eggs, baking powder, olive oil, water
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a cake pan. 2. Mix flour and baking powder. 3. In a separate bowl, combine eggs, sugar, and olive oil. 4. Add orange juice and zest to the egg mixture. 5. Gradually incorporate the flour mixture. 6. Pour batter into the pan and bake until golden. 7. Prepare the syrup by boiling sugar and water with orange juice. 8. Drizzle syrup over the cake once cooled.

title: Beef & Chorizo Gnocchi
description: A hearty and flavorful gnocchi dish with a blend of savory beef and spicy chorizo, perfect for comforting meals.
ingredients_text: gnocchi, beef, chorizo, spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook gnocchi according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, brown the beef and chorizo over medium heat. 3. Add spices and mix well. 4. Combine cooked gnocchi with the meat mixture. 5. Stir to coat the gnocchi evenly. 6. Cook for an additional 5 minutes. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your hearty meal!

title: Fish Tacos with Smoked Cod and Fresh Salsa
description: These fish tacos are a delightful blend of smoky, spicy, and zesty flavors featuring smoked cod, creamy avocado, and a refreshing salsa. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: smoked cod, tortillas, avocado, fresh salsa
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the fresh salsa by chopping tomatoes, onions, and cilantro. 2. Grill the smoked cod until heated through. 3. Warm the tortillas on a skillet. 4. Assemble the tacos with smoked cod, avocado, and salsa. 5. Serve immediately with lime wedges. 6. Enjoy your delicious fish tacos! 7. Optionally, add hot sauce for extra spice. 8. Garnish with additional cilantro if desired.

title: Pumpkin Spice Horchata
description: A delicious and refreshing Pumpkin Spice Horchata recipe perfect for the fall season.
ingredients_text: rice, water, cinnamon, sugar, pumpkin puree, vanilla extract, milk
instructions_text: 1. Soak rice in water for several hours. 2. Blend soaked rice with water and cinnamon. 3. Strain the mixture into a pitcher. 4. Stir in sugar, pumpkin puree, and vanilla extract. 5. Add milk and mix well. 6. Chill in the refrigerator. 7. Serve over ice. 8. Garnish with additional cinnamon if desired.

title: Raspberry Danish
description: Delicious Raspberry Danish made with flaky puff pastry, creamy cheese filling, and a fruity raspberry jam. Perfect for breakfast or a sweet treat.
ingredients_text: puff pastry, cream cheese, raspberry jam, sugar, egg, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Roll out puff pastry and cut into squares. 3. Mix cream cheese with sugar and vanilla. 4. Place cheese mixture on pastry squares. 5. Top with raspberry jam. 6. Fold corners of pastry over filling. 7. Brush with egg wash. 8. Bake until golden brown.

title: Salted Chocolate Tart
description: Nigella’s Salted Chocolate Tart. Full credit goes to the domestic goddess herself, @nigellalawson. You can find the full recipe on her website and on YouTube.
ingredients_text: chocolate, butter, sugar, eggs, flour, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Melt chocolate and butter together. 3. Whisk sugar and eggs until fluffy. 4. Combine chocolate mixture with egg mixture. 5. Stir in flour and salt. 6. Pour into tart shell. 7. Bake until set. 8. Cool and serve with a sprinkle of salt.

title: Roasted Cauliflower, Chickpeas & Kale Salad
description: Roasted Cauliflower, Chickpeas & Kale Salad is a delicious and healthy salad packed with skin goodness.
ingredients_text: cauliflower, chickpeas, kale, olive oil, salt, pepper, lemon juice
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Chop cauliflower and kale. 3. Toss cauliflower and chickpeas with olive oil, salt, and pepper. 4. Roast in the oven for 25-30 minutes. 5.
