In a bowl, combine roasted vegetables with kale. 6. Drizzle with lemon juice. 7. Toss to combine. 8. Serve warm or at room temperature.

title: Zesty Tangy Lemon Bars
description: Sweet, tangy, and completely irresistible Lemon Bars with a crumbly crust and a silky lemon filling.
ingredients_text: crust, lemon filling, sugar, butter, eggs, flour, lemon zest
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the crust by mixing ingredients and pressing into a baking dish. 3. Bake the crust until golden. 4. Whisk together lemon filling ingredients. 5. Pour filling over the baked crust. 6. Bake until set. 7. Cool completely. 8. Cut into bars and serve.

title: Chicken Alfredo Garlic Bread
ingredients_text: chicken, fettuccine pasta, Alfredo sauce, garlic bread
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and cook fettuccine. 2. Prepare Alfredo sauce. 3. Cook chicken until golden. 4. Combine chicken and pasta with sauce. 5. Prepare garlic bread. 6. Bake garlic bread until golden. 7. Serve chicken Alfredo with garlic bread. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Strawberry Cold Foam Matcha Latte
description: A delightful Valentine's Day treat with homemade strawberry syrup, refreshing cold foam, and a rich matcha base.
ingredients_text: strawberry syrup, cold foam, matcha, milk
instructions_text: 1. Prepare strawberry syrup by cooking strawberries with sugar. 2. Blend matcha with hot water until smooth. 3. Froth milk to create cold foam. 4. Layer strawberry syrup at the bottom of glasses. 5. Pour matcha over the syrup. 6. Top with cold foam. 7. Serve chilled. 8. Enjoy your refreshing treat!

title: Taiwanese Pineapple Cake
description: A deliciously flaky and caramelized Taiwanese pineapple cake with a sweet and tart homemade pineapple filling, baked to perfection in one pan.
ingredients_text: flour, sugar, butter, eggs, pineapple, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the pineapple filling. 3. Make the dough by mixing flour, sugar, and butter. 4. Roll out the dough and place it in the pan. 5. Fill with pineapple filling. 6. Cover with more dough. 7. Bake until golden brown. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Roasted Feta and Butternut Squash Soup
description: A warm and comforting roasted feta and butternut squash soup, perfect for transitioning to the cozy fall season. Served with crispy feta toast and a drizzle of hot honey for a sweet and savory experience.
ingredients_text: butternut squash, feta cheese, hot honey, bread for toasting
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and roast butternut squash until tender. 2. Roast feta cheese until golden. 3. Blend roasted squash and feta with broth until smooth. 4. Serve soup with crispy feta toast. 5. Drizzle with hot honey. 6. Garnish as desired. 7. Enjoy warm. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Sourdough Carrot Cake Cinnamon Rolls
description: These delightful sourdough carrot cake cinnamon rolls are filled with spices and topped with a luscious brown butter cream cheese frosting. Perfect for Easter morning or any time you crave something sweet and comforting.
ingredients_text: sourdough starter, flour, sugar, carrots, cinnamon, nutmeg, eggs, butter, cream cheese, brown sugar
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the sourdough starter. 2. Mix flour, sugar, and spices. 3. Add grated carrots and eggs. 4. Knead the dough and let it rise. 5. Roll out the dough and spread with butter. 6. Sprinkle with brown sugar and cinnamon. 7. Roll up and cut into pieces. 8. Bake and frost with cream cheese frosting.

title: Cheddar Jalapeño Cornbread
description: This cornbread is so moist and pairs perfectly with some chili. You could also make it into some muffins instead.
ingredients_text: cornmeal, cheddar cheese, jalapeños, eggs, milk, butter, baking powder, sugar, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. In a bowl, mix cornmeal, baking powder, sugar, and salt. 3. In another bowl, whisk eggs, milk, and melted butter. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients, then fold in cheese and jalapeños. 5. Pour batter into a greased baking dish. 6. Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden. 7. Let cool slightly before slicing. 8. Serve warm with chili.

title: Fried Squash Blossoms with Goat's-Milk Gouda
description: Squash blossoms, filled with a rich and creamy mixture of ricotta and goat's-milk Gouda, are lightly fried to golden perfection for a seasonal delight.
ingredients_text: squash blossoms, ricotta, goat's-milk Gouda, oil for frying
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the filling by mixing ricotta and goat's-milk Gouda. 2. Stuff each squash blossom with the cheese mixture. 3. Heat oil in a frying pan. 4. Carefully fry the stuffed blossoms until golden. 5. Drain on paper towels. 6. Serve warm. 7. Optionally, garnish with herbs. 8. Enjoy as a seasonal appetizer.

title: Sugar Cookie Rice Krispies
description: A festive twist on a classic treat, these sugar cookie rice krispies are perfect for the holiday season.
ingredients_text: Rice Krispies, sugar, butter, marshmallows, vanilla extract, sprinkles
instructions_text: 1. Melt butter and marshmallows in a pot. 2. Stir in vanilla extract. 3. Add Rice Krispies and mix well. 4. Press mixture into a greased pan. 5. Allow to cool. 6. Cut into squares. 7. Decorate with sprinkles. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Cinnamon Roll Date Cake
description: This cake tastes exactly like a gooey, warm cinnamon bun, complete with icing drizzled on top. It's gluten-free, dairy-free, and ready in a fraction of the time it takes to make traditional cinnamon rolls.
ingredients_text: dates, gluten-free flour, cinnamon, sugar, eggs, coconut oil, vanilla extract, baking powder, icing sugar
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix dates, gluten-free flour, cinnamon, and sugar. 3. Add eggs, melted coconut oil, and vanilla extract. 4. Stir in baking powder. 5. Pour batter into a greased cake pan. 6. Bake for 50 minutes or until golden. 7. Let cool, then drizzle with icing sugar. 8. Serve warm and enjoy.

title: No-Bake Mango Cheesecake
description: A creamy and luscious no-bake mango cheesecake, perfect for a summer dessert. Made with a buttery biscuit base, a smooth mango-infused cream cheese filling, and topped with mango jelly.
ingredients_text: buttery biscuits, cream cheese, mango puree, mango jelly
instructions_text: 1. Crush the buttery biscuits and press into a base. 2. Mix cream cheese with mango puree until smooth. 3. Pour the mango mixture over the biscuit base. 4. Chill in the refrigerator until set. 5. Prepare mango jelly and pour over the cheesecake. 6. Chill again until the jelly is firm. 7. Slice and serve chilled. 8. Enjoy your refreshing dessert!

title: Easy Ginger Peach Galette
description: Beyond delicious, so incredibly easy, and always comes out of the oven looking pretty...a summer delicacy!
ingredients_text: peaches, ginger, sugar, flour, butter, salt, water
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the dough with flour, butter, and salt. 3. Roll out the dough and place it on a baking sheet. 4. Slice peaches and mix with ginger and sugar. 5. Arrange peach mixture on the dough. 6. Fold the edges of the dough over the peaches. 7. Bake until golden brown. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Garlic-Paprika Shrimp Skillet
description: A delicious one-pan meal featuring sauteed shrimp in a garlicky paprika cream sauce with red pepper, shallots, fresh spinach, and a hint of lemon. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: shrimp, garlic, paprika, red pepper, shallots, fresh spinach, lemon
instructions_text: 1. Heat a skillet over medium heat. 2. Add garlic and shallots, sauté until fragrant. 3. Stir in red pepper and cook until soft. 4. Add shrimp and paprika, cook until shrimp is pink. 5. Pour in cream and mix well. 6. Add fresh spinach and cook until wilted. 7. Squeeze lemon juice over the dish. 8. Serve warm.

title: Maple Pecan Tart with Sea Salt
description: A decadent tart filled with a gooey maple pecan filling and topped with a hint of sea salt for a balance of flavors.
ingredients_text: maple syrup, pecans, sea salt, tart crust ingredients
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the tart crust and press it into a tart pan. 3. In a bowl, mix maple syrup, chopped pecans, and sea salt. 4. Pour the filling into the crust. 5. Bake until set. 6. Let cool before serving. 7. Slice and serve. 8. Enjoy your tart.

title: Healthy Carrot Cake Donuts
description: Enjoy these soft and flavorful carrot cake donuts that are a healthier alternative to your traditional favorite.
ingredients_text: carrots, flour, sugar, eggs, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, vanilla extract, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix flour, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt. 3. In another bowl, whisk eggs and sugar until fluffy. 4. Stir in grated carrots and vanilla extract. 5. Combine wet and dry ingredients until just mixed. 6. Pour batter into donut molds. 7. Bake for 20 minutes. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Best Fruit Combo Peach Blueberry Crumble Cake
description: A delightful crumble cake combining the sweet flavors of peach and blueberry. Perfect for a dessert or sweet indulgence.
ingredients_text: peaches, blueberries, flour, sugar, butter, eggs, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the crumble topping. 3. Mix the cake batter. 4. Fold in the fruits. 5. Pour batter into a baking dish. 6. Top with crumble. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Sunday-Style Pancakes
description: A fixture on menus across the city, these New York-style pancakes range from fluffy mile-high stacks to Dutch babies and thick old-school griddle cakes. These Sunday-style flapjacks are light-as-air, drowned in syrup, and finished with whipped salted honey butter with a distinctive crisp edge.
ingredients_text: pancake mix, eggs, milk, syrup, whipped salted honey butter
instructions_text: 1. Prepare pancake mix according to package instructions. 2. Heat a griddle over medium heat. 3. Pour batter onto the griddle to form pancakes. 4. Cook until bubbles form, then flip and cook until golden. 5. Serve pancakes stacked high. 6. Drizzle with syrup. 7. Top with whipped salted honey butter. 8. Enjoy your fluffy pancakes.

title: Raspberry Shortbread Cookie Bars
description: These buttery Raspberry Shortbread Cookie Bars have a sweet, homemade raspberry filling and a cream cheese frosting. They’re baked with pantry & fridge-friendly ingredients like fresh raspberries, butter, sugar, lemon, and vanilla. An easy treat everyone will love.
ingredients_text: fresh raspberries, butter, sugar, lemon, vanilla, cream cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the shortbread crust. 3. Spread the raspberry filling over the crust. 4. Bake until golden. 5. Allow to cool. 6. Prepare cream cheese frosting. 7. Frost the cooled bars. 8. Cut into squares and serve.

title: Crispy Gnocchi Caesar Salad
description: A tasty Caesar salad with crispy air fryer gnocchi instead of croutons.
ingredients_text: gnocchi, romaine lettuce, Caesar dressing, parmesan cheese, black pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook gnocchi in the air fryer until crispy. 2. Chop romaine lettuce. 3. In a bowl, combine lettuce, crispy gnocchi, and Caesar dressing. 4. Toss to mix well. 5. Top with parmesan cheese. 6. Season with black pepper. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your crispy gnocchi Caesar salad.

title: Toasted Orzo Chicken Soup
description: A comforting and heartwarming chicken soup with toasted orzo and a drizzle of Aunt Lily's Chili Oil for a kick of flavor. It comes together in just over 30 minutes, making it perfect for a cozy meal.
ingredients_text: toasted orzo, chicken, Aunt Lily's Chili Oil
instructions_text: 1. Toast orzo in a pot until golden. 2. Add chicken and water, bring to a boil. 3. Simmer until chicken is cooked. 4. Shred chicken and return to pot. 5. Stir in Aunt Lily's Chili Oil. 6. Season to taste. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your comforting soup.

title: Mongolian Beef with Glass Noodles
description: A better-for-you version of Mongolian beef paired with gluten-free Korean style glass noodles. This dish is saucy, delicious, and perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: beef, gluten-free Korean style glass noodles, sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook glass noodles according to package instructions. 2. Slice beef thinly. 3. In a pan, heat oil and stir-fry beef until browned. 4. Add sauce and simmer until thickened. 5. Combine beef with cooked glass noodles. 6. Toss to coat noodles in sauce. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Easy Strawberry Tiramisu
description: No-bake, creamy, and berry-filled, a yummy summer treat that requires very little effort...a great make-head party dessert!
ingredients_text: strawberries, mascarpone cheese, ladyfinger cookies, sugar, coffee, cocoa powder
instructions_text: 1. Brew coffee and let it cool. 2. Slice strawberries and set aside. 3. In a bowl, mix mascarpone cheese and sugar. 4. Dip ladyfingers in coffee and layer in a dish. 5. Spread mascarpone mixture over ladyfingers. 6. Add a layer of strawberries. 7. Repeat layers until ingredients are used. 8. Chill before serving.

title: Cottage Cheese Eggs
description: These are the fluffiest, high-protein scrambled eggs you'll ever taste! Made with cottage cheese, they provide a creamy texture and a whopping 26 grams of protein per serving.
ingredients_text: cottage cheese, eggs
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, whisk together eggs and cottage cheese. 2. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. 3. Pour the egg mixture into the skillet. 4. Stir gently with a spatula as the eggs begin to set. 5. Cook until fluffy and fully cooked, about 5-7 minutes. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your high-protein scrambled eggs!

title: Hong Kong-inspired Mini French Toast
description: Crispy on the outside, soft and fluffy on the inside mini French toasts made with King's Hawaiian Original Sweet Rolls, filled with peanut butter, and topped with sweet condensed milk.
ingredients_text: King's Hawaiian Original Sweet Rolls, peanut butter, sweet condensed milk
instructions_text: 1. Cut the sweet rolls in half. 2. Spread peanut butter on each half. 3. Press the halves together. 4. Dip in egg mixture. 5. Fry until golden brown. 6. Drizzle with sweet condensed milk. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your mini French toasts!

title: Pancakes & Berry Compote Yoghurt
description: A protein-rich breakfast option featuring fluffy pancakes topped with a tangy berry compote and creamy Greek yoghurt.
ingredients_text: pancake mix, eggs, milk, berries, sugar, Greek yoghurt
instructions_text: 1. Prepare pancake batter using pancake mix, eggs, and milk. 2. Heat a non-stick skillet and pour batter to form pancakes. 3. Cook until bubbles form, then flip and cook until golden. 4. In a saucepan, combine berries and sugar to make compote. 5. Cook until berries soften. 6. Serve pancakes topped with berry compote and Greek yoghurt. 7. Enjoy your protein-rich breakfast!

title: Brie, Fig Butter & Caramelized Onion Puff-Pastries
description: Delicious puff pastries filled with brie cheese, fig butter and caramelized onions, seasoned with paprika, maldon salt and fresh thyme. Optional additions include prosciutto, salami, bacon bits, and sun dried tomatoes.
ingredients_text: puff pastry, brie cheese, fig butter, caramelized onions, paprika, maldon salt, fresh thyme, optional: prosciutto, salami, bacon bits, sun dried tomatoes
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Roll out the puff pastry. 3. Spread fig butter on the pastry. 4. Add brie cheese and caramelized onions. 5. Season with paprika and salt. 6. Fold and seal the pastry. 7. Bake until golden brown. 8. Serve warm.

title: Matcha Strawberry Cookies
description: Deliciously soft cookies infused with a hint of matcha and studded with white chocolate and freeze-dried strawberries, perfect for tea time.
ingredients_text: matcha powder, white chocolate, freeze-dried strawberries, flour, sugar, butter, eggs, baking powder
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, cream together butter and sugar. 3. Add eggs and mix well. 4. Stir in matcha powder and dry ingredients. 5. Fold in white chocolate and strawberries. 6. Scoop dough onto a baking sheet. 7. Bake for 12-15 minutes. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Peach Cobbler with Homemade Cream Cheese Ice Cream
description: Experience the delightful flavors of summer with this peach cobbler topped with a golden crust and served with luscious homemade cream cheese ice cream.
ingredients_text: peaches, sugar, flour, butter, cream cheese, eggs, vanilla extract, baking powder, milk
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the peach filling with sugar and flour. 3. Make the cobbler crust with butter, flour, and baking powder. 4. Layer the peaches in a baking dish. 5. Pour the crust over the peaches. 6. Bake until golden brown. 7. For ice cream, mix cream cheese, sugar, and milk. 8. Freeze until set and serve with cobbler.

title: Creamy Pierogi Chicken Soup with Rosemary Bacon Bits
description: Made all in one pot...if your night could use some warming soup, this should be it!
ingredients_text: chicken, pierogi, bacon, rosemary, cream, broth, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook bacon until crispy, then remove and set aside. 2. In the same pot, sauté vegetables until soft. 3. Add chicken and cook until browned. 4. Stir in broth and bring to a boil. 5. Add pierogi and cook until tender. 6. Stir in cream and season to taste. 7. Serve hot, topped with bacon bits. 8. Enjoy your warming soup!

title: Creamy Butternut Squash Sage Pesto Soup
description: A comforting soup with delicious fall flavors. Equally great for dinner as it is a Thanksgiving side!
ingredients_text: butternut squash, sage, pesto, vegetable broth, cream, garlic, onion, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Roast butternut squash until tender. 2. Sauté garlic and onion in a pot. 3. Add roasted squash and vegetable broth. 4. Blend until smooth. 5. Stir in cream and pesto. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Heat through. 8. Serve warm.

title: Easy Spicy Broccoli Cheddar Potato Soup
description: Made with everything you'd load into your favorite baked potato plus the addition of broccoli...perfect to warm up to!
ingredients_text: broccoli, cheddar cheese, potatoes, onion, garlic, vegetable broth, milk, salt, pepper, spices
instructions_text: 1. Boil potatoes until tender. 2. Sauté onion and garlic until fragrant. 3. Add broccoli and cook until bright green. 4. Combine potatoes, broth, and sautéed mixture in a blender. 5. Blend until smooth. 6. Stir in cheese and milk. 7. Season with salt, pepper, and spices. 8. Serve warm.

title: White Lasagna Soup
description: This creamy veggie-loaded soup is perfect for a cozy night. Packed with flavors, it feels indulgent yet it's light and super satisfying.
ingredients_text: various vegetables, lasagna noodles, cream, cheese, vegetable broth, spices
instructions_text: 1. Sauté vegetables in a pot. 2. Add vegetable broth and bring to a boil. 3. Stir in lasagna noodles and cook until tender. 4. Mix in cream and cheese until melted. 5. Season with spices. 6. Simmer for a few minutes. 7. Serve hot. 8. Garnish with additional cheese if desired.

title: Creamy Tuscan Tortellini Soup
description: A warm and comforting soup perfect for the chilly days, filled with cheese tortellini, sundried tomatoes, fresh kale, and a creamy base.
ingredients_text: cheese tortellini, sundried tomatoes, fresh kale, creamy base
instructions_text: 1. Cook cheese tortellini according to package instructions. 2. In a pot, combine sundried tomatoes and kale. 3. Add the creamy base and stir well. 4. Bring to a simmer. 5. Add cooked tortellini to the pot. 6. Stir to combine and heat through. 7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 8. Serve warm.

title: Creamy Thai Carrot Sweet Potato Soup
description: Not only is this soup incredibly delicious, it's also so easy to make, and ahh, there's not even an ounce of cream!
ingredients_text: carrots, sweet potatoes, vegetable broth, garlic, onion, ginger, coconut milk, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Peel and chop carrots and sweet potatoes. 2. In a pot, sauté garlic, onion, and ginger. 3. Add carrots and sweet potatoes, then pour in vegetable broth. 4. Bring to a boil and simmer until tender. 5. Blend the mixture until smooth. 6. Stir in coconut milk and season with salt and pepper. 7. Heat through and adjust seasoning if needed. 8. Serve warm.

title: Strawberry Jam Cookies
description: Delicious and chewy cookies infused with a touch of lemon and filled with strawberry jam—perfect for a hint of spring warmth.
ingredients_text: strawberry jam, lemon zest, flour, sugar, butter, eggs, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, cream together butter and sugar. 3. Add eggs and lemon zest, mixing well. 4. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. 5. Gradually add dry ingredients to wet mixture. 6. Scoop dough onto a baking sheet and create a small well in the center. 7. Fill each well with strawberry jam. 8. Bake for 13 minutes or until golden brown.

title: Baked French Toast
description: A deliciously indulgent baked French toast soaked in cinnamon-spiced custard, perfect for a special breakfast or brunch.
ingredients_text: bread, eggs, milk, sugar, cinnamon, vanilla extract, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Whisk together eggs, milk, sugar, cinnamon, and vanilla. 3. Arrange bread slices in a baking dish. 4. Pour the custard mixture over the bread. 5. Let it soak for 30 minutes. 6. Dot with butter and bake for 45 minutes. 7. Serve warm, optionally with syrup. 8. Enjoy your indulgent breakfast!

title: Hash Browns & Yoghurt Bowl
description: Crispy homemade hash browns paired with a fresh yoghurt bowl for a balanced and hearty breakfast.
ingredients_text: potatoes, salt, pepper, oil, yoghurt
instructions_text: 1. Grate the potatoes and squeeze out excess moisture. 2. Season with salt and pepper. 3. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. 4. Form potato mixture into patties and fry until golden brown. 5. In a bowl, serve crispy hash browns with fresh yoghurt. 6. Garnish with herbs if desired. 7. Enjoy your hearty breakfast! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Pizza Cottage Cheese Toast
description: A viral sensation, this Pizza Cottage Cheese Toast combines crispy sourdough with creamy cottage cheese and flavorful marinara.
ingredients_text: sourdough bread, cottage cheese, marinara sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Toast the sourdough bread until crispy. 3. Spread cottage cheese on the toast. 4. Top with marinara sauce. 5. Bake until heated through. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your pizza cottage cheese toast.

title: Tropical Mango Date Cottage Cheese Bowl
description: A refreshing and creamy combination of cottage cheese with tropical mango, sweet dates, and the zing of lime. Perfect for breakfast or a light snack with a high protein content.
ingredients_text: cottage cheese, mango, dates, lime
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, combine cottage cheese with diced mango. 2. Chop dates and add to the mixture. 3. Squeeze lime juice over the top. 4. Gently mix until well combined. 5. Serve immediately or chill for a refreshing snack.

title: Lemon Blueberry Ricotta Loaf
description: This lemon blueberry ricotta loaf is the perfect complement to an afternoon cup of coffee or tea, with a light and fluffy texture thanks to its ricotta base.
ingredients_text: ricotta cheese, blueberries, lemon zest, flour, sugar, eggs, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix ricotta cheese, sugar, and lemon zest. 3. Add eggs and mix until smooth. 4. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. 5. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet mixture. 6. Fold in blueberries gently. 7. Pour the batter into a loaf pan. 8. Bake for 60 minutes or until golden and a toothpick comes out clean.

title: Strawberry Banana Bread Oatmeal Cookies
description: A super soft and chewy strawberry banana bread oatmeal cookies perfect for the holiday season
ingredients_text: strawberries, bananas, oatmeal, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, baking powder, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mash bananas and mix with strawberries. 3. Combine dry ingredients in a bowl. 4. Mix wet ingredients with the fruit. 5. Combine wet and dry mixtures. 6. Scoop onto a baking sheet. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Boozy Rice Pudding with Amaro Soaked Raisins
description: A rich and creamy rice pudding enhanced with spices and the delightful aroma of amaro-soaked raisins. A nostalgic dessert with a boozy touch.
ingredients_text: rice, milk, sugar, spices, amaro-soaked raisins
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice in milk until tender. 2. Stir in sugar and spices. 3. Soak raisins in amaro. 4. Mix soaked raisins into the pudding. 5. Simmer until creamy. 6. Serve warm or chilled. 7. Garnish with additional raisins if desired. 8. Enjoy your boozy dessert.

title: Classic Banana Pudding
description: This creamy, nostalgic dessert layers sweet vanilla pudding, fresh bananas, and buttery vanilla wafers for the ultimate comfort food treat.
ingredients_text: vanilla pudding, fresh bananas, buttery vanilla wafers
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the vanilla pudding according to package instructions. 2. Slice the fresh bananas. 3. In a serving dish, layer the vanilla wafers, followed by a layer of pudding and sliced bananas. 4. Repeat the layers until all ingredients are used. 5. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours. 6. Serve chilled. 7. Optionally, top with whipped cream before serving. 8. Enjoy your classic banana pudding!

title: Lemon-Chile Calamari Pasta
description: A handful of pantry staples and fresh calamari pieces make this quick weeknight dinner taste like a sunny, seaside Italian vacation—any time of year.
ingredients_text: calamari, pasta, lemon, chili, garlic, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat olive oil and sauté garlic. 3. Add calamari and cook until tender. 4. Stir in lemon juice and chili. 5. Combine cooked pasta with the calamari mixture. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve warm. 8. Garnish with lemon zest if desired.

title: Passion Fruit Slices
description: A delicious passion fruit slice dessert with a biscuit and coconut base, topped with a passion fruit and condensed milk mixture.
ingredients_text: biscuit base, coconut, passion fruit, condensed milk
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the biscuit and coconut base. 3. Mix passion fruit with condensed milk. 4. Pour the mixture over the base. 5. Bake until set. 6. Cool completely. 7. Slice into pieces. 8. Serve chilled.

title: Blackberry, Walnut, and Ricotta Toast
description: A delightful toast featuring sweet and tangy blackberries, creamy ricotta, and crunchy walnuts, garnished with fresh mint leaves. Perfect for a quick sweet snack or breakfast.
ingredients_text: blackberries, ricotta cheese, walnuts, bread, fresh mint leaves
instructions_text: 1. Toast the bread slices until golden. 2. Spread ricotta cheese on each slice. 3. Top with fresh blackberries. 4. Sprinkle chopped walnuts over the blackberries. 5. Garnish with fresh mint leaves. 6. Drizzle with honey if desired. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy as a quick breakfast or snack.

title: BLT Caesar Pasta Salad
description: There isn't a better dish to make on hot nights when you want something a little more filling than just a salad.
ingredients_text: pasta, bacon, romaine lettuce, Caesar dressing, Parmesan cheese, croutons
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta, chopped bacon, and romaine lettuce. 3. Drizzle with Caesar dressing and toss to combine. 4. Add grated Parmesan cheese and croutons. 5. Toss gently to mix all ingredients. 6. Serve immediately or chill for later. 7. Garnish with additional cheese if desired. 8. Enjoy your refreshing pasta salad!

title: Chicken Piccata
description: A classic and elegant dish with tender chicken breasts covered in a rich, lemony sauce, brimming with briny capers and sun-dried tomatoes over angel hair pasta.
ingredients_text: chicken breasts, lemon, capers, sun-dried tomatoes, angel hair pasta
instructions_text: 1. Cook angel hair pasta according to package instructions. 2. Season chicken breasts with salt and pepper. 3. Pan-fry chicken in a skillet until golden brown. 4. Remove chicken and add lemon juice, capers, and sun-dried tomatoes to the skillet. 5. Simmer sauce until slightly thickened. 6. Return chicken to the skillet, coating with sauce. 7. Serve chicken over pasta, drizzling with remaining sauce. 8. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.

title: Creamy, Cheesy, Maple Bacon and Broccoli Bucatini
description: A deliciously creamy pasta dish featuring maple bacon and broccoli for a hint of healthiness.
ingredients_text: bucatini pasta, maple bacon, broccoli, cream, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook bucatini pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, cook maple bacon until crispy. 3. Add broccoli to the pan and sauté until tender. 4. Stir in cream and cheese until melted. 5. Combine cooked pasta with the sauce. 6. Mix well to coat the pasta. 7. Serve hot, garnished with extra cheese if desired. 8. Enjoy your creamy, cheesy dish.

title: Pasta With Creamy Mushroom Ragù
description: This weeknight-friendly recipe for vegetarian mushroom ragù turns out a rich, tomato-y sauce that tastes like it simmered for hours.
ingredients_text: pasta, mushrooms, tomatoes, cream, garlic, onion, olive oil, herbs, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Sauté onions and garlic in olive oil. 3. Add mushrooms and cook until soft. 4. Stir in tomatoes and herbs, simmer for 10 minutes. 5. Add cream and mix well. 6. Combine sauce with cooked pasta. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve warm.

title: Mediterranean Pasta Salad with Chicken Thigh
description: A refreshing Mediterranean-inspired pasta salad featuring succulent grilled chicken thighs, fresh vegetables, feta cheese, and a tangy dressing. Perfect for a light yet satisfying meal.
ingredients_text: pasta, chicken thighs, fresh vegetables, feta cheese, dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Grill chicken thighs until cooked through. 3. Chop fresh vegetables. 4. In a bowl, combine pasta, grilled chicken, vegetables, and feta cheese. 5. Drizzle with dressing and toss to combine. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad!

title: Pumpkin Pasta Alla Vodka
description: The sauce is creamy, with warming notes of pumpkin and sage mixed with nuttiness from the parmesan...it's my favorite combo!
ingredients_text: pumpkin, sage, parmesan, pasta, cream, vodka
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, sauté pumpkin and sage until soft. 3. Add cream and vodka, stirring to combine. 4. Mix in parmesan until melted. 5. Toss cooked pasta with the sauce. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve warm. 8. Garnish with extra parmesan if desired.

title: Broccoli Burrata Pasta Salad
description: Broccoli Burrata Pasta Salad: Simple to toss together and super flavorful...perfect for serving at your next backyard dinner!
ingredients_text: broccoli, burrata cheese, pasta, olive oil, salt, pepper, lemon juice
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Blanch broccoli in boiling water for 2 minutes. 3. Drain and rinse pasta and broccoli under cold water. 4. In a large bowl, combine pasta, broccoli, and burrata. 5. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve immediately or chill before serving.

title: Halloumi Breakfast Bowl with Roasted Potatoes & Tomatoes
description: Indulge in a sophisticated brunch experience at home with this Halloumi Breakfast Bowl. Enjoy the crispy textures of fried halloumi and roasted potatoes, the juiciness of charred tomatoes, and the creamy comfort of soft scrambled eggs. A sprinkling of Aleppo pepper and fresh herbs ties it all together beautifully.
ingredients_text: halloumi, potatoes, tomatoes, eggs, Aleppo pepper, fresh herbs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast potatoes until golden. 2. Fry halloumi until crispy. 3. Char tomatoes in the same pan. 4. Scramble eggs until soft. 5. Assemble the bowl with halloumi, potatoes, tomatoes, and eggs. 6. Sprinkle with Aleppo pepper and herbs. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your brunch!

title: Creamy Sun-Dried Tomato Chicken Pasta
description: A delightful and creamy pasta dish with chicken, sun-dried tomatoes, and a rich sauce, perfect for warming up on a winter evening.
ingredients_text: pasta, chicken, sun-dried tomatoes, cream, garlic, parmesan cheese, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, sauté garlic until fragrant. 3. Add chicken and cook until browned. 4. Stir in sun-dried tomatoes and cream. 5. Mix in cooked pasta and parmesan cheese. 6. Season with herbs, salt, and pepper. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your creamy dish!

title: Crispy Parmesan Sweet Potato Harvest Salad
description: A vibrant harvest salad featuring crispy parmesan sweet potato croutons, tossed with kale, apples, garbanzo beans, chicken, and more, all in a creamy maple Dijon dressing.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, parmesan cheese, kale, apples, garbanzo beans, chicken, maple syrup, Dijon mustard, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking sheet. 2. Cut sweet potatoes into cubes and toss with olive oil and parmesan. 3. Bake sweet potatoes until crispy. 4. In a large bowl, combine kale, apples, and garbanzo beans. 5. Add cooked chicken and crispy sweet potatoes. 6. Whisk together maple syrup and Dijon mustard for dressing. 7. Drizzle dressing over salad and toss to combine. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Creamy Squash and Sage Beans
description: A perfect warm and cozy dish with creamy squash and sage-flavored butter beans, perfect for colder weather.
ingredients_text: squash, sage, butter beans
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the squash by peeling and chopping it. 2. Boil the squash until tender. 3. In a separate pan, melt butter and add sage. 4. Add the cooked squash and butter beans to the pan. 5. Stir to combine and heat through. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your cozy dish!

title: Italian Sandwich with Sundried Tomato Pesto
description: A delightful Italian sandwich that combines the flavors of sundried tomato pesto, basil pesto, sopresatta, and stracciatella cheese.
ingredients_text: sundried tomato pesto, basil pesto, sopresatta, stracciatella cheese
instructions_text: 1. Spread sundried tomato pesto on one slice of bread. 2. Spread basil pesto on another slice. 3. Layer sopresatta on the pesto side of one slice. 4. Add stracciatella cheese on top of the sopresatta. 5. Close the sandwich with the other slice of bread. 6. Press down gently. 7. Cut the sandwich in half. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Peruvian Inspired Chicken and Rice Bowl
description: A flavorful dish with marinated chicken thighs, jasmine rice, a zesty cilantro jalapeño sauce, and a refreshing cucumber salad.
ingredients_text: marinated chicken thighs, jasmine rice, cilantro jalapeño sauce, cucumber salad
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken thighs in spices and lime juice. 2. Cook jasmine rice according to package instructions. 3. Grill or pan-sear the marinated chicken until cooked through. 4. Prepare the cilantro jalapeño sauce by blending ingredients. 5. Toss cucumber salad with lime and salt. 6. Assemble the bowl with rice, chicken, sauce, and salad. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your flavorful meal!

title: Herby Chicken Meatball Bowl
description: A flavorful bowl featuring herby chicken meatballs, parmesan roasted chickpeas, roasted sweet potatoes, kale, and a yogurt-based healthy dressing. Perfect for meal prep or a hearty dinner with leftovers.
ingredients_text: herby chicken meatballs, parmesan roasted chickpeas, roasted sweet potatoes, kale, yogurt-based dressing
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare chicken meatballs with herbs. 3. Roast chickpeas with parmesan. 4. Roast sweet potatoes until tender. 5. Sauté kale until wilted. 6. Assemble the bowl with meatballs, chickpeas, sweet potatoes, and kale. 7. Drizzle with yogurt dressing. 8. Serve warm or store for meal prep.

title: Garlic Butter Baked Salmon In Lemony Parmesan Cream
description: Perfect for when you’re craving something a little fancier, but need something quick and easy to prepare!
ingredients_text: salmon fillets, garlic, butter, lemon juice, parmesan cheese, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). 2. In a bowl, mix melted butter, minced garlic, lemon juice, and parmesan. 3. Place salmon fillets on a baking sheet. 4. Pour the garlic butter mixture over the salmon. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Bake for 15-20 minutes until cooked through. 7. Serve with lemon wedges. 8. Enjoy your fancy yet easy meal!

title: Grandma Blanche's Polish Pierogi
description: Traditional Polish pierogi filled with mint mashed potatoes, crafted from Grandma Blanche's legacy recipe finally put into words by her granddaughter.
ingredients_text: mint, mashed potatoes, pierogi dough
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the pierogi dough. 2. Make mint mashed potatoes. 3. Fill dough with potato mixture. 4. Seal the pierogi. 5. Boil pierogi until they float. 6. Optionally fry in butter for crispiness. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy with sour cream.

title: Gluten-Free Fall Pizza
description: A delightful gluten-free fall pizza featuring a crisp almond flour crust topped with roasted sweet potatoes, kale, red onion, and cheese. Finished with a drizzle of hot honey for a perfect sweet and savory combination.
ingredients_text: almond flour crust, roasted sweet potatoes, kale, red onion, cheese, hot honey
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the almond flour crust. 3. Roast sweet potatoes until tender. 4. Sauté kale and red onion. 5. Assemble the pizza with crust, veggies, and cheese. 6. Bake until cheese is melted. 7. Drizzle with hot honey. 8. Slice and serve warm.

title: High Protein Creamy Tomato and Basil Beans
description: A quick and hearty meal featuring creamy tomato and basil beans, packed with over 30 grams of plant protein.
ingredients_text: creamy tomato sauce, basil, beans
instructions_text: 1. Heat the creamy tomato sauce in a pot. 2. Add the beans and stir well. 3. Incorporate fresh basil. 4. Simmer for 10 minutes. 5. Season to taste. 6. Serve hot. 7. Enjoy your hearty meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Cuban Sandwich
description: A classic Cuban sandwich with layers of roast pork, ham, Swiss cheese, pickles, and mustard, all grilled to perfection.
ingredients_text: roast pork, ham, Swiss cheese, pickles, mustard
instructions_text: 1. Layer roast pork, ham, Swiss cheese, and pickles on bread. 2. Spread mustard on the other slice of bread. 3. Close the sandwich. 4. Preheat the grill. 5. Grill the sandwich until golden brown and cheese melts. 6. Press down with a weight for even grilling. 7. Remove from grill and let cool slightly. 8. Slice and serve.

title: Dense Bean Green Goddess Salad
description: A nutrient-rich, bean-based salad featuring an array of fresh vegetables, S&W white beans and chickpeas, and a creamy green dressing packed with herbs. Perfect for meal prep, this salad improves in flavor as it sits.
ingredients_text: S&W white beans, chickpeas, fresh vegetables, creamy green dressing, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Rinse and drain the beans and chickpeas. 2. Chop the fresh vegetables. 3. In a bowl, combine beans, chickpeas, and vegetables. 4. Prepare the creamy green dressing with herbs. 5. Pour the dressing over the salad. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Let sit for flavors to meld. 8. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

title: Pepper Cucumber Salad over Cottage Cheese
description: A refreshing and protein-packed snack with sliced mini peppers and cucumbers tossed in vibrant chili crisp oil and ginger sesame dressing, served over creamy cottage cheese.
ingredients_text: sliced mini peppers, cucumbers, chili crisp oil, ginger sesame dressing, cottage cheese
instructions_text: 1. Slice mini peppers and cucumbers. 2. In a bowl, combine peppers and cucumbers. 3. Drizzle with chili crisp oil and ginger sesame dressing. 4. Toss to coat evenly. 5. Serve over a bed of cottage cheese. 6. Enjoy as a refreshing snack. 7. Optionally, garnish with sesame seeds. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Chicken Shawarma Crispy Rice Salad
description: This Chicken Shawarma Crispy Rice Salad combines Middle Eastern flavors with a modern twist, bringing together savory chicken shawarma, crunchy crispy rice, and a refreshing lemon-tahini dressing, perfect for meal prep or a satisfying meal.
ingredients_text: chicken, rice, tahini, lemon, spices, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook the rice according to package instructions. 2. Season chicken with shawarma spices and cook until done. 3. Prepare the lemon-tahini dressing. 4. Mix crispy rice with cooked chicken and vegetables. 5. Drizzle with dressing. 6. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 7. Garnish with herbs if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal prep salad.

title: Broiled Salmon Tostadas with Jalapeño Ranch
description: An easy and flavorful dinner with flaky broiled salmon, fresh cabbage, and a homemade jalapeño ranch that adds a zesty twist.
ingredients_text: flaky broiled salmon, fresh cabbage, jalapeño ranch
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the broiler. 2. Season the salmon and place it on a baking sheet. 3. Broil the salmon for about 10 minutes until flaky. 4. Prepare the jalapeño ranch dressing. 5. Chop the fresh cabbage. 6. Assemble the tostadas with salmon, cabbage, and ranch. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your flavorful dinner!

title: Boursin Chicken Meatballs with Cheesy Asparagus Orzo
description: Deliciously moist chicken meatballs with Boursin cheese, brightened with lemon zest and fresh basil, served alongside creamy cheesy asparagus orzo made in one pot.
ingredients_text: chicken, Boursin cheese, lemon zest, fresh basil, asparagus, orzo, cream
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven. 2. Mix chicken, Boursin, lemon zest, and basil. 3. Form into meatballs. 4. Bake meatballs until cooked. 5. Cook orzo in one pot with asparagus. 6. Stir in cream and cheese. 7. Serve meatballs over orzo. 8. Garnish with basil.

title: Egg Sandwich with Greek Yogurt and Avocado
description: A delicious and creamy egg sandwich with a refreshing Greek yogurt dressing, topped with avocado and cheese.
ingredients_text: eggs, Greek yogurt, avocado, cheese, bread
instructions_text: 1. Boil the eggs until hard. 2. Mash the avocado in a bowl. 3. Mix Greek yogurt with salt and pepper. 4. Spread yogurt on bread. 5. Layer sliced eggs, avocado, and cheese. 6. Top with another slice of bread. 7. Cut sandwich in half. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Shepherd's Pie
description: A classic comforting shepherd's pie with savory ground beef and a deliciously creamy mashed potato topping, perfect for cold days.
ingredients_text: ground beef, mashed potatoes, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the ground beef with seasoning until browned. 3. Prepare creamy mashed potatoes. 4. Layer the beef in a baking dish. 5. Spread mashed potatoes on top. 6. Bake until golden brown. 7. Let it cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Roasted Broccoli Salad with Miso-Caesar Dressing
description: A warm, savory salad perfect for cooler months featuring roasted broccoli, bacon, shallots, panko breadcrumbs, and a flavorful miso-caesar dressing.
ingredients_text: roasted broccoli, bacon, shallots, panko breadcrumbs, miso-caesar dressing
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast broccoli until tender. 2. Cook bacon until crispy. 3. Sauté shallots until translucent. 4. Combine roasted broccoli, bacon, and shallots in a bowl. 5. Add panko breadcrumbs. 6. Drizzle with miso-caesar dressing. 7. Toss to combine. 8. Serve warm.

title: Charred Corn, Avocado and Quinoa Salad
description: A delightful and refreshing salad with charred corn, creamy avocado, and fluffy quinoa, brought together with a zesty lime and jalapeño dressing. Perfect for a summer meal or as a side dish.
ingredients_text: charred corn, avocado, quinoa, lime, jalapeño
instructions_text: 1. Grill the corn until charred. 2. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 3. Dice the avocado. 4. In a bowl, combine corn, quinoa, and avocado. 5. Whisk lime juice and minced jalapeño for dressing. 6. Pour dressing over salad and toss gently. 7. Season with salt to taste. 8. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

title: Parmesan Chicken and Mash
description: A truly delicious weeknight dinner featuring garlicky parmesan sauce over crispy chicken thighs paired with a buttery mash.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, garlic, parmesan cheese, butter, potatoes, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Season chicken thighs with salt and pepper. 3. Sear chicken in a pan until crispy. 4. Prepare garlic parmesan sauce and pour over chicken. 5. Bake chicken until cooked through. 6. Boil potatoes until tender. 7. Mash potatoes with butter, salt, and pepper. 8. Serve chicken over mash.

title: Teriyaki Salmon Rice Bowls
description: Delicious and nutrient-dense salmon teriyaki bowls with a variety of veggies over a base of farro. Perfect for a filling and satisfying meal.
ingredients_text: salmon, teriyaki sauce, farro, assorted veggies
instructions_text: 1. Cook farro according to package instructions. 2. Preheat oven and bake salmon with teriyaki sauce. 3. Sauté assorted veggies in a pan. 4. Assemble bowls with farro, salmon, and veggies. 5. Drizzle extra teriyaki sauce on top. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your nutrient-dense meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: One Pot Fall Quinoa with Chicken Sausage
description: A comforting one-pot meal featuring browned chicken sausage, sweet potatoes, quinoa, and kale with a touch of goat cheese. Perfect for a fall weeknight dinner that's easy and nutritious.
ingredients_text: chicken sausage, sweet potatoes, quinoa, kale, goat cheese
instructions_text: 1. Brown the chicken sausage in a pot. 2. Add diced sweet potatoes and cook until tender. 3. Stir in quinoa and water, bring to a boil. 4. Reduce heat and simmer until quinoa is cooked. 5. Add kale and cook until wilted. 6. Stir in goat cheese until melted. 7. Season to taste. 8. Serve warm.

title: Garlic-Coconut Shrimp and Green Beans
description: Every stir-fry needs a star to keep you coming back. In this speedy shrimp recipe, it’s a crispy coconut and garlic topping you’ll want to eat by the spoonful.
ingredients_text: shrimp, green beans, garlic, coconut, oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. 2. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. 3. Toss in shrimp and cook until pink. 4. Add green beans and stir-fry until tender. 5. Mix in shredded coconut and cook until golden. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your crispy coconut shrimp!

title: Salmon Tacos with Avocado Crema
description: These fully-loaded fish tacos feature smoky-sweet spice-rubbed salmon, a simple avocado-jalapeño cream, pickled red onion, and shredded cabbage for crunch. Nutritious and brimming with bold, fresh flavors.
ingredients_text: salmon, avocado, jalapeño, red onion, cabbage, spices, tortillas
instructions_text: 1. Rub salmon with spices and grill until cooked. 2. Blend avocado and jalapeño to make crema. 3. Pickle red onion in vinegar. 4. Shred cabbage. 5. Warm tortillas. 6. Assemble tacos with salmon, crema, onion, and cabbage. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your flavorful tacos.

title: Honey BBQ Chicken and Potatoes
description: A delightful dish of honey BBQ chicken combined with crispy roasted potatoes and melted mozzarella cheese, perfect for an easy weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: honey, BBQ sauce, chicken, potatoes, mozzarella cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Coat chicken with honey BBQ sauce. 3. Cut potatoes and season. 4. Arrange chicken and potatoes on a baking sheet. 5. Roast in the oven until cooked. 6. Add mozzarella cheese on top. 7. Bake until cheese melts. 8. Serve warm.

title: Biscoff Ice Cream Sandwich
description: Delightful ice cream sandwiches with a creamy mascarpone-infused center, wrapped in a crunchy Biscoff cookie layer and a touch of dulce de leche.
ingredients_text: Biscoff cookies, mascarpone cheese, dulce de leche, ice cream
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking sheet. 2. Mix mascarpone cheese with dulce de leche. 3. Spread the mixture between two Biscoff cookies. 4. Freeze the sandwiches until firm. 5. Serve chilled and enjoy.

title: Salmon Tart with Scallion Caper Cream Cheese
description: An easy and impressive tart packed with seasonal vegetables, hot smoked salmon, and a delightful scallion caper cream cheese spread, perfect for Easter breakfast, brunch, or lunch.
ingredients_text: hot smoked salmon, seasonal vegetables, scallion, caper, cream cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the tart crust. 2. Spread cream cheese mixture on the crust. 3. Layer with hot smoked salmon and seasonal vegetables. 4. Bake until golden. 5. Let cool slightly before slicing. 6. Serve warm or at room temperature. 7. Garnish with additional scallions if desired. 8. Enjoy for brunch or lunch.

title: Creamy Salmon Soup
description: A comforting Finnish salmon soup that captures the essence of home. Creamy, rich, and finished with fresh dill and a hint of lemon, this delightful dish is crafted in under 30 minutes.
ingredients_text: salmon, cream, dill, lemon, potatoes, onions, carrots, broth
instructions_text: 1. In a pot, sauté onions and carrots until soft. 2. Add diced potatoes and broth, simmer until potatoes are tender. 3. Stir in cream and bring to a gentle boil. 4. Add salmon pieces and cook until just done. 5. Season with dill and lemon juice. 6. Adjust seasoning to taste. 7. Serve hot. 8. Garnish with fresh dill.

title: Japanese Strawberry and Cream Milk Bread Sandwich
description: A delightful fruit sandwich featuring the softest milk bread, pillowy whipped cream, and perfectly ripe strawberries. Inspired by Japan’s incredible creation, it’s a high-reward, simple delight.
ingredients_text: milk bread, whipped cream, strawberries
instructions_text: 1. Slice the milk bread into even pieces. 2. Whip the cream until soft peaks form. 3. Spread whipped cream on one slice of bread. 4. Layer sliced strawberries on top of the cream. 5. Top with another slice of bread. 6. Repeat for remaining sandwiches. 7. Cut sandwiches into halves or quarters. 8. Serve immediately or chill before serving.

title: Garlic Shrimp & Halloumi Salad with Peach Basil Vinaigrette
description: This refreshing and flavorful salad combines garlic shrimp and grilled halloumi with a creamy peach basil vinaigrette, offering a tasty yet healthy meal option.
ingredients_text: garlic shrimp, grilled halloumi, peach basil vinaigrette
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the garlic shrimp by sautéing in a pan. 2. Grill the halloumi until golden. 3. Make the peach basil vinaigrette by blending peaches and basil. 4. Combine the shrimp and halloumi in a bowl. 5. Drizzle with vinaigrette. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad.

title: Salmon Caesar Salad with Basil Tahini Dressing
description: A vibrant and textured spring salad with blackened salmon, sugar snap peas, radishes, and a unique basil tahini Caesar dressing.
ingredients_text: blackened salmon, sugar snap peas, radishes, basil tahini dressing
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the basil tahini dressing. 2. Blacken the salmon on a grill. 3. Blanch sugar snap peas. 4. Slice radishes. 5. Assemble salad with salmon, peas, and radishes. 6. Drizzle with dressing. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve immediately.

title: High-Protein Chicken Edamame Salad
description: A refreshing and crunchy high-protein salad combining cabbage, quinoa, cashews, apple, edamame beans, and shredded chicken, all tossed in a creamy chili yogurt dressing.
ingredients_text: cabbage, quinoa, cashews, apple, edamame beans, shredded chicken, creamy chili yogurt dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 2. Shred the cabbage and chop the apple. 3. In a bowl, combine quinoa, cabbage, apple, edamame, and cashews. 4. Add shredded chicken to the mixture. 5. In a separate bowl, mix the creamy chili yogurt dressing. 6. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss well. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad!

title: Chili, Garlic & Herb Chicken Skewers
description: The simplest, most flavorful chicken skewers made with easy pantry staples. Cook them up in the oven for a quick and delicious meal that's perfect for weekdays or meal prep, served with rice and veggies or a salad.
ingredients_text: chicken, chili, garlic, herbs, rice, veggies, salad
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Marinate chicken with chili, garlic, and herbs. 3. Thread chicken onto skewers. 4. Place skewers on a baking tray. 5. Bake in the oven for 20 minutes. 6. Serve with rice and veggies or salad. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Air-fryer King Salmon with Edamame Quinoa Salad
description: A delicious and nourishing high protein meal featuring air-fried king salmon accompanied by a vibrant edamame quinoa salad tossed in a maple vinaigrette.
ingredients_text: king salmon, edamame, quinoa, maple vinaigrette
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the air fryer. 2. Season the king salmon. 3. Air-fry the salmon until cooked through. 4. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 5. Mix edamame and quinoa in a bowl. 6. Toss with maple vinaigrette. 7. Serve salmon on top of the salad. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Whipped Feta with Roasted Potatoes and Tomatoes
description: A delightful side dish or appetizer featuring creamy whipped feta, roasted potatoes, and sweet roasted tomatoes. Topped with fresh parsley and chili-infused olive oil for the perfect blend of flavors.
ingredients_text: whipped feta, roasted potatoes, roasted tomatoes, fresh parsley, chili-infused olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Cut potatoes into cubes and toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper. 3. Spread potatoes on a baking sheet and roast for 25 minutes. 4. Add halved tomatoes to the baking sheet and roast for an additional 15 minutes. 5. In a bowl, whip feta until creamy. 6. Serve whipped feta topped with roasted potatoes and tomatoes. 7. Drizzle with chili-infused olive oil. 8. Garnish with fresh parsley before serving.

title: Tuscan White Bean Kale Salad
description: A refreshing and nourishing salad featuring kale, beans, sun-dried tomatoes, and artichokes dressed with a zesty lemon walnut gremolata. Perfect for a healthy meal that is simple yet addictive.
ingredients_text: kale, white beans, sun-dried tomatoes, artichokes, lemon, walnuts
instructions_text: 1. Rinse and chop the kale. 2. Combine kale, beans, sun-dried tomatoes, and artichokes in a bowl. 3. In a separate bowl, mix lemon juice and chopped walnuts to make the gremolata. 4. Pour the gremolata over the salad. 5. Toss everything together until well combined. 6. Let it sit for a few minutes to meld flavors. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad!

title: Hummus with Seared New York Strip
description: This homemade hummus is light and fluffy, made with dried garbanzo beans for an authentic Mediterranean flavor. Serve with seared New York strip steak for a high protein, low carb dinner.
ingredients_text: dried garbanzo beans, New York strip steak
instructions_text: 1. Soak garbanzo beans overnight. 2. Boil beans until tender. 3. Blend beans with tahini, lemon juice, and garlic until smooth. 4. Season hummus with salt and olive oil. 5. Sear New York strip steak in a hot pan. 6. Let steak rest before slicing. 7. Serve hummus with sliced steak on top. 8. Garnish with olive oil and herbs.

title: Green Bean Stir-Fry with Tender Beef
description: A flavorful stir-fry dish combining tender beef with green beans and bold Peruvian flavors, perfect for a hearty meal.
ingredients_text: tender beef, green beans, bold Peruvian spices
instructions_text: 1. Slice the beef into thin strips. 2. Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat. 3. Add the beef and stir-fry until browned. 4. Add green beans and continue to stir-fry. 5. Season with Peruvian spices. 6. Cook until beans are tender. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your hearty meal.

title: Sun-Warmed Tomato Sandwich
description: This sandwich is the epitome of summer simplicity. Using fresh, sun-warmed tomatoes makes a world of difference and creates a truly authentic experience.
ingredients_text: fresh tomatoes, bread, salt, pepper, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Slice the fresh tomatoes. 2. Toast the bread lightly. 3. Drizzle olive oil on the bread. 4. Layer the sliced tomatoes on the bread. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Optionally, add herbs. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your fresh sandwich.

title: Hot Honey Mustard & Feta Chopped Chicken Salad
description: A delightful combination of chopped vegetables, roasted chickpeas, sautéed chicken, fresh herbs, avocado, and feta, all tossed in a hot honey mustard dressing. This salad is perfect for a healthy and delicious meal that will boost your energy and mood.
ingredients_text: chopped vegetables, roasted chickpeas, sautéed chicken, fresh herbs, avocado, feta, hot honey mustard dressing
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast chickpeas until crispy. 2. Sauté chicken in a pan until cooked through. 3. Chop vegetables and herbs. 4. In a bowl, combine roasted chickpeas, sautéed chicken, vegetables, herbs, and avocado. 5. Crumble feta over the salad. 6. Drizzle with hot honey mustard dressing. 7. Toss everything together gently. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Chili Crunch Honey Chicken Bowls
description: These Chili Crunch Honey Chicken Bowls are quick, easy, and packed with sweet and spicy flavors. Serve with a refreshing pineapple salsa over a bed of rice for a complete meal.
ingredients_text: chicken, chili crunch, honey, rice, pineapple, salsa
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat chili crunch and honey. 3. Add chicken and cook until browned. 4. Prepare pineapple salsa. 5. Serve chicken over rice. 6. Top with pineapple salsa. 7. Drizzle with extra honey if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Pan-Seared Octopus with Golden Potatoes
description: A beautifully seared octopus served with golden, aromatic potatoes cooked with garlic and onions, showcasing the delightful flavors of the sea.
ingredients_text: octopus, golden potatoes, garlic, onions
instructions_text: 1. Clean and prepare the octopus. 2. Boil the potatoes until tender. 3. Sauté garlic and onions in a pan. 4. Add the boiled potatoes and sear until golden. 5. In another pan, sear the octopus until crispy. 6. Combine the octopus with the potatoes. 7. Season to taste. 8. Serve hot.

title: Creamy Lemon and Garlic Butter Beans with Roasted Zucchini
description: These creamy lemon and garlic butter beans with roasted zucchini and fresh basil are perfect for anyone who claims not to like beans. Packed with fiber and plant-based protein, this dish is a simple, quick, and delicious way to change their minds.
ingredients_text: butter beans, zucchini, garlic, lemon, fresh basil
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast zucchini until tender. 2. In a pan, sauté garlic in olive oil. 3. Add butter beans and lemon juice to the pan. 4. Stir in fresh basil. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Serve the creamy beans with roasted zucchini. 7. Garnish with additional basil if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Lemon Pepper Chicken Sandwich
description: A delightful chicken sandwich with crispy lemon pepper chicken, fresh cucumber salad, and a creamy spread, all nestled in a ciabatta baguette.
ingredients_text: crispy lemon pepper chicken, fresh cucumber salad, creamy spread, ciabatta baguette
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the lemon pepper chicken by seasoning and frying until crispy. 2. Slice the ciabatta baguette. 3. Mix the fresh cucumber salad. 4. Spread the creamy sauce on the baguette. 5. Layer the crispy chicken and cucumber salad inside the baguette. 6. Close the sandwich and cut in half. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your delicious sandwich!

title: One Pot Chicken Adobo
description: A savory and tangy Filipino dish, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner. It combines chicken with a flavorful soy sauce and vinegar marinade, cooked all in one pot.
ingredients_text: chicken, soy sauce, vinegar
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in soy sauce and vinegar. 2. Heat oil in a pot. 3. Add marinated chicken and cook until browned. 4. Pour in remaining marinade. 5. Simmer until chicken is cooked through. 6. Adjust seasoning to taste. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Harissa Salmon Traybake
description: A vibrant and easy-to-make harissa salmon traybake packed with nutritious roasted vegetables and a homemade rocket pesto, perfect for busy weekdays.
ingredients_text: harissa, salmon, assorted vegetables, rocket, olive oil, nuts
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Coat salmon with harissa. 3. Arrange vegetables on a tray. 4. Place salmon on top of vegetables. 5. Bake for 40 minutes. 6. Prepare rocket pesto. 7. Serve salmon with roasted vegetables and pesto. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Chicken Nourish Bowl
description: A quick and nutritious chicken nourish bowl that's packed with protein and flavor, perfect for a healthy lunch.
ingredients_text: chicken breast, mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, quinoa, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 2. Grill or boil chicken until fully cooked. 3. Chop mixed greens, cherry tomatoes, and cucumber. 4. In a bowl, combine quinoa, greens, tomatoes, and cucumber. 5. Slice chicken and place on top. 6. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Spicy Tomatoey Shrimp & Beans
description: An affordable yet flavorful dish that’s easy to whip up using shrimp and pantry staples, inspired by comforting family recipes.
ingredients_text: shrimp, beans, tomatoes, spices, pantry staples
instructions_text: 1. Heat oil in a pan. 2. Sauté shrimp until pink. 3. Add beans and tomatoes. 4. Season with spices. 5. Simmer for 10 minutes. 6. Stir occasionally. 7. Adjust seasoning to taste. 8. Serve warm.

title: Honey Glazed Salmon with Mango Avocado Salsa
description: These Honey Glazed Salmon bowls deliver a fresh and easy meal that's both healthy and full of flavor with creamy mango avocado salsa on a bed of rice.
ingredients_text: salmon fillets, honey, mango, avocado, rice, lime, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat grill. 2. Season salmon with salt and pepper. 3. Brush honey on salmon. 4. Grill salmon for 6-8 minutes. 5. Dice mango and avocado. 6. Mix mango, avocado, lime juice, salt. 7. Serve salmon on rice topped with salsa. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Olive Oil Sweet Potato Cake
description: A moist, tender cake naturally sweetened with maple syrup, enhanced by olive oil and mashed sweet potatoes. This gluten-free and dairy-free treat is perfect for a cozy dessert.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, maple syrup, olive oil, flour, baking powder, salt, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Mash the sweet potatoes in a bowl. 3. In another bowl, mix olive oil and maple syrup. 4. Combine the wet and dry ingredients. 5. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan. 6. Bake for 60 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean. 7. Let cool before serving. 8. Enjoy your sweet potato cake!

title: Maple, Ginger & Thyme Sweet Potatoes & Squash with Italian Sausage
description: A delightful bowl dish combining the rich flavors of maple syrup, ginger, and thyme with roasted sweet potatoes, squash, and savory Italian sausage. Perfect for entertaining or a cozy weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, squash, Italian sausage, maple syrup, ginger, thyme
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Peel and chop sweet potatoes and squash. 3. In a bowl, mix sweet potatoes, squash, maple syrup, ginger, and thyme. 4. Spread mixture on a baking sheet. 5. Add Italian sausage on top. 6. Roast in the oven for 45-60 minutes. 7. Stir halfway through cooking. 8. Serve warm.

title: Lemon-Aid Pizza Sandwich
description: A delightful fusion of pizza and sandwich, featuring homemade pesto, burrata, prosciutto, and a refreshing zest of lemon.
ingredients_text: homemade pesto, burrata, prosciutto, lemon
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Spread homemade pesto on bread. 3. Layer burrata and prosciutto. 4. Squeeze lemon juice over the top. 5. Close the sandwich. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Slice and serve warm. 8. Enjoy your fusion delight!

title: Thick & Fudgy Biscoff Blondies
description: Thick and fudgy blondies made with Biscoff spread
ingredients_text: Biscoff spread, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix Biscoff spread and butter until smooth. 3. Add sugar and eggs, mix well. 4. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt. 5. Fold dry ingredients into wet mixture. 6. Pour into a baking dish. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Let cool before slicing.

title: Sheet-Pan Chicken Souvlaki
description: Tender, juicy chicken skewers are possible in the oven—especially when roasted alongside spiced chickpeas and finished with fresh tomatoes and salty feta. These are flavored with the souvlaki heavy hitters (garlic, oregano, and lemon) and are ideal when served alongside a pile of fluffy pita.
ingredients_text: chicken, chickpeas, garlic, oregano, lemon, tomatoes, feta, pita
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Marinate chicken with garlic, oregano, and lemon. 3. Spread spiced chickpeas on a sheet pan. 4. Add marinated chicken to the pan. 5. Roast until chicken is cooked through. 6. Add fresh tomatoes and feta. 7. Serve with pita. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Chocolate Pecan Cinnamon Rolls
description: Rich, decadent, and perfectly soft cinnamon rolls loaded with chocolate, pecans, and cinnamon flavor.
ingredients_text: cinnamon rolls, chocolate, pecans, cinnamon
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the dough for cinnamon rolls. 2. Mix in chocolate and pecans. 3. Roll out the dough and shape into rolls. 4. Allow to rise. 5. Bake until golden brown. 6. Prepare icing if desired. 7. Drizzle icing over warm rolls. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Fritos Cowboy Cabbage
description: A crunchy and flavorful salad featuring tricolored coleslaw, a variety of fresh vegetables, and Fritos, all topped with a zesty chipotle-lime dressing. Optional steak adds protein to this vibrant dish.
ingredients_text: tricolored coleslaw, fresh vegetables, Fritos, chipotle-lime dressing, optional steak
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the tricolored coleslaw. 2. Chop fresh vegetables. 3. In a large bowl, combine coleslaw and vegetables. 4. Add Fritos to the mixture. 5. Drizzle with chipotle-lime dressing. 6. Toss to combine. 7. If using, slice and add optional steak. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Esquire Pasta Salad
description: Esquire Pasta salad 🌽 makes the perfect side dish this summer 🙌🏽
ingredients_text: pasta, corn, beans, dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Drain and rinse under cold water. 3. In a bowl, combine pasta, corn, and beans. 4. Prepare dressing and mix with salad. 5. Chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes. 6. Serve as a side dish. 7. Enjoy your refreshing salad! 8. Store leftovers in an airtight container.

title: A Perfect Thanksgiving Marg
description: A perfect Thanksgiving margarita with a blend of cinnamon syrup, fresh lime juice, pumpkin purée, apple cider, orange liqueur, Reposado tequila, and a rim of brown sugar and sea salt.
ingredients_text: cinnamon syrup, fresh lime juice, pumpkin purée, apple cider, orange liqueur, Reposado tequila, brown sugar, sea salt
instructions_text: 1. Rim the glass with brown sugar and sea salt. 2. In a shaker, combine cinnamon syrup, lime juice, pumpkin purée, apple cider, orange liqueur, and tequila. 3. Fill the shaker with ice. 4. Shake well until chilled. 5. Strain into the prepared glass. 6. Garnish as desired. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your festive margarita!

title: Brazilian Steak Crostinis
description: Brazilian Steak Crostinis is a delicious appetizer that combines the flavors of Picanha steak, Brazilian Steak Seasoning, and a homemade chimichurri sauce served on toasted baguette slices.
ingredients_text: Picanha steak, Brazilian Steak Seasoning, homemade chimichurri sauce, baguette slices
instructions_text: 1. Season the Picanha steak with Brazilian Steak Seasoning. 2. Grill the steak to desired doneness. 3. Prepare the chimichurri sauce. 4. Toast baguette slices until golden. 5. Slice the grilled steak thinly. 6. Assemble crostinis with steak and chimichurri on baguette. 7. Serve warm as an appetizer. 8. Enjoy with friends and family.

title: Raspberry White Chocolate Baked Oats
description: These delightful raspberry white chocolate baked oats store well and are packed with high protein and gut-friendly ingredients. Perfect for staying on track with your nutritional goals.
ingredients_text: oats, raspberries, white chocolate, milk, eggs, sweetener, baking powder, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix oats, baking powder, and sweetener. 3. In another bowl, whisk eggs, milk, and vanilla. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients, then fold in raspberries and white chocolate. 5. Pour mixture into a baking dish. 6. Bake for 25 minutes until set. 7. Let cool slightly before serving. 8. Enjoy warm or store for later.

title: Rice Pudding With Caramel Cream And Almond Praline
description: Rice pudding lightened with whipped cream and paired with a mousse-like whipped caramel and caramelized nuts. It can be made ahead for convenience and served with almond praline or chopped toasted nuts.
ingredients_text: rice, whipped cream, caramel, nuts, sugar
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice until tender. 2. Whip cream and fold into rice. 3. Prepare caramel sauce. 4. Caramelize nuts. 5. Combine rice pudding with caramel. 6. Serve with almond praline or chopped nuts. 7. Chill before serving. 8. Enjoy your dessert.

title: Chocolate Chip Pull-Apart Bread
description: This pretty layered loaf is fun to pull apart and reveals the softest, fluffiest yeasted bread filled with mini chocolate chips.
ingredients_text: yeast, flour, sugar, salt, butter, milk, mini chocolate chips
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the dough by mixing yeast, flour, sugar, and salt. 2. Add melted butter and warm milk, knead until smooth. 3. Let the dough rise until doubled in size. 4. Roll out the dough and sprinkle mini chocolate chips. 5. Cut into strips and stack them. 6. Place in a loaf pan and let rise again. 7. Bake until golden brown. 8. Allow to cool before pulling apart.

title: Butter Oat Corn Cookies
description: These crispy-edged, chewy center corn cookies are the perfect balance of salty and sweet. Brown butter toasts down with oats and chopped corn kernels, infusing the batter with summer corn flavor and the perfect chewy texture.
ingredients_text: butter, oats, corn kernels, sugar, flour, baking soda, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Brown the butter in a saucepan. 3. In a bowl, mix oats, flour, baking soda, and salt. 4. Combine brown butter and sugar, then add the dry ingredients. 5. Fold in chopped corn kernels. 6. Scoop dough onto a baking sheet. 7. Bake for 12-15 minutes until golden. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Spicy Mexican Street Shrimp
description: Deliciously spicy Mexican street shrimp with zesty lime and flavorful chipotle adobo sauce, perfect for an appetizer or main dish. Garnished with cilantro, crema, cotija cheese, and lime wedges for an extra burst of flavor.
ingredients_text: shrimp, chipotle adobo sauce, lime, cilantro, crema, cotija cheese, lime wedges
instructions_text: 1. Marinate shrimp in chipotle adobo sauce and lime juice. 2. Preheat grill. 3. Grill shrimp for 2-3 minutes on each side until cooked. 4. Remove from grill and garnish with cilantro, crema, and cotija cheese. 5. Serve with lime wedges. 6. Enjoy as an appetizer or main dish.

title: Peach Cobbler With Drop Biscuit Dough
description: This Peach Cobbler is filled with a perfect blend of sweet and spiced peaches that are topped with All-Purpose Drop Biscuit Dough and served with a splash of heavy cream. The deliciousness of this recipe lies in the warm, rich feeling it brings with each bite.
ingredients_text: peaches, sugar, cinnamon, all-purpose flour, baking powder, salt, heavy cream
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the peaches with sugar and spices. 3. Make the drop biscuit dough. 4. Layer the peaches in a baking dish. 5. Top with the biscuit dough. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Serve warm with heavy cream. 8. Enjoy your dessert.

title: Rosemary Pork Al Forno
description: Rosemary Pork al Forno is a delightful Italian dish combining succulent pork shoulder with aromatic rosemary, robust red wine, and a rich chicken stock, finished with a flavorful sauce.
ingredients_text: pork shoulder, rosemary, red wine, chicken stock, sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Season the pork shoulder with rosemary. 3. Sear the pork in a hot pan. 4. Deglaze with red wine. 5. Add chicken stock and bring to a simmer. 6. Transfer to the oven and roast for 180 minutes. 7. Prepare the sauce with the drippings. 8. Serve the pork with the sauce.

title: Summer Balsamic Steak & Peach Salad
description: A flavorful and healthy summer salad. Savor the goodness of juicy peaches, tender steak and mixed greens accentuated with a homemade tomato cucumber salad and a lemon balsamic dressing.
ingredients_text: juicy peaches, tender steak, mixed greens, homemade tomato cucumber salad, lemon balsamic dressing
instructions_text: 1. Grill the steak to desired doneness. 2. Slice the peaches. 3. Prepare the mixed greens. 4. Make the tomato cucumber salad. 5. Whisk together lemon balsamic dressing. 6. Combine all ingredients in a bowl. 7. Drizzle with dressing. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Best Copycat Starbucks Spinach, Feta & Egg White Wrap Recipe
description: Make your favorite quick and easy Starbucks breakfast at home with this copycat Starbucks spinach, feta & egg white wrap recipe.
ingredients_text: spinach, feta cheese, egg whites, wrap
instructions_text: 1. Sauté spinach until wilted. 2. Whisk egg whites and cook in a pan. 3. Add feta to the cooked egg whites. 4. Place the spinach and egg mixture in a wrap. 5. Roll the wrap tightly. 6. Heat the wrap in a skillet until golden. 7. Slice in half and serve. 8. Enjoy your homemade wrap.

title: Easy And Delicious Chicken Salad
description: This recipe for an easy and delicious chicken salad is quick to make and perfect for a light lunch. A delightful blend of cooked chicken, chili crisp, mayo, scallions, sesame seeds, sugar, and a pinch of garlic powder makes this salad a taste sensation. The added seaweed for serving gives an unforgettable twist to this simple dish. Enjoy making this recipe and don't hesitate to adjust the sugar to your preference.
ingredients_text: cooked chicken, chili crisp, mayo, scallions, sesame seeds, sugar, garlic powder, seaweed
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, combine cooked chicken, chili crisp, mayo, scallions, sesame seeds, sugar, and garlic powder. 2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly coated. 3. Adjust sugar to taste. 4. Serve on a bed of seaweed. 5. Enjoy your delicious chicken salad! 6. Store leftovers in the refrigerator. 7. Serve chilled for best flavor. 8. Garnish with extra sesame seeds if desired.

title: Brussels Sprout Salad With Bacon, Pecans, Apples And Cranberries
description: A classic salad recipe that is perfect for holiday parties. It's easy to make and travels well. Just add the dressing later!
ingredients_text: Brussels sprouts, bacon, pecans, apples, cranberries, dressing
instructions_text: 1. Shred Brussels sprouts. 2. Cook bacon until crispy. 3. Chop apples and pecans. 4. Mix Brussels sprouts, bacon, apples, and pecans in a bowl. 5. Add cranberries. 6. Prepare dressing separately. 7. Toss salad with dressing before serving. 8. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

title: Croissant Sausage & Apple Stuffing
description: A delicious stuffing made with croissants, sausage, and apple.
ingredients_text: croissants, sausage, apple
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Tear croissants into pieces. 3. Cook sausage until browned. 4. Mix croissants, sausage, and diced apple in a bowl. 5. Transfer mixture to a baking dish. 6. Bake until golden and heated through. 7. Let cool slightly before serving. 8. Enjoy your stuffing as a side dish.

title: Olive Oil Lemon Curd Cake
description: A gluten-free and dairy-free lemon olive oil cake topped with cocowhip and an olive oil based lemon curd.
ingredients_text: olive oil, lemon juice, lemon zest, cocowhip, sugar, gluten-free flour, eggs, baking powder
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the baking pan. 2. Mix olive oil, sugar, and eggs until smooth. 3. Add lemon juice and zest, mix well. 4. Combine gluten-free flour and baking powder, then fold into the wet mixture. 5. Pour batter into the pan and bake until golden. 6. Prepare lemon curd with olive oil. 7. Let the cake cool, then top with cocowhip and lemon curd. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Double Chocolate Banana Bread
ingredients_text: bananas, flour, cocoa powder, sugar, eggs, butter, baking soda, salt, chocolate chips
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mash the bananas. 3. Mix in melted butter, sugar, and eggs. 4. Combine flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and salt. 5. Fold dry ingredients into the wet mixture. 6. Stir in chocolate chips. 7. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan. 8. Bake for 60 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean.

title: Caramelized Onion Pistachio Chickpea Pasta
description: CARAMELIZED ONION PISTACHIO CHICKPEA PASTA 🧅 Inspired by cavatellino con ceci @lalopa in Matera, Italy. This pasta combines the sweetness of caramelized onions with the nutty texture of pistachios and the creaminess of chickpeas, all wrapped up in a silky pasta dish.
ingredients_text: pasta, caramelized onions, pistachios, chickpeas
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, caramelize onions until golden. 3. Add chickpeas and pistachios to the pan. 4. Combine cooked pasta with the onion mixture. 5. Stir well to coat. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Egg Chiffon Rice
description: A simple and comforting recipe for Egg Chiffon Rice using eggs, onion, and your choice of protein, topped with a delicious savory sauce.
ingredients_text: eggs, onion, choice of protein, savory sauce
