instructions_text: 1. Cook the chosen protein in a pan. 2. Sauté onions until translucent. 3. Beat the eggs in a bowl. 4. Pour eggs into the pan with onions and protein. 5. Stir gently until eggs are cooked. 6. Prepare the savory sauce. 7. Serve the egg chiffon over rice. 8. Drizzle with sauce and enjoy.

title: Crisped Chicken With Tomatoes And Shallot Sofrito
description: This is one of Max's best recipes from summers past. It's a simple, delicious summer dish that features a sofrito base perfect for additional recipes such as pasta, stew, or even swordfish. Ideal for a summer meal with family or friends.
ingredients_text: chicken, tomatoes, shallots, sofrito base
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the sofrito base with shallots and tomatoes. 3. Season the chicken. 4. Sear the chicken in a pan. 5. Add the sofrito to the pan. 6. Transfer to the oven to finish cooking. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy with family or friends.

title: Creamy Baked Eggs
description: A simple and delicious recipe for creamy baked eggs. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
ingredients_text: eggs, cream, salt, pepper, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Whisk eggs with cream, salt, and pepper. 3. Pour mixture into a baking dish. 4. Sprinkle cheese on top. 5. Bake until set. 6. Let cool slightly. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your creamy baked eggs.

title: Lemon Blueberry Loaf
description: A moist and tangy lemon-flavored loaf dotted with sweet fresh blueberries. Perfect for a summer dessert or a springtime treat.
ingredients_text: lemon zest, lemon juice, fresh blueberries, flour, sugar, butter, eggs, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Grease a loaf pan. 3. In a bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt. 4. In another bowl, cream butter and sugar, then add eggs, lemon zest, and juice. 5. Combine wet and dry ingredients, fold in blueberries. 6. Pour batter into the pan. 7. Bake for 60-65 minutes. 8. Let cool before slicing.

title: Seared Scallops With Browned Butter–Miso Sauce
description: Scallops are quick to cook, but taken past the point of perfectly done, they turn rubbery. This recipe focuses on searing them perfectly with a simple sauce of browned butter and miso, sweetened with a tablespoon of mirin.
ingredients_text: scallops, butter, miso, mirin
instructions_text: 1. Heat butter in a pan until browned. 2. Season scallops with salt. 3. Sear scallops in the browned butter for 2-3 minutes per side. 4. Remove scallops and set aside. 5. Add miso and mirin to the pan, stirring to combine. 6. Return scallops to the pan, coating with sauce. 7. Cook for an additional minute. 8. Serve scallops drizzled with sauce.

title: Double Sesame Sichuan Chicken Salad With Chili Crisp
description: A spin on classic Sichuan ban ban si ji, a salad in which poached chicken is shredded by hand. Chili crisp adds spiciness and texture to the dressing, while ground toasted Sichuan peppercorns supply their inimitable tongue-tingling quality. Serve right away, before the cucumbers begin to release their water. Serve as a side or make it a light main with steamed rice alongside.
ingredients_text: poached chicken, chili crisp, ground toasted Sichuan peppercorns, cucumbers, steamed rice
instructions_text: 1. Poach the chicken until cooked through. 2. Shred the chicken by hand. 3. Prepare the dressing with chili crisp and Sichuan peppercorns. 4. Slice cucumbers and mix with chicken. 5. Combine chicken and cucumbers with the dressing. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Optionally, serve with steamed rice. 8. Enjoy as a side or light main.

title: Shrimp Paccheri W Calabrian Chili Butter
description: A delicious shrimp pasta dish with a spicy kick from Calabrian Chili Butter and a fresh touch from lemony breadcrumbs. This recipe was created by Max Baroni during his time at the Four Horsemen.
ingredients_text: shrimp, paccheri pasta, Calabrian chili butter, lemony breadcrumbs
instructions_text: 1. Cook paccheri pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, melt Calabrian chili butter. 3. Add shrimp and sauté until cooked through. 4. Combine cooked pasta with shrimp and chili butter. 5. Prepare lemony breadcrumbs and sprinkle on top. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired. 8. Enjoy your spicy shrimp pasta.

title: Maple Butter Pumpkin Cornbread
ingredients_text: pumpkin puree, cornmeal, flour, maple syrup, butter, eggs, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix dry ingredients in a bowl. 3. In another bowl, combine wet ingredients. 4. Combine wet and dry mixtures. 5. Pour batter into a greased pan. 6. Bake for 35 minutes. 7. Let cool before serving. 8. Enjoy warm with butter.

title: Crispy Poblano Chicken Tacos
description: A READER FAVORITE + 5 STAR RECIPE!⭐️ These chicken tacos are a MUST MAKE! They’re crispy on the outside, cheesy & delicious inside + served with the BEST creamy salsa. Loaded with flavor & perfect for taco night!
ingredients_text: chicken, poblano peppers, cheese, salsa, taco shells, spices
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the poblano peppers by roasting them. 2. Cook the chicken with spices until fully cooked. 3. Stuff the taco shells with chicken and cheese. 4. Fry the stuffed tacos until crispy. 5. Serve with creamy salsa. 6. Garnish as desired. 7. Enjoy your delicious tacos! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Blackened Fish Tacos
description: Enjoy refreshing blackened fish tacos inspired by the sunny shores of Jamaica, filled with seasoned white fish, creamy avocado sauce, and a vibrant mango coleslaw.
ingredients_text: seasoned white fish, avocado sauce, mango coleslaw, tortillas
instructions_text: 1. Season the white fish with spices and grill until cooked. 2. Prepare the avocado sauce by blending ripe avocados with lime juice. 3. Make the mango coleslaw by mixing shredded cabbage, diced mango, and dressing. 4. Warm the tortillas on a skillet. 5. Assemble tacos by placing grilled fish on tortillas. 6. Top with avocado sauce and mango coleslaw. 7. Serve immediately with lime wedges. 8. Enjoy your refreshing blackened fish tacos.

title: Grilled Halloumi Tacos With Zesty Corn Salad
description: Grilled Halloumi Tacos with Zesty Corn Salad and Cilantro Sauce. The perfect vegetarian summer taco starring hearty halloumi cheese and a few seasonal staples like fresh corn, jalapeño, and avocado.
ingredients_text: halloumi cheese, fresh corn, jalapeño, avocado, cilantro, taco shells
instructions_text: 1. Grill halloumi cheese until golden. 2. Prepare corn salad with fresh corn, jalapeño, and cilantro. 3. Warm taco shells. 4. Assemble tacos with grilled halloumi and corn salad. 5. Top with avocado. 6. Drizzle with cilantro sauce. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Crockpot Swedish Meatballs
description: Crockpot Swedish Meatballs are a great weeknight dinner, combining savory flavors with creamy elements for a comforting dish.
ingredients_text: meatballs, cream, broth, spices
instructions_text: 1. Prepare meatballs and place them in the crockpot. 2. Mix cream and broth together. 3. Pour the mixture over the meatballs. 4. Add spices to taste. 5. Cover and cook on low for 5 hours. 6. Stir occasionally. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your comforting meal.

title: Creamy Corn Chowder
description: A creamy corn chowder that is very simple to make and could honestly be eaten year round. The bacon! The Boursin! Everything about this soup is perfect.
ingredients_text: corn, bacon, Boursin cheese, onion, garlic, vegetable broth, cream, potatoes
instructions_text: 1. Cook bacon until crispy, then remove and set aside. 2. In the bacon fat, sauté onion and garlic until soft. 3. Add corn, diced potatoes, and vegetable broth. 4. Simmer until potatoes are tender. 5. Blend the mixture until smooth. 6. Stir in Boursin cheese and cream. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve topped with crumbled bacon.

title: Creamy Garlic Butter Orzo With Shrimp
description: A one pan weeknight dinner that's ready in about 30 minutes. This easy recipe is part of the Easy Dinner Series and features orzo cooked in creamy garlic butter sauce with juicy shrimp.
ingredients_text: orzo, garlic, butter, shrimp
instructions_text: 1. Cook orzo according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, melt butter and sauté garlic. 3. Add shrimp and cook until pink. 4. Stir in cooked orzo. 5. Mix until well combined. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your creamy garlic butter orzo.

title: Mini Chicken Pot Pies
description: Mini Chicken Pot Pies, a perfect easy family friendly dinner. My toddler loved this recipe!!
ingredients_text: chicken, pie crust, mixed vegetables, chicken broth, onion, garlic, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Cook chicken and shred it. 3. Sauté onion and garlic until soft. 4. Add mixed vegetables and chicken broth, simmer. 5. Fill pie crusts with chicken mixture. 6. Cover with top crust and seal edges. 7. Bake for 25-30 minutes until golden. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Apple Cider Champagne Margarita
description: This Apple Cider Champagne Margarita brings a refreshing twist to your typical cocktail hour, combining the crisp essence of apple cider with the celebratory fizz of champagne. The blend of tequila, orange liqueur, and fresh lime juice creates a flavor profile that's both sweet and tangy, making it a perfect accompaniment for any festive gathering.
ingredients_text: apple cider, champagne, tequila, orange liqueur, fresh lime juice
instructions_text: 1. In a shaker, combine apple cider, tequila, orange liqueur, and fresh lime juice. 2. Fill the shaker with ice and shake well. 3. Strain the mixture into a glass. 4. Top with champagne. 5. Garnish with an apple slice or lime wedge. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your refreshing cocktail! 8. Perfect for festive gatherings.

title: Pumpkin Overnight Oats
description: A creamy and delicious way to enjoy oats with the seasonal flavor of pumpkin. Perfect for a quick and nutritious breakfast.
ingredients_text: oats, pumpkin puree, milk, yogurt, honey, cinnamon, nutmeg
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, combine oats, pumpkin puree, and milk. 2. Stir in yogurt, honey, cinnamon, and nutmeg. 3. Mix well until combined. 4. Divide into jars or containers. 5. Refrigerate overnight. 6. Serve chilled. 7. Top with additional pumpkin or nuts if desired. 8. Enjoy your nutritious breakfast!

title: Stracciatella Tomato Gnocchi
description: A deliciously cheesy, creamy, and nutritious meal featuring stracciatella cheese and tomato-stuffed gnocchi. Perfect for a quick and satisfying dinner.
ingredients_text: stracciatella cheese, tomato-stuffed gnocchi
instructions_text: 1. Boil water in a large pot. 2. Add the gnocchi and cook until they float. 3. Drain the gnocchi. 4. In a pan, combine gnocchi with stracciatella cheese. 5. Stir until cheese is melted and creamy. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your delicious meal!

title: Sweet Potato Tres Leches Cake
description: A delicious twist on the classic tres leches cake, featuring sweet potato for added flavor and moisture.
ingredients_text: sweet potato, milk, condensed milk, evaporated milk, eggs, flour, sugar, baking powder, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking dish. 2. Boil and mash the sweet potatoes. 3. In a bowl, mix the eggs and sugar until fluffy. 4. Add the mashed sweet potatoes and mix well. 5. Combine the dry ingredients and fold into the wet mixture. 6. Pour into the baking dish and bake until set. 7. Mix the three milks and pour over the baked cake. 8. Chill before serving.

title: Turkish Pasta With Garlicky Yogurt And Smoked Butter Sauce
description: This is my take on the viral Turkish pasta! I love the contrast of the cool garlicky yogurt with the warm smoky butter. Plus, it’s super easy to prep the ground beef ahead of time so when you’re ready to eat, it comes together fast for an easy and delicious lunch or dinner.
ingredients_text: pasta, ground beef, yogurt, garlic, butter, spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, brown the ground beef. 3. Mix yogurt with minced garlic. 4. In a separate pan, melt butter and add spices to create a smoky sauce. 5. Combine cooked pasta with beef. 6. Serve pasta topped with garlicky yogurt. 7. Drizzle with smoky butter sauce. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Carrot Cake Baked Oats
description: A nutritious meal with additional fibre and nutrients from carrots, and healthy fats from walnuts. It tastes like dessert.
ingredients_text: oats, carrots, walnuts, eggs, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix oats, grated carrots, chopped walnuts, and dry ingredients. 3. In another bowl, whisk eggs, sugar, and vanilla. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients. 5. Pour mixture into a baking dish. 6. Bake for 25-30 minutes. 7. Allow to cool slightly before serving. 8. Enjoy as a nutritious dessert.

title: Spice Roast Veggies With Harissa Braised Beans & Yoghurt
description: Easy vegetarian dinner! Spice Roast Veggies with Harissa Braised Beans & Yoghurt is perfect for a midweek meal, meal pre or anytime you want something nourishing & delicious!
ingredients_text: mixed vegetables, harissa, beans, yoghurt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking tray. 2. Chop mixed vegetables and toss with spices. 3. Roast the vegetables until tender. 4. In a pot, cook harissa with beans until heated through. 5. Serve roasted veggies topped with harissa beans. 6. Add a dollop of yoghurt on top. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your nourishing meal!

title: Cheesy Chicken Milanese
description: Cheesy chicken milanese✨ is a deliciously crispy and cheesy chicken dish served with a refreshing arugula salad. Perfect for a quick dinner.
ingredients_text: chicken breasts, breadcrumbs, cheese, arugula, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Flatten chicken breasts. 2. Coat with breadcrumbs and cheese. 3. Heat olive oil in a pan. 4. Fry chicken until golden brown. 5. Prepare arugula salad. 6. Serve chicken with salad. 7. Drizzle with olive oil. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Chili Cheese Queso Dip
description: Our FAV Queso! Perfect for game day. The base of this recipe is that viral restaurant queso, BUT we load it up with meat to make it even better!!
ingredients_text: cheese, ground beef, chili peppers, spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook ground beef in a skillet until browned. 2. Add chili peppers and spices to the beef. 3. Melt cheese in a separate pot. 4. Combine melted cheese with beef mixture. 5. Stir until well mixed. 6. Serve warm with tortilla chips. 7. Enjoy during game day. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Italian Style Meatballs
description: The perfect quick and easy chicken meatball recipe bursting with Italian flavors. This recipe is great for batch cooking or meal prep. The salad and yogurt accompaniment make it a complete meal.
ingredients_text: chicken, Italian herbs, breadcrumbs, egg, garlic, onion, salt, pepper, salad, yogurt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. In a bowl, mix chicken, herbs, breadcrumbs, egg, garlic, onion, salt, and pepper. 3. Form mixture into meatballs. 4. Place meatballs on a baking sheet. 5. Bake until cooked through. 6. Serve with salad and yogurt. 7. Enjoy your meal prep! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Apple Ricotta Cake
description: The perfect one-bowl cake to impress your next guests or satisfy a sudden craving for a snack. A delicate blend of creamy ricotta and fresh apples make this cake a standout!
ingredients_text: ricotta cheese, fresh apples, sugar, flour, eggs, baking powder, vanilla extract, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and grease a cake pan. 2. In a bowl, mix ricotta cheese and sugar until smooth. 3. Add eggs and vanilla, mixing well. 4. Fold in flour, baking powder, and salt. 5. Gently incorporate diced apples. 6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan. 7. Bake until golden and a toothpick comes out clean. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Spiced Gingerbread Fudge
description: Spiced Gingerbread Fudge - a fun treat to gift to others for the holidays.
ingredients_text: ginger, cinnamon, nutmeg, sugar, butter, condensed milk, chocolate
instructions_text: 1. Prepare a baking dish lined with parchment paper. 2. In a saucepan, combine butter, sugar, and condensed milk over low heat. 3. Stir in ginger, cinnamon, and nutmeg until well mixed. 4. Add chocolate and stir until melted and smooth. 5. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish. 6. Refrigerate for several hours until set. 7. Cut into squares. 8. Gift or serve as a holiday treat.

title: Funfetti Cookie Bars
description: Funfetti Cookie Bars with Golden Oreos, perfect for birthdays or just because!
ingredients_text: Golden Oreos, flour, sugar, butter, eggs, sprinkles
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, cream together butter and sugar. 3. Add eggs and mix well. 4. Gradually add flour and mix until combined. 5. Fold in crushed Golden Oreos and sprinkles. 6. Spread the mixture in a baking dish. 7. Bake for 30 minutes or until golden. 8. Let cool before cutting into bars.

title: Beef & Broccoli Stir Fry
description: If you’re craving something saucy, comforting, and satisfying but don’t want to spend ages in the kitchen, then this recipe is for you. A quick and easy stir fry featuring tender beef and fresh broccoli with a savory sauce.
ingredients_text: beef, broccoli, savory sauce
instructions_text: 1. Slice the beef thinly against the grain. 2. Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat. 3. Add beef and stir-fry until browned. 4. Add broccoli and stir-fry for a few minutes. 5. Pour in the savory sauce and mix well. 6. Cook until broccoli is tender. 7. Serve hot over rice or noodles. 8. Enjoy your quick and easy meal!

title: Street Corn Smash Burger Tacos
description: Street Corn Smash Burger Tacos - Raise your hand if street corn anything is your jam 🙋‍♀️. Same here. Not only is the flavor of this recipe out of this world good, but smash burger patties are so quick to make compared to regular burgers. The street corn mix adds sauciness, but don’t skimp on the burger sauce. It’s next level.
ingredients_text: smash burger patties, street corn mix, burger sauce, taco shells
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the street corn mix. 2. Form and smash the burger patties. 3. Cook the patties on a grill or skillet. 4. Warm the taco shells. 5. Assemble tacos with patties and street corn mix. 6. Drizzle with burger sauce. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your flavorful tacos.

title: Lemon Butter Parmesan Chicken Bites
description: Lemon Butter Parmesan Chicken / Chicken Spiedini Recipe with a tangy lemon butter sauce, perfect for grilling and summer meals.
ingredients_text: chicken, lemon, butter, parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the grill. 2. Prepare the lemon butter sauce. 3. Coat chicken pieces with the sauce. 4. Thread chicken onto skewers. 5. Grill chicken until cooked through. 6. Brush with remaining sauce. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Spaghettoni Al Gamberi
description: Spaghettoni with king prawns (jumbo shrimp) and stracciatella di bufala Cool to know: You can turn this pasta dish into a risotto. We've tried it out at Ober Mamma and it's a hit. Plus, it's gluten-free.
ingredients_text: spaghettoni, king prawns, stracciatella di bufala
instructions_text: 1. Cook spaghettoni in boiling water until al dente. 2. In a pan, sauté king prawns until pink. 3. Add cooked spaghettoni to the pan. 4. Stir in stracciatella di bufala. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Serve hot. 7. Optionally, turn into risotto by adding broth. 8. Garnish as desired.

title: Sausage With Charred Cabbage And Giardiniera
description: A bed of charred cabbage speckled with chopped giardiniera makes the perfect landing place for sweet Italian sausages and plenty of basil. This is a delicious recipe where beloved Midwest condiment of pickled veggies in a punchy-hot brine does double duty. The vegetables get finely chopped and tossed with charred cabbage and the brine gets transformed into a zesty vinaigrette that cloaks charred cabbage in a tangy, spicy sheen.
ingredients_text: sweet Italian sausages, cabbage, giardiniera, basil, brine
instructions_text: 1. Char the cabbage until tender. 2. Chop giardiniera finely. 3. Mix giardiniera with charred cabbage. 4. Prepare vinaigrette using the brine. 5. Grill sausages until cooked through. 6. Serve sausages on a bed of cabbage and giardiniera. 7. Drizzle with vinaigrette. 8. Garnish with fresh basil.

title: Pumpkin Pie Chia Pudding
description: A delicious and healthy pumpkin pie chia pudding recipe from Maxi's Kitchen.
ingredients_text: chia seeds, pumpkin puree, almond milk, maple syrup, pumpkin spice, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix chia seeds, pumpkin puree, almond milk, maple syrup, pumpkin spice, and vanilla extract. 2. Stir well to combine. 3. Let the mixture sit for 5 minutes, then stir again. 4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 3 hours or overnight. 5. Serve chilled, topped with additional pumpkin spice if desired. 6. Enjoy as a healthy dessert or snack.

title: Korean Fried Chicken
ingredients_text: chicken, flour, cornstarch, garlic powder, ginger, salt, pepper, oil for frying, sauce (soy sauce, sugar, vinegar, chili paste)
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the chicken by cutting it into pieces. 2. In a bowl, mix flour, cornstarch, garlic powder, ginger, salt, and pepper. 3. Coat the chicken pieces in the flour mixture. 4. Heat oil in a deep pan and fry the chicken until golden brown. 5. In a separate pot, combine soy sauce, sugar, vinegar, and chili paste to make the sauce. 6. Toss the fried chicken in the sauce until well coated. 7. Serve hot with your choice of sides. 8. Enjoy your Korean fried chicken!

title: Earl Grey Banana Bread
description: Earl Grey Banana Bread with matcha butter. Vegan and easy to make. One of my favourite flavours to jazz up the classic banana bread. It tastes even better the next day.
ingredients_text: bananas, Earl Grey tea, flour, sugar, baking powder, matcha, vegan butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Mash the bananas in a bowl. 3. Brew Earl Grey tea and mix with the mashed bananas. 4. Combine flour, sugar, and baking powder in another bowl. 5. Mix wet and dry ingredients until just combined. 6. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan. 7. Bake for 50-57 minutes. 8. Let cool before slicing and serve with matcha butter.

title: The Famous 1905 Salad
description: The famous 1905 Salad from Columbia Restaurant with a personal touch of sweetness and red onion.
ingredients_text: mixed greens, red onion, olives, tomatoes, lemon juice, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the mixed greens in a large bowl. 2. Slice the red onion and add to the greens. 3. Chop the olives and tomatoes, then mix in. 4. In a separate bowl, whisk together lemon juice and olive oil. 5. Pour the dressing over the salad. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Toss everything together gently. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Almond Croissant Peach Cobbler
description: A warm and aromatic almond croissant peach cobbler to bid farewell to summer and welcome autumn.
ingredients_text: almond croissants, peaches, sugar, cinnamon, butter, flour, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Slice almond croissants and layer them in a baking dish. 3. Mix sliced peaches with sugar and cinnamon. 4. Pour peach mixture over croissants. 5. Melt butter and drizzle over the top. 6. Bake until golden and bubbly. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Pumpkin Spice Arroz Con Leche
description: A creamy twist on the classic Arroz con Leche, full of cozy spices and perfect for the fall season.
ingredients_text: rice, milk, sugar, pumpkin puree, cinnamon, nutmeg, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Rinse the rice under cold water. 2. In a pot, combine rice, milk, and sugar. 3. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently. 4. Add pumpkin puree and spices. 5. Simmer until thickened, about 30-40 minutes. 6. Stir in vanilla extract. 7. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm or chilled, garnished with cinnamon.

title: Homemade Brown Sugar Cinnamon Pop Tarts
description: These homemade pop tarts are buttery, flaky, sweet, and spiced with cinnamon. Perfect for a fun baking project with a delightful homemade flavor.
ingredients_text: butter, flour, brown sugar, cinnamon, salt, water, egg
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). 2. Make the dough by mixing flour, butter, and salt. 3. Roll out the dough and cut into rectangles. 4. Mix brown sugar and cinnamon for the filling. 5. Place filling on half of the rectangles and cover with the other half. 6. Seal the edges with a fork. 7. Brush with egg wash. 8. Bake for 25-30 minutes until golden brown.

title: Roasted Korean Chicken & Salady Bits
description: An easy and quick weeknight dinner with zero compromise on flavour - roasted Korean chicken & salady bits! Perfect for summer with minimal stand-up cooking. Serve with sticky rice or your favorite carbs.
ingredients_text: Korean chicken, salad ingredients, sticky rice or favorite carbs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the Korean chicken marinade. 3. Coat the chicken and let it marinate. 4. Roast the chicken in the oven. 5. Prepare salad ingredients. 6. Cook sticky rice or preferred carbs. 7. Serve the roasted chicken with salad and rice. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Italian Meatballs & Marinara
description: Quite literally the easiest 35-minute ITALIAN MEATBALLS & MARINARA dinner. Gluten‑Free, Dairy‑Free, High‑Protein. Serves 4.
ingredients_text: ground beef, breadcrumbs, egg, garlic, onion, marinara sauce, Italian seasoning, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. In a bowl, mix ground beef, breadcrumbs, egg, garlic, onion, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper. 3. Form mixture into meatballs. 4. Place meatballs on a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes. 5. In a saucepan, heat marinara sauce. 6. Add baked meatballs to the sauce and simmer for 5 minutes. 7. Serve with pasta or on its own. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Creamy Pesto Chicken Pasta
description: Enjoy a quick, creamy, and delectable pasta dish that blends the richness of cottage cheese with the vibrant taste of pesto, combined with tender grilled chicken and sautéed spinach. Perfect for a weeknight dinner!
ingredients_text: pasta, cottage cheese, pesto, grilled chicken, spinach
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Grill chicken until cooked through. 3. Sauté spinach in a pan until wilted. 4. In a bowl, mix cottage cheese and pesto. 5. Combine cooked pasta, chicken, spinach, and pesto mixture. 6. Stir until well combined. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your creamy pesto chicken pasta!

title: Coconut Prawn Curry
description: Creamy, fragrant, and ready in under 30 minutes!
ingredients_text: prawns, coconut milk, curry powder, garlic, onion, ginger, bell pepper, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Sauté garlic, onion, and ginger in a pan. 2. Add bell pepper and cook until soft. 3. Stir in curry powder. 4. Pour in coconut milk and bring to a simmer. 5. Add prawns and cook until pink. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy with rice or bread.

title: SPICY EGG FRIED RICE
description: SPICY EGG FRIED RICE: Craving a quick, simple yet delicious meal? This spicy egg fried rice, starring fragrant chilli oil and fluffy eggs, is a must-try! Packed with flavors and ready in minutes, it’s the perfect dish for your next meal.
ingredients_text: rice, chilli oil, eggs
instructions_text: 1. Heat chilli oil in a pan. 2. Add cooked rice and stir-fry. 3. Push rice to the side and scramble eggs. 4. Mix eggs with rice. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Healthy Shrimp Tacos With Cilantro Lime Greek Yogurt Slaw
description: Deliciously healthy shrimp tacos paired with a tangy cilantro lime Greek yogurt slaw. Perfect for a fresh and light meal that bursts with flavor!
ingredients_text: shrimp, tortillas, cilantro, lime, Greek yogurt, cabbage, spices
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the shrimp by seasoning with spices. 2. Grill or boil the shrimp until cooked. 3. Mix Greek yogurt with cilantro and lime juice for the slaw. 4. Shred cabbage and combine with the yogurt mixture. 5. Warm the tortillas. 6. Assemble tacos with shrimp and slaw. 7. Serve with lime wedges. 8. Enjoy your fresh shrimp tacos!

title: Fiery Crispy Garlic Rice
description: Ditch your takeout for this restaurant-level fried rice, ready in 10 minutes for when you’re craving something super cosy and comforting. Golden, garlicky with a craveable crunch.
ingredients_text: rice, garlic, oil, spices
instructions_text: 1. Heat oil in a pan. 2. Add minced garlic and sauté until golden. 3. Stir in cooked rice. 4. Season with spices. 5. Fry until crispy. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Brownie Pudding
description: This famous brownie pudding is out of this world. A chocolate paradise. A recipe by the great Ina Garten that has inspired me since I was little.
ingredients_text: chocolate, butter, sugar, eggs, flour, vanilla extract, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Melt chocolate and butter together. 3. Whisk in sugar and eggs. 4. Stir in flour, vanilla, and salt. 5. Pour into a baking dish. 6. Bake until set. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm with ice cream.

title: Chicken Katsu Curry
description: A simple and comforting dish, Chicken Katsu Curry combines crispy fried chicken with a rich, savory curry sauce. Perfect for a satisfying meal.
ingredients_text: chicken, curry sauce, flour, panko breadcrumbs, eggs, rice
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the chicken by flattening and seasoning. 2. Dredge in flour, dip in beaten eggs, and coat with panko. 3. Heat oil in a pan and fry the chicken until golden brown. 4. Cook rice according to package instructions. 5. Prepare the curry sauce in a separate pot. 6. Slice the fried chicken and serve over rice. 7. Pour curry sauce over the chicken. 8. Garnish and enjoy.

title: Cheezit Tortellini Caesar Salad
description: Cheezit Tortellini Caesar Salad with classic romaine and tortellini, topped with crispy Cheezits. A twist on the viral trend that's perfect for dinner!
ingredients_text: tortellini, romaine lettuce, Cheezits, Caesar dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook tortellini according to package instructions. 2. Chop romaine lettuce. 3. In a large bowl, combine cooked tortellini and romaine. 4. Add Caesar dressing and toss to coat. 5. Top with crispy Cheezits. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your twist on a classic salad! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Honey Sesame Chicken Bowls
description: HONEY SESAME CHICKEN BOWLS ✨Forever my favorite healthy high-protein dinner recipe! Savory and sweet sesame sauce coats golden pan-fried chicken, nestled amongst fluffy jasmine rice and vibrant veggies.
ingredients_text: chicken, sesame sauce, jasmine rice, assorted vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook jasmine rice according to package instructions. 2. Prepare the sesame sauce. 3. Pan-fry the chicken until golden. 4. Toss chicken in sesame sauce. 5. Serve chicken over rice. 6. Add vibrant veggies on the side. 7. Drizzle extra sauce if desired. 8. Enjoy your healthy bowl!

title: Cowboy Butter Spaghetti
description: A flavorful spaghetti recipe with a rich, buttery sauce featuring shallots, garlic, lemon, Dijon, and a variety of spices.
ingredients_text: spaghetti, shallots, garlic, lemon, Dijon mustard, spices, butter
instructions_text: 1. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, melt butter over medium heat. 3. Add shallots and garlic, sauté until fragrant. 4. Stir in lemon juice and Dijon mustard. 5. Mix in spices and cook for a few minutes. 6. Combine cooked spaghetti with the sauce. 7. Toss well to coat. 8. Serve hot.

title: Elote Chicken Enchiladas
description: Delicious and easy Elote Chicken Enchiladas made with rotisserie chicken, corn, and a mix of flavorful spices. Topped with green enchilada sauce and melted cheese, these enchiladas are a perfect weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: rotisserie chicken, corn, green enchilada sauce, cheese, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Shred the rotisserie chicken. 3. Mix chicken, corn, and spices. 4. Fill tortillas with the mixture. 5. Place filled tortillas in a baking dish. 6. Top with green enchilada sauce and cheese. 7. Bake until cheese is melted. 8. Serve hot.

title: Crispy Steak Tacos With Shishito Pepper Chimichurri
description: These crunchy and juicy tacos feature cheesy-crusted tortillas stuffed with smoky carne asada and spicy, garlicky shishito chimichurri. Perfect for impressing guests on taco night!
ingredients_text: cheesy-crusted tortillas, carne asada, shishito peppers, garlic, chimichurri
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the carne asada by marinating and grilling it. 2. Make the chimichurri sauce with shishito peppers and garlic. 3. Fry the tortillas until crispy and cheesy. 4. Assemble the tacos with carne asada and chimichurri. 5. Serve hot and enjoy with toppings.

title: Baked Alaska
description: This show-stopping dessert combines cake, ice cream, and a golden meringue shell. It's a dramatic centerpiece that's surprisingly simple to make with some planning!
ingredients_text: cake, ice cream, meringue
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the cake base and let it cool. 2. Layer ice cream on top of the cake. 3. Freeze until firm. 4. Whip egg whites and sugar to make meringue. 5. Spread meringue over the ice cream. 6. Bake in a preheated oven until golden. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your show-stopping dessert!

title: Caramelized Tomato, Pesto & Feta Bread
description: Melty cheese, salty feta, and caramelised tomatoes all baked to perfection! This bread comes together so effortlessly with a bread maker - knead, rise, bake, done!
ingredients_text: caramelized tomatoes, pesto, feta, bread
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the bread maker. 2. Add ingredients: caramelized tomatoes, pesto, feta, and bread mix. 3. Set to knead. 4. Allow dough to rise. 5. Preheat oven if needed. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Slice and serve warm.

title: Salmon Ochazuke For One
description: Ochazuke is a simple and comforting Japanese dish made by pouring hot dashi or green tea over cooked rice. It was actually someone on here who recommended that I try this dish so a big thank you to them - it’s become a firm favourite 💌
ingredients_text: cooked rice, hot dashi or green tea, salmon
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. Prepare hot dashi or brew green tea. 3. Place cooked rice in a bowl. 4. Top with cooked salmon. 5. Pour hot dashi or green tea over the rice and salmon. 6. Let it sit for a minute to absorb flavors. 7. Garnish if desired. 8. Serve warm.

title: Eggnog White Russian
description: A creamy, cozy Christmas cocktail with a rich kick from espresso liquor and a smooth, velvety finish from frothed eggnog. It's like Christmas in a glass.
ingredients_text: egg nog, espresso liquor, ice
instructions_text: 1. Fill a glass with ice. 2. Pour in the espresso liquor. 3. Add the egg nog. 4. Stir gently to combine. 5. Garnish as desired. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your festive drink!

title: Best Grilled Cheese Burrito (Taco Bell Dupe)
description: This Grilled Cheese Burrito is a perfect copycat of Taco Bell's version. It combines the gooey goodness of grilled cheese with the heartiness of a burrito, making it an easy and satisfying weeknight meal.
ingredients_text: grilled cheese, burrito wrap, beans, cheese, spices
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the grilled cheese by melting cheese between two slices of bread. 2. Warm the burrito wrap. 3. Fill the wrap with grilled cheese and beans. 4. Roll the burrito tightly. 5. Grill the burrito until golden brown. 6. Slice in half. 7. Serve with your favorite dipping sauce. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Honey Miso Shortribs
description: Tender and flavorful boneless short ribs braised in a honey miso sauce with sake and beef stock, served with a deliciously thickened sauce over mashed potatoes.
ingredients_text: boneless short ribs, honey, miso, sake, beef stock, mashed potatoes
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven. 2. Sear short ribs until browned. 3. Mix honey, miso, sake, and beef stock. 4. Pour sauce over ribs in a pot. 5. Cover and braise in the oven for several hours. 6. Prepare mashed potatoes. 7. Serve ribs over mashed potatoes with sauce. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Crockpot Pesto Spaghetti Squash
description: A beloved and easy recipe for Crockpot Pesto Spaghetti Squash, perfect for a low-carb diet. This dish is cooked in a crockpot to enhance the creamy texture and flavor without the hassle of cutting raw squash.
ingredients_text: spaghetti squash, pesto, salt, pepper, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Cut the spaghetti squash in half and scoop out the seeds. 2. Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper. 3. Place in the crockpot cut side up. 4. Add pesto over the squash. 5. Cover and cook on low for 4 hours. 6. Once cooked, scrape the flesh with a fork to create strands. 7. Serve warm, topped with additional pesto if desired. 8. Enjoy your creamy, flavorful dish.

title: Lemongrass Chicken With Shredded Carrot Salad
description: A delicious and high-protein dish featuring lemongrass chicken served with a refreshing shredded carrot salad and rice.
ingredients_text: lemongrass, chicken, shredded carrots, rice
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken with lemongrass. 2. Grill the chicken until cooked through. 3. Prepare rice according to package instructions. 4. Shred carrots and mix with dressing. 5. Serve grilled chicken over rice. 6. Top with shredded carrot salad. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Classic Crème Brûlée
description: A sophisticated dessert with rich, creamy custard and a crispy caramelized sugar top.
ingredients_text: rich cream, sugar, egg yolks, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Whisk egg yolks and sugar until smooth. 3. Heat cream and vanilla, then slowly mix into egg mixture. 4. Pour into ramekins. 5. Bake in a water bath until set. 6. Chill in the fridge. 7. Sprinkle sugar on top and caramelize with a torch. 8. Serve chilled.

title: Cashew Nut Chicken
description: A delightful cashew nut chicken recipe that promises to replace your takeout cravings with a simple yet delicious homemade stir-fry.
ingredients_text: cashew nuts, chicken, soy sauce, bell peppers, garlic, ginger, onion, green onions
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in soy sauce, garlic, and ginger. 2. Heat oil in a pan and stir-fry chicken until cooked. 3. Add onions and bell peppers, stir-fry until tender. 4. Stir in cashew nuts and cook for a few minutes. 5. Garnish with green onions. 6. Serve hot with rice or noodles.

title: Marry Me Pasta With Chicken
description: With or without chicken, this pasta is delicious!
ingredients_text: pasta, chicken, cream, garlic, parmesan cheese, herbs, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, sauté garlic until fragrant. 3. Add chicken and cook until browned. 4. Stir in cream and parmesan cheese. 5. Combine cooked pasta with the sauce. 6. Season with herbs, salt, and pepper. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your delicious meal!

title: Honey Pistachio Olive Oil Cake
description: A gooey, sticky, and perfectly moist honey pistachio olive oil cake. The perfect fall dessert using olive oil.
ingredients_text: honey, pistachios, olive oil, flour, eggs, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a cake pan. 2. Mix honey and olive oil in a bowl. 3. Beat in eggs until well combined. 4. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. 5. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet mixture. 6. Fold in chopped pistachios. 7. Pour batter into the prepared pan. 8. Bake until golden and a toothpick comes out clean.

title: Chili Oil Prawn Pasta
description: A spicy and flavorful pasta dish featuring Argentinian shrimp, chili oil, and chili flakes.
ingredients_text: Argentinian shrimp, chili oil, chili flakes, pasta
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat chili oil. 3. Add shrimp and chili flakes, sauté until shrimp is cooked. 4. Drain pasta and add to the pan. 5. Toss to combine. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish with extra chili flakes if desired. 8. Enjoy your spicy prawn pasta.

title: Roasted Zucchini Feta Soup
description: This Roasted Zucchini Feta Soup is simple, healthy, and perfect for using up an abundance of zucchini. It roasts on a sheet pan, then gets blended into a smooth soup that can be enjoyed hot or cold.
ingredients_text: zucchini, feta cheese, olive oil, garlic, vegetable broth, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Slice zucchini and toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper. 3. Roast zucchini on a sheet pan for 25-30 minutes. 4. In a pot, sauté garlic until fragrant. 5. Add roasted zucchini and vegetable broth, then bring to a simmer. 6. Blend the mixture until smooth. 7. Stir in feta cheese until melted. 8. Serve hot or cold.

title: Coconut Lavender Margaritas
description: This margarita is a tropical twist on the classic, combining the floral notes of lavender with creamy coconut and zesty lime. It's a beautiful, refreshing cocktail that will elevate any gathering with its aromatic charm and stunning presentation.
ingredients_text: lavender syrup, coconut cream, lime juice, tequila, ice
instructions_text: 1. In a blender, combine lavender syrup, coconut cream, lime juice, and tequila. 2. Add ice and blend until smooth. 3. Rim the glass with salt if desired. 4. Pour the mixture into the glass. 5. Garnish with a sprig of lavender or lime slice. 6. Serve immediately and enjoy. 7. Optionally, chill the glass beforehand. 8. Experiment with ratios for desired sweetness.

title: The Ultimate Summertime Lasagna
description: The ultimate summertime lasagna with greens, gruyere, and garlic — described as “the best damn lasagna ever” by the author's dad. This one’s always a hit and includes healthy ingredients like spinach for antioxidants and a protein-rich béchamel for nearly 25g of protein per serving. It’s cozy, fresh, and satisfying, yet light — perfect for warmer days. This white lasagna is sure to impress.
ingredients_text: lasagna noodles, spinach, gruyere cheese, garlic, béchamel sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook lasagna noodles according to package instructions. 3. Sauté garlic and spinach until wilted. 4. Prepare béchamel sauce. 5. Layer noodles, spinach, and cheese in a baking dish. 6. Pour béchamel over layers. 7. Bake until golden and bubbly. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Brisket Chili
description: A hearty one-pot brisket chili featuring smoked brisket, a variety of tomatoes, and a spice blend that gives an authentic chili flavor.
ingredients_text: smoked brisket, variety of tomatoes, spice blend
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the smoked brisket. 2. In a large pot, sauté onions and garlic. 3. Add the brisket and tomatoes. 4. Stir in the spice blend. 5. Simmer for 2 hours. 6. Adjust seasoning to taste. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your hearty chili.

title: One Pan Cheesy Chicken Enchilada Skillet
description: Everything you love about classic enchiladas except a lot easier: all you need is one pan, 20 minutes, and zero tortilla rolling. Simply toss tortilla strips in a pan, cover with enchilada sauce, salsa, shredded chicken, and cheese; cook stovetop until nice and melty, and serve garnished with guac. Enjoy!
ingredients_text: tortilla strips, enchilada sauce, salsa, shredded chicken, cheese, guacamole
instructions_text: 1. Heat a pan over medium heat. 2. Add tortilla strips and pour enchilada sauce over them. 3. Stir in salsa and shredded chicken. 4. Top with cheese. 5. Cover and cook until cheese is melted. 6. Garnish with guacamole. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your easy enchilada skillet!

title: Chewy Pistachio Cranberry Cookies
description: @krolls_korner Chewy Pistachio Cranberry Cookies are perfect for the holidays! The pistachio/cranberry/white chocolate combo is so good and they're festive for the holidays. They bake up perfectly and remind me of blondies since I’m using melted butter.
ingredients_text: pistachios, cranberries, white chocolate, melted butter, flour, sugar, eggs, baking soda, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix melted butter with sugar. 3. Add eggs and mix until combined. 4. Stir in flour, baking soda, and salt. 5. Fold in pistachios, cranberries, and white chocolate. 6. Scoop dough onto a baking sheet. 7. Bake for 30 minutes or until golden. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Thai Green Noodle Dumpling Soup
description: A flavorful Thai soup recipe with green curry paste, dumplings, and udon noodles, garnished with soft boiled eggs, beansprouts, coriander, black sesame seeds, and chilli oil.
ingredients_text: green curry paste, dumplings, udon noodles, soft boiled eggs, beansprouts, coriander, black sesame seeds, chilli oil
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the dumplings according to package instructions. 2. In a pot, bring water to a boil and add udon noodles. 3. Cook noodles until tender, then drain. 4. In a separate pot, combine green curry paste with water to create the soup base. 5. Add cooked dumplings and noodles to the soup. 6. Serve in bowls, garnished with soft boiled eggs, beansprouts, coriander, and black sesame seeds. 7. Drizzle with chilli oil before serving. 8. Enjoy your flavorful Thai green noodle dumpling soup!

title: Avocado Egg Roll Beef Bowls
description: Avocado Egg Roll Beef Bowls✨ A spin off of my favorite Avocado Egg Rolls. Packed with protein from a delicious ground beef base and then topped with a fresh and flavorful avocado, sun-dried tomato and cilantro mixture. And a creamy Tahini Dressing to top them off! So good.
ingredients_text: ground beef, avocado, sun-dried tomatoes, cilantro, tahini dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook ground beef in a skillet until browned. 2. In a bowl, mix diced avocado, sun-dried tomatoes, and cilantro. 3. Prepare tahini dressing. 4. Assemble bowls with beef as the base. 5. Top with avocado mixture. 6. Drizzle with tahini dressing. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Maple & Brown Sugar Apple Crisp
description: This apple crisp is a delightful fusion of tender, tangy apples with a crispy, buttery oat topping, perfectly balanced with a hint of maple and cinnamon. It's a cozy dessert that's easy to make and sure to impress, especially when paired with creamy vanilla ice cream.
ingredients_text: tender apples, brown sugar, maple syrup, oats, butter, cinnamon
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Peel and slice the apples, then toss with brown sugar and cinnamon. 3. In a bowl, mix oats, melted butter, and maple syrup. 4. Layer the apple mixture in a baking dish. 5. Spread the oat topping evenly over the apples. 6. Bake for 40-50 minutes until golden and bubbly. 7. Let cool slightly before serving. 8. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream.

title: Marry Me Sausage Orzo
description: A delicious one-pot meal featuring chicken sausage, orzo pasta, sundried tomatoes, fresh basil, and Parmesan cheese. This recipe is quick, easy, and perfect for any weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: chicken sausage, orzo pasta, sundried tomatoes, fresh basil, Parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken sausage in a pot until browned. 2. Add orzo pasta and stir. 3. Pour in water or broth and bring to a boil. 4. Stir in sundried tomatoes and basil. 5. Reduce heat and simmer until orzo is tender. 6. Mix in Parmesan cheese. 7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 8. Serve warm.

title: Soup On Sunday: Creamy Potato Soup
description: A creamy, hearty potato soup topped with bacon, cheddar cheese, and chives. Perfect for a cozy Sunday meal.
ingredients_text: potatoes, bacon, cheddar cheese, chives
instructions_text: 1. Cook bacon until crispy, then set aside. 2. Boil potatoes until tender. 3. Mash potatoes and return to pot. 4. Stir in cheese and cream until smooth. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Serve topped with bacon and chives. 7. Enjoy warm. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Tomato & White Bean Braised Cod
description: A simplified version of a classic dish, featuring cod braised with tomatoes and cannellini beans. This dish is gluten free and dairy free.
ingredients_text: cod, tomatoes, cannellini beans
instructions_text: 1. Heat a pan over medium heat. 2. Add cod and sear until golden. 3. Stir in tomatoes and cannellini beans. 4. Simmer for 20 minutes. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: 30-Minute Crispy Honey Garlic Chicken
description: If you’re craving for some crispy fried chicken with rice at home, here’s your sign :) The sauce is simply garlic, soy sauce and honey. Super simple!
ingredients_text: chicken, garlic, soy sauce, honey, rice
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the chicken by cutting it into pieces. 2. In a bowl, mix garlic, soy sauce, and honey. 3. Marinate the chicken in the sauce for a few minutes. 4. Heat oil in a pan and fry the chicken until crispy. 5. Cook rice according to package instructions. 6. Serve the crispy chicken over rice. 7. Drizzle any remaining sauce over the chicken. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Chicken And Cabbage Stir-Fry Recipe
description: Juicy chicken and charred cabbage are the stars of this family-friendly meal featuring a savory stir-fry sauce. Substitute with ground beef or pork.
ingredients_text: juicy chicken, charred cabbage, savory stir-fry sauce, ground beef or pork (optional)
instructions_text: 1. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. 2. Add chicken and cook until browned. 3. Stir in cabbage and cook until charred. 4. Pour in stir-fry sauce and mix well. 5. Cook for an additional 5 minutes. 6. If using, add ground beef or pork and cook through. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Crispy Chicken Tacos With Spicy Taco Sauce And Pico De Gallo
description: Crispy chicken tacos with spicy taco sauce and pico de gallo
ingredients_text: crispy chicken, taco sauce, pico de gallo, taco shells
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the crispy chicken by frying until golden. 2. Mix ingredients for the spicy taco sauce. 3. Chop tomatoes, onions, and cilantro for pico de gallo. 4. Assemble tacos with chicken, sauce, and pico de gallo. 5. Serve immediately.

title: Boursin Omelet With Sour Cream & Onion Potato Chips
description: This delicious omelet combines creamy Boursin cheese and crunchy sour cream & onion potato chips for a savory delight inspired by the hit TV show 'The Bear'.
ingredients_text: Boursin cheese, sour cream & onion potato chips, eggs
instructions_text: 1. Whisk eggs in a bowl. 2. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. 3. Pour eggs into the skillet. 4. Cook until edges set, then add Boursin cheese. 5. Fold the omelet in half. 6. Cook for another minute. 7. Serve topped with crushed potato chips. 8. Enjoy your savory omelet.

title: Blackened Shrimp Alfredo Pasta
ingredients_text: shrimp, fettuccine pasta, heavy cream, parmesan cheese, garlic, blackening seasoning, butter, parsley
instructions_text: 1. Cook fettuccine according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, melt butter and sauté garlic. 3. Add shrimp and blackening seasoning, cooking until shrimp is blackened. 4. Stir in heavy cream and parmesan, mixing until smooth. 5. Combine cooked pasta with the shrimp mixture. 6. Garnish with parsley. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Nourishing Sweet Potato Bread Rolls
description: Pillowy sweet potato bread rolls made with all organic ingredients. Perfect for the holiday table!
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, flour, yeast, sugar, salt, water, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Boil sweet potatoes until soft. 2. Mash and let cool. 3. Mix flour, yeast, sugar, and salt. 4. Add mashed sweet potatoes and water, knead into dough. 5. Let rise until doubled. 6. Shape into rolls and place on a baking tray. 7. Bake until golden brown. 8. Serve warm.

title: Cran Apple Margarita
description: This Cran Apple Margarita brings a refreshing twist to the classic cocktail with the natural sweetness of apple cider and the tartness of cranberry juice. The combination of citrus and agave syrup adds a delightful complexity that makes each sip a celebration of autumn flavors. Perfect for cozy gatherings or a festive holiday toast, this drink is sure to impress your guests.
ingredients_text: apple cider, cranberry juice, citrus, agave syrup, ice
instructions_text: 1. Fill a shaker with ice. 2. Add apple cider, cranberry juice, citrus, and agave syrup. 3. Shake well until chilled. 4. Strain into a glass. 5. Garnish with a slice of apple or lime. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your refreshing drink! 8. Perfect for gatherings.

title: Cilantro Orange Chicken Bites
description: Crisp tender seasoned chicken bites tossed in a sweet & tangy orange-honey sauce then finished with fresh cilantro. Serve with rice & your favorite veggies for a healthy weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: chicken bites, orange-honey sauce, fresh cilantro, rice, veggies
instructions_text: 1. Season chicken bites. 2. Fry chicken until crisp and tender. 3. Prepare orange-honey sauce. 4. Toss chicken in sauce. 5. Garnish with fresh cilantro. 6. Serve with rice. 7. Add your favorite veggies. 8. Enjoy your healthy dinner.

title: Oreo Peppermint Mocha Brownies
description: If you’re looking for an easy and delicious festive Christmas dessert, this is going to be the perfect recipe for you!
ingredients_text: Oreo cookies, peppermint extract, cocoa powder, sugar, eggs, flour, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking dish. 2. Crush Oreo cookies and mix with melted butter. 3. In a bowl, combine cocoa powder, sugar, and eggs. 4. Add flour and peppermint extract to the mixture. 5. Fold in the crushed Oreos. 6. Pour the batter into the baking dish. 7. Bake until set. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Shrimp Tacos With Creamy Salsa Verde
description: EASY + SPEEDY SHRIMP TACOS with Creamy Salsa Verde: ready in just 25 minutes using simple shortcut ingredients. Bold flavors + minimal ingredients = weeknight win!
ingredients_text: shrimp, tortillas, creamy salsa verde, lime, cilantro, onion
instructions_text: 1. Season shrimp with spices. 2. Heat a skillet and cook shrimp until pink. 3. Warm tortillas in another pan. 4. Assemble tacos with shrimp, salsa verde, and toppings. 5. Squeeze lime over tacos. 6. Garnish with cilantro and onion. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: One Pan Chicken & Rice
description: A delicious one-pan chicken and rice dish, perfect for an easy dinner or potluck.
ingredients_text: chicken, rice, spices, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Season the chicken with spices. 2. Heat oil in a pan and brown the chicken. 3. Remove chicken and sauté vegetables. 4. Add rice and stir. 5. Pour in broth and return chicken to the pan. 6. Cover and cook until rice is tender. 7. Fluff rice and serve. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Broccoli Cheddar Beef Bowls
description: These Broccoli Cheddar Beef Bowls are a part of my cozy weeknight meal series. They are a comforting meal filled with nutritious ingredients like ground beef, vegetables, and cheese combined deliciously over a bed of rice or pasta. Perfect for those chilly evenings!
ingredients_text: ground beef, broccoli, cheddar cheese, rice or pasta, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook ground beef in a skillet until browned. 2. Add chopped broccoli and other vegetables, cooking until tender. 3. Stir in cheddar cheese until melted. 4. Serve over cooked rice or pasta. 5. Season to taste. 6. Garnish if desired. 7. Enjoy warm. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Philadelphia Roast Pork Sandwiches
description: Handheld Happiness = Philadelphia Roast Pork Sandwiches. Beautiful Smokey Roasted Pork, Garlicky Broccoli Rabe - It’s Italian Rooted, Philly Perfected Deliciousness.
ingredients_text: smoky roasted pork, garlicky broccoli rabe
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven for roasting. 2. Season the pork with spices. 3. Roast the pork until tender. 4. Sauté broccoli rabe with garlic. 5. Assemble the sandwich with pork and broccoli rabe. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your handheld happiness. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Prawn Pad See Ew
description: This is one of the greatest Thai recipes ever, Prawn Pad See Ew, a very simple noodle stir-fry with charred chewy rice noodles, juicy prawns, egg and greens in a lovely salty sauce. It serves as a quick and easy dinner.
ingredients_text: rice noodles, prawns, egg, greens, salty sauce
instructions_text: 1. Soak rice noodles in hot water until soft. 2. Heat oil in a pan and stir-fry prawns until cooked. 3. Add greens and stir-fry until wilted. 4. Push ingredients to the side and scramble the egg. 5. Add noodles and pour in the salty sauce. 6. Toss everything together until well combined. 7. Cook for a few more minutes until heated through. 8. Serve hot.

title: Egg Drop Soup
description: A warm, comforting bowl of Egg Drop Soup that takes only 15-20 minutes to prepare. This soup is naturally low in calories but rich in taste, perfect for a chilly day.
ingredients_text: Eggs, chicken broth, cornstarch, green onions, soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Bring chicken broth to a boil. 2. Whisk eggs in a bowl. 3. Mix cornstarch with water to create a slurry. 4. Stir the slurry into the broth. 5. Slowly pour in the eggs while stirring. 6. Add soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and pepper. 7. Garnish with chopped green onions. 8. Serve warm.

title: Sugar Cookie Cinnamon Toast Crunch Treats
description: A super simple and festive treat made with sugar cookie cinnamon toast crunch, marshmallows, and festive sprinkles. It takes less than 10 minutes to make!
ingredients_text: sugar cookie cinnamon toast crunch, marshmallows, festive sprinkles
instructions_text: 1. In a large bowl, combine sugar cookie cinnamon toast crunch and marshmallows. 2. Melt marshmallows in the microwave for about 30 seconds. 3. Stir the mixture until well combined. 4. Press the mixture into a greased pan. 5. Sprinkle festive sprinkles on top. 6. Allow to cool for a few minutes. 7. Cut into squares. 8. Serve and enjoy!

title: Cornbread Cake
description: A delightful combination of cornbread and cake, perfect for dessert or an afternoon treat. This cornbread cake is moist, tender, and sweet, with a shiny golden top, cream cheese frosting, and a drizzle of honey.
ingredients_text: cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, eggs, milk, butter, cream cheese, honey
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. 3. In another bowl, whisk eggs, milk, and melted butter. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients until just mixed. 5. Pour batter into a greased baking pan. 6. Bake for 30-35 minutes until golden. 7. Let cool, then frost with cream cheese and drizzle with honey. 8. Slice and serve.

title: Spaghetti Carbonara
description: A classic Italian pasta dish made with eggs, cheese, pancetta, and pepper.
ingredients_text: spaghetti, eggs, cheese, pancetta, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook spaghetti in salted water until al dente. 2. In a bowl, whisk eggs and cheese together. 3. In a pan, cook pancetta until crispy. 4. Drain spaghetti and add to the pan with pancetta. 5. Remove from heat and mix in egg and cheese mixture. 6. Stir quickly to create a creamy sauce. 7. Season with pepper. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Homemade Chicken Noodle Soup
description: Homemade Chicken Noodle Soup Sometimes all you need is a warm hearty bowl of chicken noodle soup, easy to make and filling! Good to freeze too!
ingredients_text: chicken, noodles, vegetables, broth, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Boil chicken in a pot of water. 2. Remove chicken, shred, and set aside. 3. In the same pot, add vegetables and cook until tender. 4. Add noodles and cook until al dente. 5. Return shredded chicken to the pot. 6. Season with herbs and spices. 7. Simmer for a few minutes. 8. Serve hot.

title: Spicy Chicken Parm Sandwich
description: Spicy Chicken Parm Sandwich with Miso Pesto featuring Leggo’s Gourmet Tomato & Umami Papi Chilli Oil Pasta Sauce.
ingredients_text: Spicy chicken, miso pesto, Leggo’s Gourmet Tomato & Umami Papi Chilli Oil Pasta Sauce, sandwich bread
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven. 2. Prepare spicy chicken by seasoning and cooking. 3. Mix miso pesto. 4. Assemble sandwich with chicken, pesto, and sauce. 5. Bake until golden. 6. Serve hot. 7. Enjoy with sides. 8. Store leftovers properly.

title: Chili Crab Spaghetti
description: A no-cook pasta sauce that lets summer’s best produce do all the work. It’s fresh, bright, and comes together with just a little chopping and a lot of olive oil. The only cooking required is boiling the pasta.
ingredients_text: spaghetti, summer produce, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Boil water and cook spaghetti according to package instructions. 2. Chop summer produce. 3. In a bowl, combine chopped produce with olive oil. 4. Drain spaghetti and add to the bowl. 5. Toss to combine. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your fresh pasta dish.

title: Tortellini Soup And Cheesy Garlic Bread
description: A heartwarming tortellini soup with rich chicken base, vegetables, herbs, cheese and bacon, and accompanied by cheesy garlic bread to make your autumn meals cozy and delicious. Prep time: 20 minutes. Cooking time: 50 minutes.
ingredients_text: tortellini, chicken broth, vegetables, herbs, cheese, bacon, garlic, bread
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the chicken broth. 2. Add vegetables and herbs to the broth. 3. Cook tortellini in the broth until tender. 4. In a separate bowl, mix cheese and garlic. 5. Spread the cheese mixture on bread. 6. Bake the bread until golden. 7. Serve the soup hot with cheesy garlic bread. 8. Enjoy your cozy meal.

title: Crispy Chicken + Garlicky Greens
description: A one-pan crispy chicken with creamy garlicky spinach. It's grain-free, gluten-free and perfect for a fancy yet easy weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: chicken, spinach, garlic, cream, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Season the chicken. 2. Heat oil in a pan and fry the chicken until crispy. 3. Remove chicken and set aside. 4. In the same pan, sauté garlic. 5. Add spinach and cream, cooking until wilted. 6. Return chicken to the pan. 7. Cook for a few more minutes. 8. Serve hot.

title: Roasted Cauliflower Tomato Soup
description: A perfect soup for transitioning from summer to fall, featuring cauliflower, tomatoes, and white beans.
ingredients_text: cauliflower, tomatoes, white beans
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast cauliflower until golden. 2. Sauté onions and garlic. 3. Add roasted cauliflower and tomatoes to the pot. 4. Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a boil. 5. Blend the mixture until smooth. 6. Stir in white beans and heat through. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve warm.

title: One-Pan Pork Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy one-pan pork stir fry with green beans and a hoisin-peanut butter sauce. Tastes like takeout, but faster.
ingredients_text: pork, green beans, hoisin sauce, peanut butter
instructions_text: 1. Heat a pan over medium heat. 2. Add pork and cook until browned. 3. Stir in green beans and cook until tender. 4. In a bowl, mix hoisin sauce and peanut butter. 5. Pour sauce over pork and beans. 6. Stir to combine and heat through. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your quick stir fry!

title: Air Fryer Bang Bang Shrimp
description: Enjoy the crispy delight of Bang Bang Shrimp prepared effortlessly in an air fryer, perfectly paired with a sweet, sour, and spicy sauce.
ingredients_text: shrimp, flour, cornstarch, egg, breadcrumbs, sweet chili sauce, mayonnaise, sriracha, green onions
instructions_text: 1. Preheat air fryer to 400°F (200°C). 2. In a bowl, mix flour, cornstarch, and seasonings. 3. Dip shrimp in egg, then coat with the flour mixture. 4. Place shrimp in the air fryer basket in a single layer. 5. Cook for 10-12 minutes until crispy. 6. In a separate bowl, mix sweet chili sauce, mayonnaise, and sriracha. 7. Toss cooked shrimp in the sauce. 8. Garnish with chopped green onions and serve.

title: Crispy Air Fryer Garlic Parmesan Fries
description: Crispy Air Fryer Garlic Parmesan Fries
ingredients_text: potatoes, garlic, parmesan cheese, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cut potatoes into fries. 2. Toss with olive oil, minced garlic, salt, and pepper. 3. Preheat air fryer to 400°F (200°C). 4. Place fries in the air fryer basket in a single layer. 5. Cook for 25-30 minutes, shaking halfway through. 6. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese before serving. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your crispy fries!

title: Chicken Sliders With Caesar Salad And Garlic Aioli
description: Add delicious flavor to your favorite recipe with @chosenfoods condiments made with 100% pure avocado oil and simple ingredients
ingredients_text: chicken, slider buns, Caesar salad, garlic aioli, avocado oil
instructions_text: 1. Grill the chicken until fully cooked. 2. Prepare the Caesar salad. 3. Mix garlic aioli ingredients. 4. Assemble sliders with chicken and salad. 5. Serve with extra aioli on the side. 6. Enjoy as a lunch option. 7. Optionally, add toppings of choice. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Mexican Shrimp Bowl & Corn Salsa With Cilantro Lime Sauce
description: A flavorful Mexican shrimp bowl with corn and black bean salsa, topped with a creamy cilantro lime sauce.
ingredients_text: shrimp, corn, black beans, cilantro, lime, cream
instructions_text: 1. Cook shrimp until pink. 2. Prepare corn and black bean salsa. 3. Mix cilantro and lime into cream for sauce. 4. Assemble shrimp bowl with salsa. 5. Drizzle cilantro lime sauce on top. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: One Pot Teriyaki Chicken and Rice
description: A quick and flavorful one pot dinner that is easy to prepare and clean up. Perfect for your weeknight rotation.
ingredients_text: chicken, rice, teriyaki sauce, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Heat a pot over medium heat. 2. Add chicken and cook until browned. 3. Stir in rice and teriyaki sauce. 4. Add vegetables and water. 5. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat. 6. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes. 7. Fluff rice with a fork. 8. Serve hot.

title: Slow Cooker Garlic Pulled Beef Pasta
description: An easy meal perfect for busy people, this slow cooker garlic pulled beef pasta takes just 20 minutes of prep and cooks throughout the day. It's a fuss-free recipe that's ready to go straight after the school run.
ingredients_text: pulled beef, garlic, pasta, salt, pepper, olive oil, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Season the beef with salt and pepper. 2. Sear the beef in a pan with olive oil. 3. Add garlic and herbs to the slow cooker. 4. Place the seared beef in the slow cooker. 5. Cook on low for 6-8 hours. 6. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 7. Shred the beef and mix with pasta. 8. Serve warm.

title: Sausage Gnocchi Soup
description: This sausage gnocchi soup is one of my favorite soups to make for my family every fall/winter season.
ingredients_text: gnocchi, sausage, broth, vegetables, spices
instructions_text: 1. Brown the sausage in a pot. 2. Add chopped vegetables and sauté. 3. Pour in broth and bring to a boil. 4. Stir in gnocchi and cook until tender. 5. Season with spices. 6. Simmer for a few minutes. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy with bread if desired.

title: Healthy Chicken Nuggets
description: These chicken nuggets are absolutely delicious and healthier than any fast food restaurant! Made with simple ingredients and they even sneak in some hidden veggies. Easy to freeze and reheat, these are a must try for back to school time!
ingredients_text: chicken breast, breadcrumbs, hidden veggies, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the chicken and veggies. 3. Mix breadcrumbs and spices. 4. Coat chicken pieces with the mixture. 5. Bake until golden brown. 6. Let cool before serving. 7. Freeze leftovers if desired. 8. Reheat before serving.

title: Creamy Chicken & Broccoli Sheet Pan Lasagna
description: Creamy chicken and broccoli sheet pan lasagna by @maxiskitchen
ingredients_text: chicken, broccoli, lasagna noodles, cream, cheese, garlic, onion, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the chicken and broccoli. 3. Prepare the lasagna noodles. 4. Mix cream and cheese. 5. Layer noodles, chicken, broccoli, and cream mixture. 6. Repeat layers. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: One-Pan Baked Butter Chicken
description: A delicious one-pan baked butter chicken recipe.
ingredients_text: butter, chicken, spices, cream, garlic, ginger, onion, tomatoes
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Melt butter in a pan. 3. Sauté garlic, ginger, and onion. 4. Add chicken and spices, mix well. 5. Pour in cream and tomatoes. 6. Transfer to a baking dish. 7. Bake until chicken is cooked through. 8. Serve hot.

title: Chai Spiced Rice Pudding with Cardamom Cream
description: This comforting rice pudding is infused with warm chai spices and topped with a cardamom-scented cream, offering a cozy and aromatic dessert.
ingredients_text: rice, chai spices, cream, cardamom, sugar, milk
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice in milk until tender. 2. Stir in chai spices and sugar. 3. Simmer until thickened. 4. Whip cream with cardamom. 5. Serve rice pudding warm or chilled. 6. Top with cardamom cream. 7. Garnish with additional spices if desired. 8. Enjoy your comforting dessert.

title: Cranberry & Cinnamon Sour
description: A refreshing cocktail combining the tartness of cranberry and the warmth of cinnamon.
ingredients_text: cranberry juice, cinnamon, ice
instructions_text: 1. Fill a shaker with ice. 2. Add cranberry juice and cinnamon. 3. Shake well. 4. Strain into a glass. 5. Garnish with a cinnamon stick if desired. 6. Serve immediately.

title: The Creamiest Baked Mac And Cheese
description: A creamy and rich baked mac and cheese with a blend of cheeses for a deep and warm flavor.
ingredients_text: macaroni, cheese blend, milk, butter, flour, eggs, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook macaroni until al dente. 3. In a saucepan, melt butter and whisk in flour. 4. Gradually add milk and stir until thickened. 5. Mix in cheese until melted. 6. Combine macaroni with cheese sauce and pour into a baking dish. 7. Bake until golden and bubbly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Lasagna Soup
description: This Lasagna Soup was so cozy and warm, perfect for the cooler nights! You probably have most of the ingredients in your pantry!
ingredients_text: lasagna noodles, ground beef, onion, garlic, diced tomatoes, chicken broth, Italian seasoning, mozzarella cheese, parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook the ground beef with onion and garlic until browned. 2. Add diced tomatoes and chicken broth. 3. Stir in Italian seasoning. 4. Break lasagna noodles into pieces and add to the pot. 5. Simmer until noodles are cooked. 6. Serve hot, topped with mozzarella and parmesan cheese. 7. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired. 8. Enjoy your cozy lasagna soup!

title: Slow Roasted Salmon With Salsa Verde
description: A slow-roasted salmon recipe with a classic Italian salsa verde. The salmon is slow-roasted in high-quality, buttery olive oil, and the salsa verde is made with precise measurements for a fool-proof result.
ingredients_text: salmon, olive oil, salsa verde ingredients
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven for slow roasting. 2. Prepare the salmon with olive oil. 3. Mix salsa verde ingredients. 4. Place salmon in the oven. 5. Roast for 60 minutes. 6. Serve with salsa verde. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Crispy Chipotle Chicken Tacos
description: Crispy baked tacos with chicken marinated in a smoky Chipotle sauce, sautéed with peppers and onions, filled with a Chipotle crema and mozzarella cheese, then baked until melted and crispy.
ingredients_text: chicken, chipotle sauce, peppers, onions, chipotle crema, mozzarella cheese, taco shells
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in chipotle sauce. 2. Sauté peppers and onions until soft. 3. Combine chicken with sautéed vegetables. 4. Fill taco shells with chicken mixture and mozzarella. 5. Bake until cheese is melted and crispy. 6. Drizzle with chipotle crema. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your tacos!

title: Herby Turkey Burgers With No Mayo Slaw
description: Fresh and flavorful turkey burgers with a mayo-free slaw, perfect for a Labor Day menu. Can be made on the grill or on the stovetop.
ingredients_text: ground turkey, lettuce, cabbage, carrots, vinegar, olive oil, spices
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix ground turkey with spices. 2. Form into patties. 3. Grill or cook on stovetop until cooked through. 4. In another bowl, combine shredded cabbage, carrots, vinegar, and olive oil for slaw. 5. Serve turkey burgers with slaw on top. 6. Enjoy with your favorite sides.

title: Crispy Cajun Honey Chicken Burgers
description: Sweet, spicy, crispy Cajun Honey Chicken Burgers. No need for takeaway when you can make this at home.
ingredients_text: chicken, Cajun seasoning, honey, burger buns, lettuce, tomato, mayonnaise
instructions_text: 1. Season chicken with Cajun seasoning. 2. Cook chicken in a skillet until crispy. 3. Mix honey with mayonnaise. 4. Toast burger buns. 5. Assemble burgers with chicken, lettuce, tomato, and honey mayo. 6. Serve with fries or salad. 7. Enjoy your homemade burgers! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala Sliders
description: Tender chicken marinated in bold Indian spices, cooked in creamy tikka masala and served on soft toasted buns. A perfect bite of tradition and flavor.
ingredients_text: tender chicken, Indian spices, creamy tikka masala, soft toasted buns
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in Indian spices. 2. Cook chicken in tikka masala sauce. 3. Toast buns. 4. Assemble sliders with chicken and sauce. 5. Serve warm. 6. Enjoy as a lunch or party snack.

title: Steak Chimichurri Loaded Fries
description: Steak Chimichurri Loaded Fries. So good!!
ingredients_text: fries, steak, chimichurri sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook fries according to package instructions. 2. Grill or pan-sear steak to desired doneness. 3. Let steak rest, then slice thinly. 4. Prepare chimichurri sauce. 5. Layer fries on a serving platter. 6. Top fries with sliced steak. 7. Drizzle chimichurri sauce over the top. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Chipotle Cheddar Chicken Rolled Tacos
description: Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner, these come together fast, thanks to just a handful of simple ingredients — rotisserie chicken, jarred salsa, greek yogurt, shredded cheese, and carb balance tortillas.
ingredients_text: rotisserie chicken, jarred salsa, greek yogurt, shredded cheese, carb balance tortillas
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Shred the rotisserie chicken. 3. Mix chicken with salsa, yogurt, and cheese. 4. Fill tortillas with the mixture. 5. Roll the tortillas tightly. 6. Place rolled tacos in a baking dish. 7. Bake until golden and crispy. 8. Serve warm.

title: Pomegranate Aperol Spritz
description: This modern twist on the classic Aperol Spritz combines the vibrant flavors of pomegranate and prosecco with a hint of rosemary. The result is a refreshing and visually stunning cocktail that's perfect for any occasion.
ingredients_text: pomegranate juice, Aperol, prosecco, rosemary, ice
instructions_text: 1. Fill a glass with ice. 2. Pour in pomegranate juice and Aperol. 3. Top with prosecco. 4. Stir gently to combine. 5. Garnish with a sprig of rosemary. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your refreshing cocktail. 8. Optional: Add pomegranate seeds for extra flair.

title: Spaghetti with Sweet Corn Pesto
description: When I started writing this book, I knew there was one recipe that had to make the cut. This spaghetti was one of the first recipes I ever published on my website, and to this day it's by far the recipe I hear about the most from friends, family, and readers online. With fresh corn, cherry tomatoes, and basil, this pasta is a celebration of all things summer, but it's the corn 'pesto' — a sauce made with sautéed corn, garlic, Parmesan, and olive oil — that really makes it special. It's sweet, creamy, and savory with a flavor truly all its own. This recipe epitomizes the kind of food I like to make — it's colorful, fun to eat, and a little bit unexpected. And while it may use more pans and equipment than my average recipe, when you want to make a serious summer crowd-pleaser, it's worth every minute.
ingredients_text: spaghetti, fresh corn, cherry tomatoes, basil, garlic, Parmesan, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions. 2. Sauté corn and garlic in olive oil until tender. 3. Blend sautéed corn, Parmesan, and basil to create pesto. 4. Toss cooked spaghetti with corn pesto. 5. Add cherry tomatoes and mix well. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve warm, garnished with extra basil. 8. Enjoy your colorful summer dish!

title: Peach, Basil & Goat Cheese Salad
description: If you’re looking for the ultimate summer salad, this Peach, Basil, and Goat Cheese Salad with (3 ingredient!) Creamy White Balsamic Dressing strikes the perfect balance of fresh, creamy, and bright. Vegetarian and gluten free, enjoy as a light lunch or a side dish that steals the show.
ingredients_text: peaches, fresh basil, goat cheese, white balsamic dressing
instructions_text: 1. Slice peaches and arrange on a plate. 2. Tear basil leaves and sprinkle over peaches. 3. Crumble goat cheese on top. 4. Drizzle with white balsamic dressing. 5. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy as a light lunch or side dish. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Browned Butter Madeleines
description: Delicious madeleines with a delicately crisp exterior and rich, custardy-cakey crumb, featuring browned butter, almond flour, and orange zest.
ingredients_text: browned butter, almond flour, orange zest, sugar, eggs, all-purpose flour, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the madeleine pan. 2. Brown the butter and let it cool. 3. Whisk together eggs and sugar until frothy. 4. Mix in almond flour, all-purpose flour, baking powder, and salt. 5. Fold in the browned butter and orange zest. 6. Fill the madeleine molds and bake until golden. 7. Let cool before removing from the pan. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Cheesy Beef Enchilada Skillet
description: Cheesy Beef Enchilada Skillet is an easy one pan dinner you can make with 1lb of ground beef!
ingredients_text: 1 lb ground beef, cheese, enchilada sauce, tortillas, spices
instructions_text: 1. Brown the ground beef in a skillet. 2. Drain excess fat. 3. Add enchilada sauce and spices. 4. Stir in tortillas and mix well. 5. Top with cheese. 6. Cover and cook until cheese melts. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Grilled Honey Harissa Chicken Thighs
description: Juicy, caramelized, and seriously addictive chicken thighs with a honey harissa flavor. Can be grilled or baked.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, honey, harissa, salt, pepper
