instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken thighs with honey and harissa. 2. Preheat grill or oven. 3. Season with salt and pepper. 4. Grill or bake until cooked through. 5. Caramelize the exterior for extra flavor. 6. Let rest before serving. 7. Serve with your choice of sides. 8. Enjoy your juicy chicken!

title: Cauliflower Shawarma Bowl
description: Crispy charred cauliflower piled over creamy hummus with a fiery yet zingy tahini sauce to bring it all together with a colorful riot of flavours and textures.
ingredients_text: cauliflower, hummus, tahini sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking sheet. 2. Cut cauliflower into florets and toss with oil and spices. 3. Roast cauliflower until crispy and charred. 4. Prepare hummus and spread it in a bowl. 5. Drizzle tahini sauce over the hummus. 6. Top with roasted cauliflower. 7. Garnish with fresh herbs or vegetables. 8. Serve warm and enjoy.

title: Curry & Sausage Rolls With Mango Mayo
description: A delicious and easy-to-make recipe perfect for the holiday season, featuring curry-flavored sausage rolls with a mango mayo dip.
ingredients_text: curry-flavored sausage, mayo, mango
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the curry-flavored sausage rolls. 3. Bake the sausage rolls until golden. 4. While baking, mix mayo with mango. 5. Serve the sausage rolls with mango mayo dip. 6. Enjoy as a holiday snack. 7. Store leftovers in the fridge. 8. Reheat before serving if desired.

title: Baked Feta And Butternut Squash Pasta
description: A delicious remake of the viral baked feta pasta, this version is made with butternut squash, sage, hot honey and garlic. It's a perfect dish to welcome the fall season.
ingredients_text: butternut squash, sage, hot honey, garlic, feta cheese, pasta
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Toss butternut squash with olive oil, sage, and garlic. 3. Place feta in the center and drizzle with hot honey. 4. Bake until squash is tender and feta is golden. 5. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 6. Combine baked ingredients with pasta. 7. Toss well to mix flavors. 8. Serve warm.

title: Lemon Parmesan Sesame Salad
description: A refreshing and tangy salad with a homemade lemon sesame vinaigrette. Perfect as a house salad and can be customized with additional ingredients like tomato, peaches, or corn in the summer.
ingredients_text: mixed greens, lemon juice, sesame oil, Parmesan cheese, salt, pepper, optional tomatoes, peaches, corn
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, whisk together lemon juice, sesame oil, salt, and pepper. 2. In a large salad bowl, combine mixed greens. 3. Drizzle the vinaigrette over the greens. 4. Toss to coat evenly. 5. Add Parmesan cheese and any optional ingredients. 6. Toss gently again. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad!

title: Strawberry Puff Pastry Cups
description: Another fun combo of ingredients that absolutely cannot go wrong - perfect for a brunch party! Easy to put together and look way fancy.
ingredients_text: puff pastry, strawberries, sugar, whipped cream
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking sheet. 2. Roll out the puff pastry and cut into squares. 3. Place the pastry squares on the baking sheet. 4. Bake until golden brown. 5. Allow to cool slightly. 6. Fill each cup with strawberries and whipped cream. 7. Dust with sugar if desired. 8. Serve at brunch.

title: Italian Wedding Soup
description: Simple, filling, savory, and soooo delicious.
ingredients_text: meatballs, chicken broth, spinach, carrots, onions, pasta, garlic, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Prepare meatballs and set aside. 2. In a pot, heat chicken broth. 3. Add chopped onions, carrots, and garlic; cook until soft. 4. Stir in meatballs and pasta; simmer until cooked. 5. Add spinach and herbs; cook until wilted. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your savory soup.

title: Asparagus & Cod With Butter Beans
description: Cod rubbed with a quick herby mayo, nestled over a creamy, brothy base of butter beans and asparagus. Everything cooks together in minutes, with asparagus adding its luxe, fleeting magic to what is otherwise a very simple dinner.
ingredients_text: Cod, herby mayo, butter beans, asparagus
instructions_text: 1. Rub cod with herby mayo. 2. In a pot, combine butter beans and asparagus. 3. Place cod on top of the beans and asparagus. 4. Cook everything together on stovetop. 5. Simmer until cod is cooked through. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your simple dinner. 8. Garnish if desired.

title: Saucy Chicken Stir Fry
description: A delicious stir fry with ground chicken, fresh vegetables, and a homemade orange sauce, served over white rice.
ingredients_text: ground chicken, fresh vegetables, homemade orange sauce, white rice
instructions_text: 1. Cook white rice according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat oil and sauté fresh vegetables. 3. Add ground chicken and cook until browned. 4. Mix in homemade orange sauce and stir well. 5. Simmer for a few minutes. 6. Serve the stir fry over cooked rice. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Cheesy Chicken & Spinach Ravioli Bake
description: A guaranteed crowd pleaser that’s six ingredient-easy and can be on the table in under 30 minutes. This recipe is ultra versatile and can be made the night before for ease.
ingredients_text: ravioli, chicken, spinach, cheese, cream, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the ravioli according to package instructions. 3. In a bowl, mix cooked ravioli, chicken, spinach, and cheese. 4. Transfer to a baking dish. 5. Pour cream over the mixture. 6. Season to taste. 7. Bake until golden and bubbly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Warm Carrot & Avocado Salad
description: An easy salad or healthy appetizer that pairs roasted carrots with a yogurt feta sauce, avocado, and a variety of spices. Can be served as an appetizer, a warm salad, or a main dish paired with shrimp.
ingredients_text: roasted carrots, yogurt, feta cheese, avocado, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast the carrots until tender. 2. In a bowl, mix yogurt and crumbled feta. 3. Slice the avocado. 4. Combine roasted carrots and avocado. 5. Drizzle with yogurt feta sauce. 6. Season with spices. 7. Serve warm as a salad or appetizer. 8. Optionally, pair with shrimp.

title: Best Chicken Noodle Soup
description: A hearty and flavorful chicken noodle soup with a unique touch of fennel, lemon zest, and Parmesan rinds. Served with toasted baguette.
ingredients_text: chicken, noodles, fennel, lemon zest, Parmesan rinds, toasted baguette
instructions_text: 1. Boil chicken in water until cooked. 2. Remove chicken and shred. 3. Add noodles and fennel to the broth. 4. Cook until noodles are tender. 5. Stir in lemon zest and Parmesan rinds. 6. Return shredded chicken to the pot. 7. Season to taste. 8. Serve with toasted baguette.

title: Bacon, Egg And Cheese Bagels
description: On the menu for breakfast this week: bacon, egg and cheese bagels. A delicious and nutritious breakfast that can be prepared in advance and kept in the fridge for up to 4 days.
ingredients_text: bagels, bacon, eggs, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook bacon until crispy. 2. Fry eggs to desired doneness. 3. Slice bagels and toast them. 4. Layer bacon, egg, and cheese on bagels. 5. Assemble bagels. 6. Wrap in foil for storage. 7. Refrigerate for up to 4 days. 8. Reheat before serving.

title: Easy 1-Pan Lemon Orzo Pasta With Shrimp
description: A quick and easy lemon orzo pasta with shrimp, ready in under 30 minutes.
ingredients_text: orzo pasta, shrimp, lemon, garlic, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook orzo pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat olive oil and sauté garlic. 3. Add shrimp and cook until pink. 4. Stir in cooked orzo and lemon juice. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Mix well and heat through. 7. Serve warm. 8. Garnish with lemon zest if desired.

title: Butternut Squash And Italian Chicken Sausage Skillet Dinner
description: An easy, comforting, and nourishing skillet dinner featuring butternut squash and Italian chicken sausage. Perfect for a cozy fall meal.
ingredients_text: butternut squash, Italian chicken sausage
instructions_text: 1. Heat a skillet over medium heat. 2. Add sliced Italian chicken sausage and cook until browned. 3. Add diced butternut squash to the skillet. 4. Stir and cook until squash is tender. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Cook for an additional 5 minutes. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your comforting meal.

title: Caramel Peanut Bars
description: Gooey, crunchy, chocolatey caramel peanut bars made with simple, wholesome ingredients. No-bake, dairy-free, and delicious.
ingredients_text: peanuts, caramel, chocolate, oats, maple syrup
instructions_text: 1. Prepare a baking dish with parchment paper. 2. Mix peanuts, oats, and maple syrup in a bowl. 3. Melt caramel and chocolate together. 4. Combine the mixture with the melted caramel and chocolate. 5. Press the mixture into the baking dish. 6. Refrigerate until set. 7. Cut into bars. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Pumpkin Pie Cake Bars
description: Deliciously spiced pumpkin pie layer over a moist cake base, perfect for autumn celebrations.
ingredients_text: pumpkin puree, sugar, eggs, flour, baking powder, spices, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix pumpkin puree, sugar, and eggs. 3. Combine flour, baking powder, and spices. 4. Mix dry ingredients into wet ingredients. 5. Pour batter into a baking dish. 6. Bake for 50 minutes. 7. Cool before cutting into bars. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Pasta Salad With Green Goddess Dressing
description: This is a favorite pasta dish that combines pasta and salad, prepared in just 25 minutes.
ingredients_text: pasta, green goddess dressing, assorted vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Drain and rinse under cold water. 3. In a bowl, mix pasta with assorted vegetables. 4. Add green goddess dressing and toss to combine. 5. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 6. Chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes. 7. Serve cold. 8. Enjoy your refreshing pasta salad.

title: Melting Carrots With Lemon & Dill
description: A delicious side dish featuring carrots roasted to perfection with lemon and dill.
ingredients_text: carrots, lemon, dill
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Peel and cut carrots. 3. Toss carrots with lemon juice and dill. 4. Spread on a baking sheet. 5. Roast until tender. 6. Stir occasionally. 7. Remove from oven. 8. Serve warm.

title: Honey Buffalo Chicken Bites With Mac N Cheese
description: Honey buffalo chicken bites with Mac N cheese
ingredients_text: chicken bites, honey, buffalo sauce, macaroni, cheese, milk, butter, flour
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare chicken bites by coating them in honey and buffalo sauce. 3. Bake chicken bites until cooked through. 4. Cook macaroni according to package instructions. 5. In a saucepan, melt butter and whisk in flour to make a roux. 6. Gradually add milk and cheese to create a cheese sauce. 7. Combine macaroni with cheese sauce. 8. Serve chicken bites alongside mac and cheese.

title: Green Beans With Tahini Sbagliato
description: A simple summery side dish featuring green beans with a tahini-based dressing, adapted from Samin Nosrat's Tahini Sbagliato.
ingredients_text: green beans, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Boil green beans until tender. 2. In a bowl, mix tahini, lemon juice, minced garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper. 3. Drain green beans and let cool slightly. 4. Toss green beans with tahini dressing. 5. Adjust seasoning to taste. 6. Serve as a side dish. 7. Enjoy chilled or at room temperature.

title: End Of Summer Mac And Cheese
description: A rich and creamy mac and cheese recipe featuring a blend of gouda, provolone, sharp cheddar, and colby jack cheeses, perfect for celebrating the end of summer.
ingredients_text: macaroni, gouda cheese, provolone cheese, sharp cheddar cheese, colby jack cheese, milk, butter, flour, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Cook macaroni according to package instructions. 3. In a saucepan, melt butter and whisk in flour to create a roux. 4. Gradually add milk, stirring until thickened. 5. Stir in cheeses until melted and smooth. 6. Combine macaroni with cheese sauce, mixing well. 7. Transfer to a baking dish and bake for 30 minutes. 8. Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Classic Mac & Cheese
description: A comforting and familiar dish of macaroni and cheese, with a twist of caramelized onions and garlic.
ingredients_text: macaroni, cheese, caramelized onions, garlic
instructions_text: 1. Boil macaroni until al dente. 2. In a pan, caramelize onions and garlic. 3. Mix cooked macaroni with cheese and caramelized mixture. 4. Transfer to a baking dish. 5. Bake until golden and bubbly. 6. Let cool slightly. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your classic mac & cheese.

title: Cajun Seafood Ravioli Alfredo
description: Cheesy ravioli loaded with shrimp, lobster & crab in a creamy Cajun Alfredo sauce
ingredients_text: ravioli, shrimp, lobster, crab, creamy Cajun Alfredo sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook ravioli according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, heat Cajun Alfredo sauce. 3. Add shrimp, lobster, and crab to the sauce. 4. Cook until seafood is heated through. 5. Drain ravioli and add to the skillet. 6. Toss to coat ravioli in the sauce. 7. Serve hot, garnished with parsley if desired. 8. Enjoy your rich, cheesy dish!

title: Warm Cinnamon Apple Stovetop Oats
description: These warm cinnamon apple stovetop oats taste just like an apple pie, perfect for cooler weather.
ingredients_text: oats, cinnamon, apples, water, sugar, salt
instructions_text: 1. In a pot, combine oats, water, and salt. 2. Bring to a boil. 3. Reduce heat and simmer for 5-10 minutes. 4. Stir in chopped apples and cinnamon. 5. Cook until apples are tender. 6. Add sugar to taste. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your comforting bowl of oats.

title: Apple & Blueberry Cake
description: When the air turns crisp and the mornings become misty, it’s the perfect time to fill your kitchen with the scent of cinnamon, apples and blueberries.
ingredients_text: apples, blueberries, cinnamon, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, baking powder
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix flour, sugar, and baking powder. 3. In another bowl, beat eggs and mix with melted butter. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients. 5. Fold in apples and blueberries. 6. Pour batter into a greased pan. 7. Bake until golden brown. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Cinnamon Rolls with Brown Sugar Pecan Filling and Maple Glaze
description: Delicious cinnamon rolls filled with a rich brown sugar and pecan filling, topped with a sweet maple glaze. Perfect for breakfast or as a sweet treat!
ingredients_text: cinnamon, brown sugar, pecans, maple syrup, flour, yeast, milk, butter, eggs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Prepare dough with flour, yeast, milk, and eggs. 3. Roll out dough and spread brown sugar and pecan filling. 4. Roll dough tightly and cut into rolls. 5. Place rolls in a baking dish and let rise. 6. Bake for 25-30 minutes until golden. 7. Prepare maple glaze and drizzle over warm rolls. 8. Serve and enjoy!

title: Katsu Curry
description: Dinner doesn’t have to be complicated to feel special. This is weeknight, Katsu Curry. S&B Golden Curry cubes do all the hard work. Making this meal, easy, delicious and stress free!
ingredients_text: S&B Golden Curry cubes, chicken, rice
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. Prepare chicken by coating it in flour and frying until golden. 3. In a separate pot, dissolve S&B Golden Curry cubes in water. 4. Simmer the curry sauce until thickened. 5. Serve the fried chicken over rice. 6. Pour the curry sauce over the chicken and rice. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Teriyaki Chicken Noodles
description: The perfect weekend Fakeaway, quick, easy & delicious. Has the flavours of a Chinese take out, but made at home in under 20 minutes.
ingredients_text: chicken, teriyaki sauce, noodles, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook noodles according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat teriyaki sauce. 3. Add sliced chicken and cook until browned. 4. Stir in vegetables and cook until tender. 5. Combine cooked noodles with chicken and sauce. 6. Toss to coat evenly. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your homemade takeout!

title: The Best Homemade Meatball Subs
description: The Best Homemade Meatball Subs
ingredients_text: meatballs, sub rolls, marinara sauce, mozzarella cheese, Italian seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). 2. Prepare meatballs and bake for 25 minutes. 3. Heat marinara sauce in a pan. 4. Place meatballs in sub rolls. 5. Top with marinara sauce and mozzarella cheese. 6. Bake assembled subs for 10 minutes. 7. Remove from oven and let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Tomato Sandwich
description: A classic tomato sandwich recipe with ripe tomatoes, mayo, and lightly toasted bread. For extra flavor, the mayo is dressed up with salt, pepper, lemon juice, and grated garlic.
ingredients_text: ripe tomatoes, mayo, bread, salt, pepper, lemon juice, grated garlic
instructions_text: 1. Toast the bread lightly. 2. In a bowl, mix mayo with salt, pepper, lemon juice, and grated garlic. 3. Slice the ripe tomatoes. 4. Spread the mayo mixture on the toasted bread. 5. Layer the sliced tomatoes on top. 6. Close the sandwich with another slice of bread. 7. Cut in half and serve. 8. Enjoy your classic tomato sandwich.

title: Red Coconut & Lime Poached Fish
description: A healthy dinner option that can be prepared in 30 minutes. This recipe features fish poached in a flavorful red coconut and lime sauce.
ingredients_text: fish, red coconut milk, lime, spices
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the red coconut milk and lime sauce. 2. Heat the sauce in a pan. 3. Add the fish to the pan. 4. Poach the fish for about 10-15 minutes. 5. Ensure the fish is cooked through. 6. Serve the fish with the sauce. 7. Garnish with lime if desired. 8. Enjoy your healthy dinner.

title: Salted Honey Butter Jalapeño Cheddar Rolls
description: Delicious rolls perfect for family dinners, served warm with salted honey butter that melts into every inch of each roll.
ingredients_text: flour, jalapeños, cheddar cheese, honey, butter, salt, yeast, water
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix flour, yeast, and salt. 3. Add water and knead until smooth. 4. Fold in jalapeños and cheddar. 5. Let dough rise until doubled. 6. Shape into rolls and place on a baking sheet. 7. Bake until golden brown. 8. Serve warm with salted honey butter.

title: Raspberry And White Chocolate Muffins
description: Raspberry and white chocolate muffins.. the perfect grab and go snack. They’re so easy to make and such a perfect way to use up ripe bananas.
ingredients_text: raspberries, white chocolate, ripe bananas, flour, sugar, eggs, baking powder, salt, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mash the ripe bananas. 3. Mix in sugar, eggs, and melted butter. 4. Fold in flour, baking powder, and salt. 5. Gently add raspberries and white chocolate. 6. Spoon the mixture into muffin tins. 7. Bake for 25 minutes or until golden. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Sweet Potato Fajita Bowl
description: A flavorful bowl featuring sweet potatoes, taco mince, caramelized veggies, and guacamole, perfect for a healthy meal.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, taco mince, caramelized veggies, guacamole
instructions_text: 1. Boil sweet potatoes until tender. 2. Cook taco mince in a skillet. 3. Caramelize veggies in another pan. 4. Combine sweet potatoes, taco mince, and veggies in a bowl. 5. Top with guacamole. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Best Bacon Egg & Cheese Biscuit Casserole
description: Whether you’re obsessed with bacon, egg, and cheese sandwiches or just love the convenience of a good breakfast casserole, this is the dish you need to try. It takes the deli classic and makes it even more decadent but with no added stress, thanks to simple ingredients like American cheese, canned biscuits, and mostly hands-off cooking.
ingredients_text: canned biscuits, American cheese, bacon, eggs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the bacon until crispy. 3. Whisk eggs and season. 4. Layer biscuits in a baking dish. 5. Add cooked bacon and cheese. 6. Pour egg mixture over layers. 7. Bake until set. 8. Serve warm.

title: Asian Pear Salad With Crispy Shallots
description: Subtly sweet and extremely crunchy, Asian pears are an underutilized but deeply effective salad ingredient. Cut into batons, they look a bit like potatoes destined for the fryer, but they soak up a bright vinaigrette with ease and play very nicely with chiles and herbs.
ingredients_text: Asian pears, shallots, chiles, herbs, vinaigrette
instructions_text: 1. Cut Asian pears into batons. 2. Slice shallots thinly. 3. Fry shallots until crispy. 4. Prepare vinaigrette. 5. Toss pears with vinaigrette. 6. Add chiles and herbs. 7. Top with crispy shallots. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Orange Chipotle Honeynut Cabbage Salad
description: A vibrant salad featuring crispy lentils, roasted honeynut squash, and cabbage with a zesty chipotle dressing.
ingredients_text: crispy lentils, roasted honeynut squash, cabbage, chipotle dressing
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast honeynut squash until tender. 2. Cook lentils until crispy. 3. Shred cabbage. 4. Prepare chipotle dressing. 5. Combine lentils, squash, and cabbage in a bowl. 6. Drizzle with dressing. 7. Toss to mix well. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Asparagus Wild Garlic Cous Cous
description: A flavorful cous cous dish with asparagus and wild garlic, perfect for a light meal.
ingredients_text: cous cous, asparagus, wild garlic
instructions_text: 1. Boil water and prepare cous cous according to package instructions. 2. Chop asparagus and wild garlic. 3. In a pan, lightly sauté asparagus and wild garlic. 4. Combine sautéed vegetables with cous cous. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Serve warm. 7. Garnish with additional wild garlic if desired. 8. Enjoy your light meal.

title: Slow Cooker Beef Stew
description: A hearty and comforting beef stew made easy in the slow cooker.
ingredients_text: beef, potatoes, carrots, onions, garlic, beef broth, herbs, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cut beef into chunks and season. 2. Brown beef in a skillet. 3. Add vegetables to the slow cooker. 4. Place browned beef on top. 5. Pour in beef broth and seasonings. 6. Cover and cook on low for 8 hours. 7. Stir before serving. 8. Enjoy your hearty stew.

title: Roasted Veg + Halloumi Orzo
description: Roasted veg + halloumi orzo from @thenourishapp_ 🌱🌶️
ingredients_text: orzo, halloumi, assorted roasted vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and prepare a baking tray. 2. Chop vegetables and toss with oil. 3. Roast vegetables until tender. 4. Cook orzo according to package instructions. 5. Grill or fry halloumi until golden. 6. Combine orzo, roasted vegetables, and halloumi. 7. Season to taste. 8. Serve warm.

title: Honey Mustard Chicken Melt With Apple Slaw
description: The fall sandwich you need is here. This honey mustard chicken melt with a 3 ingredient apple slaw is a must make!
ingredients_text: chicken, honey mustard, bread, apple, cabbage, carrots
instructions_text: 1. Preheat grill or oven. 2. Mix honey mustard with cooked chicken. 3. Assemble sandwich with chicken and slaw. 4. Grill or bake until golden. 5. Prepare apple slaw with thinly sliced apple, cabbage, and carrots. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Shrimp Tostadas With Macha Sauce And Peach
description: Delicious shrimp tostadas with a unique peach and macha sauce that tastes like chamoy. The tostadas are topped with a fresh shrimp ceviche and a layer of guacamole.
ingredients_text: shrimp, tostadas, peach, macha sauce, guacamole
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the macha sauce with peach. 2. Cook shrimp until pink. 3. Make fresh shrimp ceviche. 4. Assemble tostadas with ceviche. 5. Add a layer of guacamole. 6. Drizzle with macha sauce. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your delicious tostadas.

title: Earl Grey Hot Chocolate
description: A delightful blend of Earl Grey tea and rich dark chocolate, perfect for a cozy treat.
ingredients_text: Earl Grey tea, dark chocolate, milk, sugar
instructions_text: 1. Brew Earl Grey tea. 2. Melt dark chocolate in a saucepan. 3. Add brewed tea to melted chocolate. 4. Stir in milk and sugar. 5. Heat until warm. 6. Whisk until frothy. 7. Pour into cups. 8. Serve hot.

title: Butternut Squash & Roasted Garlic Pasta
description: Butternut squash & roasted garlic pasta is the ultimate thanksgiving / fall dish! This recipe is warm, cozy and can also be turned into a soup!
ingredients_text: butternut squash, roasted garlic, pasta, olive oil, salt, pepper, parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and roast butternut squash and garlic. 2. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 3. Blend roasted squash and garlic into a sauce. 4. Combine sauce with cooked pasta. 5. Add olive oil, salt, and pepper. 6. Serve with parmesan cheese. 7. Optionally, blend with broth to make a soup. 8. Enjoy warm.

title: Raising Cane’S Style Chicken Fingers
description: Raising Cane’s Style Chicken Fingers
ingredients_text: chicken fingers, seasoning, flour, oil for frying
instructions_text: 1. Prepare chicken fingers by seasoning them. 2. Dredge in flour. 3. Heat oil in a frying pan. 4. Fry chicken fingers until golden brown. 5. Drain excess oil. 6. Serve with dipping sauce. 7. Enjoy your meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Dirty Martini Garlic Bread
description: Dirty Martini Garlic Bread is a crowd pleaser perfect for holiday celebrations. This recipe uses feta cheese for a tangy taste, but blue cheese can be substituted.
ingredients_text: garlic bread, feta cheese, blue cheese (optional), olive oil, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare garlic bread. 3. Mix feta cheese with olive oil and herbs. 4. Spread the mixture on the bread. 5. Bake until golden. 6. Optionally, add blue cheese. 7. Slice and serve warm. 8. Enjoy at your holiday gathering.

title: Marry Me Salmon Bites
description: This is a recipe for delicious bite-sized salmon pieces cooked with garlic, shallots, heavy cream, white wine, parmesan, sun-dried tomatoes, spinach, and a mix of seasonings.
ingredients_text: salmon, garlic, shallots, heavy cream, white wine, parmesan, sun-dried tomatoes, spinach, seasonings
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Sauté garlic and shallots until fragrant. 3. Add salmon and cook until slightly browned. 4. Pour in white wine and let it reduce. 5. Stir in heavy cream, parmesan, sun-dried tomatoes, and spinach. 6. Season to taste. 7. Transfer to the oven and bake until cooked through. 8. Serve warm as bites.

title: Green Coconut Shrimp
description: This green coconut shrimp is fast, bold, and big on flavor. Charred aromatics, fresh herbs, and coconut milk turn into a silky sauce that coats golden shrimp. Toasted bread is a must.
ingredients_text: shrimp, coconut milk, fresh herbs, charred aromatics, toasted bread
instructions_text: 1. Char the aromatics in a pan. 2. Add fresh herbs and coconut milk to create a sauce. 3. Cook the shrimp until golden. 4. Coat the shrimp in the sauce. 5. Serve with toasted bread. 6. Garnish with additional herbs if desired. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Caramelized Cottage Cheese And Peaches With Crunchy Topping
description: A delightful combination of cottage cheese and peaches caramelized in the air fryer, topped with a crunchy nut topping and a drizzle of hot honey. A high-protein twist on the viral air fryer peaches and ice cream.
ingredients_text: cottage cheese, peaches, nut topping, hot honey
instructions_text: 1. Preheat air fryer. 2. Slice peaches and mix with cottage cheese. 3. Place mixture in air fryer basket. 4. Cook for 15 minutes until caramelized. 5. Prepare nut topping. 6. Remove from air fryer and sprinkle with nut topping. 7. Drizzle with hot honey. 8. Serve warm.

title: Coq Au Vin Blanc
description: A luxurious, easy-to-make dish perfect for a cozy and fancy meal. The chicken melts in your mouth and the dish is perfect for fall, winter and holiday season.
ingredients_text: chicken, white wine, mushrooms, onions, garlic, thyme, bay leaves, butter, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Brown the chicken in a pot. 2. Remove chicken and sauté onions and garlic. 3. Add mushrooms and cook until tender. 4. Pour in white wine and add herbs. 5. Return chicken to the pot and simmer. 6. Cook until chicken is tender. 7. Adjust seasoning. 8. Serve warm.

title: Kung Pao Cabbage With Tofu
description: A spicy and savory dish originating from China’s Sichuan Province, featuring cabbage cooked in a punchy sauce, combined with baked tofu and roasted cashews.
ingredients_text: cabbage, baked tofu, roasted cashews, spicy sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and bake tofu until golden. 2. Chop cabbage and prepare sauce. 3. In a pan, stir-fry cabbage in sauce until tender. 4. Add baked tofu and roasted cashews. 5. Mix well and cook for a few more minutes. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Sheet Pan Chicken And Broccoli Stir-Fry
description: A delicious and simple sheet pan chicken and broccoli stir-fry recipe.
ingredients_text: chicken, broccoli
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the chicken and broccoli. 3. Season with spices. 4. Arrange on a sheet pan. 5. Bake in the oven. 6. Stir halfway through. 7. Check for doneness. 8. Serve hot.

title: Chopped Chicken Caesar Wrap
description: A delicious wrap filled with seasoned chicken and Caesar salad, served warm and crispy.
ingredients_text: seasoned chicken, Caesar salad, wrap
instructions_text: 1. Season and grill the chicken until cooked through. 2. Prepare the Caesar salad. 3. Warm the wrap. 4. Fill the wrap with grilled chicken and Caesar salad. 5. Roll the wrap tightly. 6. Grill the wrap until crispy. 7. Slice in half. 8. Serve warm.

title: Seared Beef Salad In A Spicy Sesame Dressing
description: Seared Beef Salad in a Spicy Sesame Dressing
ingredients_text: beef, salad greens, sesame dressing, spices
instructions_text: 1. Season the beef with spices. 2. Heat a pan and sear the beef until cooked to your liking. 3. Let the beef rest before slicing. 4. Prepare the salad greens in a bowl. 5. Slice the beef and add it to the salad. 6. Drizzle with spicy sesame dressing. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Creamy Chicken & Mushroom Tortellini Soup
description: cosy soup recipes with a side of nostalgic tv
ingredients_text: tortellini, chicken, mushrooms, cream, broth, garlic, onion, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Sauté onions and garlic until translucent. 2. Add chicken and cook until browned. 3. Stir in mushrooms and cook until soft. 4. Pour in broth and bring to a simmer. 5. Add tortellini and cook until tender. 6. Stir in cream and herbs. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve hot.

title: No-Bake Mango Cheesecake
description: A creamy and luscious no-bake mango cheesecake, perfect for a summer dessert. Made with a buttery biscuit base, a smooth mango-infused cream cheese filling, and topped with mango jelly.
ingredients_text: buttery biscuits, cream cheese, mango puree, mango jelly
instructions_text: 1. Crush the buttery biscuits and press into the base of a springform pan. 2. In a bowl, mix cream cheese and mango puree until smooth. 3. Pour the mango mixture over the biscuit base. 4. Refrigerate until set. 5. Prepare mango jelly according to package instructions. 6. Pour the jelly over the set cheesecake. 7. Chill until the jelly is firm. 8. Slice and serve chilled.

title: Steak And Corn Salad
description: A delicious salad full of veggies and good ingredients, perfect for prioritizing whole foods.
ingredients_text: steak, corn, mixed vegetables, dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook the steak to your desired doneness. 2. Let the steak rest before slicing. 3. Boil or steam the corn until tender. 4. Chop mixed vegetables. 5. In a bowl, combine sliced steak, corn, and vegetables. 6. Drizzle with dressing and toss gently. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your healthy salad.

title: Gnocchi Piccata
description: Imagine all the punchy, savory flavors of chicken piccata, only instead of chicken, the foundation is built upon plump, perfectly tender potato gnocchi.
ingredients_text: potato gnocchi, lemon, capers, garlic, butter, parsley, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Boil potato gnocchi until tender. 2. In a pan, melt butter and sauté garlic. 3. Add capers and lemon juice. 4. Toss in cooked gnocchi. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Garnish with parsley. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Weeknight Pumpkin Chili
description: A cozy and filling chili made with pumpkin puree, ground beef, and canned beans, perfect for a speedy weeknight meal.
ingredients_text: pumpkin puree, ground beef, canned beans
instructions_text: 1. In a large pot, brown the ground beef over medium heat. 2. Add pumpkin puree and canned beans to the pot. 3. Stir to combine and heat through. 4. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 5. Simmer for 15 minutes. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish with your choice of toppings. 8. Enjoy your cozy chili.

title: Rosemary And Dried Cherry Pork Chops
description: Rehydrating dried cherries in hot water turns them plump and juicy—exactly what you want scattered throughout a rosemary-scented pan sauce for thick-cut pork chops. Don’t be tempted to go for boneless chops; a dish this simple and flavorful calls for a heavy-hitting bone-in situation.
ingredients_text: bone-in pork chops, dried cherries, rosemary, hot water
instructions_text: 1. Rehydrate dried cherries in hot water. 2. Season pork chops with salt and pepper. 3. Sear pork chops in a pan until browned. 4. Remove chops and make sauce with rosemary and cherries. 5. Return chops to the pan to finish cooking. 6. Serve with the pan sauce. 7. Garnish with additional rosemary if desired. 8. Enjoy your flavorful dish.

title: Creamy Sausage Potato Soup
description: A hearty soup recipe with bacon, Italian sausage, onion, garlic, potatoes, broth, heavy cream, Italian seasoning, and cheese. Perfect for a cozy fall meal.
ingredients_text: bacon, Italian sausage, onion, garlic, potatoes, broth, heavy cream, Italian seasoning, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook bacon in a pot until crispy. 2. Add Italian sausage and cook until browned. 3. Stir in onion and garlic, cooking until softened. 4. Add potatoes and broth, bringing to a boil. 5. Reduce heat and simmer until potatoes are tender. 6. Stir in heavy cream and Italian seasoning. 7. Add cheese and mix until melted. 8. Serve warm.

title: Corn Salad With Scallion Ancho Chili Dressing
description: A bright, veggie-forward corn salad perfect for summer. It features sweet corn, tender squash, fresh herbs, a salty sprinkle of cotija, and a glossy, sizzled scallion and ancho chili dressing. It can be made vegetarian with tofu or pescatarian with shrimp.
ingredients_text: sweet corn, tender squash, fresh herbs, cotija cheese, scallions, ancho chili, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the corn and squash by boiling until tender. 2. Chop fresh herbs and scallions. 3. In a bowl, combine corn, squash, herbs, and cotija. 4. In a pan, heat olive oil and sauté scallions and ancho chili. 5. Drizzle dressing over the salad. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy as a light lunch or side dish.

title: Chicken Pot Pie Soup
description: A hearty and comforting chicken pot pie soup, perfect for the fall season.
ingredients_text: chicken, vegetables, broth, cream, spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken in a pot until browned. 2. Add chopped vegetables and sauté. 3. Pour in broth and bring to a boil. 4. Stir in cream and seasonings. 5. Simmer until thickened. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your comforting soup.

title: Smashed Broccoli Farfalle
description: Broccoli cooked and smashed into a pasta sauce flavored with garlic and red pepper flakes, pecorino romano cheese, and extra flavor from cooking pasta in the salty water used to blanch the broccoli.
ingredients_text: broccoli, garlic, red pepper flakes, pecorino romano cheese, farfalle pasta, salt
instructions_text: 1. Blanch broccoli in salted water. 2. Cook farfalle pasta in the same water. 3. Smash the blanched broccoli. 4. Sauté garlic and red pepper flakes. 5. Combine smashed broccoli with sautéed garlic. 6. Mix in cooked pasta. 7. Add pecorino romano cheese. 8. Serve warm.

title: Cilantro Honey Lime Chicken & Roasted Corn And Tomato Salad
description: A flavorful combination of cilantro honey lime chicken, roasted corn and tomato salad, and cilantro lime rice.
ingredients_text: cilantro, honey, lime, chicken, corn, tomatoes, rice
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in cilantro, honey, and lime. 2. Grill the chicken until cooked through. 3. Roast corn and tomatoes in the oven. 4. Cook rice according to package instructions. 5. Mix roasted corn and tomatoes with rice. 6. Serve grilled chicken over the salad. 7. Drizzle with extra lime juice if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Bruschetta Chicken And Bacon Pasta
description: This is one of my all-time favorites! Recipe adapted from @melskitchencafe.
ingredients_text: chicken, bacon, pasta, tomatoes, basil, garlic, olive oil, balsamic vinegar, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, cook bacon until crispy. 3. Remove bacon and sauté garlic in the bacon fat. 4. Add diced tomatoes and cook until soft. 5. Stir in cooked pasta, bacon, and basil. 6. Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic vinegar. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve warm.

title: Banana Upside-Down Cake
description: This Banana Upside-Down Cake is a fun twist on the classic pineapple upside-down cake, with caramelized bananas on top for a rich and comforting dessert. It’s sweet, moist, and perfect for any occasion, from a cozy family dinner to a festive gathering.
ingredients_text: bananas, sugar, butter, flour, eggs, baking powder, vanilla extract, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Melt butter and sugar in a pan. 3. Arrange sliced bananas in the pan. 4. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt. 5. Beat eggs and vanilla, then combine with dry ingredients. 6. Pour batter over bananas. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Cool, then invert onto a plate.

title: Spinach & Roasted Almond Pesto Pasta
description: A quick and satisfying pesto pasta with roasted almonds, basil, and lemon, ready in less than 15 minutes.
ingredients_text: pasta, roasted almonds, basil, lemon
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a blender, combine roasted almonds, basil, and lemon juice. 3. Blend until smooth. 4. Drain pasta and return to pot. 5. Mix in the pesto. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve warm. 8. Garnish with extra almonds if desired.

title: Easy Middle Eastern Chuck Roast
description: A flavorful Middle Eastern-style chuck roast that is tenderized with lemon and spices, perfect for a cozy meal.
ingredients_text: chuck roast, lemon, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Marinate the chuck roast with lemon and spices. 3. Sear the roast in a pan. 4. Place the roast in a baking dish. 5. Cover and slow-cook in the oven. 6. Check for tenderness. 7. Let it rest before slicing. 8. Serve warm.

title: Dumpling Brothy Rice
description: A delicious and hearty dish of dumplings and bok choy served over rice in a flavorful broth.
ingredients_text: dumplings, bok choy, rice, broth
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the dumplings according to package instructions. 2. In a pot, bring broth to a boil. 3. Add rice and cook until tender. 4. Stir in bok choy and cook until wilted. 5. Add cooked dumplings to the pot. 6. Season to taste. 7. Serve hot in bowls. 8. Enjoy your hearty meal.

title: Brothy Cacio E Pepe Beans
description: A quick and easy 20-minute dinner featuring beans in a brothy cacio e pepe style.
ingredients_text: beans, cacio e pepe seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Boil water in a pot. 2. Add beans and cook until tender. 3. Stir in cacio e pepe seasoning. 4. Simmer for a few minutes. 5. Adjust seasoning to taste. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Miso Sesame Butter Beans
description: A hearty and comforting dish that's easy to prepare, perfect for a mid-week dinner during cold months. This dish is high in protein, featuring miso and sesame flavors with butter beans.
ingredients_text: butter beans, miso, sesame oil, garlic, ginger, soy sauce, green onions
instructions_text: 1. Rinse and drain the butter beans. 2. In a pot, heat sesame oil and sauté garlic and ginger. 3. Add miso and soy sauce, stirring until combined. 4. Incorporate butter beans and mix well. 5. Simmer for 10 minutes. 6. Garnish with chopped green onions. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your hearty dish!

title: Pomegranate & Harissa Glazed Beetroot Skewers
description: I’m not quite ready for cosy season! Pomegranate and harissa glazed beetroot skewers with a sesame, garlic and chilli sprinkle and miso lime hummus. Grab that forgotten pack of beetroots out and make these!
ingredients_text: beetroots, pomegranate, harissa, sesame, garlic, chilli, miso, lime
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the grill. 2. Prepare the beetroot by peeling and cutting into chunks. 3. Toss beetroot with pomegranate and harissa. 4. Thread beetroot onto skewers. 5. Grill skewers for about 20 minutes, turning occasionally. 6. Mix sesame, garlic, and chilli for the sprinkle. 7. Serve skewers with miso lime hummus. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Banana Pudding Sugar Cookies
description: These cookies are a delightful fusion of classic sugar cookies with the rich, comforting flavors of banana pudding. Perfect for summer!
ingredients_text: sugar, butter, flour, baking powder, bananas, vanilla extract, eggs, milk
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Cream together sugar and butter. 3. Mix in mashed bananas and vanilla. 4. Add eggs and mix well. 5. Combine flour and baking powder, then gradually add to the wet mixture. 6. Scoop dough onto baking sheets. 7. Bake for 10-12 minutes until golden. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Brazilian Cheese Bread
description: Chewy, Cheese and impossible to eat just one. It comes together so quickly thanks to a blender.
ingredients_text: cheese, tapioca flour, eggs, milk, salt, oil
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). 2. Blend cheese, tapioca flour, eggs, milk, salt, and oil until smooth. 3. Pour the batter into greased muffin tins. 4. Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden. 5. Let cool slightly before serving. 6. Enjoy warm for the best texture. 7. Store leftovers in an airtight container. 8. Reheat before serving.

title: Puff Pastry Chili Cheese Dogs
description: An upgraded version of pigs in a blanket, these chili cheese dogs wrapped in puff pastry are a perfect game day food. They can be sliced into thirds for bite-sized servings.
ingredients_text: puff pastry, chili, cheese, hot dogs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Roll out the puff pastry. 3. Place a hot dog on the pastry. 4. Add chili and cheese on top. 5. Wrap the pastry around the hot dog. 6. Cut into thirds if desired. 7. Bake until golden brown. 8. Serve warm.

title: Pan Seared Chicken With Coconut Curry Brothy Rice
description: A flavorful dish featuring pan-seared chicken thighs and a coconut curry broth poured over warm rice, perfect for a comforting meal.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, coconut milk, curry powder, rice, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Season chicken thighs with salt and pepper. 2. Pan-sear chicken in a hot skillet until golden brown. 3. Remove chicken and set aside. 4. In the same skillet, add coconut milk and curry powder. 5. Bring to a simmer and return chicken to the skillet. 6. Cook until chicken is fully cooked. 7. Serve over warm rice. 8. Drizzle with coconut curry broth.

title: Chicken Caesar Smash Tacos
description: These Chicken Caesar Smash Tacos will be your new favorite dinner!
ingredients_text: chicken, taco shells, Caesar dressing, lettuce, Parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken in a skillet until fully cooked. 2. Smash cooked chicken and mix with Caesar dressing. 3. Warm taco shells in a separate pan. 4. Fill taco shells with the chicken mixture. 5. Top with shredded lettuce and Parmesan cheese. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your Chicken Caesar Smash Tacos! 8. Optional: Add extra dressing if desired.

title: Marry Me Chicken Potatoes
description: A loaded potato dish with seasoned chicken, a creamy sauce, and crispy potatoes. Perfect for a hearty meal.
ingredients_text: seasoned chicken, creamy sauce, crispy potatoes
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Season the chicken and cook until golden. 3. Prepare the creamy sauce. 4. Layer the crispy potatoes in a baking dish. 5. Add the chicken on top. 6. Pour the creamy sauce over the dish. 7. Bake until heated through. 8. Serve hot.

title: Apple & Gouda Turkey Panini With Sweet Potato Fries
description: This Apple & Gouda Turkey Panini is the ultimate fall sandwich. Along with turkey & sliced apples, it’s has layers of melty gouda, crispy bacon & a honey dijon spread. Served with baked sweet potato fries, it’s sweet, savory, and perfectly satisfying.
ingredients_text: turkey, sliced apples, gouda cheese, crispy bacon, honey dijon spread, sweet potatoes
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the grill. 2. Assemble the panini with turkey, apples, gouda, and bacon. 3. Grill the panini until golden brown. 4. Cut sweet potatoes into fries. 5. Bake sweet potato fries until crispy. 6. Serve the panini with sweet potato fries. 7. Drizzle with honey dijon spread if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Soup On Sunday: Buffalo Chicken Chili
description: The first Sunday of football called for a game day classic, but in a bowl!
ingredients_text: buffalo sauce, chicken, beans, tomatoes, onion, garlic, bell pepper, spices
instructions_text: 1. In a slow cooker, combine buffalo sauce, chicken, beans, and tomatoes. 2. Chop onion, garlic, and bell pepper; add to the mixture. 3. Season with spices. 4. Stir well to combine. 5. Cover and cook on low for 8 hours. 6. Shred chicken before serving. 7. Serve hot with toppings of choice. 8. Enjoy during game day!

title: Trader Joe’s Pumpkin Gnocchi
description: Cozy, creamy, a little bougie, and totally weeknight-friendly gnocchi dish with a pumpkin and caramelized onion cream sauce.
ingredients_text: gnocchi, pumpkin, caramelized onions, cream, spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook the gnocchi according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, caramelize onions until golden. 3. Add pumpkin and cream to the skillet. 4. Stir until combined and heated through. 5. Toss the cooked gnocchi in the sauce. 6. Season with spices to taste. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your cozy meal!

title: Chili Butter Omelette Sandwich
description: A five minute fix that’s as fun to cook up as it is to dive into and as always you can tailor this one with your choice of fillings and add-ins.
ingredients_text: eggs, butter, chili, bread, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Whisk eggs with salt and pepper. 2. Melt butter in a pan. 3. Add chili to the butter. 4. Pour in the eggs and cook until set. 5. Toast the bread. 6. Assemble the omelette in the sandwich. 7. Cut in half and serve. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Chicken Pot Pie Orzo
description: A cozy, easy, and delicious Chicken Pot Pie Orzo that is perfect for using leftover Thanksgiving turkey.
ingredients_text: orzo pasta, cooked chicken, mixed vegetables, chicken broth, cream, butter, salt, pepper, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Cook orzo according to package instructions. 2. In a pot, melt butter and sauté mixed vegetables. 3. Add cooked chicken and stir. 4. Pour in chicken broth and cream, and bring to a simmer. 5. Stir in cooked orzo and season with salt, pepper, and herbs. 6. Transfer to a baking dish. 7. Bake until bubbly and golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Chikfila Inspired Pasta Dish
description: A pasta dish inspired by Chikfila, perfect for meal prep with high protein content.
ingredients_text: pasta, chicken, seasoning, cheese, sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Season and cook chicken until golden. 3. Combine cooked pasta and chicken in a large bowl. 4. Add cheese and sauce, mixing well. 5. Serve warm or store for meal prep. 6. Garnish with herbs if desired. 7. Enjoy your high-protein meal! 8. Refrigerate leftovers.

title: Italian Pastry Coffee Cake
description: Your favorite Italian pastry just turned into coffee cake! That slightly scented ricotta filling studded with chocolate and candied citrus but in a cake form, perfect for dunking in your next cup of coffee or tea (or dare I say even in an espresso martini?!!) it’s so good you guys, perfectly balanced, bouncy and sweet, it’s just what the soul needs during that afternoon pick me up or for a sweet weekend treat!
ingredients_text: ricotta cheese, chocolate, candied citrus, flour, sugar, eggs, baking powder, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking pan. 2. Mix ricotta cheese with chocolate and candied citrus. 3. In a separate bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and vanilla. 4. Beat eggs and mix into the dry ingredients. 5. Fold in the ricotta mixture. 6. Pour batter into the pan. 7. Bake until golden and a toothpick comes out clean. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Fried Shrimp Curry
description: A quick and easy Japanese curry made with curry cubes and paired with Panko fried shrimp. A dish that everyone will surely love.
ingredients_text: curry cubes, Panko bread crumbs, shrimp
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the curry according to package instructions. 2. Coat shrimp in Panko bread crumbs. 3. Heat oil in a pan and fry the shrimp until golden brown. 4. Serve the fried shrimp over the curry. 5. Garnish as desired. 6. Enjoy your meal! 7. Store leftovers in the fridge. 8. Reheat before serving.

title: Chimichurri Steak Tacos With Honey Avocado
description: Chimichurri steak tacos with honey avocado. A simple recipe, but full of so much flavour and high in protein.
ingredients_text: chimichurri sauce, steak, tortillas, honey, avocado
instructions_text: 1. Prepare chimichurri sauce. 2. Grill the steak to desired doneness. 3. Warm tortillas. 4. Slice steak and place on tortillas. 5. Drizzle with honey. 6. Add sliced avocado. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your tacos!

title: Creamy Slow Cooked Leeks
description: Leeks are in season and cooking them low and slow is one of the best ways to enjoy them. Serve as a side with a roast or by themselves.
ingredients_text: leeks, cream, butter, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Clean and slice the leeks. 2. In a slow cooker, add leeks, cream, and butter. 3. Season with salt and pepper. 4. Stir to combine. 5. Cover and cook on low for 90 minutes. 6. Check for tenderness. 7. Serve warm as a side or on its own. 8. Enjoy your creamy leeks!

title: Gochujang Sesame Noodles
description: A riff on VIRAL GOCHUJANG NOODLES with nutty sesame and umami-rich miso. The result is chopstick after chopstick of saucy flavours.
ingredients_text: gochujang, sesame oil, miso, noodles, soy sauce, scallions, sesame seeds
instructions_text: 1. Cook the noodles according to package instructions. 2. In a bowl, mix gochujang, sesame oil, and miso. 3. Drain the noodles and toss them in the sauce. 4. Add soy sauce and mix well. 5. Garnish with chopped scallions and sesame seeds. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy with chopsticks. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Easy Sausage & Veggie Skillet
description: A flavorful one-pan meal with sausage and veggies, cooked in chicken broth and garnished with lemon and fresh herbs. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: sausage, assorted veggies, chicken broth, lemon, fresh herbs
instructions_text: 1. Heat a skillet over medium heat. 2. Add sausage and cook until browned. 3. Add assorted veggies and sauté until tender. 4. Pour in chicken broth and bring to a simmer. 5. Cook for an additional 5-10 minutes. 6. Garnish with lemon and fresh herbs. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your quick weeknight dinner!

title: Italian Wedding Soup
description: Italian Wedding Soup | Soups So Good It Can Cure Any Sickness Ep. 12
ingredients_text: meatballs, chicken broth, spinach, carrots, onions, garlic, pasta, Parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Prepare meatballs and set aside. 2. In a pot, heat chicken broth. 3. Add chopped onions, garlic, and carrots; simmer. 4. Stir in meatballs and cook until done. 5. Add spinach and pasta; cook until pasta is tender. 6. Season to taste. 7. Serve hot, garnished with Parmesan cheese. 8. Enjoy your comforting soup!

title: Mediterranean Ground Beef Bowls With Lemon Tahini Sauce
description: Delicious Mediterranean ground beef bowls with fresh veggies, briny olives, and a creamy lemon-tahini sauce. Perfect for a weeknight meal or a date night at home.
ingredients_text: ground beef, fresh veggies, briny olives, lemon, tahini
instructions_text: 1. Cook ground beef in a skillet over medium heat until browned. 2. Prepare fresh veggies and olives. 3. In a bowl, mix tahini with lemon juice. 4. Assemble bowls with beef, veggies, and olives. 5. Drizzle lemon-tahini sauce over the top. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Prepable Protein Fillings Christmas Feast Slaw
description: A perfect combination of roast chicken, honey mustard Brussels sprout slaw, cranberries, sage, and salty ham. Big Christmas sandwich energy, but lighter and protein-packed.
ingredients_text: roast chicken, honey mustard, Brussels sprouts, cranberries, sage, ham
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the Brussels sprout slaw with honey mustard. 2. Shred the roast chicken. 3. Mix chicken with slaw. 4. Add cranberries and sage. 5. Incorporate salty ham. 6. Assemble into sandwiches. 7. Serve immediately or store for meal prep. 8. Enjoy your lighter Christmas feast.

title: Egg Cucumber Salad
description: A creamy egg salad with cucumber, inspired by @maidtocook, perfect for a refreshing meal.
ingredients_text: eggs, cucumber, mayonnaise, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Boil the eggs until hard-boiled. 2. Cool and peel the eggs. 3. Chop the eggs and cucumber. 4. In a bowl, mix eggs, cucumber, mayonnaise, salt, and pepper. 5. Stir until well combined. 6. Chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes. 7. Serve on a bed of lettuce or as a sandwich filling. 8. Enjoy your refreshing egg cucumber salad.

title: Banana Custard Oatmeal
description: A deliciously creamy and sweet oatmeal bowl with banana and a hint of custard, perfect for a nourishing breakfast.
ingredients_text: oats, banana, custard powder, milk, sugar, water
instructions_text: 1. Boil water and milk in a pot. 2. Add oats and cook until soft. 3. Mix custard powder with a little water to form a paste. 4. Stir custard mixture into the oatmeal. 5. Add sliced banana and sugar. 6. Cook for another minute. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your creamy banana custard oatmeal.

title: Loaded Hashbrowns - Carne Asada Edition
description: Loaded Hashbrowns with Carne Asada, topped with guacamole, crema Mexicana, and more.
ingredients_text: hashbrowns, carne asada, guacamole, crema Mexicana
instructions_text: 1. Cook the hashbrowns until crispy. 2. Grill the carne asada to desired doneness. 3. Prepare guacamole. 4. Assemble hashbrowns on a plate. 5. Top with carne asada. 6. Add guacamole and crema Mexicana. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Serve hot.

title: Miso Brothy Rice With Crispy Gochujang Tofu
description: A comforting and easy-to-make dish featuring miso brothy rice and crispy gochujang tofu. Topped with bok choy, seaweed, green onions, and leftover sauce marinade.
ingredients_text: miso paste, rice, gochujang, tofu, bok choy, seaweed, green onions, sauce marinade
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. In a pot, combine water and miso paste to create the broth. 3. Fry tofu in gochujang until crispy. 4. Blanch bok choy in boiling water. 5. Assemble bowls with rice, broth, tofu, bok choy, and toppings. 6. Drizzle with leftover sauce marinade. 7. Garnish with seaweed and green onions. 8. Serve hot.

title: Tomato And Basil Pasta
description: A simple and delicious pasta dish using storecupboard staples like tinned tomatoes and dried pasta.
ingredients_text: tinned tomatoes, dried pasta
instructions_text: 1. Boil water in a large pot. 2. Add dried pasta and cook according to package instructions. 3. In a separate pan, heat tinned tomatoes. 4. Combine cooked pasta with the heated tomatoes. 5. Add basil and stir well. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve hot. 8. Garnish with additional basil if desired.

title: Buffalo Chicken Sheet Pan Nachos
description: Buffalo Chicken Sheet Pan Nachos! Ready in under 15 minutes and perfect to serve to a crowd.
ingredients_text: tortilla chips, cooked buffalo chicken, shredded cheese, green onions, jalapeños, ranch dressing
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Spread tortilla chips on a sheet pan. 3. Top with buffalo chicken and shredded cheese. 4. Bake until cheese is melted. 5. Remove from oven and add green onions and jalapeños. 6. Drizzle with ranch dressing. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy with friends!

title: Spicy Vodka Ditali
description: Spicy Vodka Ditali is a creamy pasta dish with a kick of vodka and red pepper flakes.
ingredients_text: pasta, vodka, red pepper flakes, cream
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat vodka and red pepper flakes. 3. Add cream and stir until combined. 4. Mix in cooked pasta. 5. Simmer for a few minutes. 6. Adjust seasoning as needed. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your spicy vodka ditali.

title: The Turkish Viral Pasta
description: Anna Paul's mom's recipe! This Turkish pasta is so good and unbelievably easy!
ingredients_text: pasta, chicken, olive oil, garlic, tomatoes, spices
instructions_text: 1. Boil pasta until al dente. 2. In a pan, heat olive oil. 3. Sauté garlic until fragrant. 4. Add diced tomatoes and spices, cook until soft. 5. Stir in cooked pasta and chicken. 6. Mix well to combine. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Shrimp Stuffed Shells
description: Jumbo pasta shells stuffed with ricotta, garlic shrimp, spinach & sweet sun-dried tomatoes, then baked in a creamy rose sauce until perfectly melty.
ingredients_text: jumbo pasta shells, ricotta, garlic, shrimp, spinach, sun-dried tomatoes, creamy rose sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven. 2. Cook pasta shells until al dente. 3. Sauté garlic and shrimp until cooked. 4. Mix shrimp with ricotta, spinach, and sun-dried tomatoes. 5. Stuff shells with the mixture. 6. Place in a baking dish and cover with rose sauce. 7. Bake until bubbly and melty. 8. Serve warm.

title: Hashbrown Tacos
description: A delicious brunch recipe featuring crispy hashbrown tacos topped with avocado, cottage cheese, scrambled eggs, honey, and chives.
ingredients_text: hashbrowns, avocado, cottage cheese, scrambled eggs, honey, chives
instructions_text: 1. Prepare hashbrowns and fry until crispy. 2. Scramble eggs in a separate pan. 3. Assemble tacos with hashbrowns as the shell. 4. Add scrambled eggs, cottage cheese, and avocado. 5. Drizzle honey on top. 6. Garnish with chives. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your brunch!

title: Grinch’S Heart Blondies
description: These Grinch-inspired blondies have a peppermint flavor and are perfect for the holiday season. You can adjust the flavor by swapping peppermint for almond extract and adding extra white chocolate.
ingredients_text: blondie mix, peppermint extract, white chocolate, optional almond extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking dish. 2. Mix blondie mix with peppermint extract. 3. Fold in white chocolate. 4. Pour the batter into the dish. 5. Bake until golden. 6. Let cool before cutting. 7. Optionally, drizzle with melted white chocolate. 8. Serve and enjoy!

title: Peach Shortbread with Sweetened Condensed Milk Sauce
description: A luscious and buttery shortbread dessert layered with ripe peaches and drizzled with a warm, sweetened condensed milk sauce. Perfect for any occasion.
ingredients_text: shortbread, ripe peaches, sweetened condensed milk
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the baking dish. 2. Make the shortbread dough and press it into the dish. 3. Layer sliced peaches over the shortbread. 4. Bake until golden and set. 5. Prepare the sweetened condensed milk sauce. 6. Drizzle the sauce over the baked dessert. 7. Allow to cool slightly before serving. 8. Enjoy warm or at room temperature.

title: Chicken In A Cajun Cream Sauce
description: Chicken thighs cooked in a flavorful Cajun cream sauce
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, Cajun seasoning, cream
instructions_text: 1. Season chicken thighs with Cajun seasoning. 2. Heat oil in a skillet. 3. Cook chicken until browned. 4. Remove chicken and set aside. 5. Add cream to the skillet and stir. 6. Return chicken to the skillet. 7. Simmer until chicken is cooked through. 8. Serve hot.

title: Fall Tortellini Soup
description: Sausage, tortellini, veggies and cream come together so perfectly, it’s my go to every fall. It feels special but is still simple enough to make any weeknight.
ingredients_text: sausage, tortellini, veggies, cream
instructions_text: 1. In a large pot, cook sausage until browned. 2. Add chopped veggies and sauté until tender. 3. Stir in cream and bring to a simmer. 4. Add tortellini and cook until tender. 5. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 6. Serve hot, garnished with herbs if desired. 7. Enjoy your comforting fall soup.

title: Mashed Feta Cucumber Salad
description: A vibrant, creamy, and tangy Mediterranean-inspired dish that combines the salty richness of feta cheese with fresh, crisp cucumber. The feta is mashed to create slightly chunky and spreadable dressing. The best way to get the rich flavor of feta in every bite!
ingredients_text: feta cheese, cucumber, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Mash feta cheese in a bowl. 2. Dice cucumber and add to the bowl. 3. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice. 4. Season with salt and pepper. 5. Mix until combined. 6. Serve chilled. 7. Enjoy as a salad or spread. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Creamy Tomato Salmon & Mashed Potato
description: Enjoy this creamy tomato salmon & mashed potato for just 520 calories & 33g protein! This recipe is super easy to make, it's comforting and makes the perfect dinner.
ingredients_text: salmon, tomatoes, cream, potatoes, salt, pepper, butter
instructions_text: 1. Boil potatoes until tender. 2. Mash with butter, salt, and pepper. 3. Cook salmon in a skillet. 4. Add tomatoes and cream to the skillet. 5. Simmer until salmon is cooked through. 6. Serve salmon over mashed potatoes. 7. Garnish with herbs if desired. 8. Enjoy your comforting meal.

title: Crispy Gnocchi Burrata & Tomato Salad
description: Shaking things up a bit for episode 10 of pasta salads with crispy gnocchi!!! A must try. Super fun little crispy bites
ingredients_text: gnocchi, burrata, tomatoes, olive oil, salt, pepper, basil
instructions_text: 1. Cook gnocchi according to package instructions. 2. Heat oil in a pan and fry gnocchi until crispy. 3. In a bowl, combine tomatoes, burrata, and basil. 4. Add crispy gnocchi to the bowl. 5. Drizzle with olive oil. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Crispy Chicken Parmesan Sandwich
description: Crispy chicken parmesan sandwich with creamy tomato and pesto sauce
ingredients_text: crispy chicken, parmesan cheese, creamy tomato sauce, pesto sauce, sandwich bread
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the crispy chicken. 2. Cook the creamy tomato sauce. 3. Mix in the pesto sauce. 4. Assemble the sandwich with chicken and sauce. 5. Top with parmesan cheese. 6. Bake until cheese is melted. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your sandwich.

title: Pearl Couscous With Bacon & Peas
description: A cozy little 25 minute dinner with pearl couscous, bacon, peas, and shredded gouda for a creamy and luxurious meal.
ingredients_text: pearl couscous, bacon, peas, shredded gouda
instructions_text: 1. Cook pearl couscous according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, cook bacon until crispy. 3. Add peas to the skillet and cook until heated through. 4. Combine cooked couscous with bacon and peas. 5. Stir in shredded gouda until melted. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your creamy meal!

title: One Pot Creamy Broccoli Pasta
description: This creamy broccoli pasta is a weeknight hero in our house, warm, cheesy, and made in just one pot! Shell pasta catches all the sauce in the best way, and the broccoli makes it feel just a little wholesome. It’s the perfect comfort food when you're recovering from Christmas cooking marathons or need a quick dinner before movie night with the family.
ingredients_text: shell pasta, broccoli, cheese, cream, garlic, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Boil water and cook shell pasta until al dente. 2. In the same pot, add broccoli and cook until tender. 3. Drain pasta and broccoli, reserving some water. 4. Return to pot, add cream and cheese. 5. Stir until creamy, adding reserved water as needed. 6. Season with garlic, salt, and pepper. 7. Mix well and heat through. 8. Serve warm and enjoy.

title: Chicken, Leek & Prosciutto Skillet Lasagne
description: Golden, bubbling, and full of flavor - This chicken, leek & prosciutto skillet lasagne is divine! Layers of shredded rotisserie chicken, jammy leeks, salty prosciutto, and a creamy lemon-kissed white wine sauce, all baked until golden with melty mozzarella on top.
ingredients_text: shredded rotisserie chicken, leeks, prosciutto, white wine, mozzarella, lemon
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Sauté leeks in a skillet until jammy. 3. Add shredded chicken and prosciutto. 4. Stir in white wine and lemon juice. 5. Layer with mozzarella. 6. Bake until golden and bubbly. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Mulled Wine Pear And Blackberry Pavlovas
description: A dreamy little dessert with whipped cream, poached pears, and pistachios.
ingredients_text: whipped cream, poached pears, pistachios
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare baking sheets. 2. Whip the cream until soft peaks form. 3. Poach the pears in a spiced syrup. 4. Assemble the pavlovas with whipped cream and pears. 5. Top with crushed pistachios. 6. Chill before serving. 7. Serve with fresh blackberries. 8. Enjoy your delightful dessert.

title: Crockpot Hamburger Helper
description: Forget the boxed stuff - everyone’s childhood favorite dinner, made from scratch and even easier. Just set the crockpot and forget about till dinner! Easy and so yummy!
ingredients_text: hamburger meat, pasta, cheese, milk, onion, garlic, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Brown the hamburger meat in a skillet. 2. Add chopped onion and garlic, sauté until soft. 3. Transfer to the crockpot. 4. Add pasta, cheese, milk, and seasoning. 5. Stir to combine. 6. Cover and cook on low for 4 hours. 7. Stir occasionally. 8. Serve warm.

title: Focaccia Sandwich
description: A delicious sandwich made with roasted tomato focaccia, pesto mayo, turkey, bacon, lettuce, tomato, and red onion. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
ingredients_text: roasted tomato focaccia, pesto mayo, turkey, bacon, lettuce, tomato, red onion
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven if needed. 2. Prepare pesto mayo by mixing pesto with mayo. 3. Slice focaccia and spread pesto mayo on both sides. 4. Layer turkey, bacon, lettuce, tomato, and red onion. 5. Close the sandwich and press lightly. 6. Optionally, toast in the oven for a few minutes. 7. Cut in half and serve. 8. Enjoy your sandwich!

title: The Perfect Scrambled Eggs
description: The Hong Kong-style Egg Sandwich looks simple, but the eggs hold a secret.
ingredients_text: eggs, bread, butter, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Whisk eggs with salt and pepper. 2. Heat butter in a pan. 3. Pour in eggs and stir gently. 4. Cook until creamy. 5. Toast bread. 6. Assemble sandwich with scrambled eggs. 7. Cut in half. 8. Serve warm.

title: Loaded Cottage Avocado Toast
description: A delicious and healthy breakfast toast loaded with avocado, cottage cheese, arugula, and a fried egg, all seasoned with chili crisp oil, salt and pepper.
ingredients_text: avocado, cottage cheese, arugula, fried egg, chili crisp oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Toast the bread. 2. Mash the avocado and spread it on the toast. 3. Top with cottage cheese. 4. Add arugula on top. 5. Fry an egg to your liking. 6. Place the fried egg on the toast. 7. Drizzle with chili crisp oil. 8. Season with salt and pepper.

title: Tandoori Salmon
description: A flavorful salmon dish marinated in a combination of masalas, perfect for a midweek meal. The marinade can also be used for paneer or any protein of your choice.
ingredients_text: salmon, masalas, yogurt, lemon juice, garlic, ginger
instructions_text: 1. Marinate salmon in yogurt and masalas for at least 30 minutes. 2. Preheat grill to medium-high heat. 3. Place marinated salmon on the grill. 4. Cook for about 6-8 minutes on each side. 5. Check for doneness; salmon should flake easily. 6. Remove from grill and let rest. 7. Serve with lemon wedges. 8. Enjoy your flavorful tandoori salmon.

title: Roasted Courgette Pasta
description: An easy way to sneak in more fibre and veggies without changing what you love. Roasted courgettes blended with basil, garlic, lemon and walnuts for a dreamy pesto. Fresh, simple and incredibly delicious.
ingredients_text: courgettes, basil, garlic, lemon, walnuts, pasta
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast courgettes until tender. 2. Blend roasted courgettes with basil, garlic, lemon, and walnuts. 3. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 4. Drain pasta and combine with the pesto. 5. Toss well to coat. 6. Serve warm. 7. Garnish with extra basil if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Warm Cauliflower, Quinoa & Chickpea Salad
description: A warm salad featuring roasted cauliflower, quinoa, chickpeas, and a lemon dressing.
ingredients_text: cauliflower, quinoa, chickpeas, lemon dressing
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast cauliflower until golden. 2. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 3. Rinse and drain chickpeas. 4. Combine roasted cauliflower, quinoa, and chickpeas in a bowl. 5. Drizzle with lemon dressing. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your salad!

title: Big Mac Loaded Potato Gems
description: Absolutely obsessed with these!! Such a tasty dinner 😍

title: Christmas Tree Farm Spritz
description: This festive spritz captures the essence of the holiday season with its refreshing blend of gin, elderflower, and lemon, kissed by the sparkle of Prosecco. The aromatic rosemary sprigs and juniper berries evoke the cozy scent of a Christmas tree farm, adding a playful, decorative touch.
ingredients_text: gin, elderflower, lemon, Prosecco, rosemary sprigs, juniper berries
instructions_text: 1. In a glass, combine gin, elderflower, and lemon. 2. Stir gently to mix. 3. Top with Prosecco. 4. Garnish with rosemary sprigs and juniper berries. 5. Serve immediately. 6. Enjoy the festive flavors. 7. Optionally, add ice. 8. Celebrate the holiday season.

title: Fig & Caramelized Hot Honey Grilled Cheese
description: It’s cheesy, sweet & salty EVERYTHING you could possibly want in a GRILLED CHEESE. This Fig & caramelized hot honey grilled cheese passes all the grilled cheese tests for me! Made with 2 different types of cheeses- Gruyere & Havarti & coated in a cinnamon sugar butter mixture. It is a total treat for your tastebuds.
ingredients_text: 2 types of cheese (Gruyere, Havarti), cinnamon sugar butter, figs, hot honey
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the cinnamon sugar butter. 2. Spread butter on the outside of the bread. 3. Layer Gruyere and Havarti cheese on the inside. 4. Add sliced figs and drizzle with hot honey. 5. Close the sandwich and grill until golden brown. 6. Flip and grill the other side. 7. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. 8. Slice and serve warm.

title: Maple-Roasted Cinnamon Apples with Vanilla Ice Cream
description: Warm, sweet, and gooey maple-roasted cinnamon apples served with cold vanilla ice cream and a sprinkle of flake salt. A delightful transition from summer to fall!
ingredients_text: apples, maple syrup, cinnamon, vanilla ice cream, flake salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Slice apples and toss with maple syrup and cinnamon. 3. Place apples in a baking dish. 4. Roast in the oven until tender. 5. Serve warm with vanilla ice cream. 6. Sprinkle with flake salt. 7. Enjoy as a comforting dessert.

title: Marry Me Butter Beans And Burrata
description: Marry me butter beans or just call them your new favorite weeknight dinner. Either way, don’t skip the bread.
ingredients_text: butter beans, burrata, bread, olive oil, garlic, herbs, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the butter beans until tender. 3. In a pan, sauté garlic in olive oil. 4. Add beans and herbs, season with salt and pepper. 5. Transfer to a baking dish and top with burrata. 6. Bake until burrata is warm. 7. Serve with bread. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: One Pot Miso Mushroom Butter Beans
description: One pot miso mushroom butter beans that serves 2 hungry people or 2 less hungry people + a serving of leftovers for lunch!
ingredients_text: miso, mushrooms, butter beans
instructions_text: 1. Heat a pot over medium heat. 2. Add miso and sauté until fragrant. 3. Add sliced mushrooms and cook until soft. 4. Stir in butter beans and mix well. 5. Simmer for 10 minutes. 6. Adjust seasoning to taste. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy leftovers for lunch.

title: Protein Packed Chicken Skewers
description: A high protein recipe of chicken skewers with a garlic butter topping, containing at least 30g of protein and can be made within 30 minutes.
ingredients_text: chicken, garlic, butter, skewers, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the grill. 2. Cut chicken into cubes. 3. Skewer the chicken pieces. 4. Melt butter and mix with minced garlic. 5. Brush garlic butter on skewers. 6. Grill skewers for about 15-20 minutes. 7. Turn occasionally until cooked through. 8. Serve hot.

title: Speedy Pad Thai Noodle Salad
description: A quick and non-traditional version of Pad Thai turned into a noodle salad, with a perfect combination of sweet, sour, and salty flavors. You can swap chicken for any protein you like.
ingredients_text: noodles, chicken, vegetables, sauce, peanuts
instructions_text: 1. Cook noodles according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, cook chicken until done. 3. Add vegetables to the pan and stir-fry. 4. Mix in cooked noodles. 5. Pour sauce over the mixture. 6. Toss to combine. 7. Serve topped with peanuts. 8. Enjoy your salad!

title: Parmesan Crusted Chicken Caesar Crunchwrap
description: This parmesan crusted chicken caesar wrap has everything. Share it with a friend or eat the whole thing like I did. Absolutely no regrets.
ingredients_text: parmesan cheese, chicken, caesar dressing, tortilla wraps, lettuce, tomatoes
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and prepare baking sheet. 2. Coat chicken with parmesan cheese. 3. Bake chicken until cooked through. 4. Assemble wrap with chicken, caesar dressing, lettuce, and tomatoes. 5. Fold tortilla into a crunchwrap shape. 6. Grill on both sides until crispy. 7. Cut in half and serve. 8. Enjoy with a friend or alone.

title: Smoky Chipotle Chicken Power Skillet
description: An easy weeknight meal with juicy chicken, creamy chipotle-cilantro sauce, crisp cucumber salad, and rice.
ingredients_text: juicy chicken, creamy chipotle-cilantro sauce, crisp cucumber salad, rice
instructions_text: 1. Cook the chicken in a skillet until browned. 2. Prepare the chipotle-cilantro sauce and mix with the chicken. 3. Cook rice according to package instructions. 4. Prepare the cucumber salad. 5. Serve the chicken with sauce over rice. 6. Add cucumber salad on the side. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Egg Cucumber Salad
description: A creamy egg salad with cucumber, inspired by @maidtocook.
ingredients_text: eggs, cucumber, mayonnaise, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Boil the eggs until hard-boiled. 2. Peel and chop the eggs. 3. Dice the cucumber. 4. In a bowl, mix eggs and cucumber. 5. Add mayonnaise, salt, and pepper. 6. Stir until well combined. 7. Chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes. 8. Serve as a salad or sandwich filling.

title: Homemade Salmon And Shrimp Hibachi
description: A quick and easy homemade hibachi recipe featuring salmon, shrimp, fried rice, and a flavorful white sauce.
ingredients_text: salmon, shrimp, fried rice, white sauce
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the fried rice. 2. Grill the salmon and shrimp until cooked. 3. Mix the white sauce ingredients. 4. Serve the grilled seafood over the fried rice. 5. Drizzle with white sauce. 6. Garnish as desired. 7. Enjoy your homemade hibachi! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Slow Cooker “Marry Me” Chicken Pappardelle
description: Rich, creamy, and full of flavour – this slow cooker pasta is the ultimate comfort food with a high-protein twist. Perfect for weeknights or when you want something special with minimal effort!
ingredients_text: pappardelle pasta, chicken, cream, garlic, parmesan cheese, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Place chicken in the slow cooker. 2. Add cream, garlic, and herbs. 3. Cook on low for 6 hours. 4. Cook pappardelle according to package instructions. 5. Shred chicken and mix with sauce. 6. Combine with pasta. 7. Serve with parmesan. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Butternut Squash Orzo
description: A delicious butternut squash orzo recipe that serves as a perfect comfort food. This dish is almost like an orzo risotto, with the added flavors of baked garlic, nutmeg, and sage leaves.
ingredients_text: butternut squash, orzo, garlic, nutmeg, sage leaves
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and bake the butternut squash until tender. 2. Cook the orzo in a pot of boiling water. 3. In a pan, sauté garlic until fragrant. 4. Add baked squash and nutmeg to the pan. 5. Combine orzo with the squash mixture. 6. Stir in sage leaves. 7. Season to taste. 8. Serve warm.

title: Maple Bourbon Pecan Pie Squares
description: Maple Bourbon Pecan Pie Squares with Chocolate Chips and Brown Butter Shortbread Crust. All the best parts of pecan pie but thicker, gooier, and way easier than making an actual pie. They use maple syrup instead of corn syrup for a deeper flavor, and the brown butter shortbread crust and melty chocolate chips make these next-level. Perfect make-ahead Thanksgiving dessert.
ingredients_text: maple syrup, bourbon, pecans, chocolate chips, brown butter, shortbread crust
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the brown butter shortbread crust. 3. Mix maple syrup, bourbon, and eggs. 4. Stir in pecans and chocolate chips. 5. Pour filling into crust. 6. Bake until set. 7. Cool completely. 8. Cut into squares and serve.

title: Roasted Veg + Halloumi Orzo
description: Roasted veg + halloumi orzo from @thenourishapp_ 🌱🌶️
ingredients_text: orzo, halloumi, assorted roasted vegetables
