instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking tray. 2. Chop assorted vegetables and toss with olive oil. 3. Roast the vegetables until tender. 4. Cook orzo according to package instructions. 5. Grill or pan-fry halloumi until golden. 6. Combine roasted vegetables, orzo, and halloumi. 7. Season to taste. 8. Serve warm.

title: PB & J Oatmeal Breakfast Bars
description: Sweet, tangy, and nutty oatmeal breakfast bars that are easy to make and great for starting your day.
ingredients_text: oats, peanut butter, jelly, honey, salt, baking powder, almond milk
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix oats, baking powder, and salt. 3. In another bowl, combine peanut butter, honey, and almond milk. 4. Mix wet and dry ingredients until combined. 5. Spread half the mixture in a baking dish. 6. Layer with jelly, then top with remaining mixture. 7. Bake for 28 minutes. 8. Let cool, cut into bars, and serve.

title: Raspberry and Pistachio Baked Oats
description: If you're a pistachio lover, these raspberry and pistachio baked oats are a must-try. They're high in protein, packed with fiber, and perfect for an easy grab-and-go breakfast throughout the week.
ingredients_text: raspberries, pistachios, oats, milk, eggs, honey, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. In a bowl, mix oats, baking powder, and salt. 3. In another bowl, whisk eggs, milk, and honey. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients. 5. Fold in raspberries and pistachios. 6. Pour mixture into a baking dish. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Pineapple Upside-Down Cake
description: This retro dessert combines caramelized pineapple with a soft, buttery cake. It's as beautiful as it is delicious!
ingredients_text: pineapple slices, brown sugar, butter, flour, sugar, eggs, baking powder, milk, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Melt butter and brown sugar in a pan, then arrange pineapple slices. 3. Prepare cake batter with flour, sugar, eggs, baking powder, milk, and vanilla. 4. Pour batter over pineapple. 5. Bake until golden. 6. Let cool slightly. 7. Invert onto a plate. 8. Serve warm.

title: Festive Crumble With Caramelised Jammy Red Fruits
description: Caramelised, jammy red fruits baked with a mapley, spiced crumble topping. A perfect festive dessert.
ingredients_text: jammy red fruits, maple syrup, spiced crumble topping
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the jammy red fruits. 3. Mix the crumble topping ingredients. 4. Layer the fruits in a baking dish. 5. Sprinkle the crumble topping over the fruits. 6. Bake until golden and bubbly. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Creamy French Onion Pasta
description: The coziest winter pasta with creamy French onion sauce, garlic-rosemary breadcrumbs, and a hint of charred lemon.
ingredients_text: pasta, French onion sauce, garlic, rosemary, breadcrumbs, lemon
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Prepare French onion sauce in a pan. 3. Mix breadcrumbs with garlic and rosemary. 4. Toast breadcrumb mixture until golden. 5. Combine pasta with sauce. 6. Serve topped with toasted breadcrumbs. 7. Squeeze charred lemon over the dish. 8. Enjoy your creamy pasta.

title: Spicy Chicken Burrito Bowl
description: A simple and delicious spicy chicken recipe that can be served in a burrito bowl or in a salad. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy dinner or meal prep.
ingredients_text: spicy chicken, rice, beans, corn, salsa, cheese, avocado
instructions_text: 1. Cook the spicy chicken in a skillet. 2. Prepare rice according to package instructions. 3. In a bowl, layer rice, beans, and corn. 4. Add cooked chicken on top. 5. Drizzle with salsa and sprinkle cheese. 6. Top with sliced avocado. 7. Serve immediately or store for meal prep. 8. Enjoy your burrito bowl!

title: Cajun Chicken & Smoked Sausage Alfredo
description: A flavorful Cajun dish combining chicken, smoked sausage, and creamy Alfredo sauce.
ingredients_text: chicken, smoked sausage, Alfredo sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken in a skillet until browned. 2. Add smoked sausage and cook until heated through. 3. Stir in Alfredo sauce and simmer. 4. Cook pasta separately. 5. Combine pasta with the sauce mixture. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Berries & Cream French Toast Bake
description: A delightful and easy-to-make French toast bake with fresh mixed berries and a creamy custard center. Perfect for Easter brunch or any special breakfast.
ingredients_text: fresh mixed berries, bread, eggs, milk, sugar, vanilla extract, cinnamon, cream
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Grease a baking dish. 3. Layer bread and mixed berries in the dish. 4. Whisk eggs, milk, sugar, vanilla, and cinnamon. 5. Pour the custard mixture over the bread and berries. 6. Let it soak for 15 minutes. 7. Bake for 30-35 minutes until golden. 8. Serve warm with cream.

title: Pickle Ranch Cheeseburger Sliders
description: Pickle Ranch Cheeseburger Sliders made with King's Hawaiian original sweet rolls are an easy and delicious dinner recipe.
ingredients_text: King's Hawaiian sweet rolls, ground beef, ranch seasoning, pickles, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook ground beef with ranch seasoning. 3. Slice sweet rolls in half. 4. Layer beef, cheese, and pickles on the rolls. 5. Place the top half of the rolls back on. 6. Bake until cheese melts. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your sliders!

title: Texas Waldorf Peach Salad With Peach Vinaigrette
description: A delicious salad made with arugula, blue cheese, pistachios, dried cranberries, and pickled red onions or shallots, topped with a homemade honey peach dressing.
ingredients_text: arugula, blue cheese, pistachios, dried cranberries, pickled red onions, honey, peach dressing
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the honey peach dressing. 2. In a large bowl, combine arugula, blue cheese, pistachios, and dried cranberries. 3. Add pickled red onions. 4. Drizzle the dressing over the salad. 5. Toss gently to combine. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy as a refreshing lunch. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Chicken Caesar Smash Tacos
ingredients_text: chicken, Caesar dressing, tortillas, lettuce, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Grill the chicken until cooked through. 2. Slice the chicken into strips. 3. Warm the tortillas. 4. Spread Caesar dressing on tortillas. 5. Add lettuce and cheese. 6. Place chicken strips on top. 7. Fold the tortillas to create tacos. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Watermelon Summer Berry Salad
description: A refreshing and colorful salad made with fresh watermelon, sweet seasonal berries, and a hint of lime zest, all tossed in a honey-lime poppy seed dressing. Perfect for summer gatherings and the 4th of July!
ingredients_text: fresh watermelon, seasonal berries, lime zest, honey, poppy seeds
instructions_text: 1. Cut watermelon into cubes. 2. Mix berries in a bowl. 3. In a separate bowl, whisk honey and lime zest. 4. Combine watermelon and berries. 5. Drizzle dressing over salad. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Sprinkle poppy seeds on top. 8. Serve chilled.

title: Egg, Bacon & Cheese Breakfast Sliders
description: The ultimate easy and crowd-pleasing breakfast! Perfect for holidays, brunch parties, or lazy weekends. Prep the eggs and bacon the night before for an even easier morning.
ingredients_text: eggs, bacon, cheese, slider buns
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook bacon until crispy. 3. Whisk eggs and scramble in a pan. 4. Assemble sliders with bacon and cheese in buns. 5. Bake until cheese melts. 6. Serve warm. 7. Optionally, prep night before. 8. Enjoy at brunch or holidays.

title: A Partridge In A Pear Sip
description: This festive cocktail is a delightful concoction that captures the essence of the holidays with its harmonious blend of pear and ginger, uplifted by the floral notes of elderflower. Its presentation with a rosemary sprig and pear slice makes it not just a drink, but a centerpiece of celebration!
ingredients_text: pear, ginger, elderflower, rosemary sprig, pear slice
instructions_text: 1. In a shaker, combine pear juice and ginger. 2. Add elderflower liqueur. 3. Shake well with ice. 4. Strain into a glass. 5. Garnish with a rosemary sprig. 6. Add a pear slice for decoration. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your festive cocktail!

title: Chopped Broccoli Salad
description: A super fresh and crunchy salad that's quick to throw together, featuring raw broccoli, toasted pumpkin seeds, and a creamy dressing.
ingredients_text: raw broccoli, toasted pumpkin seeds, creamy dressing
instructions_text: 1. Chop the raw broccoli into small pieces. 2. Toast the pumpkin seeds in a pan until golden. 3. In a bowl, combine broccoli and pumpkin seeds. 4. Prepare the creamy dressing. 5. Pour the dressing over the salad. 6. Toss to combine. 7. Serve immediately or chill before serving. 8. Enjoy your fresh salad!

title: Thai Basil Chicken Fried Rice
description: A flavorful Thai basil chicken fried rice dish.
ingredients_text: Thai basil, chicken, rice, soy sauce, garlic, onion, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice and set aside. 2. Sauté garlic and onion in a pan. 3. Add chicken and cook until browned. 4. Stir in vegetables and cook until tender. 5. Add cooked rice and soy sauce. 6. Mix in Thai basil. 7. Stir-fry until everything is well combined. 8. Serve hot.

title: Brown Butter Blondies
description: These brown butter Christmas blondies make any holiday gathering so much sweeter!
ingredients_text: brown butter, sugar, eggs, flour, baking powder, salt, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking dish. 2. Brown the butter in a saucepan. 3. Mix brown butter and sugar until combined. 4. Add eggs and vanilla, mixing well. 5. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt. 6. Pour the batter into the prepared dish. 7. Bake until golden and set. 8. Let cool before cutting into squares.

title: Healthy Greek Yogurt Pancakes
description: Fluffy and nutritious pancakes made with Greek yogurt, perfect for a healthy Sunday morning breakfast.
ingredients_text: Greek yogurt, flour, eggs, baking powder, sugar, milk, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix Greek yogurt, eggs, and milk. 2. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and sugar. 3. Gradually add dry ingredients to wet ingredients. 4. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. 5. Pour batter onto skillet, cooking until bubbles form. 6. Flip and cook until golden brown. 7. Serve warm with toppings of choice. 8. Enjoy your healthy pancakes!

title: Caramelized Banana and Date Yogurt Parfait
description: A delightful parfait featuring caramelized bananas and dates over creamy Greek yogurt, topped with crunchy walnuts and a touch of flake salt and olive oil.
ingredients_text: caramelized bananas, dates, Greek yogurt, walnuts, flake salt, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Caramelize the bananas in a pan. 2. Layer Greek yogurt in a glass. 3. Add a layer of caramelized bananas. 4. Chop dates and sprinkle over the bananas. 5. Add another layer of yogurt. 6. Top with walnuts. 7. Drizzle with olive oil. 8. Finish with a pinch of flake salt.

title: Peach and Pistachio Breakfast Pots
description: A refreshing and wholesome breakfast pot combining juicy peaches with crunchy pistachios over creamy Greek yogurt, perfect for a nutritious start to the day.
ingredients_text: juicy peaches, crunchy pistachios, creamy Greek yogurt
instructions_text: 1. Chop the peaches and pistachios. 2. Layer Greek yogurt in a pot. 3. Add chopped peaches on top. 4. Sprinkle with pistachios. 5. Drizzle with honey if desired. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy as a nutritious breakfast. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Pistachio Matcha Banana Bread
description: A delightful fusion of creamy bananas, earthy matcha, and crunchy pistachios creates this vibrant and healthy banana bread.
ingredients_text: bananas, matcha powder, pistachios, flour, sugar, eggs, baking powder
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mash the bananas. 3. Mix in matcha powder and sugar. 4. Add eggs and mix well. 5. Fold in flour, baking powder, and chopped pistachios. 6. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan. 7. Bake for 40 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean. 8. Let cool before slicing.

title: Pancake Yogurt e Pesche
description: These are soft and summery pancakes, infused with peaches for a fruity twist both inside and on top.
ingredients_text: pancake mix, yogurt, peaches, eggs, milk, sugar
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix pancake mix, yogurt, eggs, and milk. 2. Fold in diced peaches. 3. Heat a skillet over medium heat. 4. Pour batter onto skillet, cooking until bubbles form. 5. Flip and cook until golden brown. 6. Serve with additional peaches on top. 7. Drizzle with syrup if desired. 8. Enjoy warm.

title: Viral Dumpling Lasagna
description: All the flavors of a soup dumpling, but with half the effort.
ingredients_text: dumpling wrappers, ground pork, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, green onions, sesame oil, chicken broth
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the filling with pork, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, and green onions. 3. Layer dumpling wrappers in a baking dish. 4. Add filling and pour chicken broth over layers. 5. Cover with more wrappers. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm with dipping sauce.

title: Christmas Morning French Toast
description: The perfect Christmas morning breakfast! Save to make for Christmas morning but also it’s delicious any morning you’re wanting an easy breakfast!
ingredients_text: bread, eggs, milk, cinnamon, vanilla extract, sugar, butter
instructions_text: 1. Whisk eggs, milk, cinnamon, vanilla, and sugar in a bowl. 2. Dip bread slices into the mixture. 3. Heat butter in a skillet over medium heat. 4. Cook bread slices until golden brown on both sides. 5. Serve warm with syrup or toppings of choice. 6. Optionally, sprinkle with powdered sugar. 7. Enjoy your festive breakfast! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Seared Salmon With Lemony Pearl Couscous, Cucumber-Herb Salad, And Garlic Labneh
description: Seared salmon, lemony pearl couscous, a fresh cucumber–herb salad, and a dollop of garlic labneh — my perfect meal!! Easy enough for a weeknight but special enough for a dinner party.
ingredients_text: salmon, pearl couscous, cucumber, herbs, garlic, labneh, lemon
instructions_text: 1. Season the salmon and sear in a hot pan until cooked through. 2. Cook pearl couscous according to package instructions and toss with lemon. 3. Prepare cucumber-herb salad by mixing chopped cucumbers and herbs. 4. Make garlic labneh by mixing labneh with minced garlic. 5. Plate the seared salmon with couscous and salad. 6. Add a dollop of garlic labneh on top. 7. Garnish with additional herbs if desired. 8. Serve warm and enjoy.

title: Christmas Crack Cookies
description: The easiest and most delicious way to use your Christmas crack this holiday season!
ingredients_text: Christmas crack, chocolate chips, nuts, cookie dough
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the Christmas crack. 3. Mix cookie dough with chocolate chips and nuts. 4. Spread the mixture on a baking sheet. 5. Bake until golden. 6. Allow to cool. 7. Cut into squares. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Creamy Garlic Shrimp Stuffed Shells
description: These stuffed shells bring together the irresistible creaminess of ricotta and the savory kick of garlic shrimp, encased in tender pasta and topped with melty mozzarella. The splash of lemon zest and hint of nutmeg make this dish uniquely aromatic and delightfully refreshing.
ingredients_text: stuffed shells, ricotta cheese, garlic, shrimp, mozzarella cheese, lemon zest, nutmeg
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the stuffed shells according to package instructions. 3. Sauté garlic and shrimp until cooked. 4. Mix ricotta, lemon zest, and nutmeg. 5. Stuff shells with shrimp mixture. 6. Place shells in a baking dish, top with mozzarella. 7. Bake until cheese is melted. 8. Serve warm.

title: Pumpkin Spice Cheesecake
description: A delicious Pumpkin Spice Cheesecake made with cottage cheese, Greek yogurt, and pumpkin purée, sweetened with allulose and spiced with pumpkin spice.
ingredients_text: cottage cheese, Greek yogurt, pumpkin purée, allulose, pumpkin spice
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Blend cottage cheese, Greek yogurt, and pumpkin purée. 3. Add allulose and pumpkin spice, mix well. 4. Pour mixture into a baking dish. 5. Bake for 45 minutes. 6. Let cool before serving. 7. Serve chilled. 8. Enjoy your cheesecake!

title: Vinegar Chicken With Figs
description: The inky sauce, rich and sticky from the figs and butter, transforms skinless, boneless chicken breasts into a restaurant-quality dish.
ingredients_text: skinless boneless chicken breasts, figs, butter, vinegar
instructions_text: 1. Heat butter in a skillet. 2. Add chicken breasts and cook until browned. 3. Remove chicken and set aside. 4. Add figs and vinegar to the skillet. 5. Simmer until sauce thickens. 6. Return chicken to the skillet. 7. Coat chicken in the sauce. 8. Serve warm.

title: Spring Orzo Salad With Crispy Shallot Vinaigrette
description: One of my all time favorite recipes for spring! A delightful orzo salad with a crispy shallot vinaigrette that is perfect for the season.
ingredients_text: orzo, shallots, olive oil, vinegar, salt, pepper, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Cook the orzo according to package instructions. 2. Slice shallots and fry until crispy. 3. Whisk together olive oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper for the vinaigrette. 4. Combine cooked orzo with crispy shallots and vinaigrette. 5. Add herbs and mix well. 6. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 7. Garnish with additional herbs if desired. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad!

title: Soy & Garlic Steak Rice Bowl
description: A fresh meal featuring soy and garlic marinated steak served with sticky rice and a spicy cucumber salad.
ingredients_text: steak, soy sauce, garlic, sticky rice, cucumber, chili, vinegar
instructions_text: 1. Marinate steak in soy sauce and garlic. 2. Grill the steak to desired doneness. 3. Cook sticky rice according to package instructions. 4. Prepare spicy cucumber salad with sliced cucumber, chili, and vinegar. 5. Slice the grilled steak. 6. Serve steak over sticky rice. 7. Top with spicy cucumber salad. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Pumpkin Spice Loaf Cake
description: A delicious pumpkin spice loaf cake with cream cheese frosting, perfect for fall dessert.
ingredients_text: pumpkin puree, flour, sugar, eggs, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, cream cheese, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix pumpkin puree, sugar, and eggs. 3. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and nutmeg. 4. Gradually add dry ingredients to the pumpkin mixture. 5. Pour the batter into a loaf pan. 6. Bake for 60 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean. 7. Let it cool, then frost with cream cheese. 8. Slice and serve.

title: Creamy White Chicken Chili Corn Chowder
description: Cheesy, creamy, and you have to serve it up with all the toppings + homemade honey butter beer bread on the side. Use up all the corn this weekend, it’s chowder season!
ingredients_text: chicken, corn, cheese, cream, broth, spices, toppings, honey butter beer bread
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken until done. 2. Add corn and broth to pot. 3. Stir in cream and cheese. 4. Season with spices. 5. Simmer for 30 minutes. 6. Prepare toppings. 7. Serve chowder hot. 8. Enjoy with honey butter beer bread.

title: Creamy Chili Crisp Pasta
description: A creamy pasta dish with a spicy kick from chili crisp.
ingredients_text: pasta, chili crisp, cream, garlic, parmesan cheese, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Boil pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat chili crisp. 3. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. 4. Stir in cream and parmesan cheese. 5. Mix in cooked pasta. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve hot. 8. Garnish with extra chili crisp if desired.

title: Grilled Steak And Kale Salad
description: A hearty salad with grilled steak, kale, arugula, and a variety of fresh and roasted ingredients, topped with a tangy homemade dressing.
ingredients_text: grilled steak, kale, arugula, fresh ingredients, roasted ingredients, homemade dressing
instructions_text: 1. Grill the steak to desired doneness. 2. Let the steak rest before slicing. 3. In a large bowl, combine kale and arugula. 4. Add fresh and roasted ingredients to the greens. 5. Slice the grilled steak and place on top. 6. Drizzle with homemade dressing. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Caesar Pasta Salad
description: A delicious Caesar pasta salad with homemade dressing, perfect for sunny days. Customize with your choice of pasta and add chicken for extra protein.
ingredients_text: pasta, homemade dressing, chicken, optional toppings
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Prepare homemade dressing. 3. Combine cooked pasta and dressing in a bowl. 4. Add cooked chicken if desired. 5. Toss to coat evenly. 6. Customize with optional toppings. 7. Chill in the refrigerator for a bit. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Peach Dumplings
description: Deliciously simple peach dumplings encased in buttery crescent roll dough and draped in a rich whiskey brown butter sauce.
ingredients_text: peach, crescent roll dough, whiskey, brown butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the crescent roll dough. 3. Wrap peaches in the dough. 4. Bake until golden. 5. In a pan, melt butter and add whiskey. 6. Drizzle the sauce over dumplings. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your dessert.

title: Aguachile De Callo De Hacha En Salsas Negras
description: This aguachile of scallops in black sauces is inspired by a recipe that a team member tried once, and we couldn't resist replicating it for our SPECIAL BEACH SNACKS edition released this March.
ingredients_text: scallops, black sauces, lime juice, cilantro, red onion, cucumber, jalapeño
instructions_text: 1. Clean and slice scallops. 2. Mix black sauces with lime juice. 3. Chop cilantro, red onion, cucumber, and jalapeño. 4. Combine scallops with the sauce and vegetables. 5. Let marinate for 10 minutes. 6. Serve chilled. 7. Garnish with additional cilantro. 8. Enjoy as a beach snack.

title: Prawn And Mango Salad
description: A refreshing salad featuring prawns, mango, avocado, and a zesty lemon dressing.
ingredients_text: prawns, mango, avocado, lemon dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook prawns until pink and cooked through. 2. Dice mango and avocado. 3. In a bowl, combine prawns, mango, and avocado. 4. Drizzle with lemon dressing. 5. Toss gently to combine. 6. Serve chilled. 7. Garnish with herbs if desired. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad.

title: Crispy Pasta Caesar Salad
description: A delightful combination of crispy pasta and Caesar salad with chicken and a creamy sauce.
ingredients_text: crispy pasta, chicken, Caesar dressing, lettuce, parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta until crispy. 2. Grill or pan-fry chicken until cooked through. 3. Toss lettuce with Caesar dressing. 4. Add crispy pasta and sliced chicken. 5. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Chicken Alfredo Lasagna Rolls
description: Delicious Chicken Alfredo Lasagna Rolls with a creamy Alfredo sauce and a blend of cheeses.
ingredients_text: lasagna noodles, chicken, Alfredo sauce, blend of cheeses
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven. 2. Cook lasagna noodles. 3. Mix chicken with Alfredo sauce. 4. Spread mixture on noodles. 5. Roll noodles and place in baking dish. 6. Top with remaining sauce and cheese. 7. Bake until bubbly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Garlic Sesame Chicken Zucchini Bowls
description: A flavorful, protein and fiber-rich dish perfect for weeknight meals. Serve over rice or enjoy on its own for a low-carb option.
ingredients_text: chicken, garlic, sesame oil, zucchini, rice, soy sauce, sesame seeds
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. Heat sesame oil in a pan. 3. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. 4. Add chicken and cook until browned. 5. Stir in sliced zucchini and soy sauce. 6. Cook until zucchini is tender. 7. Serve chicken mixture over rice. 8. Garnish with sesame seeds.

title: Breakfast Strata
description: Breakfast Strata makes the perfect savory brunch casserole. It’s one of my favorite and it’s beyond easy to whip up. Make it with added protein using Lifeway Kefir Farmer Cheese dolloped on top. It adds a wonderful creamy, cheese texture you will love.
ingredients_text: Lifeway Kefir Farmer Cheese, bread, eggs, milk, salt, pepper, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Whisk eggs and milk together. 3. Layer bread and vegetables in a baking dish. 4. Pour egg mixture over the layers. 5. Dollop with Lifeway Kefir Farmer Cheese. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Bake until set and golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Christmas Thyme Tonic
description: This Christmas Thyme Tonic is a sparkling holiday drink that combines the floral notes of elderflower liqueur with the refreshing zing of lime and a hint of thyme. Finished with a dazzling touch of edible glitter, it's a festive delight perfect for holiday celebrations.
ingredients_text: elderflower liqueur, lime, thyme, edible glitter, sparkling water
instructions_text: 1. In a glass, combine elderflower liqueur and lime juice. 2. Add fresh thyme leaves. 3. Top with sparkling water. 4. Stir gently to mix. 5. Add a pinch of edible glitter for sparkle. 6. Garnish with a thyme sprig. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your festive drink!

title: White Chocolate Peppermint Cookies
description: The perfect Christmas time cookie! These come together in one bowl and take less than 30 minutes start to finish!
ingredients_text: white chocolate, peppermint extract, flour, sugar, butter, eggs, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix melted butter and sugar. 3. Add eggs and peppermint extract, mixing well. 4. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt. 5. Fold in white chocolate. 6. Scoop dough onto a baking sheet. 7. Bake for 10-12 minutes. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Creamy Mushroom Pasta
description: This creamy mushroom pasta is weeknight dinner gold: deeply browned mushrooms, a silky Parmesan-laced sauce, and just enough lemon to keep everything bright.
ingredients_text: pasta, mushrooms, Parmesan cheese, lemon, garlic, cream, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, heat olive oil and sauté garlic until fragrant. 3. Add mushrooms and cook until browned. 4. Stir in cream and Parmesan, mixing until smooth. 5. Add lemon juice and season with salt and pepper. 6. Combine cooked pasta with the sauce. 7. Toss to coat evenly. 8. Serve warm, garnished with extra Parmesan if desired.

title: Pandan Coconut Cinnamon Rolls
description: Unbelievably soft and fluffy cinnamon rolls with an Asian twist of pandan and coconut, bringing together the delightful flavors of your favorite Asian bakery treats.
ingredients_text: pandan extract, coconut milk, flour, sugar, yeast, cinnamon, butter, salt
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the dough by mixing flour, sugar, yeast, and salt. 2. Add pandan extract, coconut milk, and melted butter. 3. Knead until smooth and let rise. 4. Roll out the dough and spread with butter and cinnamon. 5. Roll tightly and cut into pieces. 6. Place in a baking dish and let rise again. 7. Bake until golden brown. 8. Serve warm and enjoy.

title: Creamy Chicken & Mushroom Potato Top Pie
description: A creamy chicken and mushroom pie topped with cheesy mashed potatoes.
ingredients_text: chicken, mushrooms, potatoes, cheese, cream, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook chicken and mushrooms until browned. 3. Prepare cheesy mashed potatoes. 4. Combine chicken and mushrooms with cream. 5. Transfer mixture to a baking dish. 6. Top with mashed potatoes. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: A Perfect Grilled Cheese Sandwich
description: For the Platonic ideal grilled cheese sandwich recipe, you don’t need much. The supplies are simple, the prep time is minimal, and the technique is straightforward. This version—crispy on the outside, gooey in the middle, and deeply comforting, especially when served alongside a steaming bowl of tomato soup—doesn’t try to reinvent the comfort-food classic; it simply guides you toward the ultimate expression of it.
ingredients_text: bread, cheese, butter
instructions_text: 1. Heat a skillet over medium heat. 2. Butter one side of each slice of bread. 3. Place cheese between two slices, buttered sides out. 4. Grill until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side. 5. Remove from skillet and let cool slightly. 6. Cut in half and serve with tomato soup. 7. Enjoy your gooey grilled cheese! 8. Store leftovers in an airtight container.

title: Butter-Cream Shrimp & Rice
description: The only creamy shrimp recipe you’ll ever need. Better than a restaurant.
ingredients_text: shrimp, butter, cream, rice, seasonings
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, melt butter over medium heat. 3. Add shrimp and cook until pink. 4. Stir in cream and seasonings. 5. Simmer until sauce thickens. 6. Serve shrimp over rice. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your creamy shrimp dish.

title: Sheet Pan-Cakes
description: Episode 9 of realistic nutrition tips: make sheet pan-cakes instead of pancakes #sponsored With summer ending, you might be back on a tight schedule and in need of a quick morning meal. Sheet Pan-cakes are a high-protein go-to for those busy mornings – they’re easy to make, packed with nutrients, and perfect for feeding a whole crowd. As always, I got all my ingredients from @sprouts, which has an amazing assortment of high-quality groceries that make healthy eating a lot easier.
ingredients_text: ingredients from @sprouts
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare a sheet pan with cooking spray. 3. Mix the pancake batter. 4. Pour the batter onto the sheet pan. 5. Bake in the oven for 13 minutes. 6. Cut into squares. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Creamy Rigatoni And Calabrian Chilies
description: A rich and satisfying dinner featuring creamy rigatoni with a spicy kick from Calabrian chilies.
ingredients_text: rigatoni, Calabrian chilies, cream, cheese, garlic, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook rigatoni according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, sauté garlic until fragrant. 3. Add Calabrian chilies and cream, stirring well. 4. Mix in cooked rigatoni. 5. Add cheese, salt, and pepper to taste. 6. Stir until creamy and heated through. 7. Serve hot. 8. Garnish with additional cheese if desired.

title: Spicy Cheesy Black Bean Rice Burritos
description: Spicy cheesy black bean rice burritos
ingredients_text: black beans, rice, cheese, spices, tortillas
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. In a bowl, mix black beans, cooked rice, cheese, and spices. 3. Warm tortillas in a pan. 4. Spoon the mixture onto each tortilla. 5. Roll the tortillas tightly to form burritos. 6. Grill the burritos until golden brown. 7. Serve hot with salsa or guacamole. 8. Enjoy your spicy cheesy burritos!

title: Ramp & Cheddar Biscuits
description: Light and fluffy biscuits with ricotta in the dough, filled with ramps and grated white cheddar, perfect for breakfast.
ingredients_text: ricotta, ramps, white cheddar, flour, baking powder, salt, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). 2. In a bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt. 3. Cut in butter until crumbly. 4. Stir in ricotta, ramps, and cheddar. 5. Form dough into biscuits. 6. Place on a baking sheet. 7. Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Pink Panna Cotta
description: Peach and pistachio panna cotta. Cool to know: Our head pastry chef Benoit wanted to sprinkle pistachios and crushed amaretti over the top. Yummy!
ingredients_text: peach, pistachio, cream, sugar, gelatin, amaretti
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the gelatin according to package instructions. 2. In a saucepan, heat cream and sugar until dissolved. 3. Stir in the peach puree and gelatin mixture. 4. Pour into molds and refrigerate until set. 5. Once set, top with crushed pistachios and amaretti. 6. Serve chilled. 7. Enjoy your delicious panna cotta! 8. Garnish with additional peach slices if desired.

title: Juicy Sheet Pan Middle Eastern Beef Kebabs
description: These juicy and flavorful Middle Eastern beef kebabs are seasoned just like my dad used to make. Serve them wrapped in warm lavash for a delightful meal.
ingredients_text: beef, lavash, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the beef with seasoning. 3. Shape the beef into kebabs. 4. Place kebabs on a sheet pan. 5. Bake in the oven for 30 minutes. 6. Serve wrapped in warm lavash. 7. Enjoy your meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Peach & Kefir Custard Pie
description: A nod to my Georgia roots: an old-fashioned peaches and cream pie with a spin to make it grain-free and plant-based. Almond flour creates a sweet, crunchy crust, and kefir thickened with tapioca and arrowroot flour envelop fresh and delicious peaches to create this summertime pie.
ingredients_text: almond flour, fresh peaches, kefir, tapioca flour, arrowroot flour
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the almond flour crust and press it into a pie dish. 3. Mix kefir with tapioca and arrowroot flour. 4. Slice fresh peaches and layer them in the crust. 5. Pour the kefir mixture over the peaches. 6. Bake until set. 7. Allow to cool before serving. 8. Enjoy your summertime pie.

title: Raspberry Almond Pancakes
description: Fluffy pancakes filled with fresh raspberries and topped with crunchy almonds. Perfect for a delightful breakfast.
ingredients_text: flour, fresh raspberries, almonds, eggs, milk, sugar, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt. 2. In another bowl, whisk eggs, milk, and sugar. 3. Combine wet and dry ingredients. 4. Fold in raspberries and chopped almonds. 5. Heat a skillet and pour batter to form pancakes. 6. Cook until bubbles form, then flip. 7. Serve warm, topped with more raspberries and almonds. 8. Enjoy your delightful breakfast!

title: Cottage Cheese Pancakes
description: Inspired by Arthur's syrniki, these cottage cheese pancakes are incredibly fluffy and moist, achieved by an end-stage steaming process. Experience breakfast perfection with these delightful pancakes.
ingredients_text: cottage cheese, flour, eggs, sugar, salt, baking powder, oil
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix cottage cheese, eggs, and sugar. 2. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. 3. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet mixture. 4. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. 5. Pour batter to form pancakes. 6. Cook until golden brown on both sides. 7. Steam pancakes briefly for fluffiness. 8. Serve warm with toppings of choice.

title: Cinnamon Roll Cottage Cheese Pancakes
description: These Cinnamon Roll Cottage Cheese Pancakes are light, fluffy, and reminiscent of a cinnamon roll in pancake form. This easy, high-protein breakfast is made with Daisy Cottage Cheese for the best texture and flavor.
ingredients_text: Daisy Cottage Cheese, flour, eggs, cinnamon, sugar, baking powder, vanilla extract, milk
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix cottage cheese, eggs, and vanilla. 2. In another bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and cinnamon. 3. Combine wet and dry ingredients until just mixed. 4. Heat a skillet over medium heat and grease lightly. 5. Pour batter onto skillet, cooking until bubbles form. 6. Flip and cook until golden brown. 7. Serve warm with syrup or toppings. 8. Enjoy your fluffy pancakes!

title: Cheesy Pork, Peppers, & Onion Breakfast Biscuits
description: A savory breakfast delight loaded with protein, featuring ground pork, vibrant peppers and onions, and a hearty dose of cheddar cheese. Perfect for meal prep and ready in minutes.
ingredients_text: ground pork, vibrant peppers, onions, cheddar cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Sauté ground pork with peppers and onions until cooked. 3. Mix in cheddar cheese. 4. Prepare biscuit dough. 5. Fill dough with pork mixture. 6. Shape into biscuits. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Peach Dutch Baby Pancake
description: A delightful cross between a Dutch baby and cobbler, this sweet peach-filled pancake is the perfect not-too-sweet Sunday breakfast treat.
ingredients_text: peaches, flour, eggs, milk, sugar, butter, vanilla extract, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Whisk together flour, eggs, milk, sugar, and salt. 3. Melt butter in a skillet. 4. Pour batter into the skillet and add sliced peaches. 5. Bake until puffed and golden. 6. Remove from oven and let cool slightly. 7. Serve warm, optionally dusted with powdered sugar. 8. Enjoy your sweet peach Dutch baby pancake.

title: Cinnamon Rolls With Caramel Sauce
description: Cinnamon rolls with caramel sauce and vanilla frosting.
ingredients_text: cinnamon rolls, caramel sauce, vanilla frosting
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the cinnamon roll dough. 3. Roll out the dough and sprinkle with cinnamon. 4. Roll up the dough and cut into pieces. 5. Place in a baking dish and let rise. 6. Bake until golden brown. 7. Drizzle with caramel sauce. 8. Top with vanilla frosting before serving.

title: The Fluffiest Apple Pie Pancakes
description: Fluffy apple pie pancakes topped with vanilla Greek yogurt and sautéed cinnamon apples + syrup
ingredients_text: pancake mix, apples, cinnamon, vanilla Greek yogurt, syrup
instructions_text: 1. Prepare pancake mix according to package instructions. 2. Peel and slice apples. 3. Sauté apples with cinnamon until soft. 4. Cook pancakes on a stovetop until golden brown. 5. Top pancakes with sautéed apples and Greek yogurt. 6. Drizzle with syrup. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your fluffy apple pie pancakes!

title: French Toast With Maple Mascarpone Cream
description: A delicious French toast recipe topped with a sweet and creamy maple mascarpone cream. No need for additional maple syrup!
ingredients_text: bread, eggs, milk, mascarpone cheese, maple syrup, vanilla extract, butter
instructions_text: 1. Whisk eggs, milk, and vanilla in a bowl. 2. Dip bread slices into the mixture. 3. Heat butter in a skillet. 4. Fry the soaked bread until golden brown. 5. In a separate bowl, mix mascarpone with maple syrup. 6. Top French toast with maple mascarpone cream. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your delicious breakfast!

title: Magic Bar Cookies
description: Magic Bar Cookies: a vegan, gluten-free, and refined sugar-free version of the nostalgic magic bars, in a fun, bite-sized form.
ingredients_text: magic bar ingredients
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare a baking dish. 3. Mix the dry ingredients. 4. Add wet ingredients and combine. 5. Spread the mixture in the baking dish. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Let cool before cutting. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Salted Caramel Apple Pie Cookies
description: A luxurious blend of cinnamon vanilla sugar cookie base filled with a warm apple pie filling and topped with decadent salted caramel. Perfect for invoking the cozy flavors of fall.
ingredients_text: cinnamon, vanilla, sugar, cookie dough, apple pie filling, salted caramel
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the cookie dough with cinnamon and vanilla. 3. Fill with apple pie filling. 4. Bake until golden. 5. Drizzle with salted caramel. 6. Let cool before serving. 7. Enjoy the cozy flavors. 8. Store leftovers in an airtight container.

title: Cherry Lemon Sorbet Parfait
description: With over 62 million views on TikTok, this is by far my most viral recipe! Before summer ends, you’ve got to make this!
ingredients_text: cherries, lemon juice, sugar, water
instructions_text: 1. Blend cherries and lemon juice until smooth. 2. In a saucepan, combine sugar and water, heat until dissolved. 3. Mix the sugar syrup with the cherry mixture. 4. Pour into a container and freeze for 2-3 hours. 5. Scoop sorbet into parfait glasses. 6. Layer with additional cherries if desired. 7. Serve immediately or store in the freezer. 8. Enjoy your refreshing parfait!

title: Blueberry Banana Bread
description: A moist, thick, dense, healthy, vegan, gluten free banana bread with blueberries. Perfect for summer!
ingredients_text: bananas, blueberries, gluten-free flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, plant-based milk, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Mash the bananas in a bowl. 3. Mix in the blueberries, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. 4. Add plant-based milk and vanilla extract, stirring until combined. 5. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan. 6. Bake for 60 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean. 7. Let cool before slicing. 8. Serve and enjoy your healthy banana bread!

title: Bacon Egg & Cheese Biscuit Casserole
description: A simple yet decadent breakfast casserole that combines the classic bacon, egg, and cheese into a hearty dish.
ingredients_text: bacon, eggs, cheese, biscuits
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook bacon until crispy. 3. Whisk eggs and mix with cheese. 4. Cut biscuits into pieces. 5. Layer biscuits, bacon, and egg mixture in a baking dish. 6. Bake until set. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Chicken Breakfast Sausages
description: Try a twist on your favorite breakfast sausage with ground chicken. A blend of spices such as fennel and smoked paprika, along with a dash of maple syrup, is sure to make these breakfast patties a new morning favorite.
ingredients_text: ground chicken, fennel, smoked paprika, maple syrup, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, combine ground chicken with fennel, smoked paprika, maple syrup, salt, and pepper. 2. Mix until well combined. 3. Form the mixture into patties. 4. Heat a skillet over medium heat. 5. Cook the patties for about 5-6 minutes on each side until browned and cooked through. 6. Remove from skillet and let rest. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your breakfast sausages!

title: Maple Cinnamon Apple Overnight Oats
description: A healthy and delicious overnight oats recipe with the flavors of maple, cinnamon, and apple.
ingredients_text: oats, maple syrup, cinnamon, apple, milk, yogurt
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, combine oats, maple syrup, and cinnamon. 2. Add milk and yogurt, stirring until mixed. 3. Chop apple and fold into the mixture. 4. Cover and refrigerate overnight. 5. In the morning, stir and adjust consistency with more milk if needed. 6. Serve cold, topped with additional apple slices. 7. Enjoy your healthy breakfast! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Mushroom And Kale Breakfast Skillet
description: A veggie-packed egg skillet, perfect for feeding a crowd a healthy breakfast. Serve with toast on the side for mopping up those runny yolks.
ingredients_text: mushrooms, kale, eggs, toast
instructions_text: 1. Sauté mushrooms in a skillet until tender. 2. Add kale and cook until wilted. 3. Whisk eggs in a bowl. 4. Pour eggs over the veggies in the skillet. 5. Cook until eggs are set. 6. Serve with toast on the side. 7. Enjoy your healthy breakfast. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Protein Maple Cinnamon Smoothie
description: Sometimes this is just a @ballerinafarm fan account and I can’t help it 🤷‍♀️
ingredients_text: maple syrup, cinnamon, protein powder, almond milk, ice
instructions_text: 1. Combine all ingredients in a blender. 2. Blend until smooth. 3. Adjust sweetness if needed. 4. Pour into a glass. 5. Serve immediately.

title: Espresso Flan
description: A rich and creamy flan infused with espresso, topped with a caramel layer.
ingredients_text: eggs, sugar, milk, heavy cream, espresso, caramel
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Whisk eggs and sugar until smooth. 3. Heat milk and cream, then stir in espresso. 4. Combine egg mixture with milk mixture. 5. Pour into a flan mold and bake in a water bath. 6. Cool and refrigerate. 7. Prepare caramel and pour over flan. 8. Serve chilled.

title: Maple Cinnamon Loaf
description: The perfect spiced cinnamon loaf. Try it and tag me!
ingredients_text: maple syrup, cinnamon, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix flour, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon. 3. In another bowl, whisk eggs, maple syrup, and melted butter. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients until just mixed. 5. Pour the batter into a loaf pan. 6. Bake for 60 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean. 7. Let cool before slicing. 8. Serve and enjoy!

title: Strawberry Cinnamon Rolls
description: Ooey gooey cinnamon rolls with a sweet strawberry filling.
ingredients_text: cinnamon rolls, strawberries, sugar, butter, flour, eggs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the cinnamon roll dough. 3. Mix strawberries with sugar. 4. Roll out the dough and spread the strawberry filling. 5. Roll up the dough and cut into pieces. 6. Place in a baking dish and let rise. 7. Bake until golden brown. 8. Serve warm.

title: Peppermint Hot Chocolate Munch
description: This chocolaty gooey treat is perfect for the holiday season! To make it even more festive, serve it in a Christmas mug and top with crushed candy cane and mini marshmallows.
ingredients_text: chocolate, milk, crushed candy cane, mini marshmallows
instructions_text: 1. Heat milk in a saucepan until warm. 2. Stir in chocolate until melted. 3. Add crushed candy cane and mix well. 4. Pour into mugs. 5. Top with mini marshmallows. 6. Garnish with more crushed candy cane. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your festive treat!

title: Cinnamon Roll Banana Cake
description: This cake is a cross between warm, gooey cinnamon rolls and banana cake. It's moist with so much flavour and perfect for autumn.
ingredients_text: bananas, flour, sugar, butter, eggs, cinnamon, baking powder, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mash the bananas in a bowl. 3. Mix in sugar, butter, and eggs. 4. Combine flour, baking powder, and cinnamon. 5. Fold dry ingredients into the wet mixture. 6. Pour into a baking dish. 7. Bake until golden brown. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Warm Caramelized Cinnamon Apples & Sticky Dates Over Creamy Yogurt
description: Warm Caramelized cinnamon apples & sticky dates over creamy yogurt is the most satisfying combo you can make this fall. It makes for a protein/fiber punch & an apple crumble for breakfast or anytime of day!
ingredients_text: cinnamon apples, sticky dates, creamy yogurt
instructions_text: 1. Slice the apples and dates. 2. Heat a pan over medium heat. 3. Add the apples and cinnamon, cooking until caramelized. 4. Stir in the sticky dates. 5. Serve the warm mixture over creamy yogurt. 6. Enjoy as a breakfast or snack. 7. Optionally, sprinkle with nuts or granola. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Coconut-Date Power Breakfast Bars
description: Five different types of coconut, plus almonds, oats, and whole wheat flour go into these quintuple-threat, nutrient-dense breakfast or snack bars.
ingredients_text: coconut, almonds, oats, whole wheat flour, dates
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix dry ingredients in a bowl. 3. Combine wet ingredients separately. 4. Mix wet and dry ingredients together. 5. Pour mixture into a baking dish. 6. Bake until golden brown. 7. Let cool before cutting. 8. Serve as breakfast or snack bars.

title: Strawberry Crumble Cheesecake
description: A delicious strawberry crumble cheesecake with a graham cracker crust, creamy cheesecake filling, fresh strawberry topping, and a crumbly topping.
ingredients_text: graham cracker crust, creamy cheesecake filling, fresh strawberries, crumbly topping
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the graham cracker crust. 3. Mix the cheesecake filling and pour into the crust. 4. Bake until set. 5. Prepare the crumbly topping. 6. Add fresh strawberries on top. 7. Bake again briefly. 8. Cool and serve.

title: Cheesecake With Fruity Pebbles
description: A delicious cheesecake infused with the fun and colorful flavors of Fruity Pebbles cereal.
ingredients_text: Fruity Pebbles cereal, cream cheese, sugar, eggs, vanilla extract, graham cracker crust
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven. 2. Mix cream cheese and sugar until smooth. 3. Add eggs and vanilla, mix well. 4. Fold in crushed Fruity Pebbles. 5. Pour mixture into crust. 6. Bake until set. 7. Cool and refrigerate. 8. Serve chilled.

title: Beef Udon Stir Fry
description: Beef Udon Stir Fry🍜 So quick and easy to make!! Other than the chopping, it comes together really fast!
ingredients_text: beef, udon noodles, vegetables, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, oil
instructions_text: 1. Slice beef and chop vegetables. 2. Heat oil in a pan. 3. Stir-fry beef until browned. 4. Add garlic and ginger, sauté briefly. 5. Add vegetables and stir-fry until tender. 6. Cook udon noodles separately. 7. Combine noodles with beef and vegetables. 8. Add soy sauce and mix well.

title: One-Pan Greek Pastisio–Inspired Pasta
description: A simplified, one-pan version of Greek pastitsio featuring creamy and tangy whipped feta, spiced with cinnamon and red pepper.
ingredients_text: pasta, whipped feta, cinnamon, red pepper, ground meat
instructions_text: 1. Cook the pasta in a large pan. 2. In a bowl, mix whipped feta with cinnamon and red pepper. 3. Drain the pasta and return to the pan. 4. Stir in the whipped feta mixture. 5. Add ground meat and mix well. 6. Cook until heated through. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your one-pan meal.

title: Breakfast Nachos
description: A delicious and easy-to-make breakfast version of nachos, perfect for a lazy Sunday breakfast or serving guests.
ingredients_text: tortilla chips, scrambled eggs, cheese, salsa, avocado, jalapeños
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Spread tortilla chips on a baking sheet. 3. Top with scrambled eggs and cheese. 4. Bake until cheese is melted. 5. Remove from oven and add salsa, avocado, and jalapeños. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your breakfast nachos! 8. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.

title: Lentil Pomegranate Salad
description: The perfect combination of fruity, tangy, and earthy flavors in one dish.
ingredients_text: lentils, pomegranate seeds, mixed greens, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook lentils according to package instructions. 2. Rinse and drain lentils. 3. In a bowl, combine lentils, pomegranate seeds, and mixed greens. 4. In a separate bowl, whisk olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. 5. Pour dressing over the salad and toss gently. 6. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 7. Garnish with extra pomegranate seeds if desired. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad!

title: Roasted Pumpkin Basque Cheesecake
description: Silky, spiced, and baked with roasted kabocha pumpkin purée, this cheesecake loaf is smooth, velvety, and full of cozy fall flavor. Comforting, fragrant, and the perfect dessert for the season.
ingredients_text: roasted kabocha pumpkin purée, cream cheese, eggs, sugar, vanilla extract, spices, graham cracker crust
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the graham cracker crust. 3. Mix cream cheese, sugar, and spices. 4. Add eggs and pumpkin purée. 5. Pour mixture into crust. 6. Bake until set. 7. Cool and chill. 8. Serve with a sprinkle of spices.

title: Raspberry Bites
description: Delicious raspberry bites with a sweet compote and icing.
ingredients_text: raspberries, sugar, icing, flour, butter, baking powder
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the raspberry compote. 3. Mix flour, sugar, and baking powder. 4. Add butter and combine. 5. Fold in raspberries. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Drizzle with icing. 8. Serve warm.

title: Blueberry Cobbler Scones
description: Delicious blueberry cobbler scones, perfect for a sweet breakfast or dessert.
ingredients_text: blueberries, flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, butter, milk, egg
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. In a bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. 3. Cut in butter until crumbly. 4. Stir in milk and egg until combined. 5. Fold in blueberries gently. 6. Drop spoonfuls onto a baking sheet. 7. Bake for 20-25 minutes until golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Coconut Coffee Jellies
description: Coconut coffee jellies inspired by Vietnamese coconut coffee and Filipino cathedral jellies. A little bit boozy, super jiggly, and very fun to eat.
ingredients_text: coconut milk, coffee, gelatin, sugar, rum (optional)
instructions_text: 1. Brew coffee and let it cool. 2. Mix coconut milk with sugar. 3. Dissolve gelatin in warm coffee. 4. Combine coffee and coconut mixture. 5. Pour into molds. 6. Chill until set. 7. Unmold jellies. 8. Serve chilled.

title: Protein-Packed Green Goddess Chicken Smash
description: A high-protein, fresh-but-satisfying meal perfect for lunches, easy dinners, or meal prep. Creamy, crunchy, herby, and seriously filling.
ingredients_text: chicken, herbs, creamy dressing, crunchy vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken until fully cooked. 2. Chop herbs and vegetables. 3. Mix chicken with herbs and dressing. 4. Combine with crunchy vegetables. 5. Serve immediately or store for meal prep. 6. Enjoy as a satisfying lunch or dinner. 7. Optionally, add more herbs for flavor. 8. Refrigerate leftovers.

title: Mochi Pancakes
description: A simple snack recipe for Mochi Pancakes.
ingredients_text: mochi flour, water, sugar, baking powder, salt, oil
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix mochi flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. 2. Gradually add water and stir until smooth. 3. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. 4. Pour batter into the pan, forming pancakes. 5. Cook until bubbles form, then flip and cook until golden. 6. Repeat with remaining batter. 7. Serve warm with toppings of choice. 8. Enjoy your mochi pancakes!

title: Cheesy Peppercorn Steak Orzo
description: Juicy steak, creamy peppercorn, and cheesy orzo all cooked together for a comforting meal.
ingredients_text: juicy steak, creamy peppercorn, cheesy orzo
instructions_text: 1. Cook orzo according to package instructions. 2. Season steak with salt and pepper. 3. Sear steak in a hot pan until desired doneness. 4. Remove steak and let rest. 5. In the same pan, add peppercorn sauce. 6. Stir in cooked orzo and cheese. 7. Slice steak and serve over orzo. 8. Enjoy your comforting meal.

title: Roasted Cabbage Salad With Orange-Maple-Walnut-Goat Cheese Crumble
description: Tender roasted cabbage with a sweet, crunchy, and salty topping. Perfectly piled on a plate in the shape of a cone.
ingredients_text: cabbage, orange, maple syrup, walnuts, goat cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking sheet. 2. Cut the cabbage into wedges. 3. Roast the cabbage until tender. 4. In a bowl, mix orange juice, maple syrup, and chopped walnuts. 5. Crumble goat cheese over the roasted cabbage. 6. Drizzle the orange-maple mixture on top. 7. Serve warm or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your flavorful salad.

title: Pizza Quesadillas
description: These are super easy and delicious to make!
ingredients_text: tortillas, cheese, chicken, pizza sauce, bell peppers, onions
instructions_text: 1. Heat a skillet over medium heat. 2. Place a tortilla in the skillet. 3. Add cheese, chicken, pizza sauce, bell peppers, and onions on one half. 4. Fold the tortilla over. 5. Cook until golden brown, then flip. 6. Remove and slice into wedges. 7. Serve with extra pizza sauce. 8. Enjoy your pizza quesadillas!

title: Sizzling Ginger-Scallion White Bean Salad
description: A super-tasty and veggie-packed white bean salad tossed in a killer dressing made with ginger and scallions sizzled in hot oil.
ingredients_text: white beans, ginger, scallions, hot oil
instructions_text: 1. Rinse and drain the white beans. 2. Heat oil in a pan. 3. Add ginger and scallions to the hot oil. 4. Sizzle until fragrant. 5. Toss the beans with the ginger-scallion oil. 6. Season to taste. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your salad!

title: Classic Lemon & Sugar CrêPes
description: A simple and classic recipe for making delicious lemon and sugar crêpes, perfect for Pancake Day or any special occasion.
ingredients_text: flour, eggs, milk, sugar, lemon juice, butter
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix flour and eggs. 2. Gradually add milk while whisking. 3. Stir in sugar and lemon juice. 4. Heat a non-stick pan and melt butter. 5. Pour batter into the pan, swirling to coat. 6. Cook until golden, then flip. 7. Repeat with remaining batter. 8. Serve with lemon juice and sugar sprinkled on top.

title: Strawberry Bread With Strawberry Glaze
description: A delicious strawberry bread topped with a sweet strawberry glaze.
ingredients_text: strawberries, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, baking powder, milk, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Mash strawberries in a bowl. 3. In another bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. 4. In a separate bowl, whisk eggs, butter, milk, and vanilla. 5. Combine wet and dry ingredients, then fold in mashed strawberries. 6. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan. 7. Bake for 55 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean. 8. Allow to cool and top with strawberry glaze.

title: Pumpkin Munchkins
description: Delicious pumpkin-flavored donut bites coated with cinnamon-maple sugar for a perfect sweet treat.
ingredients_text: pumpkin puree, flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, maple syrup, eggs, milk
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and prepare donut pan. 2. In a bowl, mix pumpkin puree, eggs, and milk. 3. In another bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and cinnamon. 4. Gradually mix dry ingredients into wet ingredients. 5. Fill donut pan and bake until golden. 6. Let cool slightly. 7. Coat with cinnamon-maple sugar. 8. Serve warm.

title: Apple Pie Oats
description: A winter breakfast MUST: apple pie oats.
ingredients_text: oats, apples, cinnamon, sugar, milk, butter
instructions_text: 1. Cook oats in milk until creamy. 2. Add diced apples and cinnamon. 3. Stir in sugar and butter. 4. Cook until apples are tender. 5. Serve warm. 6. Top with additional cinnamon if desired. 7. Enjoy your breakfast. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Banana Bread Chia Pudding
description: Banana bread flavors in the easiest breakfast ever. Follow @larisaxfit for more easy breakfast ideas.
ingredients_text: chia seeds, almond milk, mashed bananas, vanilla extract, maple syrup, cinnamon
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix chia seeds and almond milk. 2. Add mashed bananas, vanilla extract, maple syrup, and cinnamon. 3. Stir well to combine. 4. Let it sit for 10 minutes to thicken. 5. Stir again and divide into serving bowls. 6. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight. 7. Serve chilled, topped with banana slices or nuts. 8. Enjoy your banana bread chia pudding!

title: Hot Cocoa Crème Brûlée with Marshmallow Topping
description: A decadent dessert blending the rich flavors of hot cocoa and brûlée, topped with perfectly toasted marshmallows.
ingredients_text: hot cocoa mix, heavy cream, sugar, egg yolks, vanilla extract, marshmallows
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Whisk together hot cocoa mix, cream, and sugar. 3. Add egg yolks and vanilla, mix well. 4. Pour into ramekins and place in a baking dish. 5. Fill the dish with water and bake. 6. Chill in the fridge. 7. Top with marshmallows and toast. 8. Serve warm.

title: Cheesy Honey Chipotle Dump And Bake
description: A one dish dinner for nights when you’ve had a long day and just want something easy that still feels satisfying. Minimal washing up, high protein and packed with veggies for volume.
ingredients_text: chicken, honey, chipotle sauce, cheese, assorted vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. In a baking dish, combine chicken, honey, and chipotle sauce. 3. Add cheese and vegetables. 4. Mix well. 5. Cover with foil. 6. Bake for 30 minutes. 7. Remove foil and bake for an additional 15 minutes. 8. Serve warm.

title: Strawberry Lemon Cake Donuts
description: Soo easy to make! It might be cold outside, but it’s warm in this kitchen.
ingredients_text: strawberries, lemon juice, flour, sugar, baking powder, eggs, milk, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix flour, sugar, and baking powder. 3. In another bowl, combine eggs, milk, melted butter, and lemon juice. 4. Fold the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients. 5. Gently mix in chopped strawberries. 6. Pour the batter into a donut pan. 7. Bake for 30 minutes or until golden. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Rudolph Sour
description: Rudolph’s Sour is a playful twist on a classic sour cocktail. The combination of sweet amaretto, bright lemon, and a subtle hint of bourbon creates a unique holiday treat. Its whimsical presentation with a cherry 'nose' makes it a festive delight.
ingredients_text: amaretto, lemon juice, bourbon, cherry
instructions_text: 1. In a shaker, combine amaretto, lemon juice, and bourbon. 2. Fill with ice and shake well. 3. Strain into a glass. 4. Garnish with a cherry. 5. Serve immediately.

title: White Chicken Chili
description: A cozy white chicken chili recipe made with salsa verde, chicken, beans, and spices — perfect for weeknight dinners.
ingredients_text: chicken, salsa verde, beans, spices
instructions_text: 1. In a pot, combine chicken and salsa verde. 2. Cook over medium heat until chicken is cooked through. 3. Shred the chicken and return to the pot. 4. Add beans and spices. 5. Stir well and simmer for 10 minutes. 6. Adjust seasoning to taste. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your cozy chili!

title: Chicken Kofta With Tzatziki And Lemon Dill Rice
description: Chicken kofta served with tzatziki and lemon dill rice.
ingredients_text: chicken, tzatziki, lemon, dill, rice
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the chicken kofta mixture. 2. Shape into kofta and grill until cooked. 3. Cook rice with lemon and dill. 4. Prepare tzatziki sauce. 5. Serve kofta with tzatziki and rice. 6. Garnish as desired. 7. Enjoy your meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Almond Joy Cookies
description: HOLIDAY DINNER SERIES: Ep.52 Almond Joy Cookies ✨
ingredients_text: almonds, coconut, chocolate chips, flour, sugar, butter, eggs, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix flour, sugar, and butter. 3. Add eggs and vanilla extract, mix well. 4. Fold in almonds, coconut, and chocolate chips. 5. Drop spoonfuls onto a baking sheet. 6. Bake for 12-15 minutes. 7. Let cool on a wire rack. 8. Serve and enjoy your cookies.

title: Hoisin Garlic Noodles
description: A flavorful noodle dish featuring hoisin sauce, garlic, and scallions, topped with toasted sesame seeds.
ingredients_text: hoisin sauce, garlic, scallions, toasted sesame seeds, noodles
instructions_text: 1. Cook noodles according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, sauté garlic until fragrant. 3. Add hoisin sauce and mix well. 4. Toss in cooked noodles and coat evenly. 5. Stir in chopped scallions. 6. Serve topped with toasted sesame seeds. 7. Enjoy warm. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Almond Croissant Overnight Oats
description: Almond croissant overnight oats… honestly one of my favourite winter breakfasts. It’s cosy, it’s satiating, and it gives you protein and fibre.
ingredients_text: almond milk, oats, almond butter, chopped almonds, sweetener, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, combine oats and almond milk. 2. Stir in almond butter and sweetener. 3. Add chopped almonds and vanilla extract. 4. Mix well until combined. 5. Cover and refrigerate overnight. 6. In the morning, stir and adjust consistency if needed. 7. Serve chilled, topped with extra almonds. 8. Enjoy your cozy breakfast!

title: Santa's Moscow Mule
description: Santa is ditching his reindeer this year and going with the mule. A festive cocktail with a North Pole shimmer.
ingredients_text: vodka, ginger beer, lime juice, ice, festive garnish
instructions_text: 1. Fill a glass with ice. 2. Add vodka and lime juice. 3. Top with ginger beer. 4. Stir gently. 5. Garnish with a festive touch. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your holiday cocktail!

title: Dump & Bake Creamy Pesto Shrimp Pasta
description: A simple dump & bake creamy pesto shrimp pasta with added veggies, a high-protein cottage cheese sauce, and only 10 minutes to prep. Perfect for a weeknight meal!
ingredients_text: pasta, shrimp, pesto, cottage cheese, mixed veggies
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven. 2. In a baking dish, combine pasta, shrimp, and veggies. 3. Mix pesto and cottage cheese, then pour over the pasta. 4. Stir to combine. 5. Cover with foil and bake. 6. Remove foil and bake until bubbly. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Charred Poblano Chili & Lime Black Bean Salad
description: A healthy and easy-to-make salad featuring charred poblano chili, lime, and black beans, perfect for meal prep.
ingredients_text: charred poblano chili, lime, black beans
instructions_text: 1. Char the poblano chili until blackened. 2. Let it cool, then peel and chop. 3. In a bowl, combine black beans and chopped poblano. 4. Squeeze lime juice over the mixture. 5. Toss to combine. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy as a meal prep option.

title: One-Pot Beef & Spinach Orzo
description: This dish is made even more nutritious with a twist, using cannellini beans instead of heavy cream.
ingredients_text: beef, spinach, orzo, cannellini beans
instructions_text: 1. Brown the beef in a pot. 2. Add spinach and cook until wilted. 3. Stir in orzo and cannellini beans. 4. Add water or broth and bring to a boil. 5. Reduce heat and simmer until orzo is cooked. 6. Season to taste. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your nutritious meal.

title: Sweet Potato Butter Swim Biscuits
description: Delicious sweet potato biscuits with a buttery finish.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, flour, butter, sugar, baking powder, salt, egg
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Boil and mash sweet potatoes. 3. Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. 4. Add mashed sweet potatoes and egg to the dry ingredients. 5. Fold in melted butter. 6. Shape the dough into biscuits. 7. Place on a baking sheet. 8. Bake until golden brown.

title: Orange Loaf Cake
description: A delightful orange-flavored loaf cake, perfect for a gloomy day.
ingredients_text: orange zest, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, baking powder, salt, orange juice
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Grease a loaf pan. 3. In a bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt. 4. In another bowl, cream butter and sugar, then add eggs and orange zest. 5. Combine wet and dry ingredients, then add orange juice. 6. Pour batter into the prepared pan. 7. Bake for 50 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean. 8. Let cool before slicing.

title: Creamy Roasted Butternut Squash Salad
description: This creamy roasted butternut squash salad is a lighter, lower carb take on the viral potato salad. It is slightly sweet, nutty, and so delicious tossed in a creamy herb yogurt dressing. It's also higher protein from the creamy greek yogurt and a nice amount of crunch from the cucumbers and onion.
ingredients_text: butternut squash, greek yogurt, cucumbers, onion, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast butternut squash until tender. 2. In a bowl, mix greek yogurt with herbs for dressing. 3. Chop cucumbers and onion. 4. Combine roasted squash, cucumbers, and onion in a large bowl. 5. Toss with the creamy herb dressing. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your creamy roasted butternut squash salad.

title: Honey Sriracha Cheesesteak Baguettes
description: Delicious honey sriracha cheesesteak baguettes perfect for a quick meal.
ingredients_text: cheesesteak meat, honey, sriracha, baguettes
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the cheesesteak meat in a pan. 3. Mix honey and sriracha. 4. Slice baguettes and fill with meat. 5. Drizzle honey sriracha sauce over the meat. 6. Bake in the oven until heated through. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Cheesy Garlic Rolls Recipe
description: Delicious homemade cheesy garlic rolls with a rich garlic butter filling.
ingredients_text: cheese, garlic, butter, flour, yeast, salt, water
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the dough with flour, yeast, and water. 3. Mix garlic with butter for filling. 4. Roll out the dough and add filling. 5. Shape into rolls. 6. Let rise. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Cucumber Ranch Crack Salad
description: A lighter and refreshing salad that everyone will love, perfect for game day or as a Super Bowl side. It's addicting with its ranch dressing!
ingredients_text: cucumbers, ranch dressing, bacon bits, cheese, green onions
instructions_text: 1. Chop cucumbers and green onions. 2. In a bowl, combine cucumbers, bacon bits, and cheese. 3. Drizzle ranch dressing over the mixture. 4. Toss gently to coat. 5. Garnish with green onions. 6. Serve immediately or chill before serving. 7. Enjoy as a refreshing side dish. 8. Perfect for game day!

title: Broccoli Cheddar Orzo Soup
description: A hearty soup that combines broccoli, cheddar, and orzo, topped with crispy prosciutto. Perfect for a comforting meal.
ingredients_text: broccoli, cheddar cheese, orzo, prosciutto
instructions_text: 1. Cook orzo according to package instructions. 2. In a pot, sauté prosciutto until crispy. 3. Add broccoli and cook until tender. 4. Stir in cheese until melted. 5. Combine with cooked orzo. 6. Season to taste. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your comforting soup.

title: Smashed Potato, Pea And Feta Salad
description: A delicious salad made with smashed baby potatoes, peas, edamame beans, feta cheese, red onion, and cucumber, dressed with a honey mustard vinaigrette.
ingredients_text: smashed baby potatoes, peas, edamame beans, feta cheese, red onion, cucumber, honey mustard vinaigrette
instructions_text: 1. Boil the baby potatoes until tender. 2. Smash the potatoes gently. 3. Cook peas and edamame beans until tender. 4. Chop red onion and cucumber. 5. In a bowl, combine smashed potatoes, peas, edamame, feta, onion, and cucumber. 6. Drizzle with honey mustard vinaigrette. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

title: Japanese Crab Omelette
description: A delicious and easy to make Japanese Crab Omelette recipe.
ingredients_text: crab meat, eggs, salt, pepper, green onions, oil
instructions_text: 1. Whisk eggs in a bowl. 2. Add crab meat, chopped green onions, salt, and pepper. 3. Heat oil in a pan. 4. Pour egg mixture into the pan. 5. Cook until edges are set. 6. Fold the omelette in half. 7. Cook for another minute. 8. Serve warm.

title: Maine’s Most Divisive Lobster Roll
description: A delicious lobster roll recipe inspired by Maine's most divisive lobster roll. The recipe includes a homemade brown butter vinaigrette.
ingredients_text: lobster, brown butter, rolls, seasonings
instructions_text: 1. Cook lobster in boiling water until done. 2. Prepare brown butter vinaigrette. 3. Mix lobster with vinaigrette. 4. Toast rolls lightly. 5. Fill rolls with lobster mixture. 6. Garnish as desired. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your lobster roll!

title: Sheet Pan Lasagna
description: Restaurant quality sheet pan lasagna featuring hearty spinach, artichokes, and three different kinds of cheese.
ingredients_text: spinach, artichokes, three kinds of cheese, lasagna noodles, marinara sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the lasagna noodles. 3. Layer spinach, artichokes, and cheese in a sheet pan. 4. Add marinara sauce. 5. Repeat layers. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Slice and serve.

title: Broccoli & Beans - Simple & Speedy Goodness
description: A simple and speedy recipe for a delicious broccoli and beans dish.
ingredients_text: broccoli, beans
instructions_text: 1. Boil water in a pot. 2. Add broccoli and cook until tender. 3. In a separate pan, cook beans until heated through. 4. Combine broccoli and beans in a bowl. 5. Season to taste. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: 30 Minute Crispy Thai Peanut Chicken Ramen
description: Homemade ramen with sesame chicken, lots of garlic butter spooned over the creamiest peanutty ramen.
ingredients_text: ramen noodles, sesame chicken, garlic, butter, peanut sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook ramen noodles according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, melt butter and sauté garlic until fragrant. 3. Add sesame chicken to the pan and cook until golden. 4. Stir in peanut sauce and combine well. 5. Drain ramen and add to the chicken mixture. 6. Toss to coat the noodles evenly. 7. Serve hot, garnished with additional peanuts if desired. 8. Enjoy your creamy peanutty ramen!

title: Creamy Roasted Garlic Butternut Squash Pasta
description: Creamy Roasted Garlic Butternut Squash Pasta. Bringing all the fall vibes to the table. Upcoming fall nights are made for this simple pasta. It is perfectly garlicky with a creamy butternut squash sauce. The prosciutto adds the yummiest salty crunch. Everyone’s loves this and it’s my favorite fall pasta.
ingredients_text: butternut squash, garlic, pasta, prosciutto, cream, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Roast butternut squash and garlic until tender. 2. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 3. Blend roasted squash and garlic with cream. 4. Toss pasta with the creamy sauce. 5. Add crispy prosciutto. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your fall-inspired dish.

title: Breakfast Ramen
description: A super easy breakfast inspired ramen with instant noodles, plant based bacon, sliced mushrooms, soft boiled eggs, crispy onions, soy sauce, sesame oil, and optional chilli oil and sesame seeds.
ingredients_text: instant noodles, plant based bacon, sliced mushrooms, soft boiled eggs, crispy onions, soy sauce, sesame oil, optional chilli oil, sesame seeds
instructions_text: 1. Boil water and cook instant noodles according to package instructions. 2. In a separate pan, sauté plant based bacon and sliced mushrooms. 3. Soft boil eggs in boiling water for 6-7 minutes. 4. Drain noodles and mix with soy sauce and sesame oil. 5. Top noodles with sautéed bacon, mushrooms, and crispy onions. 6. Peel and slice soft boiled eggs, placing them on top. 7. Drizzle with optional chilli oil and sprinkle sesame seeds. 8. Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Broccoli Mac And Cheese
description: A delicious and hearty dish of macaroni and cheese with broccoli.
ingredients_text: macaroni, cheese, broccoli
instructions_text: 1. Cook macaroni according to package instructions. 2. Steam broccoli until tender. 3. In a pot, combine cooked macaroni and cheese. 4. Stir in steamed broccoli. 5. Transfer to a baking dish. 6. Bake until golden and bubbly. 7. Let cool slightly before serving. 8. Enjoy your hearty dish!

title: Cheesy Garlic Chicken Fritters
description: Herby, melty minis made with ground chicken, fresh herbs, and just enough cheese to crisp up golden in the pan. Paired with garlicky cauliflower mash and grilled asparagus.
ingredients_text: ground chicken, fresh herbs, cheese, cauliflower, garlic, asparagus
instructions_text: 1. Mix ground chicken with herbs and cheese. 2. Form into small fritters. 3. Heat oil in a pan and fry fritters until golden. 4. Boil cauliflower and mash with garlic. 5. Grill asparagus until tender. 6. Serve fritters with cauliflower mash and asparagus. 7. Garnish with extra herbs if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: French Onion Soup Dip
description: A delicious game day snack made with caramelized onions, cream cheese, sour cream, and shredded cheese, served with a toasted baguette.
ingredients_text: caramelized onions, cream cheese, sour cream, shredded cheese, toasted baguette
instructions_text: 1. Caramelize onions in a skillet until golden brown. 2. In a bowl, mix cream cheese, sour cream, and shredded cheese. 3. Stir in caramelized onions. 4. Transfer mixture to a baking dish. 5. Bake until bubbly and golden. 6. Slice baguette and toast. 7. Serve dip warm with toasted baguette slices. 8. Enjoy as a game day snack.

title: Roasted Beet & Citrus Salad With Ricotta + Pistachios
description: This roasted beet and citrus salad with fresh ricotta and crunchy pistachios is perfect for your next dinner party. It's bright, creamy, and satisfying.
ingredients_text: roasted beets, citrus fruits, fresh ricotta, pistachios
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast the beets until tender. 2. Peel and slice the roasted beets. 3. Segment the citrus fruits. 4. Arrange the beets and citrus on a plate. 5. Add dollops of fresh ricotta. 6. Sprinkle with pistachios. 7. Drizzle with olive oil and season. 8. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

title: Prosciutto, Brie, Pear, & Fig Melt
description: A delicious melt sandwich with prosciutto, brie, pear, and fig jam, perfect for a cozy fall meal.
ingredients_text: prosciutto, brie, pear, fig jam, bread
instructions_text: 1. Preheat a grill or skillet. 2. Spread fig jam on one slice of bread. 3. Layer brie, prosciutto, and pear on top. 4. Top with another slice of bread. 5. Grill until golden brown and cheese melts. 6. Flip and grill the other side. 7. Remove from heat and slice. 8. Serve warm.

title: Feta And Sun-Dried Tomato Dip
description: A quick and flavorful dip made with sun-dried tomatoes, feta, and yogurt, perfect for serving with crudités and crackers.
ingredients_text: sun-dried tomatoes, feta cheese, yogurt, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Combine sun-dried tomatoes, feta, and yogurt in a blender. 2. Blend until smooth. 3. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 4. Transfer to a serving bowl. 5. Serve with crudités and crackers.

title: Smash Breakfast Tacos
description: Delicious and easy-to-make Smash Breakfast Tacos featuring crispy sausage, runny eggs, creamy avocado, and crumbled feta cheese wrapped in warm tortillas. Perfect for a hearty breakfast or brunch.
ingredients_text: crispy sausage, runny eggs, creamy avocado, crumbled feta cheese, warm tortillas
instructions_text: 1. Cook the sausage in a skillet until crispy. 2. In the same skillet, scramble the eggs until runny. 3. Warm the tortillas in a separate pan. 4. Spread avocado on each tortilla. 5. Add the crispy sausage and scrambled eggs. 6. Top with crumbled feta cheese. 7. Fold the tortillas and serve warm. 8. Enjoy your hearty breakfast tacos!

title: Hot Honey–Glazed Salmon
description: This hot honey salmon recipe creates a sweet-spicy lacquer over broiled fish for a restaurant-quality weeknight dinner or make-ahead lunch.
ingredients_text: salmon fillets, hot honey, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the broiler. 2. Season salmon with salt and pepper. 3. Brush hot honey over the salmon. 4. Place salmon under the broiler. 5. Broil until cooked through, about 10-15 minutes. 6. Remove from oven and let rest. 7. Drizzle with more hot honey if desired. 8. Serve with your choice of sides.

title: Sourdough Focaccia
description: Fluffy, bubbly sourdough focaccia with a crispy crunchy crust, topped with sea salt and sesame seeds.
ingredients_text: sourdough starter, flour, water, sea salt, sesame seeds
