description: Delicious small batch vegan sweet rolls featuring rich brown butter and gooey pistachio cream. Topped with a decadent pistachio cream cheese frosting, these rolls are perfect for a delightful treat.
ingredients_text: brown butter, pistachio cream, cream cheese, flour, sugar, yeast, salt, water
instructions_text: 1. Prepare brown butter and let it cool. 2. Mix flour, sugar, yeast, and salt. 3. Combine with brown butter and water to form dough. 4. Knead the dough and let it rise. 5. Roll out the dough and spread pistachio cream. 6. Roll up and cut into pieces. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Top with pistachio cream cheese frosting.

title: Lemon Ricotta Pasta
description: If you only have 15 minutes for dinner, this easy and delightful pasta combines the fresh flavors of lemon and ricotta with the goodness of broccoli.
ingredients_text: pasta, ricotta cheese, lemon juice, broccoli, salt, pepper, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Steam broccoli until tender. 3. In a bowl, mix ricotta, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. 4. Drain pasta and combine with ricotta mixture. 5. Add steamed broccoli and toss gently. 6. Drizzle with olive oil. 7. Serve warm. 8. Garnish with lemon zest if desired.

title: Penne Rigate with Cream of Caramelized Onion and Parmigiano
description: A sumptuous pasta dish featuring penne rigate enveloped in a silky cream of caramelized red onion and Parmigiano Reggiano, garnished with thyme.
ingredients_text: penne rigate, caramelized red onion, Parmigiano Reggiano, thyme
instructions_text: 1. Cook penne rigate according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, caramelize red onions until golden. 3. Add cream to the onions and simmer. 4. Stir in grated Parmigiano Reggiano until melted. 5. Combine the pasta with the onion cream sauce. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Garnish with fresh thyme. 8. Serve warm.

title: Spring Pasta Salad
description: A delightful pasta salad that's perfect for a spring potluck, picnic, or Easter gathering. It combines crunchy textures with bright and herby flavors, highlighted by delicious California olives.
ingredients_text: pasta, California olives, assorted vegetables, herbs, olive oil, vinegar, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Drain and rinse under cold water. 3. Chop vegetables and herbs. 4. In a large bowl, combine pasta, olives, vegetables, and herbs. 5. Drizzle with olive oil and vinegar. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Toss to combine. 8. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

title: Calamarata con Stracciatella e Pistacchi
description: A creamy and festive pasta dish perfect for your holiday table. Made with stracciatella, pistachios, and crispy speck, it's sure to impress your guests.
ingredients_text: pasta, stracciatella, pistachios, crispy speck
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, combine stracciatella and cooked pasta. 3. Add chopped pistachios and crispy speck. 4. Mix until creamy. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Serve warm. 7. Garnish with extra pistachios if desired. 8. Enjoy your festive dish!

title: Roasted Pumpkin, Quinoa, Avocado and Almond Salad
description: A hearty and flavorful salad featuring roasted pumpkin, quinoa, avocado, and almonds, perfect for a healthy lunch or dinner.
ingredients_text: roasted pumpkin, quinoa, avocado, almonds
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast the pumpkin until tender. 2. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 3. Slice the avocado. 4. In a bowl, combine roasted pumpkin, quinoa, avocado, and almonds. 5. Toss gently to mix. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your hearty salad!

title: Spinach & Pepper Egg White Bites
description: A convenient and protein-packed high-protein breakfast you can prepare ahead of time, ideal for busy mornings.
ingredients_text: egg whites, spinach, bell peppers, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Whisk egg whites in a bowl. 3. Stir in chopped spinach and bell peppers. 4. Season with salt and pepper. 5. Pour mixture into muffin tins. 6. Bake until set. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm or store for later.

title: Baked Spinach and Spicy Mushroom Rigatoni
description: A delightful and creamy baked pasta dish featuring spinach, spicy mushrooms, and a rich sauce that combines milk, fresh cream, and flavorful spices.
ingredients_text: spinach, spicy mushrooms, milk, fresh cream, flavorful spices, rigatoni pasta
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook rigatoni according to package instructions. 3. Sauté spinach and spicy mushrooms in a pan. 4. Mix milk, fresh cream, and spices in a bowl. 5. Combine cooked pasta, sautéed vegetables, and sauce. 6. Transfer to a baking dish. 7. Bake until golden and bubbly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Tomato Red Pesto Gnocchi
description: A creamy and vibrant gnocchi dish featuring a rich tomato red pesto sauce. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner that is both vegan and delicious.
ingredients_text: gnocchi, tomato red pesto sauce
instructions_text: 1. Boil gnocchi according to package instructions. 2. In a separate pan, heat the tomato red pesto sauce. 3. Drain the gnocchi and add to the sauce. 4. Stir gently to combine. 5. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Sausage, Chorizo, Sun Dried Tomato and Mozzarella Pasta
description: A quick and flavorful pasta dish that combines the richness of chorizo, the savory taste of sausages, and the creaminess of mozzarella, enhanced by sun dried tomato paste.
ingredients_text: pasta, chorizo, sausages, sun dried tomato paste, mozzarella
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, cook chorizo and sausages until browned. 3. Add sun dried tomato paste and mix well. 4. Drain pasta and add to the skillet. 5. Stir in mozzarella until melted. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your flavorful pasta dish!

title: Hot Honey Halloumi Chicken Pasta
description: A delicious high-protein pasta dish with spicy hot honey halloumi, juicy chicken, and a creamy sauce.
ingredients_text: hot honey, halloumi, chicken, pasta, creamy sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, fry chicken until cooked through. 3. Add halloumi and cook until golden. 4. Mix in hot honey and creamy sauce. 5. Combine with pasta. 6. Stir well to coat. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Avocado Flatbread with Cannellini Beans
description: A delicious, protein-packed avocado flatbread with a tangy bean mix that's perfect for a hearty breakfast or brunch.
ingredients_text: avocado, flatbread, cannellini beans, spices, lemon juice
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mash the avocado in a bowl. 3. Mix cannellini beans with spices and lemon juice. 4. Spread the avocado on flatbread. 5. Top with the bean mix. 6. Bake until warm. 7. Slice and serve. 8. Enjoy your hearty breakfast.

title: Crunchy Raw Carrot Salad
description: A zesty and crunchy carrot salad, perfect for a quick, healthy snack or a side dish. Enjoy the refreshing flavors and satisfying crunch of fresh carrots paired with a citrusy, sweet, and slightly spicy dressing.
ingredients_text: fresh carrots, citrus dressing, spices
instructions_text: 1. Peel and grate the fresh carrots. 2. In a bowl, mix the grated carrots with the citrus dressing. 3. Add spices to taste. 4. Toss well to combine. 5. Let it sit for a few minutes for flavors to meld. 6. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 7. Enjoy as a snack or side dish.

title: Courgette Ribbons with Tahini Yoghurt on Toast
description: A fresh and vibrant toast topped with lemon and mint-dressed courgette ribbons, laid on a creamy tahini yoghurt bed. Perfect for a light brunch or snack.
ingredients_text: courgette, lemon, mint, tahini, yoghurt, bread
instructions_text: 1. Prepare courgette ribbons using a peeler. 2. Toss courgette with lemon juice and chopped mint. 3. Mix tahini with yoghurt until smooth. 4. Toast the bread slices. 5. Spread tahini yoghurt on the toast. 6. Top with courgette ribbons. 7. Garnish with additional mint if desired. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Pasta and Pickles Salad
description: A refreshing pasta salad that leverages the tangy flavor of pickle brine for a delightful and light meal, perfect for any occasion.
ingredients_text: pasta, pickles, pickle brine, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Drain and rinse under cold water. 3. Chop pickles and vegetables. 4. In a bowl, mix pasta, pickles, and vegetables. 5. Add pickle brine and stir well. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes. 8. Serve cold.

title: Sun-Dried Tomato Avocado Grilled Cheese
description: A savory and creamy vegan grilled cheese featuring sun-dried tomatoes, mashed avocado, and arugula on toasted sourdough. Quick and easy comfort food.
ingredients_text: sun-dried tomatoes, mashed avocado, arugula, sourdough bread
instructions_text: 1. Preheat a grill or skillet. 2. Spread mashed avocado on one slice of sourdough. 3. Layer with sun-dried tomatoes and arugula. 4. Top with another slice of sourdough. 5. Grill until golden brown on both sides. 6. Remove from heat and slice. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your vegan grilled cheese!

title: Saucy Spicy Sausage Orecchiette Pasta
description: Delight in this vibrant pasta dish, combining the zest of spicy sausage with hearty orecchiette, perfectly complemented by the freshness of spinach and parsley. Topped with a sprinkle of Parmesan for that extra flavorful finish.
ingredients_text: spicy sausage, orecchiette pasta, spinach, parsley, Parmesan
instructions_text: 1. Cook orecchiette pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, cook spicy sausage until browned. 3. Add spinach and parsley to the skillet, cooking until wilted. 4. Combine cooked pasta with the sausage mixture. 5. Stir in Parmesan cheese until melted. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve hot, garnished with extra Parmesan. 8. Enjoy your vibrant pasta dish!

title: Brown Butter Corn Pasta Alfredo
description: Creamy with warming notes of sage, sweetness from the corn, and nuttiness from the brown butter!
ingredients_text: pasta, corn, brown butter, sage, cream, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, melt butter until browned. 3. Add corn and sage, sauté briefly. 4. Stir in cream and cheese until melted. 5. Combine pasta with sauce. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve warm. 8. Garnish with additional sage if desired.

title: Sweet Potato Fudgy Brownies
description: Fudgy, vegan brownies made with sweet potatoes, cocoa powder, nut butter, and maple syrup. A healthy treat that's easy to bake!
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, cocoa powder, nut butter, maple syrup
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook sweet potatoes until soft. 3. Mash sweet potatoes in a bowl. 4. Mix in cocoa powder, nut butter, and maple syrup. 5. Pour the mixture into a baking dish. 6. Bake for 30 minutes. 7. Let cool before slicing. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Mexican Street Corn Pasta Salad
description: A vibrant and flavorful pasta salad inspired by the beloved Mexican street corn, featuring sweet corn, smoky bacon, and a spicy, creamy dressing.
ingredients_text: pasta, sweet corn, smoky bacon, spicy creamy dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, cook bacon until crispy. 3. Combine cooked pasta, corn, and bacon in a bowl. 4. Mix in the spicy creamy dressing. 5. Toss everything together until well combined. 6. Chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes. 7. Serve cold or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your vibrant pasta salad!

title: Cavatelli with Shrimp & Cannellini Bean Puree
description: A protein-packed pasta dish inspired by a memorable meal in Puglia, featuring shrimp and a creamy cannellini bean puree.
ingredients_text: cavatelli pasta, shrimp, cannellini beans, garlic, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook cavatelli pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, sauté garlic in olive oil. 3. Add shrimp and cook until pink. 4. Blend cannellini beans with olive oil, salt, and pepper until smooth. 5. Drain pasta and combine with shrimp. 6. Serve pasta topped with cannellini bean puree. 7. Garnish with additional olive oil if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Miso, Mushroom & Guanciale Pasta
description: A rich and creamy pasta dish featuring beech mushrooms, savory guanciale, and umami-rich miso paste, perfect for a luxurious meal experience.
ingredients_text: pasta, beech mushrooms, guanciale, miso paste, cream
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, cook guanciale until crispy. 3. Add beech mushrooms and sauté until tender. 4. Stir in miso paste and cream. 5. Combine cooked pasta with the sauce. 6. Toss to coat evenly. 7. Serve hot, garnished as desired. 8. Enjoy your rich and creamy pasta dish.

title: Hot Lemon and Bay Pudding
description: A magical pudding with a light lemon sponge on top and a rich custardy base, enhanced with the aromatic touch of bay leaves.
ingredients_text: lemon, bay leaves, eggs, sugar, flour, butter, milk
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the baking dish. 3. Mix lemon juice, zest, and bay leaves. 4. Whisk eggs and sugar until fluffy. 5. Combine dry ingredients and fold into egg mixture. 6. Pour in milk and melted butter, mix well. 7. Bake until golden and set. 8. Serve warm or chilled.

title: Fudgy White Chocolate Raspberry Banana Bread Bars
description: Deliciously fudgy white chocolate raspberry banana bread bars packed with chunks of walnuts, white chocolates, and sweet raspberries. Perfect for a sweet treat or dessert.
ingredients_text: bananas, white chocolate, raspberries, walnuts
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking dish. 2. Mash the bananas in a bowl. 3. Mix in white chocolate and raspberries. 4. Fold in walnuts. 5. Pour the batter into the dish. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Let cool before cutting. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Elote-Inspired Corn Fritters
description: Hot, crispy elote-inspired corn fritters, packed with sweet corn, vegan feta, spring onions, and a kick of spicy hot sauce.
ingredients_text: sweet corn, vegan feta, spring onions, spicy hot sauce
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix sweet corn, vegan feta, and chopped spring onions. 2. Add spicy hot sauce to taste. 3. Form the mixture into fritters. 4. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. 5. Fry the fritters until golden brown on both sides. 6. Drain on paper towels. 7. Serve hot with extra hot sauce if desired. 8. Enjoy your crispy corn fritters!

title: Vegan Ube Butter Mochi
description: A vegan take on the classic chewy and delicious ube butter mochi, perfect for a plant-based dessert with a hint of coconut and enticing ube flavors.
ingredients_text: ube, coconut milk, glutinous rice flour, sugar, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix ube, coconut milk, and sugar. 3. In another bowl, combine glutinous rice flour, baking powder, and salt. 4. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet mixture. 5. Pour the batter into a greased baking dish. 6. Bake for 45-50 minutes until set. 7. Let cool before slicing. 8. Serve and enjoy your vegan mochi.

title: Spicy Spinach Mushroom Pasta
description: A creamy, saucy pasta bursting with the flavors of spicy mushrooms, savory garlic, and fresh spinach. Perfect with a sprinkle of chili flakes and a sip of wine.
ingredients_text: pasta, mushrooms, spinach, garlic, chili flakes, cream, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Sauté garlic and mushrooms in olive oil until tender. 3. Add spinach and cook until wilted. 4. Stir in cream and chili flakes. 5. Combine cooked pasta with the sauce. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve hot, garnished with extra chili flakes. 8. Enjoy with a glass of wine.

title: Crispy Prosciutto Spring Pasta Salad
description: A vibrant gluten-free and dairy-free pasta salad, loaded with fresh greens and drizzled in a zesty lemon and garlic vinaigrette, topped with crispy prosciutto for a savory finish.
ingredients_text: gluten-free pasta, fresh greens, lemon, garlic, prosciutto
instructions_text: 1. Cook the gluten-free pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a bowl, mix lemon juice and minced garlic for the vinaigrette. 3. Toss the cooked pasta with fresh greens. 4. Drizzle the vinaigrette over the pasta and greens. 5. Cook prosciutto in a pan until crispy. 6. Top the salad with crispy prosciutto. 7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Puerto Rican Tembleque
description: A creamy coconut dessert that is reminiscent of a coconut pudding, called Tembleque, which is a popular treat in Puerto Rican cuisine.
ingredients_text: coconut milk, cornstarch, sugar, salt, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. In a saucepan, mix coconut milk, sugar, and salt. 2. Heat over medium until warm. 3. In a separate bowl, dissolve cornstarch in a little water. 4. Add cornstarch mixture to the saucepan, stirring constantly. 5. Cook until thickened, about 5-7 minutes. 6. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla. 7. Pour into molds and refrigerate until set. 8. Serve chilled, optionally garnished with coconut flakes.

title: Creamy Cajun Alfredo with Fried Oyster Mushrooms
description: A deliciously rich and creamy Cajun Alfredo pasta topped with crispy fried oyster mushrooms, offering the perfect comfort food experience.
ingredients_text: pasta, cream, Cajun seasoning, oyster mushrooms, oil, garlic, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, sauté garlic in oil. 3. Add cream and Cajun seasoning, stirring until combined. 4. Fry oyster mushrooms until crispy. 5. Mix cooked pasta with the sauce. 6. Top with fried mushrooms. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your creamy Cajun Alfredo.

title: Crockpot Basil Butter Chicken
description: Quickly put together in the crockpot (or in a pan and bake in the oven). Simply mix, cook, serve, and enjoy!
ingredients_text: basil, butter, chicken, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Mix basil, butter, salt, and pepper in a bowl. 2. Place chicken in the crockpot. 3. Pour the basil mixture over the chicken. 4. Cover and cook on low for 180 minutes. 5. Check for doneness. 6. Serve hot. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Honey-Chili Glazed Sweet Potatoes with Whipped Ricotta & Lime
description: Sweet potatoes that melt in your mouth, glazed with honey-chili butter, and served over a lime-infused whipped ricotta, topped with fresh herbs and pistachios.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, honey, chili butter, ricotta cheese, lime, fresh herbs, pistachios
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking dish. 2. Peel and chop sweet potatoes. 3. Toss sweet potatoes with honey-chili butter. 4. Bake until tender. 5. Whip ricotta with lime juice. 6. Serve sweet potatoes over whipped ricotta. 7. Top with fresh herbs and pistachios. 8. Enjoy your dish warm.

title: Popcorn Chicken with Honey Mustard Dipping Sauce
description: Crunchy, delectable popcorn chicken, served with a homemade honey mustard sauce, all gluten and dairy free for a perfect snack or appetizer.
ingredients_text: popcorn chicken, honey, mustard
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the popcorn chicken according to package instructions. 2. In a bowl, mix honey and mustard to create the dipping sauce. 3. Serve the popcorn chicken hot with the honey mustard sauce on the side. 4. Enjoy as a snack or appetizer.

title: Hawaiian Banana Bread
description: An ode to Hawaii, this gluten and dairy-free banana bread combines ripe bananas with classic island flavors like coconut and pineapple for a delightful early summer treat.
ingredients_text: ripe bananas, coconut, pineapple
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mash ripe bananas in a bowl. 3. Mix in coconut and pineapple. 4. Combine dry ingredients. 5. Fold dry ingredients into banana mixture. 6. Pour batter into a loaf pan. 7. Bake for 60 minutes. 8. Let cool before slicing.

title: Portuguese Octopus Salad
description: A refreshing and easy-to-make octopus salad inspired by a traditional Portuguese dish. This salad combines tender octopus with fresh vegetables and herbs for a taste of summer.
ingredients_text: octopus, fresh vegetables, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Boil the octopus until tender. 2. Let it cool and chop into bite-sized pieces. 3. Prepare fresh vegetables and herbs. 4. Combine octopus with vegetables and herbs. 5. Drizzle with olive oil and season. 6. Toss gently to mix. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy as a refreshing salad.

title: Butternut Squash, Sausage & Rosemary Risotto
description: This delicious butternut squash, sausage & rosemary risotto is autumn in a bowl. It’s silky and sweet but savoury and rich too.
ingredients_text: butternut squash, sausage, rosemary, arborio rice, broth, onion, garlic, parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Sauté onion and garlic until translucent. 2. Add sausage and cook until browned. 3. Stir in arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes. 4. Gradually add broth, stirring frequently. 5. Incorporate roasted butternut squash. 6. Cook until rice is creamy and al dente. 7. Stir in rosemary and parmesan cheese. 8. Serve warm, garnished with additional rosemary.

title: Garlic Sesame Chicken Zucchini Bowls
description: A quick and healthy weeknight meal packed with flavor and nutrients. It features garlic sesame chicken with zucchini, perfect for hitting your protein goals.
ingredients_text: garlic, sesame oil, chicken, zucchini
instructions_text: 1. Heat sesame oil in a pan. 2. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. 3. Add chicken and cook until browned. 4. Slice zucchini and add to the pan. 5. Stir-fry until zucchini is tender. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve in bowls. 8. Enjoy your healthy meal!

title: Philly Cheesesteak Egg Rolls
description: This game day appetizer will be your new obsession! Flavorful, cheesy filling wrapped in a crispy, crunchy shell- SO tasty & will be super popular at your game day spread!
ingredients_text: cheese, beef, egg roll wrappers, onions, peppers, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Cook beef in a skillet until browned. 2. Sauté onions and peppers until soft. 3. Mix beef, onions, peppers, and cheese. 4. Fill egg roll wrappers with the mixture. 5. Roll and seal the wrappers. 6. Fry in hot oil until golden brown. 7. Drain on paper towels. 8. Serve hot with dipping sauce.

title: Chicken Tortilla Rolls
description: Crispy on the outside, tender inside, chicken tortilla rolls perfect with a creamy garlic dip
ingredients_text: tortillas, chicken, garlic, cream, spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken with spices until tender. 2. Prepare creamy garlic dip. 3. Place chicken in tortillas. 4. Roll tortillas tightly. 5. Fry rolls until crispy. 6. Serve with garlic dip. 7. Enjoy as a lunch or snack.

title: Creamy Pumpkin Gnocchi Soup
description: A quick and easy 5 ingredient Creamy Gnocchi Soup perfect for the colder weather months. This soup is vegan and can be ready in less than 30 minutes.
ingredients_text: 5 ingredients, including gnocchi and pumpkin
instructions_text: 1. In a pot, combine pumpkin and water. 2. Bring to a boil and add gnocchi. 3. Cook until gnocchi is tender. 4. Stir in coconut milk for creaminess. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Simmer for a few minutes. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your creamy soup.

title: Kimchi Jjigae With Noodles
description: A hearty Korean ramen dish featuring kimchi jjigae with noodles. This recipe includes a variety of ingredients such as Napa cabbage kimchi, pork belly, and instant ramen noodles, all combined to create a flavorful and satisfying meal.
ingredients_text: Napa cabbage kimchi, pork belly, instant ramen noodles
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the kimchi and pork belly. 2. In a pot, sauté the pork belly until browned. 3. Add the kimchi and stir for a few minutes. 4. Pour in water and bring to a boil. 5. Add instant ramen noodles and cook until tender. 6. Adjust seasoning as needed. 7. Serve hot in bowls. 8. Enjoy your hearty kimchi jjigae with noodles.

title: The Crispiest Fried Chicken You’ve Ever Seen
description: Yes this is the crispiest fried chicken you’ve ever seen
ingredients_text: chicken, flour, spices, oil
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the chicken by cleaning and seasoning it. 2. Dredge the chicken in seasoned flour. 3. Heat oil in a deep pan. 4. Fry the chicken until golden brown and crispy. 5. Drain on paper towels. 6. Serve hot. 7. Enjoy with your favorite dipping sauce.

title: Puff Tarts With Tomato, Thyme & Honey
description: Puff tarts forever. This one is flavoured with tomato, thyme & honey. It’s so good this time of year and really simple too.
ingredients_text: puff pastry, tomatoes, thyme, honey
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Roll out the puff pastry. 3. Cut into squares. 4. Top with sliced tomatoes and thyme. 5. Drizzle with honey. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Sautéed Teriyaki Oyakodon
description: A twist on the classic Japanese chicken and egg rice bowl using teriyaki-style sautéed chicken.
ingredients_text: chicken, eggs, rice, teriyaki sauce, green onions
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. Sauté chicken in teriyaki sauce until cooked. 3. Beat eggs and pour over chicken. 4. Cook until eggs are set. 5. Serve chicken and egg mixture over rice. 6. Garnish with chopped green onions. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Salmon & Quinoa Power Salad with Lemon-Feta-Avocado Salsa
description: A nutritious power salad featuring seared salmon, quinoa, kale, and a refreshing lemon-feta-avocado salsa.
ingredients_text: seared salmon, quinoa, kale, lemon, feta, avocado
instructions_text: 1. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 2. Sear salmon in a hot pan until cooked through. 3. Prepare lemon-feta-avocado salsa by mixing diced avocado, crumbled feta, and lemon juice. 4. Toss kale with cooked quinoa. 5. Top the quinoa and kale mixture with seared salmon. 6. Spoon the salsa over the salmon. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your nutritious power salad!

title: Steak & Asparagus with Soy Sauce
description: Better than takeout, this steak and asparagus dish boasts a tender steak and a delicious sauce made from chicken stock, soy sauce, and more.
ingredients_text: steak, asparagus, chicken stock, soy sauce, additional seasonings
instructions_text: 1. Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. 2. Season the steak and cook until desired doneness. 3. Remove steak and let it rest. 4. In the same skillet, add asparagus and sauté until tender. 5. Pour in chicken stock and soy sauce, stirring to combine. 6. Slice the steak and return to the skillet. 7. Toss everything together and heat through. 8. Serve warm.

title: Greek Chicken Lentil Bowl
description: A delicious Greek-inspired chicken and lentil bowl that's perfect for weeknight meals and meal prep. Light and fresh, it's a great choice even in the chilly months.
ingredients_text: chicken, lentils, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, herbs, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook lentils according to package instructions. 2. Marinate chicken with olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, herbs, salt, and pepper. 3. Grill or boil the chicken until cooked through. 4. Assemble the bowl with lentils and sliced chicken. 5. Drizzle with extra olive oil and lemon juice. 6. Garnish with fresh herbs. 7. Serve warm or chilled. 8. Enjoy as a meal prep option.

title: Skirt Steak with Red Chimichurri
description: One of the thinnest cuts of beef out there, skirt steak was basically made for weeknight meals because of its quick-cooking nature. Topped with a bright, spicy, Argentinean-style red chimichurri sauce.
ingredients_text: skirt steak, red chimichurri sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat grill or stovetop pan. 2. Season skirt steak with salt and pepper. 3. Cook steak for 3-5 minutes per side for medium-rare. 4. Remove steak and let rest. 5. Prepare red chimichurri sauce. 6. Slice steak against the grain. 7. Top with chimichurri sauce. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Egg Roll In A Bowl
description: This egg roll in a bowl is everything you want in a weeknight dinner. It’s easy, filling, veggie-packed, and loved by everyone. It also makes amazing leftovers.
ingredients_text: cabbage, carrots, green onions, ground pork, soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, ginger, eggs
instructions_text: 1. Heat sesame oil in a skillet. 2. Add garlic and ginger, sauté until fragrant. 3. Add ground pork, cook until browned. 4. Stir in cabbage, carrots, and green onions. 5. Pour in soy sauce, mix well. 6. Push mixture to the side, scramble eggs in the skillet. 7. Combine everything and cook until eggs are set. 8. Serve hot and enjoy.

title: Steak and Farro Salad with Pickled Red Onions and Creamy Feta Dressing
description: A hearty and satisfying salad featuring succulent steak, nutty farro, and a creamy feta dressing, all balanced with tangy pickled red onions.
ingredients_text: steak, farro, pickled red onions, feta cheese, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook farro according to package instructions. 2. Grill or sear steak to desired doneness, then let rest. 3. Slice steak thinly. 4. In a bowl, mix feta cheese, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper for dressing. 5. Combine farro, sliced steak, and pickled onions in a large bowl. 6. Drizzle with creamy feta dressing. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve immediately or chill for later.

title: Swordfish Steak with Crispy Capers
description: Swordfish is a hearty fish that can be seared without fear of sticking or tearing, much like steak. This recipe features golden-brown swordfish steaks topped with crispy capers in a rich browned butter sauce, aromatic with garlic and herbs.
ingredients_text: swordfish steaks, capers, butter, garlic, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Heat butter in a skillet until browned. 2. Add garlic and herbs, sauté briefly. 3. Season swordfish steaks with salt and pepper. 4. Sear swordfish in the skillet for 4-5 minutes per side. 5. In the last minute, add capers to the skillet. 6. Remove swordfish and capers, plate them. 7. Drizzle browned butter sauce over the fish. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Korean-Inspired Sirloin Steak with Sesame Ginger Rice and Pickled Vegetables
description: This Korean-Inspired Sirloin Steak is marinated with a savory blend and paired with fragrant sesame ginger rice and tangy pickled vegetables. The combination offers a balanced, flavorful meal.
ingredients_text: sirloin steak, sesame oil, ginger, rice, pickled vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Marinate the sirloin steak in sesame oil and ginger. 2. Cook the rice according to package instructions. 3. Grill the marinated steak to desired doneness. 4. Prepare pickled vegetables. 5. Serve the steak over sesame ginger rice. 6. Add pickled vegetables on the side. 7. Garnish with additional sesame seeds if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Korean Bulgogi Steak Tacos with Spicy Slaw
description: These Korean-inspired tacos feature tender bulgogi-style steak with a flavorful marinade, served in warm tortillas with a crunchy, spicy slaw and a drizzle of sriracha mayo.
ingredients_text: bulgogi-style steak, warm tortillas, spicy slaw, sriracha mayo
instructions_text: 1. Marinate the steak in bulgogi sauce. 2. Grill the steak until cooked to preference. 3. Prepare the spicy slaw. 4. Warm the tortillas. 5. Slice the grilled steak. 6. Assemble tacos with steak and slaw. 7. Drizzle with sriracha mayo. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Spicy Garlic Bok Choy
description: A quick and easy Chinese side dish made with baby bok choy, garlic, and chili oil. Ready in just 10 minutes!
ingredients_text: baby bok choy, garlic, chili oil
instructions_text: 1. Heat chili oil in a pan. 2. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. 3. Add baby bok choy and stir-fry for 5 minutes. 4. Season with salt to taste. 5. Cook until bok choy is tender. 6. Remove from heat. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy as a side dish.

title: Quick 20-Minute Soup Dumplings
description: Elevate frozen chicken soup dumplings with fresh veggies and flavorful toppings in just 20 minutes for a nutritious and easy meal.
ingredients_text: frozen chicken soup dumplings, fresh veggies, flavorful toppings
instructions_text: 1. Prepare frozen chicken soup dumplings according to package instructions. 2. While dumplings are cooking, chop fresh veggies. 3. Steam or sauté the veggies until tender. 4. Once dumplings are ready, remove from heat. 5. Plate the dumplings and top with fresh veggies. 6. Add any additional flavorful toppings. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your nutritious meal.

title: Maple-Glazed Steak with Sweet Potato Mash and Brussels Sprouts
description: This steak dinner brings in the sweetness of maple syrup, a Thanksgiving favorite, paired with creamy sweet potato mash and roasted Brussels sprouts for a festive, hearty meal.
ingredients_text: steak, maple syrup, sweet potatoes, Brussels sprouts, butter, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Boil sweet potatoes until tender, then mash with butter, salt, and pepper. 3. Season steak with salt and pepper, then sear in a hot pan. 4. Brush steak with maple syrup and transfer to the oven. 5. Roast Brussels sprouts alongside the steak until caramelized. 6. Serve steak with sweet potato mash and Brussels sprouts. 7. Drizzle any remaining maple syrup over the steak. 8. Enjoy your festive meal.

title: Peach and Prosciutto Salad with Burrata
description: A delightful and fresh summer salad that combines juicy peaches, savory prosciutto, and creamy burrata cheese, perfect for an elegant yet simple appetizer.
ingredients_text: juicy peaches, prosciutto, burrata cheese
instructions_text: 1. Slice the peaches. 2. Tear the prosciutto into pieces. 3. Arrange peaches and prosciutto on a plate. 4. Add burrata cheese on top. 5. Drizzle with olive oil. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Garnish with fresh herbs. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Cowboy Butter Steak Bites
description: Deliciously seasoned ribeye steak bites served with roasted garlic mashed potatoes and caramelized onions.
ingredients_text: ribeye steak, garlic, potatoes, onions, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Season the ribeye steak bites. 2. Grill the steak bites until cooked to preference. 3. Roast garlic until golden. 4. Boil potatoes until tender. 5. Mash potatoes with roasted garlic. 6. Caramelize onions in a pan. 7. Serve steak bites with mashed potatoes and caramelized onions. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: 30 Minute Herby Lemon Garlic Steak and Rice
description: Easy to throw together and great for grilling on warm nights...the perfect summer dinner bowl!
ingredients_text: steak, rice, lemon, garlic, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Marinate steak with lemon juice, garlic, and herbs. 2. Preheat grill. 3. Cook steak for 5-7 minutes per side. 4. Prepare rice according to package instructions. 5. Slice steak after resting. 6. Serve steak over rice. 7. Garnish with additional herbs. 8. Enjoy your summer dinner bowl!

title: Halloumi Tacos with Zesty Corn Salad and Creamy Cilantro Sauce
description: Salty, tangy grilled halloumi is the perfect match for a fresh corn and avocado salad and vibrant herb sauce in these loaded vegetarian tacos. Use fresh or frozen fire-roasted corn, and turn this lineup into tacos or tostadas!
ingredients_text: halloumi, corn, avocado, cilantro, tortillas, lime, spices
instructions_text: 1. Grill halloumi until golden. 2. Prepare corn salad with corn, avocado, and lime. 3. Blend cilantro with yogurt for sauce. 4. Warm tortillas. 5. Assemble tacos with halloumi and salad. 6. Drizzle with cilantro sauce. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Korean BBQ Chicken Bowls with Cucumber Salad
description: A quick and flavorful Korean-inspired dish featuring crispy chicken thighs in a rich gochujang sauce, served with fresh cucumber salad over rice.
ingredients_text: crispy chicken thighs, gochujang sauce, fresh cucumber, rice
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. Prepare gochujang sauce. 3. Fry chicken thighs until crispy. 4. Toss cucumber with dressing. 5. Serve chicken over rice. 6. Top with cucumber salad. 7. Drizzle extra sauce if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Butter Garlic Steak Bites and Mashed Potatoes
description: Succulent steak bites infused with butter and garlic, served alongside creamy mashed potatoes for a hearty meal.
ingredients_text: steak bites, butter, garlic, potatoes, cream, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Heat butter in a pan and add garlic. 2. Add steak bites and cook until browned. 3. Boil potatoes until tender. 4. Mash potatoes with cream, salt, and pepper. 5. Serve steak bites alongside mashed potatoes.

title: Steak with Creamy Mushroom Sauce and Cheesy Mashed Potatoes
description: Indulge in the perfect comfort meal with this rib eye steak that melts in your mouth, paired with creamy mushroom sauce and cheesy mashed potatoes—ideal for warming up the cooler evenings.
ingredients_text: rib eye steak, mushrooms, cream, cheese, potatoes, butter, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Season the rib eye steak with salt and pepper. 2. Grill the steak to desired doneness. 3. In a pan, sauté mushrooms until golden. 4. Add cream to the mushrooms and simmer. 5. Boil potatoes until tender. 6. Mash potatoes with cheese and butter. 7. Serve steak topped with mushroom sauce alongside cheesy mashed potatoes. 8. Enjoy your comforting meal.

title: Butter Garlic Steak Bites with Mashed Potatoes
description: Tender butter garlic steak bites served alongside creamy mashed potatoes for a comforting and flavorful meal.
ingredients_text: steak bites, butter, garlic, potatoes, cream, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Season steak bites with salt and pepper. 2. Heat butter in a pan over medium heat. 3. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant. 4. Add steak bites and cook until browned. 5. Boil potatoes until tender. 6. Mash potatoes with cream, salt, and pepper. 7. Serve steak bites alongside mashed potatoes. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Steak and Shrimp Tacos with Chimichurri
description: A tantalizing fusion of flavors marrying tender grilled skirt steak and spicy shrimp with vibrant chimichurri, all wrapped in a warm tortilla.
ingredients_text: skirt steak, shrimp, chimichurri, tortillas
instructions_text: 1. Marinate the skirt steak and shrimp in chimichurri. 2. Preheat the grill. 3. Grill the steak to desired doneness and shrimp until cooked through. 4. Warm the tortillas on the grill. 5. Slice the steak. 6. Assemble tacos with steak, shrimp, and extra chimichurri. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your flavorful tacos!

title: Easy Steak With Pan Sauce
description: This punchy, buttery steak with pan sauce is restaurant-worthy but simple enough to make on a busy weeknight. It also conveniently works with any piece of meat.
ingredients_text: steak, butter, salt, pepper, garlic, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Season the steak with salt and pepper. 2. Heat butter in a pan over medium-high heat. 3. Add the steak and sear until browned. 4. Flip the steak and add garlic and herbs. 5. Cook to desired doneness. 6. Remove steak and let rest. 7. Make pan sauce by deglazing with broth. 8. Serve steak with sauce drizzled on top.

title: Sesame-Soy Dumpling Salad
description: A quick and vibrant salad featuring crispy pan-fried dumplings, fresh vegetables, and a bold sesame-soy dressing. Perfect for a refreshing weeknight meal.
ingredients_text: crispy pan-fried dumplings, fresh vegetables, sesame-soy dressing
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the dumplings according to package instructions. 2. Pan-fry the dumplings until crispy. 3. Chop fresh vegetables. 4. In a bowl, mix sesame-soy dressing. 5. Combine vegetables and dumplings in a serving bowl. 6. Drizzle with dressing. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Steak Frites with Peppercorn Sauce
description: A classic and indulgent French favorite, featuring perfectly seasoned steak paired with crispy French fries and a rich peppercorn sauce.
ingredients_text: steak, French fries, peppercorn sauce, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Season the steak with salt and pepper. 2. Grill the steak to desired doneness. 3. Prepare French fries by frying until crispy. 4. In a pan, make the peppercorn sauce. 5. Serve the steak with fries on the side. 6. Drizzle the sauce over the steak. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Creamy Cajun Garlic Butter Steak Potatoes
description: A creamy, Cajun sauce drizzled over tender steak bites, sat on top of cheesy cubed potatoes with garlic butter, offering a high-protein meal packed with flavor.
ingredients_text: steak bites, cubed potatoes, Cajun sauce, garlic butter, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook cubed potatoes until tender. 2. In a skillet, melt garlic butter. 3. Add steak bites and sear until cooked. 4. Pour Cajun sauce over steak. 5. Combine steak and potatoes in the skillet. 6. Sprinkle cheese on top. 7. Let it melt slightly. 8. Serve hot.

title: Spring Crisp Salad
description: Fresh, crisp, and tasty! The perfect salad for spring. Quick and easy to make, full of flavor and crunch. Great as a light lunch or a simple side dish.
ingredients_text: fresh greens, cherry tomatoes, cucumber, bell peppers, red onion, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Wash and chop the fresh greens. 2. Slice the cherry tomatoes, cucumber, and bell peppers. 3. Finely chop the red onion. 4. In a large bowl, combine all the vegetables. 5. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Spring Steak Bowl
description: A vibrant bowl featuring hanger steak and quinoa paired with fresh farmers market veggies, topped with a herby scallion sauce and goat cheese.
ingredients_text: hanger steak, quinoa, fresh farmers market veggies, herby scallion sauce, goat cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 2. Season hanger steak and grill to desired doneness. 3. Chop fresh veggies. 4. Prepare herby scallion sauce. 5. Slice the grilled steak. 6. Assemble the bowl with quinoa, veggies, steak, and goat cheese. 7. Drizzle with herby scallion sauce. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Sweet Potato Quinoa Salad
description: A vibrant and hearty salad featuring smoky chipotle lime sweet potatoes and a tangy-sweet maple cilantro dressing. Perfect as a side dish or topped with grilled chicken or shrimp for a complete meal.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, quinoa, chipotle, lime, maple syrup, cilantro, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Cube sweet potatoes and toss with chipotle, lime, olive oil, salt, and pepper. 3. Roast sweet potatoes for 25-30 minutes. 4. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 5. In a bowl, mix roasted sweet potatoes with quinoa. 6. Whisk together maple syrup, lime juice, and cilantro for dressing. 7. Drizzle dressing over salad and toss to combine. 8. Serve warm or chilled, optionally topped with grilled chicken or shrimp.

title: Miso Tamari Steak & Potatoes with Scallion Herb Oil
description: A delightful twist on the classic steak and potatoes, featuring miso-coated Japanese sweet potatoes and a flavorful charred scallion herb oil. This dish is both gluten-free and dairy-free, offering a perfect balance of umami and fresh flavors.
ingredients_text: miso, tamari, steak, Japanese sweet potatoes, scallions, herbs, oil
instructions_text: 1. Preheat grill. 2. Coat steak with miso and tamari. 3. Roast sweet potatoes until tender. 4. Grill steak to desired doneness. 5. Blend scallions and herbs with oil for herb oil. 6. Serve steak with sweet potatoes. 7. Drizzle with scallion herb oil. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Hot Honey Chicken Nuggets
description: Crispy nuggets tossed in a bold, buttery, spicy honey glaze. Perfect for a quick snack with a spicy-sweet kick.
ingredients_text: chicken nuggets, honey, butter, hot sauce, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Prepare chicken nuggets according to package instructions. 2. In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. 3. Stir in honey and hot sauce until combined. 4. Toss cooked nuggets in the honey glaze. 5. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy as a snack or appetizer. 8. Store leftovers in an airtight container.

title: Sausage & Kale Butternut Squash Soup
description: Hearty, cozy and ready in 30 minutes! This soup is made with spicy chicken sausage, butternut squash, tender kale & stewed tomatoes all simmered in a rich savory broth then topped with lots of shredded parmesan. It’s flavor-packed and perfect for those chilly weeknights.
ingredients_text: spicy chicken sausage, butternut squash, tender kale, stewed tomatoes, shredded parmesan, broth
instructions_text: 1. In a large pot, cook the spicy chicken sausage until browned. 2. Add diced butternut squash and cook for a few minutes. 3. Stir in the stewed tomatoes and broth. 4. Bring to a simmer and cook until squash is tender. 5. Add kale and cook until wilted. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve hot, topped with shredded parmesan. 8. Enjoy your hearty soup!

title: Green Chili Chicken Enchiladas
description: A comforting and creamy chicken enchilada recipe with a healthier twist. Perfect for family dinners and celebrations like Cinco de Mayo.
ingredients_text: chicken, green chili, tortillas, cheese, sour cream, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the chicken and shred it. 3. Mix chicken with green chili and spices. 4. Fill tortillas with the mixture and roll them up. 5. Place in a baking dish and top with cheese and sour cream. 6. Bake until bubbly. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy with your favorite toppings.

title: Crispy Chicken Katsu Bowls
description: Crispy, fried soy-drenched chicken with favorite toppings and a spicy, sweet, and creamy sauce.
ingredients_text: chicken, soy sauce, favorite toppings, spicy sauce, sweet sauce, creamy sauce
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in soy sauce. 2. Coat chicken in breadcrumbs. 3. Heat oil in a pan. 4. Fry chicken until crispy. 5. Prepare toppings. 6. Assemble bowls with chicken and toppings. 7. Drizzle with spicy, sweet, and creamy sauce. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Pasta E Fagioli
description: A classic Italian soup made with pasta and beans, also known as pasta fazool. This hearty soup has been a staple in Italian kitchens for generations.
ingredients_text: pasta, beans, broth, vegetables, herbs, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pot, heat olive oil and sauté vegetables. 3. Add broth and bring to a simmer. 4. Stir in beans and cooked pasta. 5. Season with herbs and spices. 6. Simmer for 10-15 minutes. 7. Adjust seasoning to taste. 8. Serve hot.

title: Southwest Honey Chipotle Bean Salad
description: A healthy lunch option that is delicious, packed with fiber and protein, and gets better after the first day.
ingredients_text: various beans, honey, chipotle peppers, bell peppers, corn, red onion, cilantro, lime juice
instructions_text: 1. Rinse and drain the beans. 2. In a large bowl, combine beans, corn, diced bell peppers, and red onion. 3. In a separate bowl, mix honey, chipotle peppers, and lime juice. 4. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine. 5. Add chopped cilantro and mix well. 6. Let the salad sit for at least 30 minutes to meld flavors. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy as a healthy lunch option.

title: Chipotle Chicken and Chorizo Air Fryer Gnocchi
description: A bold and flavorful dish combining gnocchi, chicken, and chorizo with a smoky chipotle sauce, all crisped to perfection in the air fryer.
ingredients_text: gnocchi, chicken, chorizo, chipotle sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the air fryer. 2. Cook the gnocchi according to package instructions. 3. In a bowl, mix cooked gnocchi, chicken, chorizo, and chipotle sauce. 4. Place the mixture in the air fryer basket. 5. Air fry at 400°F for 15-20 minutes until crispy. 6. Shake the basket halfway through cooking. 7. Check for doneness and adjust time if necessary. 8. Serve hot.

title: Honey Mustard Chicken Cobb Salad
description: A vibrant spring salad with pan-seared chicken, crispy bacon, creamy avocado, and a sweet tangy honey mustard dressing.
ingredients_text: pan-seared chicken, crispy bacon, creamy avocado, honey mustard dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook the pan-seared chicken until golden brown. 2. Prepare the honey mustard dressing. 3. Chop the crispy bacon and avocado. 4. In a bowl, combine chicken, bacon, and avocado. 5. Drizzle with honey mustard dressing. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your vibrant salad!

title: Pumpkin Red Curry
description: Carrots, coconut milk, and pumpkin add a sweetness that compliments the red curry paste SO well. Done in under 30 minutes and great as leftovers.
ingredients_text: carrots, coconut milk, pumpkin, red curry paste
instructions_text: 1. Heat a pot over medium heat. 2. Add carrots and sauté until tender. 3. Stir in pumpkin and red curry paste. 4. Pour in coconut milk and mix well. 5. Simmer for 15 minutes. 6. Adjust seasoning as needed. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy as leftovers.

title: Smashed Tater Tot Potato Salad
description: A delightful twist on classic potato salad using crispy smashed tater tots as the base and dressed in a refreshing dill pickle sauce. This dish is not only mom approved, but also a viral favorite!
ingredients_text: crispy smashed tater tots, dill pickle sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook tater tots according to package instructions. 2. Smash the cooked tater tots gently. 3. Prepare the dill pickle sauce. 4. Combine smashed tater tots with the sauce. 5. Mix well to coat the tater tots. 6. Chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes. 7. Serve in a bowl. 8. Enjoy your potato salad!

title: Southwest Chipotle Steak Wraps
description: These low-carb, protein-rich steak wraps, flavored with chipotle seasoning and creamy chipotle ranch, are ready in just 10 minutes!
ingredients_text: steak, chipotle seasoning, chipotle ranch, wraps
instructions_text: 1. Season the steak with chipotle seasoning. 2. Cook the steak on a stovetop until desired doneness. 3. Warm the wraps. 4. Slice the cooked steak. 5. Spread chipotle ranch on the wraps. 6. Add sliced steak to the wraps. 7. Roll the wraps tightly. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Greek Turkey Meatballs with Mixed Olive Sweet Pepper and Feta Salad
description: A protein packed, nourishing and delicious dinner featuring flavorful and tender Greek turkey meatballs, a mixed olive salad that's savory and sweet with a bit of heat, and an easy homemade tzatziki.
ingredients_text: turkey, mixed olives, sweet peppers, feta cheese, tzatziki ingredients
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking sheet. 2. Mix turkey with spices and form into meatballs. 3. Bake meatballs until cooked through. 4. Prepare the mixed olive salad with sweet peppers and feta. 5. Make the homemade tzatziki. 6. Serve meatballs with salad and tzatziki. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: The Coziest Tuscan Butter Bean Soup
description: Creamy butter beans in a rosemary-imbued broth with sweet pops of sun-dried tomatoes, ribbons of kale, and a touch of Parmesan for richness. This soup is ready in just 30 minutes.
ingredients_text: butter beans, rosemary, sun-dried tomatoes, kale, Parmesan cheese, broth
instructions_text: 1. In a pot, heat broth and add rosemary. 2. Stir in butter beans and sun-dried tomatoes. 3. Simmer for 10 minutes. 4. Add kale and cook until wilted. 5. Stir in Parmesan cheese. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your cozy soup!

title: Breakfast Burrito Salad
description: This hearty salad combines the flavors of a classic breakfast burrito with a refreshing twist. Perfect for brunch, lunch, or meal prep, it features fresh Mexican chorizo, roasted vegetables, cheesy croutons, and a zesty lime dressing.
ingredients_text: fresh Mexican chorizo, roasted vegetables, cheesy croutons, zesty lime dressing
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and roast vegetables. 2. Cook chorizo in a skillet. 3. Prepare cheesy croutons. 4. Mix roasted vegetables and chorizo in a bowl. 5. Add croutons. 6. Drizzle with lime dressing. 7. Toss to combine. 8. Serve immediately or refrigerate for meal prep.

title: Chimichurri Steak Bites Over Mashed Potatoes with Garlic Lemon Broccolini
description: Tender steak bites seared to perfection, topped with a vibrant chimichurri sauce and served over creamy mashed potatoes with a side of garlic lemon broccolini.
ingredients_text: steak bites, chimichurri sauce, mashed potatoes, broccolini, garlic, lemon
instructions_text: 1. Season steak bites and sear in a hot pan until cooked to your liking. 2. Prepare chimichurri sauce and set aside. 3. Boil potatoes until tender, then mash with butter and cream. 4. Sauté broccolini with garlic and lemon juice. 5. Plate mashed potatoes, top with steak bites, and drizzle chimichurri. 6. Serve broccolini on the side. 7. Enjoy your meal!

title: Red Pepper & Bean Gnocchi
description: Creamy, satisfying & so hella tasty. Comfort food with a lil added protein & fibre.
ingredients_text: gnocchi, red pepper, cream, beans, spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook gnocchi according to package instructions. 2. Sauté red pepper until soft. 3. Add cream and beans to the pan. 4. Mix in cooked gnocchi. 5. Season with spices. 6. Stir until heated through. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your creamy comfort dish!

title: Spicy Thai Noodle Salad with Grilled Chicken
description: A refreshing and hearty noodle salad featuring spicy Thai flavors, creamy avocado, and juicy grilled chicken, perfect for summer meals.
ingredients_text: noodles, grilled chicken, avocado, spicy sauce, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook noodles according to package instructions. 2. Grill chicken until fully cooked. 3. Slice avocado and vegetables. 4. In a bowl, combine noodles, chicken, avocado, and vegetables. 5. Drizzle with spicy sauce. 6. Toss to combine. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad!

title: Leeks & Beans For The Panicked Rabbit In Your Head
description: A comforting dish of leeks and beans, perfect for a chilly morning or light lunch. It can be made vegetarian or vegan.
ingredients_text: leeks, beans
instructions_text: 1. Clean and chop the leeks. 2. Rinse and soak the beans if needed. 3. Boil the beans until tender. 4. In a pan, sauté the leeks until soft. 5. Combine the leeks and beans in the pan. 6. Season to taste. 7. Cook for a few more minutes. 8. Serve warm.

title: Coconut & Lime Crispy Chicken Curry
description: A delightful blend of coconut and lime with crispy chicken thighs simmered in a fragrant curry sauce. Perfect for a flavorful yet easy meal.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, coconut milk, lime, curry powder, garlic, onion, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Heat oil in a pan and fry chicken thighs until crispy. 2. Remove chicken and set aside. 3. In the same pan, sauté garlic and onion until fragrant. 4. Add curry powder and stir for a minute. 5. Pour in coconut milk and lime juice, stirring well. 6. Return chicken to the pan and simmer for 20 minutes. 7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 8. Serve hot with rice or bread.

title: Mix And Bake Chicken Taco Casserole
description: A simple and delicious chicken taco casserole that is perfect for weeknight dinners. Just mix, bake, eat, and finish with all your favorite taco toppings.
ingredients_text: chicken, taco seasoning, tortillas, cheese, beans, corn, salsa, toppings
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix cooked chicken with taco seasoning. 3. Layer tortillas, chicken mixture, beans, corn, and cheese in a baking dish. 4. Bake for 30 minutes. 5. Remove from oven and let cool slightly. 6. Top with salsa and your favorite taco toppings. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Arugula Steak Salad with Chimichurri Dressing
description: A delightful summer salad combining juicy steak, peppery arugula, creamy blue cheese, and a zesty chimichurri dressing. Perfect for a light yet flavorful meal.
ingredients_text: juicy steak, arugula, blue cheese, chimichurri dressing
instructions_text: 1. Grill the steak to desired doneness. 2. Let the steak rest before slicing. 3. In a large bowl, combine arugula and blue cheese. 4. Slice the steak thinly. 5. Top the arugula with sliced steak. 6. Drizzle with chimichurri dressing. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Creamy Buffalo White Bean Chicken Chili
description: The coziest, high protein, one-pot meal you need in your life this fall!
ingredients_text: white beans, chicken, buffalo sauce, cream, spices, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. In a large pot, sauté vegetables until soft. 2. Add chicken and cook until browned. 3. Stir in white beans and buffalo sauce. 4. Pour in cream and mix well. 5. Simmer for 20 minutes. 6. Adjust seasoning to taste. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your cozy meal!

title: Summer Green Pasta Salad
description: The perfect summer green pasta salad with sautéed zucchini, peas, and artichokes tossed in a zesty lemon basil dressing. Serve it cold or warm for the ideal weeknight meal!
ingredients_text: pasta, zucchini, peas, artichokes, lemon, basil, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Sauté zucchini in olive oil until tender. 3. Add peas and artichokes to the skillet. 4. In a bowl, mix lemon juice, basil, salt, and pepper. 5. Combine cooked pasta with sautéed vegetables. 6. Pour dressing over the pasta salad. 7. Toss to combine. 8. Serve warm or chilled.

title: One-Pan Greek Parmesan Chicken & Potatoes
description: Crispy, zesty chicken thighs with baby golden potatoes, infused with Greek flavors and served with a roasted garlic tzatziki.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, baby golden potatoes, Greek seasoning, garlic, tzatziki sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Season chicken thighs with Greek seasoning. 3. Place chicken and potatoes in a baking dish. 4. Roast in the oven until chicken is crispy and potatoes are tender. 5. Prepare roasted garlic tzatziki. 6. Serve chicken with potatoes and tzatziki. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Chipotle Pineapple Chicken with Bang Bang Sauce
description: Chicken marinated in a chipotle tomato sauce and roasted with sweet pineapple chunks. Served with a creamy bang bang sauce for a delightful, tropical-inspired meal.
ingredients_text: chicken, chipotle tomato sauce, pineapple chunks, bang bang sauce
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in chipotle tomato sauce. 2. Preheat oven and prepare a baking dish. 3. Place marinated chicken and pineapple chunks in the dish. 4. Roast in the oven for the specified time. 5. Prepare bang bang sauce. 6. Serve chicken with roasted pineapple and drizzle with bang bang sauce. 7. Enjoy your tropical-inspired meal.

title: Easy Wholesome Nourish Bowl
description: Feeling so good after eating this, and it’s so simple! Crunchy butter beans, sweet potato, quinoa, lemon kale, cucumber, avocado and pomegranate on a bed of hummus.
ingredients_text: butter beans, sweet potato, quinoa, lemon kale, cucumber, avocado, pomegranate, hummus
instructions_text: 1. Cook quinoa and sweet potato until tender. 2. Sauté lemon kale until wilted. 3. Assemble the bowl with hummus as the base. 4. Add quinoa, sweet potato, and butter beans. 5. Top with cucumber, avocado, and pomegranate. 6. Drizzle with olive oil if desired. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Lemon White Bean Chicken Soup
description: A light and refreshing soup that is super hearty and nourishing, packed with protein and fiber for the ultimate good for you bowl of comfort.
ingredients_text: white beans, chicken, lemon, garlic, onion, vegetable broth, spinach, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken in a pot until browned. 2. Remove chicken and sauté garlic and onion. 3. Add vegetable broth and white beans. 4. Return chicken to the pot. 5. Simmer for 30 minutes. 6. Stir in spinach and lemon juice. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve hot.

title: Springy Salmon Caesar Salad with Basil Tahini Dressing
description: This Springy Salmon Caesar Salad is a delightful twist on the classic. Featuring blackened salmon, homemade croutons, and a vibrant basil tahini Caesar dressing, it's a perfect salute to spring's flavors.
ingredients_text: blackened salmon, homemade croutons, basil tahini dressing, romaine lettuce, parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the blackened salmon by seasoning and cooking it until crispy. 2. Make homemade croutons by toasting bread cubes. 3. Whisk together basil tahini dressing ingredients. 4. Chop romaine lettuce and place it in a bowl. 5. Add croutons and salmon on top of the lettuce. 6. Drizzle with basil tahini dressing. 7. Sprinkle with parmesan cheese. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Thanksgiving Green Bean Casserole
description: A classic green bean casserole recipe with homemade cream sauce and fresh sautéed mushrooms.
ingredients_text: green beans, cream sauce, fresh mushrooms
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the cream sauce. 3. Sauté the mushrooms. 4. Combine green beans, sauce, and mushrooms. 5. Transfer to a baking dish. 6. Bake until bubbly. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Green Goddess Chicken Salad
description: A vibrant and herbaceous chicken salad featuring a creamy blend of avocado, Greek yogurt, and mayonnaise tossed with shredded chicken and a trio of fresh herbs.
ingredients_text: shredded chicken, avocado, Greek yogurt, mayonnaise, fresh herbs
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, combine shredded chicken, avocado, Greek yogurt, and mayonnaise. 2. Add chopped fresh herbs. 3. Mix until well combined. 4. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 5. Serve chilled. 6. Garnish with additional herbs if desired. 7. Enjoy as a salad or in a wrap. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Tomato Salad with Burrata, Peach, and Iberian Ham
description: A refreshing and gourmet salad featuring juicy tomatoes, creamy burrata, sweet peach slices, and savory Iberian ham, all dressed in a honey basil vinaigrette.
ingredients_text: juicy tomatoes, creamy burrata, sweet peach slices, Iberian ham, honey basil vinaigrette
instructions_text: 1. Slice the tomatoes and peaches. 2. Tear the burrata into pieces. 3. Arrange tomatoes, peaches, and burrata on a plate. 4. Add slices of Iberian ham. 5. Drizzle with honey basil vinaigrette. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad.

title: Charred Chicken Kebab-Style Bowls with Smoky Date & Pomegranate Salsa
description: Juicy marinated chicken thighs seared to perfection, served over buttery cinnamon rice and topped with a sweet-sharp salsa of jammy Medjool dates, pomegranate, and warm spices. A perfect blend of flavors finished with fresh herbs.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, cinnamon rice, Medjool dates, pomegranate, fresh herbs, warm spices
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken thighs with spices. 2. Grill or sear chicken until cooked through. 3. Prepare cinnamon rice according to package instructions. 4. Chop dates and pomegranate for salsa. 5. Combine dates, pomegranate, and herbs for salsa. 6. Serve chicken over rice. 7. Top with salsa. 8. Garnish with additional herbs if desired.

title: Chimichurri Chicken Thighs & Mash
description: A delicious and healthy meal of chimichurri chicken thighs served with creamy mashed potatoes. This recipe also includes a homemade chimichurri sauce.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, chimichurri sauce, potatoes, cream, butter, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the chimichurri sauce. 3. Season chicken thighs and marinate in chimichurri. 4. Bake chicken until cooked through. 5. Boil potatoes until tender. 6. Mash potatoes with cream and butter. 7. Serve chicken with mashed potatoes. 8. Drizzle extra chimichurri on top.

title: Brutal Viral Sweet Potato Avocado Bowl
description: A fresh, healthy, and viral bowl featuring roasted sweet potatoes, cherry tomatoes, avocado, cottage cheese, and fried eggs with a sprinkle of herbs and spices.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, cherry tomatoes, avocado, cottage cheese, eggs, herbs, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast sweet potatoes until tender. 2. Fry eggs to your liking. 3. Slice avocado and cherry tomatoes. 4. In a bowl, layer roasted sweet potatoes, cherry tomatoes, and avocado. 5. Add cottage cheese and top with fried eggs. 6. Sprinkle with herbs and spices. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your healthy bowl!

title: Smoky Street Corn Chicken Bowls
description: Quick and delicious smoky street corn chicken bowls, perfect for a weeknight dinner with the option to grill or sauté.
ingredients_text: chicken, corn, spices, lime, cilantro, rice
instructions_text: 1. Grill or sauté the chicken until cooked through. 2. Prepare the corn with spices and grill until smoky. 3. Cook rice according to package instructions. 4. Assemble bowls with rice, chicken, and corn. 5. Squeeze lime juice over the top. 6. Garnish with cilantro. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Creamy Chicken, Bacon & Leek Traybake
description: A creamy, comforting dish featuring chicken, bacon, and leeks, all baked in one tray. The leftovers are even better.
ingredients_text: chicken, bacon, leeks, cream
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the leeks and bacon. 3. Combine chicken, leeks, and bacon in a tray. 4. Pour cream over the mixture. 5. Bake until chicken is cooked through. 6. Let it rest before serving. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy leftovers.

title: Cheddar Chicken And Broccoli Loaded Potato
description: A loaded baked potato with cheddar chicken and broccoli. A top tier food and a good recipe to add into your rotation.
ingredients_text: loaded baked potato, cheddar cheese, chicken, broccoli
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and bake the potatoes until tender. 2. Cook the chicken and season to taste. 3. Steam the broccoli until bright green. 4. Mix cooked chicken with cheddar cheese. 5. Cut the baked potatoes open and fluff the insides. 6. Fill the potatoes with the chicken and cheese mixture. 7. Top with steamed broccoli. 8. Serve hot and enjoy.

title: One Pan Sumac Salmon with Golden Rice
description: This one pan meal features sumac spiced salmon, vibrant golden rice, and tender green beans finished with lemon, shaved almonds, and Greek yogurt. It's the perfect balance of protein, carbs, and healthy fats.
ingredients_text: salmon, sumac, golden rice, green beans, lemon, shaved almonds, Greek yogurt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Season salmon with sumac. 3. Cook golden rice in a pan. 4. Add green beans to the pan. 5. Place salmon on top and bake. 6. Finish with lemon juice. 7. Serve with shaved almonds. 8. Top with Greek yogurt.

title: Matcha Tres Leches Cake
description: A delicious triple matcha twist on the traditional tres leches cake featuring a matcha genoise, matcha-infused three milks, and a soft matcha chantilly cream topped with fresh strawberries.
ingredients_text: matcha powder, flour, sugar, eggs, milk, heavy cream, strawberries
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the cake pan. 2. Whisk together matcha powder, flour, and sugar. 3. Beat eggs and fold into the dry ingredients. 4. Bake the matcha genoise until golden. 5. Prepare the matcha-infused milk mixture. 6. Soak the baked cake in the milk mixture. 7. Whip heavy cream with matcha for chantilly. 8. Top the cake with chantilly and fresh strawberries.

title: Spaghetti with Broccoli Rabe Cream and Walnuts
description: A creamy and nutritious pasta dish enriched with vibrant broccoli rabe and crunch from walnuts, topped with a sprinkle of grated cheese.
ingredients_text: spaghetti, broccoli rabe, walnuts, grated cheese, cream
instructions_text: 1. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions. 2. In a separate pan, sauté broccoli rabe until tender. 3. Add cream to the broccoli rabe and mix well. 4. Combine the cooked spaghetti with the broccoli rabe cream. 5. Stir in chopped walnuts. 6. Serve topped with grated cheese. 7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 8. Enjoy your creamy pasta dish.

title: Grilled Zucchini with Feta & Basil
description: An easy and flavor-packed side dish perfect for Memorial Day weekend! Featuring perfectly grilled zucchini, crumbled feta cheese, and fresh basil all tossed in a vibrant lemon-garlic vinaigrette with optional toasted pine nuts for extra crunch.
ingredients_text: zucchini, feta cheese, fresh basil, lemon, garlic, olive oil, pine nuts (optional)
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the grill. 2. Slice zucchini and toss with olive oil, salt, and pepper. 3. Grill zucchini until tender and charred. 4. In a bowl, mix crumbled feta, chopped basil, lemon juice, and minced garlic. 5. Toss grilled zucchini with the feta mixture. 6. Add toasted pine nuts if desired. 7. Serve warm or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy as a side dish.

title: One Pan Sausage and Gnocchi Pasta
description: A quick and flavorful one-pan meal with Italian sausage, gnocchi, tomatoes, and spinach, topped with parmesan.
ingredients_text: Italian sausage, gnocchi, tomatoes, spinach, parmesan
instructions_text: 1. Cook Italian sausage in a pan until browned. 2. Add gnocchi and cook for a few minutes. 3. Stir in tomatoes and spinach. 4. Cook until spinach wilts. 5. Sprinkle with parmesan. 6. Stir to combine. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: 3 Ingredient Coconut Pudding
description: This coconut pudding is made with only 3 ingredients and is gelatin-free. Enjoy the creamy, delightful coconut flavor, perfect for any occasion.
ingredients_text: 3 cups coconut milk, 1/2 cup sugar, 1/4 cup cornstarch
instructions_text: 1. In a saucepan, mix coconut milk and sugar. 2. In a separate bowl, dissolve cornstarch in a little water. 3. Heat the coconut mixture over medium heat. 4. Gradually add the cornstarch mixture, stirring constantly. 5. Cook until thickened, about 5-7 minutes. 6. Pour into serving dishes. 7. Let cool to room temperature. 8. Refrigerate until set.

title: Whipped Brie Dip With Honey, Fig Jam And Toasted Pistachios
description: This easy whipped Brie dip recipe is what dreams are made of! Fluffy whipped Brie, toasted pistachios, crunchy fig jam and a sweet drizz of honey. It’s so good and perfect for fall. You can switch up the toppings to your heart's desires.
ingredients_text: Brie cheese, honey, fig jam, toasted pistachios
instructions_text: 1. Whip the Brie cheese until fluffy. 2. Fold in fig jam and honey. 3. Transfer to a serving dish. 4. Top with toasted pistachios. 5. Serve with crackers or bread. 6. Enjoy as a dip. 7. Optionally, add more toppings. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Caramelized Onion & Sundried Tomato Beans
description: Creamy and rich butter beans with caramelized onions and sundried tomatoes create an irresistible dish that's perfect with sourdough bread or pasta.
ingredients_text: butter beans, caramelized onions, sundried tomatoes, sourdough bread or pasta
instructions_text: 1. Heat a pan and add butter beans. 2. Stir in caramelized onions. 3. Add sundried tomatoes. 4. Cook until heated through. 5. Serve with sourdough bread or pasta. 6. Season to taste. 7. Enjoy your creamy dish. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Ricotta & Lemon Zest Ravioli with Burst Tomato Sauce & Burrata
description: A vibrant and easy summer pasta using ricotta and lemon zest ravioli from Trader Joe's, smothered in a savory burst cherry tomato sauce and topped with creamy burrata and fresh basil.
ingredients_text: ricotta ravioli, lemon zest, cherry tomatoes, burrata, fresh basil, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Boil the ricotta ravioli according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat olive oil and add halved cherry tomatoes. 3. Cook until tomatoes burst and release their juices. 4. Season with salt and pepper. 5. Drain ravioli and add to the pan with the sauce. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Serve topped with burrata and fresh basil. 8. Enjoy your vibrant summer pasta!

title: Cheesy Crispy Sriracha Eggs
description: Delicious eggs cooked on a crispy cheesy base with a spicy kick, perfect for breakfast or lunch.
ingredients_text: eggs, cheese, sriracha, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. 2. Add cheese to the skillet and let it melt until crispy. 3. Crack eggs onto the melted cheese. 4. Drizzle sriracha over the eggs. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Cook until eggs are set to your liking. 7. Carefully remove from skillet. 8. Serve hot.

title: Melting Beets with Feta & Pistachios
description: Roasting beets and enhancing their flavors with orange juice creates a melt-in-your-mouth texture. Topped with crumbled feta and pistachios, this dish combines sweetness and savory elements for a delicious side.
ingredients_text: beets, orange juice, feta cheese, pistachios
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Wash and trim the beets, then wrap them in foil. 3. Roast the beets for about 45 minutes until tender. 4. Let the beets cool, then peel and slice them. 5. Drizzle with orange juice. 6. Top with crumbled feta and chopped pistachios. 7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 8. Serve warm as a side dish.

title: Spiced Roasted Sweet Potato Bean Hummus Bowls
description: Dreamy lemony garlic hummus with spiced toasted sweet potato chunks, crispy roasted beans, and a fresh kale salad. Perfect for a healthy lunch and tastes even better the next day.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, beans, garlic, lemon, kale, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast sweet potatoes until tender. 2. Toast beans until crispy. 3. Blend garlic, lemon, and chickpeas to make hummus. 4. Prepare kale salad with desired dressing. 5. Assemble bowls with hummus, sweet potatoes, beans, and kale. 6. Serve immediately or refrigerate for later. 7. Enjoy as a healthy lunch. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Lemon Burrata Pasta
description: A simple, light, and summery pasta dish featuring radiatori pasta tossed with a lemony butter sauce, topped with creamy burrata and enhanced by Dash Pasta Blend Mediterranean.
ingredients_text: radiatori pasta, lemon, butter, burrata, Dash Pasta Blend Mediterranean
instructions_text: 1. Cook radiatori pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, melt butter and add lemon juice. 3. Toss cooked pasta in the lemon butter sauce. 4. Plate the pasta and top with burrata. 5. Sprinkle with Dash Pasta Blend Mediterranean. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your light summer dish.

title: Creamy Sun-Dried Tomato & Butter Bean One-Pot
description: A quick and satisfying one-pot dish with creamy sun-dried tomatoes, butter beans, and spinach. Perfect for a delicious dinner in just 15 minutes.
ingredients_text: sun-dried tomatoes, butter beans, spinach
instructions_text: 1. Heat a pot over medium heat. 2. Add sun-dried tomatoes and sauté for a minute. 3. Stir in butter beans and spinach. 4. Pour in cream and mix well. 5. Cook for 5-7 minutes until heated through. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your creamy dish!

title: Sweet Potato and Halloumi Chopped Salad
description: A delightful fall chopped salad featuring crispy chickpeas, roasted sweet potatoes, and fried halloumi tossed with shaved Brussels sprouts, apples, and red onion, all brought together with a hot honey mustard dressing.
ingredients_text: crispy chickpeas, roasted sweet potatoes, fried halloumi, shaved Brussels sprouts, apples, red onion, hot honey mustard dressing
instructions_text: 1. Roast sweet potatoes until tender. 2. Fry halloumi until golden. 3. Prepare crispy chickpeas. 4. Shave Brussels sprouts. 5. Chop apples and red onion. 6. Combine all ingredients in a bowl. 7. Drizzle with hot honey mustard dressing. 8. Toss gently and serve.

title: Viral One-Pot Dumplings
description: Experience the richness of this one-pan dumpling recipe, steeped in a flavorful coconut miso broth and highlighted by a spicy, nutty finish.
ingredients_text: dumplings, coconut milk, miso paste, spices, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the dumplings according to package instructions. 2. In a pot, combine coconut milk and miso paste. 3. Heat the mixture until it simmers. 4. Add the dumplings to the pot. 5. Cook until dumplings are tender. 6. Stir in spices and vegetables. 7. Simmer for a few more minutes. 8. Serve hot.

title: Cheesy Leeks & Beans with Charred Broccoli
description: A warm bowl of cheesy leeks and beans with charred broccoli, pink pickled onions, and crunchy breadcrumbs. It's nutritious, high in protein, and perfect for a quick comfort meal.
ingredients_text: leeks, beans, broccoli, pink pickled onions, breadcrumbs, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven for charred broccoli. 2. Cook leeks until soft. 3. Add beans and cheese, stir until melted. 4. Char broccoli in the oven. 5. Prepare pink pickled onions. 6. Combine leeks, beans, and broccoli in a bowl. 7. Top with breadcrumbs. 8. Serve warm.

title: Creamy Garlic Alfredo Chicken Meatballs With Herby Mash
description: Juicy chicken meatballs in a garlicky Alfredo sauce, served with fluffy herby mash
ingredients_text: chicken meatballs, garlic, Alfredo sauce, potatoes, herbs, butter, cream
instructions_text: 1. Prepare chicken meatballs and cook until golden. 2. In a pan, sauté garlic until fragrant. 3. Add Alfredo sauce to the pan and mix well. 4. Combine cooked meatballs with the sauce. 5. Boil potatoes until tender. 6. Mash potatoes with herbs and butter. 7. Serve meatballs over herby mash. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Chipotle Beef Sweet Potato Skins
description: Stuffed sweet potato skins with chipotle beef (or chicken, if you prefer) and melty cheddar, topped with your favorite toppings.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, ground beef, chipotle seasoning, cheddar cheese, toppings of choice
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and bake sweet potatoes until tender. 2. Cook ground beef with chipotle seasoning. 3. Cut sweet potatoes in half and scoop out some flesh. 4. Mix scooped flesh with beef and cheese. 5. Stuff the mixture back into sweet potato skins. 6. Top with additional cheese and toppings. 7. Bake until cheese is melted. 8. Serve warm.

title: Sweet Potato Curry
description: A flavorful curry made with sweet potatoes, lentils, and a variety of spices, topped with coconut yoghurt and fresh coriander.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, lentils, spices, coconut yoghurt, fresh coriander
instructions_text: 1. Peel and chop sweet potatoes. 2. Rinse lentils and set aside. 3. In a pot, sauté spices until fragrant. 4. Add sweet potatoes and lentils, cover with water. 5. Simmer until sweet potatoes are tender. 6. Stir in coconut yoghurt. 7. Garnish with fresh coriander. 8. Serve warm.

title: Tuna Melt Sandwich
description: A crispy and gooey tuna melt sandwich with a delightful combination of cheeses, perfect for a quick and comforting meal.
ingredients_text: tuna, cheese, bread, mayonnaise, butter
