instructions_text: 1. Preheat the grill. 2. Mix tuna with mayonnaise. 3. Butter the bread slices. 4. Layer tuna and cheese between bread. 5. Grill until golden brown. 6. Flip and grill the other side. 7. Remove and slice in half. 8. Serve warm.

title: Steak Caesar Power Bowls
description: Packed with nutrients, this steak Caesar salad marries the richness of a seared New York strip with the heartiness of farro made in bone broth, finished with a tahini Caesar dressing.
ingredients_text: New York strip steak, farro, bone broth, tahini, Caesar dressing, romaine lettuce, Parmesan cheese, croutons
instructions_text: 1. Cook farro in bone broth according to package instructions. 2. Season steak with salt and pepper, then grill to desired doneness. 3. Let steak rest before slicing. 4. Toss romaine lettuce with tahini Caesar dressing. 5. Assemble bowls with farro, sliced steak, and lettuce. 6. Top with Parmesan cheese and croutons. 7. Drizzle with extra dressing if desired. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Caprese Style Pesto Pasta Salad
description: A delicious twist on the classic Italian Caprese salad, this pesto pasta salad is simple, fresh, and bursting with flavor.
ingredients_text: pasta, pesto, cherry tomatoes, mozzarella, fresh basil, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Drain and rinse under cold water. 3. In a large bowl, combine pasta, pesto, cherry tomatoes, and mozzarella. 4. Add fresh basil, olive oil, salt, and pepper. 5. Toss gently to combine. 6. Chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes. 7. Serve cold or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your refreshing pasta salad!

title: Healthy Bean Salad
description: This refreshing and healthy bean salad is perfect for meal prep. Packed with protein and flavor, it's perfect for summer cookouts or a quick lunch.
ingredients_text: mixed beans, bell peppers, red onion, cilantro, lime juice, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Rinse and drain the mixed beans. 2. Chop bell peppers and red onion. 3. In a bowl, combine beans, bell peppers, onion, and cilantro. 4. In a separate bowl, whisk lime juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper. 5. Pour dressing over the salad and toss gently. 6. Let it chill in the fridge for 10 minutes. 7. Serve cold. 8. Enjoy your refreshing bean salad!

title: Slow Cooker Sausage & Leeks In Creamy Mustard Sauce
description: Juicy sausages slow-cooked with leeks, mustard, and a touch of crème fraiche, served with crispy paprika potatoes and tender broccoli — a lighter twist on comfort food.
ingredients_text: juicy sausages, leeks, mustard, crème fraiche, crispy paprika potatoes, broccoli
instructions_text: 1. Brown the sausages in a pan. 2. Add sliced leeks and mustard to the slow cooker. 3. Place the browned sausages on top. 4. Pour in crème fraiche and mix. 5. Cook on low for 7 hours. 6. Prepare crispy paprika potatoes and steam broccoli. 7. Serve sausages and leeks with potatoes and broccoli. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Herby Sesame Chicken Salad
description: An herby salad packed with protein, fresh veggies, and crunchy honey sesame cashews. Perfect for a healthy dinner for two or a delightful meal prep option.
ingredients_text: chicken, fresh veggies, honey sesame cashews, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Cook the chicken until fully cooked. 2. Chop fresh veggies. 3. Mix chicken and veggies in a bowl. 4. Add honey sesame cashews. 5. Toss with herbs. 6. Serve immediately or store for meal prep. 7. Enjoy your healthy salad. 8. Refrigerate leftovers.

title: Herby Spring Pea Couscous Salad
description: A refreshing and vibrant salad combining spring peas, couscous, and a variety of fresh herbs, topped with a homemade basil pesto dressing.
ingredients_text: spring peas, couscous, fresh herbs, basil pesto dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook couscous according to package instructions. 2. Blanch spring peas in boiling water. 3. Combine cooked couscous and peas in a bowl. 4. Chop fresh herbs and add to the mixture. 5. Prepare basil pesto dressing. 6. Drizzle dressing over the salad. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

title: Mediterranean Cauliflower Salad
description: This is not just any side salad — it's a deliciously flavorful cauliflower dish perfect for enhancing any meal. Roasted cauliflower is mixed with a lively lemony caper-currant dressing, honey, crumbled feta, and orange zest, making it a standout at any gathering.
ingredients_text: cauliflower, lemon, capers, currants, honey, feta cheese, orange zest
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast cauliflower until golden. 2. Prepare the dressing by mixing lemon juice, capers, currants, and honey. 3. Crumble feta cheese and add to the roasted cauliflower. 4. Drizzle the dressing over the salad. 5. Add orange zest for flavor. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Serve warm or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy as a side dish or light lunch.

title: Cheese-Loaded Chicken And Potatoes
description: Cheese-loaded chicken and potatoes, last year this recipe got 7.1M views and @arthurpaek liked it 😌 so let’s make it again…
ingredients_text: chicken, potatoes, cheese, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Season the chicken and potatoes. 3. Place chicken and potatoes in a baking dish. 4. Top with cheese. 5. Bake for 60 minutes. 6. Check for doneness. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Hanger Steak with Smoky Jalapeno Slaw
description: Juicy hanger steak perfectly cooked with a smoky jalapeno slaw and fragrant cumin oil for a dish that bursts with flavor.
ingredients_text: hanger steak, jalapenos, cumin oil, slaw ingredients
instructions_text: 1. Preheat grill to medium-high heat. 2. Season hanger steak with salt and pepper. 3. Grill steak for 4-5 minutes per side for medium-rare. 4. In a bowl, mix jalapenos with slaw ingredients. 5. Drizzle cumin oil over the slaw and toss to combine. 6. Let steak rest for 5 minutes before slicing. 7. Serve sliced steak topped with smoky jalapeno slaw. 8. Enjoy your flavorful dish!

title: Honey Gochujang Chicken Kebabs
description: Delicious, protein-rich chicken kebabs marinated with honey and gochujang, served with pickled veggies and toasted flatbreads. A perfect combination of sweet, tangy, and savory flavors.
ingredients_text: chicken, honey, gochujang, pickled veggies, flatbreads
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in honey and gochujang. 2. Preheat grill. 3. Skewer marinated chicken. 4. Grill kebabs for 15 minutes, turning occasionally. 5. Prepare pickled veggies. 6. Toast flatbreads. 7. Serve kebabs with pickled veggies and flatbreads. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Pesto Mozzarella Stuffed Chicken
description: An easy-to-prepare and incredibly delicious Pesto Mozzarella Stuffed Chicken. Perfect for a quick weeknight meal, this dish requires only three main ingredients and a few spices to deliver juicy, cheesy flavors.
ingredients_text: chicken breasts, pesto, mozzarella cheese, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Slice the chicken breasts to create pockets. 3. Stuff each pocket with pesto and mozzarella. 4. Season with spices. 5. Place in a baking dish. 6. Bake until cooked through. 7. Let rest before serving. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Harvest Fall Salad With Caramelized Shallot Dressing
description: Hearty, colorful, and full of cozy fall flavor. This salad holds up beautifully for leftovers, and was a meal prep favorite for us last fall. Rich in fiber, protein, and immune-boosting ingredients with the most dreamy, aromatic dressing.
ingredients_text: mixed greens, shallots, olive oil, balsamic vinegar, salt, pepper, nuts, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Caramelize shallots in olive oil until golden. 2. Mix greens in a bowl. 3. Add nuts and cheese. 4. Whisk balsamic vinegar with salt and pepper. 5. Pour dressing over salad. 6. Toss to combine. 7. Serve immediately or store for later. 8. Enjoy your hearty salad!

title: Chicken Alfredo Pastina
description: A comforting and creamy Chicken Alfredo Pastina that warms your soul.
ingredients_text: pastina, chicken, cream, parmesan cheese, garlic, butter, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook pastina according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, melt butter and sauté garlic. 3. Add cooked chicken and cream, stirring well. 4. Mix in parmesan cheese until melted. 5. Combine with pastina, seasoning with salt and pepper. 6. Serve warm. 7. Garnish with extra cheese if desired. 8. Enjoy your creamy Chicken Alfredo Pastina.

title: Thai Basil Chicken
description: A quick and flavorful Thai-inspired dish featuring sweet, salty, and slightly spicy chicken with aromatic herbs and fried eggs served over warm rice.
ingredients_text: chicken, Thai basil, soy sauce, garlic, fried eggs, rice
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. Heat oil in a pan and sauté garlic until fragrant. 3. Add chicken and cook until browned. 4. Stir in soy sauce and Thai basil, cooking until basil wilts. 5. Fry eggs in a separate pan. 6. Serve chicken over rice with fried eggs on top. 7. Garnish with additional basil if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Spinach, Leek, and Fontina Quiche
description: This homemade quiche is packed with water spinach, leeks, and fontina cheese, providing a creamy and cheesy delicious breakfast that sneaks in plenty of veggies.
ingredients_text: water spinach, leeks, fontina cheese, eggs, cream, pie crust
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). 2. Sauté leeks until soft. 3. Whisk eggs and cream together. 4. Stir in sautéed leeks and water spinach. 5. Pour mixture into pie crust. 6. Sprinkle fontina cheese on top. 7. Bake for 50 minutes until set. 8. Let cool before slicing.

title: Honey Mustard Pork Tenderloin Traybake
description: High protein, low calorie, juicy pork tenderloin roasted with baby potatoes, tenderstem broccoli, and a sweet mustard glaze.
ingredients_text: pork tenderloin, baby potatoes, tenderstem broccoli, honey, mustard
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 200°C (400°F). 2. Season the pork tenderloin with salt and pepper. 3. In a bowl, mix honey and mustard to create the glaze. 4. Place the pork on a tray with baby potatoes and broccoli. 5. Brush the glaze over the pork. 6. Roast in the oven for 30 minutes. 7. Check the internal temperature of the pork. 8. Let rest before slicing and serving.

title: Hot Honey Chicken Parm With Cheesy Mash
description: This is ultimate comfort food, crispy coated chicken in a hot honey spiced tomato sauce with mozzarella and parmesan with an extra drizzle of hot honey for good measure.
ingredients_text: crispy coated chicken, hot honey, spiced tomato sauce, mozzarella, parmesan
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Coat chicken in breadcrumbs and fry until golden. 3. Prepare the spiced tomato sauce with hot honey. 4. Layer fried chicken with sauce and cheeses. 5. Bake until cheese is melted. 6. Prepare cheesy mash. 7. Serve chicken with cheesy mash. 8. Drizzle with extra hot honey.

title: Butter Chicken Lasagna
description: Butter Chicken Lasagna featuring Kawan Paratha layers, combined with savory butter chicken sauce and melted cheese. A fusion recipe that's both indulgent and unique.
ingredients_text: Kawan Paratha, butter chicken sauce, melted cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Layer Kawan Paratha in a baking dish. 3. Spread butter chicken sauce over the paratha. 4. Add a layer of melted cheese. 5. Repeat layers until ingredients are used. 6. Bake until cheese is bubbly and golden. 7. Let it cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Honey Butter Chicken
description: Juicy chicken marinated and cooked to perfection, smothered in an addictive honey butter sauce. A simple yet delicious meal ready in just 30 minutes.
ingredients_text: juicy chicken, honey, butter
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in honey and butter. 2. Preheat oven or skillet. 3. Cook chicken until golden brown. 4. Prepare honey butter sauce. 5. Smother chicken in sauce. 6. Cook for additional flavor infusion. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: 20-Minute One-Pan Creamy Cauliflower Gnocchi with Chicken Sausage and Spinach
description: A low-carb meal featuring creamy cauliflower gnocchi with crispy chicken sausage and spinach. It's a one-pan dish that's both comforting and packed with protein and veggies.
ingredients_text: cauliflower gnocchi, chicken sausage, spinach
instructions_text: 1. Heat a pan over medium heat. 2. Add chicken sausage and cook until crispy. 3. Stir in cauliflower gnocchi and spinach. 4. Cook until gnocchi is heated through. 5. Add cream and mix well. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes. 8. Serve warm.

title: Maple, Ginger, Thyme Squash & Sweet Potatoes with Italian Sausage
description: A delightful mix of sweet potatoes, squash, and Italian sausage, flavored with a unique blend of maple, ginger, and thyme. This dish is gluten-free and dairy-free, perfect for any occasion.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, squash, Italian sausage, maple syrup, ginger, thyme
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Peel and chop sweet potatoes and squash. 3. In a bowl, mix maple syrup, ginger, and thyme. 4. Toss sweet potatoes and squash with the mixture. 5. Cook Italian sausage in a skillet. 6. Combine sausage with vegetables in a baking dish. 7. Bake until tender. 8. Serve warm.

title: Hawaiian Mac Salad
description: A creamy and delightful Hawaiian-style macaroni salad that's perfect for picnics and potlucks. This salad combines tangy and sweet flavors with a rich, creamy dressing.
ingredients_text: macaroni, creamy dressing, tangy flavors, sweet flavors
instructions_text: 1. Cook macaroni according to package instructions. 2. Drain and rinse under cold water. 3. In a bowl, mix creamy dressing with tangy and sweet flavors. 4. Combine macaroni with the dressing. 5. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes. 6. Serve cold at picnics or potlucks.

title: Grilled Summer Pasta Salad
description: A vibrant grilled summer pasta salad featuring tender grilled chicken, sweet corn, colorful veggies, tossed in a flavorful pesto vinaigrette with a kick of chipotle ranch.
ingredients_text: pasta, grilled chicken, sweet corn, colorful veggies, pesto vinaigrette, chipotle ranch
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Grill chicken until cooked through. 3. Grill corn and veggies until tender. 4. In a large bowl, combine pasta, chicken, corn, and veggies. 5. Drizzle with pesto vinaigrette and chipotle ranch. 6. Toss to combine. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your vibrant summer salad!

title: Rhubarb Fritters with Strawberry Glaze
description: These donut-shop-worthy rhubarb fritters are filled with jammy rhubarb and topped with a buttery strawberry glaze. A delightful twist on classic fruit fritters with ultimate cragginess.
ingredients_text: rhubarb, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, baking powder, salt, strawberry glaze
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the rhubarb by chopping it into small pieces. 2. In a bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. 3. In another bowl, whisk eggs and melted butter. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients, then fold in rhubarb. 5. Heat oil in a deep pan and drop spoonfuls of batter. 6. Fry until golden brown, then drain on paper towels. 7. Prepare strawberry glaze by mixing powdered sugar with strawberry puree. 8. Drizzle glaze over fritters before serving.

title: Loaded Curry Sweet Potato
description: A hearty and flavorful sweet potato dish loaded with spiced chickpea curry and topped with fresh basil chimichurri sauce.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, chickpeas, spices, fresh basil, olive oil, vinegar
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and bake sweet potatoes until tender. 2. Cook chickpeas with spices in a pan. 3. Prepare basil chimichurri by blending basil, olive oil, and vinegar. 4. Once sweet potatoes are done, slice them open. 5. Fill with spiced chickpeas. 6. Drizzle with chimichurri sauce. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your hearty meal!

title: Marry Me Tortellini
description: A delightful and viral one-pot Marry Me Tortellini that's ready in under 20 minutes. It's creamy, cheesy, and packed with flavors that will make you fall in love!
ingredients_text: tortellini, cream, cheese, spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook tortellini according to package instructions. 2. In a pot, combine cream and cheese over medium heat. 3. Stir until cheese is melted and sauce is creamy. 4. Add cooked tortellini to the sauce. 5. Mix well to coat the tortellini. 6. Season with spices to taste. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Marinated Roasted Bell Pepper Bean Salad with Crispy Capers
description: A delightful bean salad with roasted bell peppers and a dressing that combines tangy, sweet, and savory flavors, topped with crispy capers. Perfect for a fiber and protein boost!
ingredients_text: roasted bell peppers, beans, dressing, crispy capers
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast bell peppers until tender. 2. Prepare the dressing by mixing tangy, sweet, and savory ingredients. 3. Combine roasted bell peppers and beans in a bowl. 4. Drizzle the dressing over the salad. 5. Toss gently to combine. 6. Top with crispy capers. 7. Serve immediately or chill for later. 8. Enjoy your protein-packed salad!

title: Swedish Strawberry Cake (Jordgubbstårta)
description: A light and easy-to-make Swedish strawberry cake that captures the essence of midsummer with its fresh strawberries and fluffy cream filling.
ingredients_text: fresh strawberries, cream, sugar, flour, eggs, baking powder, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare cake pans. 2. Whisk eggs and sugar until fluffy. 3. Fold in flour and baking powder. 4. Bake the cake layers until golden. 5. Let cool and slice. 6. Whip cream and mix with vanilla. 7. Layer cake with cream and strawberries. 8. Chill before serving.

title: Tomato, Olive and Feta Chickpeas
description: A healthy and satisfying dish featuring tomato, olive, and feta with chickpeas, rich in flavor and nutrient-dense.
ingredients_text: tomato, olive, feta, chickpeas
instructions_text: 1. Rinse and drain chickpeas. 2. Chop tomatoes and olives. 3. Crumble feta cheese. 4. In a pan, combine chickpeas, tomatoes, olives, and feta. 5. Cook over medium heat for 10-15 minutes. 6. Stir occasionally until heated through. 7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 8. Serve warm.

title: Cherry Crumble
description: Juicy cherries tucked under a golden brown crumble that is then baked until bubbling and served warm. A simple pleasure that feels like home.
ingredients_text: juicy cherries, crumble topping
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the cherries and place them in a baking dish. 3. Mix the crumble ingredients together. 4. Spread the crumble over the cherries. 5. Bake until golden brown and bubbling. 6. Remove from oven and let cool slightly. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your dessert.

title: Marinated Heirloom Tomato Ricotta Toast
description: A refreshing and flavorful heirloom tomato toast with creamy ricotta, perfect for celebrating the summer harvest.
ingredients_text: heirloom tomatoes, ricotta cheese, bread, olive oil, salt, pepper, fresh basil
instructions_text: 1. Toast the bread until golden. 2. Slice heirloom tomatoes. 3. Spread ricotta on toasted bread. 4. Top with sliced tomatoes. 5. Drizzle with olive oil. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Garnish with fresh basil. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Chili Lime Chicken Thighs
description: Juicy and flavorful chicken thighs marinated in a zesty honey chili lime sauce, perfect for a quick Mediterranean dish.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, honey, chili, lime, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken thighs in honey, chili, and lime juice. 2. Preheat grill. 3. Grill chicken thighs for 6-7 minutes on each side. 4. Check for doneness. 5. Remove from grill and let rest. 6. Serve with lime wedges. 7. Enjoy with a side salad. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Gochujang Butter Eggs
description: Deliciously soft-boiled eggs coated in a savory and spicy gochujang butter sauce, perfect for serving with rice.
ingredients_text: eggs, gochujang, butter, rice
instructions_text: 1. Boil water and gently add eggs. 2. Cook for 6-7 minutes for soft-boiled. 3. Remove eggs and cool in ice water. 4. In a pan, melt butter and mix in gochujang. 5. Peel the eggs and coat them in the sauce. 6. Serve with rice. 7. Enjoy your spicy gochujang butter eggs.

title: Shrimp Caesar Wrap
description: Garlic butter shrimp paired with Caesar salad in a parmesan-crusted wrap. A delicious and perfect way to spruce up your Caesar salad game.
ingredients_text: shrimp, garlic, butter, Caesar salad, parmesan, wrap
instructions_text: 1. Cook shrimp in garlic butter until pink. 2. Prepare Caesar salad. 3. Mix shrimp with salad. 4. Place mixture in a wrap. 5. Coat wrap with parmesan. 6. Grill or toast until golden. 7. Cut in half. 8. Serve immediately.

title: One-Pot Blackened Chicken with Coconut Turmeric Rice
description: Juicy, spiced chicken thighs seared to perfection and combined with flavorful coconut turmeric rice for an easy and satisfying one-pot meal.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, coconut milk, turmeric, rice, spices
instructions_text: 1. Season chicken thighs with spices. 2. Sear chicken in a pot until browned. 3. Remove chicken and set aside. 4. In the same pot, add coconut milk and turmeric. 5. Stir in rice and return chicken to the pot. 6. Cover and simmer until rice is cooked. 7. Fluff rice and serve. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Ultimate Air Fryer Ice Cream
description: Indulge in the ultimate dessert experience with our Air Fryer Ice Cream, featuring a crispy cornflake-coated shell and a creamy vanilla inside. Perfect for hot weather and a poolside treat.
ingredients_text: cornflakes, vanilla ice cream
instructions_text: 1. Coat ice cream balls in crushed cornflakes. 2. Preheat air fryer. 3. Place coated ice cream in air fryer basket. 4. Air fry for 6 minutes. 5. Remove and let cool slightly. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Optionally drizzle with chocolate sauce. 8. Enjoy your crispy ice cream treat!

title: Crispy Air Fried Gnocchi with Sundried Tomato Chicken
description: Enjoy a delicious, crispy air fried gnocchi dish combined with tender chicken and sun-dried tomatoes for a flavorful meal.
ingredients_text: gnocchi, chicken, sun-dried tomatoes
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the air fryer. 2. Cook the gnocchi until crispy. 3. Sauté chicken until cooked through. 4. Add sun-dried tomatoes to the chicken. 5. Combine crispy gnocchi with chicken mixture. 6. Season to taste. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Lemon Garlic Chicken Sandwich with Cucumber and Cabbage Salad
description: A savory chicken sandwich boasting a zesty lemon garlic taste, complemented by a refreshing cucumber and cabbage salad with a hint of fresh parsley.
ingredients_text: chicken breast, lemon, garlic, cucumber, cabbage, fresh parsley, sandwich bread
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken with lemon juice and minced garlic. 2. Grill the chicken until cooked through. 3. Slice cucumber and shred cabbage. 4. Mix cucumber, cabbage, and parsley in a bowl. 5. Assemble the sandwich with grilled chicken and salad. 6. Serve with extra salad on the side. 7. Enjoy your savory sandwich! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: BBQ Pulled Chicken Bowl
description: A healthy and delicious BBQ Pulled Chicken Bowl with 350 calories and 30 g protein per serving.
ingredients_text: chicken, BBQ sauce, rice, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken in BBQ sauce until tender. 2. Shred the chicken. 3. Prepare rice as per package instructions. 4. Assemble bowls with rice, pulled chicken, and vegetables. 5. Drizzle with extra BBQ sauce. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Kung Pao Chicken
description: Spicy, savory, and loaded with flavor—this homemade Kung Pao Chicken is so easy to make and better than takeout! Perfect for a quick dinner that hits all the right notes with tender chicken, crunchy peanuts, and bold, saucy goodness in every bite.
ingredients_text: chicken, peanuts, soy sauce, garlic, ginger, bell peppers, scallions, sesame oil, rice vinegar, cornstarch, chili paste
instructions_text: 1. Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces. 2. Marinate chicken with soy sauce, cornstarch, and sesame oil. 3. Heat oil in a pan and stir-fry chicken until cooked. 4. Add garlic, ginger, and bell peppers; stir-fry for a few minutes. 5. Stir in peanuts and chili paste. 6. Add rice vinegar and mix well. 7. Garnish with scallions. 8. Serve hot over rice.

title: Creamy Lemon Alfredo Chicken
description: Zesty and comforting Creamy Lemon Alfredo Chicken where velvety Alfredo sauce meets bright lemon flavor and tender golden chicken.
ingredients_text: chicken, Alfredo sauce, lemon, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken until golden. 2. Prepare Alfredo sauce. 3. Add lemon juice to sauce. 4. Combine chicken and sauce. 5. Simmer for flavor. 6. Serve warm. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Spicy Lemon Basil Chicken
description: A riff on chicken francese with a spicy kick, featuring a delicious lemon basil butter sauce.
ingredients_text: chicken breasts, lemon, basil, butter, spices
instructions_text: 1. Season chicken breasts with spices. 2. Heat butter in a pan. 3. Cook chicken until golden brown. 4. Remove chicken and set aside. 5. Add lemon juice and basil to the pan. 6. Return chicken to the pan and coat with sauce. 7. Simmer for a few minutes. 8. Serve hot with sauce drizzled on top.

title: Chicken Pot Pie Soup
description: A hearty soup with the flavors of a classic chicken pot pie, featuring rotisserie chicken, potatoes, and a variety of vegetables.
ingredients_text: rotisserie chicken, potatoes, a variety of vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Shred the rotisserie chicken. 2. Chop the potatoes and vegetables. 3. In a pot, combine chicken, potatoes, and vegetables. 4. Add broth and seasonings. 5. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 30 minutes. 6. Thicken with cream or flour if desired. 7. Stir well and adjust seasoning. 8. Serve hot.

title: Chicken, Bacon & Boursin Mash Bowls
description: Buttery mash topped with juicy chicken and crispy bacon in a creamy Boursin sauce. Pure comfort food.
ingredients_text: potatoes, chicken, bacon, Boursin cheese, butter, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Boil potatoes until tender. 2. Mash with butter, salt, and pepper. 3. Cook chicken in a pan until golden. 4. Fry bacon until crispy. 5. Mix Boursin cheese with a bit of water to create a sauce. 6. Top mashed potatoes with chicken, bacon, and Boursin sauce. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your comfort bowl!

title: Spring Chicken with Lemon and Capers
description: A delightful twist on classic chicken piccata featuring crisp-skinned chicken, fresh kale, and a tangy lemon caper sauce on a base of orzo.
ingredients_text: crisp-skinned chicken, fresh kale, lemon, capers, orzo
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Season the chicken and sear until golden. 3. Remove chicken and sauté kale. 4. Add lemon juice and capers to the pan. 5. Cook orzo according to package instructions. 6. Combine orzo with kale and sauce. 7. Serve chicken on top of orzo mixture. 8. Garnish with additional capers if desired.

title: Garlic Herb Chicken With Honey Butter Carrots & Creamy Mashed Potatoes
description: This is the comfort food dinner with tender and flavourful chicken, topped with a glorious pan sauce. The honey butter carrots are perfectly roasted and the creamy mashed potatoes have a bit of cream cheese in them and they’re so velvety.
ingredients_text: chicken, garlic, herbs, honey, butter, carrots, cream cheese, potatoes
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Season chicken with garlic and herbs. 3. Roast chicken until cooked through. 4. In a pan, melt butter and add honey, then toss in carrots. 5. Boil potatoes until tender, then mash with cream cheese. 6. Serve chicken with pan sauce, honey butter carrots, and creamy mashed potatoes. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your comforting meal.

title: Caramelized Ginger Chicken
description: A flavorful chicken dish marinated with ginger, honey, and soy sauce, seared to perfection, and tossed with aromatic vegetables and herbs.
ingredients_text: chicken, ginger, honey, soy sauce, aromatic vegetables, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken with ginger, honey, and soy sauce. 2. Heat a pan and sear the marinated chicken until golden. 3. Add aromatic vegetables to the pan. 4. Toss everything together until cooked through. 5. Garnish with fresh herbs. 6. Serve hot. 7. Enjoy your flavorful dish. 8. Pair with rice or salad if desired.

title: Chicken Pot Pie Meatballs
description: These are surprisingly moist and soo nostalgic!
ingredients_text: chicken, seasonings, breadcrumbs, vegetables, pie crust
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven. 2. Mix chicken with seasonings and breadcrumbs. 3. Form into meatballs. 4. Sauté vegetables until soft. 5. Place meatballs in a baking dish. 6. Cover with pie crust. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Buffalo Chicken Stuffed Potatoes
description: This is a viral recipe of Buffalo Chicken Stuffed Potatoes from a couple of years ago, shared again for its delightful taste. The recipe involves baking a potato, stuffing it with a mixture of chicken, spices, cheese and buffalo sauce, and baking it again until the cheese melts.
ingredients_text: 1 potato, cooked chicken, buffalo sauce, cheese, spices
instructions_text: 1. Bake the potato until tender. 2. In a bowl, mix shredded chicken with buffalo sauce and spices. 3. Cut the potato open and scoop out some flesh. 4. Stuff the potato with the chicken mixture. 5. Top with cheese. 6. Bake again until cheese melts. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your stuffed potato.

title: Cheesy Cottage Pie Loaded Potatoes
description: A comforting dish of potatoes loaded with a cheesy cottage pie mix, perfect for a cozy dinner.
ingredients_text: potatoes, cheese, ground beef, onions, carrots, peas, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Boil and mash the potatoes. 3. Cook the ground beef with onions, carrots, and peas. 4. Mix the beef with the mashed potatoes. 5. Layer the mixture in a baking dish. 6. Top with cheese. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Vegetarian Easy Potato Quiche
description: A wholesome and satisfying vegetarian quiche with a smashed potato base, packed with protein from eggs and cheese, and nutrients from leeks, mushrooms, and spinach. A comforting dish for any meal.
ingredients_text: smashed potatoes, eggs, cheese, leeks, mushrooms, spinach
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the smashed potato base. 3. Sauté leeks and mushrooms. 4. Mix eggs and cheese in a bowl. 5. Combine sautéed vegetables with the egg mixture. 6. Pour mixture into the potato base. 7. Bake until set. 8. Let cool slightly before serving.

title: Super Nutritious Cottage Pie
description: A super clean, warming, and flavoursome cottage pie with a high protein content. This recipe levels up the traditional school dinner dish with the use of sweet potatoes and a rich, savory beef mince filling.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, beef mince, onions, garlic, carrots, peas, beef broth, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Boil sweet potatoes until tender. 3. Sauté onions, garlic, and carrots in olive oil. 4. Add beef mince and cook until browned. 5. Stir in peas and beef broth, season with salt and pepper. 6. Mash sweet potatoes and layer over beef mixture. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Cajun White Chicken Chili
description: This white chicken chili has a little kick and a lot of comfort. It’s creamy, hearty, and packed with tender chicken, white beans, sweet corn, and warm Cajun spices.
ingredients_text: tender chicken, white beans, sweet corn, warm Cajun spices
instructions_text: 1. In a large pot, sauté chicken until browned. 2. Add white beans, corn, and Cajun spices. 3. Stir in cream and simmer. 4. Cook until heated through. 5. Adjust seasoning to taste. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish if desired. 8. Enjoy your comforting chili.

title: Viral BLT Salad
description: The viral sandwich in salad version! This salad hits all the same notes as a BLT made Mike’s Way, with the signature cherry pepper relish, banana peppers, mayo, and pickles. It's absolutely addictive and can be enhanced with shredded chicken for added protein.
ingredients_text: lettuce, tomatoes, bacon, cherry pepper relish, banana peppers, mayo, pickles, shredded chicken
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the lettuce and chop the tomatoes. 2. Cook the bacon until crispy. 3. In a bowl, combine lettuce, tomatoes, and bacon. 4. Add cherry pepper relish and banana peppers. 5. Mix in mayo and pickles. 6. If desired, add shredded chicken for extra protein. 7. Toss everything together until well combined. 8. Serve immediately and enjoy!

title: Hot Honey Pepperoni & Peppers Pasta Salad
description: A vibrant summer pasta salad that brings the flavors of your favorite pizza into a fresh and light dish. Featuring spicy pepperoni, creamy mozzarella, roasted red peppers, and fresh tomatoes, all tossed in a bold dressing with roasted garlic, honey, and parmesan.
ingredients_text: spicy pepperoni, creamy mozzarella, roasted red peppers, fresh tomatoes, roasted garlic, honey, parmesan
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Roast garlic until golden. 3. In a bowl, mix honey, roasted garlic, and dressing. 4. Combine cooked pasta, pepperoni, mozzarella, peppers, and tomatoes. 5. Pour dressing over the salad and toss. 6. Chill for 30 minutes. 7. Serve cold. 8. Enjoy your vibrant summer pasta salad!

title: Roasted Pumpkin, Couscous & Feta Salad
description: A vibrant salad featuring roasted pumpkin, pearl couscous, and a simple lemon dressing, perfect for a healthy dinner option.
ingredients_text: roasted pumpkin, pearl couscous, lemon dressing
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast the pumpkin until tender. 2. Cook the pearl couscous according to package instructions. 3. Prepare the lemon dressing. 4. Combine roasted pumpkin and couscous in a bowl. 5. Drizzle with lemon dressing. 6. Toss gently to mix. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your vibrant salad!

title: Summer Roll Chicken
description: Delicious and healthy summer rolls filled with seasoned chicken breast, fresh vegetables, and served with a creamy peanut butter sauce. Refined sugar-free and perfect for a light meal.
ingredients_text: seasoned chicken breast, fresh vegetables, peanut butter sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook the seasoned chicken breast until fully cooked. 2. Prepare fresh vegetables by slicing them thinly. 3. Soften rice paper wrappers in warm water. 4. Place a portion of chicken and vegetables on each wrapper. 5. Roll tightly to enclose the filling. 6. Serve with creamy peanut butter sauce. 7. Enjoy as a light meal. 8. Store any leftovers in the refrigerator.

title: Grilled Cod With Pistachio-Herb Salsa
description: You don't need a long marinade–or any planning ahead, for that matter–to bring bold flavor to an easy weeknight dinner! Instead, make a zippy Mediterranean-style salsa while you preheat your grill and you'll have a healthy dinner on your table in 30 minutes or less.
ingredients_text: cod, pistachios, herbs, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the grill. 2. Prepare the pistachio-herb salsa by mixing chopped pistachios, herbs, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. 3. Season the cod with salt and pepper. 4. Grill the cod for about 6-8 minutes per side until cooked through. 5. Remove from grill and let rest. 6. Serve the grilled cod topped with the pistachio-herb salsa. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Clean the grill after use.

title: Spicy Mediterranean Chicken with Creamy Cucumber Salad
description: Juicy grilled chicken thighs marinated in a blend of warm Mediterranean spices and served with a creamy cucumber salad reminiscent of tzatziki. Finished with a sprinkle of feta cheese.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, Mediterranean spices, cucumber, yogurt, feta cheese
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken thighs in Mediterranean spices. 2. Grill chicken until cooked through. 3. Prepare creamy cucumber salad with yogurt. 4. Mix in diced cucumbers and season. 5. Serve grilled chicken with salad. 6. Sprinkle feta cheese on top. 7. Enjoy your meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: One Pan Sweet Corn Coconut Dumplings
description: A delightful fusion of flavors featuring sweet summer corn, bok choy, and frozen potstickers in a cozy coconut broth. This dish is part dumpling soup, part corn chowder, and entirely crave-worthy.
ingredients_text: sweet corn, bok choy, frozen potstickers, coconut broth
instructions_text: 1. In a pot, heat coconut broth. 2. Add sweet corn and bok choy. 3. Bring to a simmer. 4. Add frozen potstickers. 5. Cook until dumplings are heated through. 6. Stir gently to combine. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your cozy dumpling soup.

title: Eggy Avocado Salmon Toast
description: A quick and healthy breakfast idea for those who love simple yet tasty meals! Try this easy recipe featuring eggs, avocado, and lightly salted red fish.
ingredients_text: 2 slices bread, 2 eggs, 1 avocado, lightly salted red fish
instructions_text: 1. Toast the bread slices. 2. Cook the eggs to your preference. 3. Mash the avocado in a bowl. 4. Spread the mashed avocado on the toasted bread. 5. Place the cooked eggs on top. 6. Add slices of lightly salted red fish. 7. Season with salt and pepper if desired. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Crispy Garlic Parmesan Hash Browns
description: Delicious oval-shaped hash browns seasoned with garlic and Parmesan for a crispy breakfast or snack.
ingredients_text: potatoes, garlic, Parmesan cheese, salt, pepper, oil
instructions_text: 1. Grate the potatoes and rinse to remove excess starch. 2. Squeeze out moisture and mix with minced garlic and Parmesan. 3. Season with salt and pepper. 4. Form into oval shapes. 5. Heat oil in a pan and fry until golden brown. 6. Flip and cook the other side until crispy. 7. Drain on paper towels. 8. Serve hot as a breakfast or snack.

title: Honey Jerk Salmon Tacos
description: Deliciously sweet, spicy, and refreshing Honey Jerk Salmon Tacos perfectly paired with mango salsa, ideal for summer enjoyment.
ingredients_text: salmon fillets, honey, jerk seasoning, tortillas, mango, lime, cilantro, red onion
instructions_text: 1. Marinate salmon in honey and jerk seasoning. 2. Grill the salmon until cooked through. 3. Prepare mango salsa by mixing diced mango, lime juice, cilantro, and red onion. 4. Warm tortillas on the grill. 5. Flake the grilled salmon and place it on tortillas. 6. Top with mango salsa. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your tacos!

title: Best Skillet Cornbread
description: A classic cornbread recipe perfect for serving with a drizzle of honey or alongside your Thanksgiving meal. This savory cornbread is baked to golden perfection in a cast-iron skillet, promising crispy edges and soft interiors.
ingredients_text: cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, milk, eggs, butter, honey
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. In a bowl, mix cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. 3. In another bowl, whisk milk, eggs, and melted butter. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients. 5. Pour batter into a preheated skillet. 6. Bake until golden brown. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve with honey.

title: Crunchy Kale & White Bean Salad with Creamy Pistachio Dressing
description: A delicious crunchy kale and white bean salad featuring a creamy, drinkable pistachio dressing inspired by Erewon's famous kale salad. Perfect for a healthy and satisfying meal.
ingredients_text: kale, white beans, pistachios, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Wash and chop the kale. 2. Rinse and drain the white beans. 3. Blend pistachios, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper for dressing. 4. In a bowl, combine kale and white beans. 5. Drizzle with pistachio dressing. 6. Toss to combine. 7. Serve immediately or chill. 8. Enjoy your healthy salad!

title: Cheesy Potato Mochi
description: Deliciously chewy potato mochi filled with gooey mozzarella cheese, lightly pan-fried and topped with honey and sesame seeds for a delicate sweet-savory touch.
ingredients_text: potato, mozzarella cheese, honey, sesame seeds
instructions_text: 1. Boil and mash the potatoes. 2. Mix in mozzarella cheese until combined. 3. Form the mixture into small balls. 4. Heat a pan and lightly fry the mochi balls until golden. 5. Drizzle with honey. 6. Sprinkle sesame seeds on top. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your sweet-savory treat!

title: Chipotle Salmon Tacos with Chili Lime Sauce
description: A flavorful and healthy taco recipe featuring chipotle-seasoned salmon, a refreshing cabbage slaw, and a creamy homemade chili lime sauce. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
ingredients_text: chipotle-seasoned salmon, cabbage slaw, chili lime sauce, tortillas
instructions_text: 1. Season salmon with chipotle spices. 2. Grill or cook salmon on stovetop until cooked through. 3. Prepare cabbage slaw. 4. Mix ingredients for chili lime sauce. 5. Warm tortillas. 6. Assemble tacos with salmon, slaw, and sauce. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Indian Vodka Pasta
description: A fusion of Indian spices and vodka to create a creamy, spicy and rich pasta dish.
ingredients_text: pasta, Indian spices, vodka, cream
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat vodka and add Indian spices. 3. Stir in cream and mix well. 4. Combine the sauce with the cooked pasta. 5. Simmer for a few minutes. 6. Adjust seasoning as needed. 7. Serve hot. 8. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.

title: Maple Cinnamon Sweet Potato Casserole
description: A delicious casserole made with pork and sweet potatoes, flavored with maple and cinnamon.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, pork, maple syrup, cinnamon
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the pork until browned. 3. Mash the sweet potatoes. 4. Mix pork, sweet potatoes, maple syrup, and cinnamon. 5. Transfer to a baking dish. 6. Bake until heated through. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Sweet Potato Turkey Chili
description: Packed with vegetables and protein, this nourishing Sweet Potato Turkey Chili is a must try this season. So cozy and comforting and absolutely delicious! Top with avocado and Greek yogurt and enjoy.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, ground turkey, vegetables, avocado, Greek yogurt
instructions_text: 1. Cook ground turkey in a pot until browned. 2. Add diced sweet potatoes and vegetables. 3. Stir in spices and cook for a few minutes. 4. Pour in broth and bring to a boil. 5. Reduce heat and simmer until sweet potatoes are tender. 6. Serve topped with avocado and Greek yogurt. 7. Enjoy your cozy chili!

title: Greek Chicken Souvlaki Bowl
description: A delicious Greek-inspired chicken bowl with juicy grilled chicken, creamy tzatziki sauce, and roasted lemon potatoes, served over a fresh salad.
ingredients_text: juicy grilled chicken, creamy tzatziki sauce, roasted lemon potatoes, fresh salad
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in olive oil, lemon juice, and spices. 2. Skewer and grill the chicken until cooked through. 3. Roast potatoes with lemon and herbs until golden. 4. Prepare tzatziki sauce with yogurt, cucumber, and garlic. 5. Assemble the bowl with salad, chicken, potatoes, and tzatziki. 6. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon juice. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your Greek-inspired meal!

title: Korean Gochujang Fried Mozzarella Balls
description: A fusion of Korean fried chicken flavors with gooey mozzarella, resulting in crispy, cheesy, sweet, and spicy perfection.
ingredients_text: mozzarella balls, gochujang, flour, breadcrumbs, eggs, oil for frying
instructions_text: 1. Prepare a breading station with flour, beaten eggs, and breadcrumbs. 2. Dip mozzarella balls in flour, then eggs, and finally breadcrumbs. 3. Heat oil in a frying pan. 4. Fry the breaded mozzarella balls until golden brown. 5. Remove and drain on paper towels. 6. Toss with gochujang for flavor. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your crispy, cheesy treat!

title: Vegan Crab Cake Tostada
description: A delicious vegan take on the classic crab cake, served on a crisp chickpea flour tortilla with tangy onion slaw and creamy tartar sauce.
ingredients_text: chickpea flour tortilla, vegan crab cake, onion slaw, tartar sauce
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the chickpea flour tortilla. 2. Make the vegan crab cake mixture. 3. Form the mixture into patties and fry until golden. 4. Prepare the onion slaw. 5. Assemble the tostadas with the crab cakes and slaw. 6. Drizzle with tartar sauce. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Baked Feta Egg Breakfast Burritos
description: A delightful recipe that combines baked feta scrambled eggs and sautéed garden veggies into a convenient and protein-rich breakfast burrito. Perfect for meal prep and easy mornings.
ingredients_text: baked feta, scrambled eggs, sautéed garden veggies, tortillas
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and bake feta until soft. 2. Scramble eggs in a bowl. 3. Sauté garden veggies in a pan. 4. Mix baked feta with scrambled eggs and veggies. 5. Fill tortillas with the mixture. 6. Roll up the burritos. 7. Optionally, bake burritos for a few minutes. 8. Serve warm.

title: Crockpot Chuck Roast Tinga Tacos
description: Delicious and effortless chuck roast tacos slow-cooked to perfection, topped with a refreshing cilantro-cotija yogurt sauce and crumbled cheese. A family favorite!
ingredients_text: chuck roast, cilantro, cotija cheese, yogurt, taco shells
instructions_text: 1. Season the chuck roast and place it in the crockpot. 2. Add desired spices and a bit of water. 3. Cover and cook on low for 8 hours. 4. Once cooked, shred the beef with two forks. 5. Mix yogurt with chopped cilantro and crumbled cotija cheese. 6. Serve the shredded beef in taco shells. 7. Top with the cilantro-cotija yogurt sauce. 8. Enjoy your tacos!

title: Salmon With Sizzled Nut Salsa
description: A savory-hot salsa made with mixed nuts (like the kind dubbed cocktail nuts meant for snacking) gives roast salmon a kaleidoscope of textures and flavors.
ingredients_text: salmon, mixed nuts, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Season the salmon with spices. 3. Bake the salmon until cooked through. 4. Prepare the nut salsa by mixing the nuts with spices. 5. Sizzle the nut mixture in a pan. 6. Serve the salmon topped with the nut salsa. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Pomegranate & Green Bean Salad
description: This Pomegranate & Green Bean Salad is the perfect veggie side dish to accompany rich & decadent meals this holiday season
ingredients_text: green beans, pomegranate seeds, olive oil, lemon juice, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Boil green beans until tender. 2. Drain and cool. 3. In a bowl, mix olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. 4. Add green beans and pomegranate seeds. 5. Toss to combine. 6. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 7. Garnish with extra pomegranate seeds if desired. 8. Enjoy as a side dish.

title: Honey Mustard Grilled Chicken with Peach Salad
description: A deliciously tangy honey mustard grilled chicken served with a refreshing peach and cucumber salad. Perfect for a summer grill with friends and family.
ingredients_text: honey, mustard, chicken breasts, peaches, cucumber, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in honey and mustard. 2. Preheat grill. 3. Grill chicken until cooked through. 4. Slice peaches and cucumber. 5. Toss salad with olive oil, salt, and pepper. 6. Serve grilled chicken with peach salad. 7. Enjoy with friends and family.

title: Buffalo Chicken Ranch Bowls
description: Spicy Buffalo chicken with cooling ranch dressing, paired with a simple cabbage slaw and served on a bed of fluffy quinoa. Topped with extra Buffalo sauce and ranch, this dish is a quick, easy, and delicious weeknight dinner that satisfies cravings.
ingredients_text: Buffalo chicken, ranch dressing, cabbage slaw, quinoa, extra Buffalo sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 2. Prepare Buffalo chicken by cooking and tossing in sauce. 3. Mix cabbage slaw with ranch dressing. 4. Assemble bowls with quinoa as the base. 5. Top with Buffalo chicken and slaw. 6. Drizzle with extra Buffalo sauce and ranch. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Basil Gnocchi With Burrata
description: A big bowl of pillowy, pestoy gnocchi - comfort food dreams!!
ingredients_text: gnocchi, basil, burrata, pesto, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the gnocchi according to package instructions. 2. Cook the basil in boiling water for a few seconds. 3. Blend basil with pesto ingredients. 4. Toss the gnocchi with the pesto. 5. Serve with burrata on top. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Enjoy warm. 8. Garnish with extra basil if desired.

title: Spicy Egg Salad Toast
description: A fiery, creamy egg salad perfect for quick lunches. This dish is flavorful enough to eat on its own, or deliciously piled over crusty bread like sourdough.
ingredients_text: eggs, mayonnaise, hot sauce, salt, pepper, sourdough bread
instructions_text: 1. Boil the eggs until hard-boiled. 2. Peel and chop the eggs. 3. In a bowl, mix eggs with mayonnaise, hot sauce, salt, and pepper. 4. Toast the sourdough bread. 5. Pile the egg salad onto the toasted bread. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy as a quick lunch. 8. Store any leftovers in the fridge.

title: Pesto Chicken Caesar Pasta Salad
description: A vibrant summer salad that combines the classic flavors of Caesar with a new pesto twist, featuring succulent chicken, shellbows pasta, fresh romaine, and a crunch of toasted panko.
ingredients_text: chicken, shellbows pasta, romaine, pesto, toasted panko
instructions_text: 1. Cook the shellbows pasta according to package instructions. 2. Grill or boil the chicken until fully cooked, then slice. 3. In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta, chicken, and chopped romaine. 4. Add pesto and mix until well coated. 5. Top with toasted panko for crunch. 6. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 7. Garnish with extra pesto if desired. 8. Enjoy your vibrant summer salad!

title: Italian Tortellini Pasta Salad
description: An easy make-ahead Italian tortellini pasta salad featuring pillowy cheese tortellini, diced salami, crisp veggies, mozzarella, and fresh basil tossed in a herby Italian vinaigrette. Perfect for spring and summer meal prep.
ingredients_text: cheese tortellini, diced salami, crisp veggies, mozzarella, fresh basil, herby Italian vinaigrette
instructions_text: 1. Cook the cheese tortellini according to package instructions. 2. Drain and cool the tortellini. 3. In a large bowl, combine tortellini, diced salami, chopped veggies, mozzarella, and fresh basil. 4. Drizzle with herby Italian vinaigrette. 5. Toss gently to combine. 6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your refreshing pasta salad!

title: Pesto Noodles with Crispy Lemon Chicken
description: A refreshing summer dinner combining pesto-coated noodles and crispy lemon-flavored chicken, perfect for a light yet satisfying meal.
ingredients_text: pesto, noodles, chicken, lemon, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook noodles according to package instructions. 2. Prepare pesto sauce. 3. Season chicken with lemon, salt, and pepper. 4. Fry chicken until crispy. 5. Toss cooked noodles with pesto. 6. Slice chicken and place on top of noodles. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: ChampiñOnes En Salsa De Ajo Y Tres Quesos
description: This is a delicious mushroom dish in a garlic and three-cheese sauce, perfect as a dip or as a sauce for your protein. The flavors are intense and creamy, reminiscent of a fondue.
ingredients_text: mushrooms, garlic, three types of cheese
instructions_text: 1. Sauté garlic in a pan. 2. Add mushrooms and cook until tender. 3. Stir in the three cheeses until melted. 4. Season with salt and pepper. 5. Serve warm as a dip or sauce. 6. Garnish with herbs if desired. 7. Enjoy with bread or as a topping for proteins. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Trader Joe's Burrata and Tomato Ravioloni with Spicy Vodka Sauce
description: A delightful, easy-to-make dish featuring Trader Joe's Burrata and Tomato Ravioloni paired with a luxurious spicy vodka sauce.
ingredients_text: Trader Joe's Burrata and Tomato Ravioloni, spicy vodka sauce
instructions_text: 1. Boil water and cook the ravioloni according to package instructions. 2. In a separate pan, heat the spicy vodka sauce. 3. Drain the ravioloni and add to the sauce. 4. Toss gently to combine. 5. Serve warm. 6. Garnish with additional burrata if desired. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Arugula Salad with Lime Maple Vinaigrette
description: A refreshing and vibrant salad combining arugula and spinach with a medley of fruits and veggies. Drizzled with a lime maple vinaigrette, this dish is perfect for spring and summer events.
ingredients_text: arugula, spinach, assorted fruits, assorted veggies, lime, maple syrup
instructions_text: 1. Wash and dry arugula and spinach. 2. Chop assorted fruits and veggies. 3. In a bowl, combine greens, fruits, and veggies. 4. In a separate bowl, whisk lime juice and maple syrup. 5. Drizzle vinaigrette over salad. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad!

title: Sweet Potato Casserole
description: A delicious sweet potato casserole with a streusel topping and a layer of mini marshmallows, perfect for Thanksgiving sides.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, sugar, butter, milk, eggs, vanilla extract, mini marshmallows, flour, brown sugar, pecans
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Boil sweet potatoes until tender, then mash. 3. Mix mashed sweet potatoes with sugar, butter, milk, eggs, and vanilla. 4. Pour mixture into a baking dish. 5. In a separate bowl, combine flour, brown sugar, and pecans for streusel topping. 6. Sprinkle streusel over sweet potato mixture. 7. Top with mini marshmallows. 8. Bake for 30-35 minutes until golden and bubbly.

title: Spinach Artichoke Salmon
description: Combine the signature creaminess of spinach and artichoke dip with succulent spiced salmon and orzo for the ultimate one pan dinner recipe. This Spinach Artichoke Salmon is weeknight-friendly and destined to become a family favorite!
ingredients_text: salmon, spinach, artichoke, orzo, cream, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook orzo according to package instructions. 3. Sauté spinach and artichoke in a pan. 4. Season salmon and place it in the pan. 5. Add cream and mix well. 6. Combine with cooked orzo. 7. Bake until salmon is cooked through. 8. Serve warm.

title: Famous Crunchy Quinoa Salad with Salmon
description: A crunchy and savory salad with the perfect combination of quinoa, rice, fresh veggies, and a delicious salmon topping. Ideal for a healthy meal packed with flavor.
ingredients_text: quinoa, rice, fresh veggies, salmon
instructions_text: 1. Cook quinoa and rice according to package instructions. 2. Chop fresh veggies. 3. Flake cooked salmon. 4. In a large bowl, combine quinoa, rice, veggies, and salmon. 5. Drizzle with dressing of choice. 6. Toss gently to mix. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your crunchy salad!

title: Creamy Chicken Tortilla Soup
description: A comforting and creamy chicken tortilla soup perfect for a cozy night.
ingredients_text: chicken, tortillas, cream, spices, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken in a pot until browned. 2. Add chopped vegetables and spices. 3. Pour in broth and bring to a simmer. 4. Stir in cream for creaminess. 5. Add tortilla strips. 6. Simmer for 10 minutes. 7. Serve hot. 8. Garnish with toppings as desired.

title: Fiesta Caesar Salad with Cilantro-Lime Caesar Dressing
description: A zesty twist on the classic Caesar salad featuring crispy romaine, creamy avocado, and tangy cotija cheese, all dressed in a cilantro-lime Caesar dressing. Perfect with additional protein like steak, chicken, or shrimp.
ingredients_text: crispy romaine, creamy avocado, tangy cotija cheese, cilantro-lime Caesar dressing, additional protein (steak, chicken, or shrimp)
instructions_text: 1. Wash and chop the romaine lettuce. 2. Slice the avocado. 3. Crumble the cotija cheese. 4. In a bowl, combine romaine, avocado, and cotija. 5. Drizzle with cilantro-lime Caesar dressing. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Add your choice of protein. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Chipotle Chicken Crunchwrap with Crispy Cheese Crust
description: A flavorful Mexican-inspired take on the classic Taco Bell Crunchwrap, featuring chipotle chicken and a crispy cheese crust for the perfect dinner or snack.
ingredients_text: chipotle chicken, tortillas, cheese, lettuce, tomatoes, sour cream
instructions_text: 1. Cook chipotle chicken until done. 2. Prepare tortillas and cheese. 3. Layer chicken, cheese, lettuce, and tomatoes on a tortilla. 4. Fold the tortilla to form a wrap. 5. Grill the wrap until crispy. 6. Serve with sour cream. 7. Enjoy your Crunchwrap! 8. Repeat for remaining wraps.

title: Dip de Jamón Serrano
description: Un delicioso dip de jamón serrano, perfecto para cualquier reunión. Sabor intenso asegurado para sorprender a todos tus invitados.
ingredients_text: jamón serrano, cream cheese, garlic, olive oil, lemon juice
instructions_text: 1. In a blender, combine jamón serrano, cream cheese, and garlic. 2. Add olive oil and lemon juice. 3. Blend until smooth. 4. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary. 5. Transfer to a serving bowl. 6. Chill in the refrigerator for 15 minutes. 7. Serve with crackers or bread. 8. Enjoy at your gathering!

title: Mini Spinach & Feta Chicken Burgers
description: These mini chicken burgers are packed with spinach and feta, perfect for a meal prep addition. Serve with grilled veggies and a creamy cauliflower mash for a complete, satisfying meal.
ingredients_text: mini chicken burgers, spinach, feta, grilled veggies, creamy cauliflower mash
instructions_text: 1. Preheat grill. 2. In a bowl, mix chicken, spinach, and feta. 3. Form into mini patties. 4. Grill patties until cooked through. 5. Serve with grilled veggies. 6. Prepare creamy cauliflower mash. 7. Plate the burgers with sides. 8. Enjoy your meal prep.

title: Summer Peach & Feta Corn Salad
description: A refreshing summer salad featuring sweet peaches, charred corn, salty feta, and a zesty lime-lemon dressing. Perfect as a salad or a dip for chips, ideal for meal prep.
ingredients_text: sweet peaches, charred corn, salty feta, lime, lemon
instructions_text: 1. Char the corn on a grill or stovetop. 2. Dice the peaches. 3. Crumble the feta cheese. 4. In a bowl, combine corn, peaches, and feta. 5. Squeeze lime and lemon juice over the mixture. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Serve as a salad or dip. 8. Enjoy fresh or store for meal prep.

title: Breakfast Egg & Potato Tart
description: Breakfast egg & potato tart with a crisp potato base, soft scrambled egg topping, melty cheese, and sautéed veggies - all made in one pan!
ingredients_text: potatoes, eggs, cheese, assorted vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the potato base in a pan. 3. Sauté the vegetables until soft. 4. Scramble the eggs and mix with cheese. 5. Pour the egg mixture over the potato base. 6. Bake until set. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Slice and serve warm.

title: Roasted Butternut Squash, Apple & Quinoa Salad With Honey Vinaigrette
description: This cozy, nutrient-packed salad highlights the best of fall produce. It’s hearty yet fresh, perfect for weeknight dinners or festive special occasions. The mix of basil and dried cherries adds a bright, unexpected twist that takes every bite to the next level. It can be served with chicken, salmon, or even eggs for an extra hit of protein!
ingredients_text: butternut squash, apple, quinoa, honey, basil, dried cherries
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast butternut squash until tender. 2. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 3. Chop apples and mix with roasted squash. 4. Combine quinoa, squash, and apples in a bowl. 5. Whisk together honey and vinaigrette. 6. Drizzle dressing over the salad. 7. Add basil and dried cherries. 8. Toss gently and serve.

title: Avocado Peach Caprese Salad
description: A refreshing summer salad with a fruity twist, combining creamy avocado and juicy peaches with the classic caprese ingredients.
ingredients_text: 2 ripe avocados, 2 peaches, 1 cup fresh mozzarella, 1/4 cup fresh basil, 2 tablespoons balsamic glaze, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Slice avocados and peaches. 2. Cut mozzarella into slices. 3. Arrange avocado, peach, and mozzarella on a plate. 4. Sprinkle with fresh basil. 5. Drizzle with balsamic glaze. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad!

title: Garlic Mashed Potatoes
description: Roasted garlic mashed potatoes with a splash of tangy balsamic vinegar for an extra kick. Perfect for a Thanksgiving table or a cozy carb craving.
ingredients_text: potatoes, roasted garlic, balsamic vinegar, salt, pepper, butter, cream
instructions_text: 1. Boil potatoes until tender. 2. Roast garlic until golden. 3. Drain potatoes and return to pot. 4. Mash potatoes with roasted garlic. 5. Stir in balsamic vinegar, butter, and cream. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy at your Thanksgiving table.

title: Vibrant Spring Pistachio Pesto Pasta with Seared Salmon
description: A vibrant and saucy spring meal featuring pistachio pesto pasta paired with seared salmon drizzled with a tangy honey mustard glaze. Packed with protein and bursting with flavor!
ingredients_text: pasta, pistachios, salmon, honey, mustard, olive oil, garlic, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a blender, combine pistachios, garlic, olive oil, and seasonings to make pesto. 3. Heat a skillet and sear salmon until cooked through. 4. Mix cooked pasta with pistachio pesto. 5. Drizzle honey mustard glaze over seared salmon. 6. Serve pasta topped with salmon. 7. Garnish with extra pistachios if desired. 8. Enjoy your vibrant spring meal!

title: Air Fryer Bun Cha
description: A Vietnamese-style noodle dish with succulent chicken patties and a spicy, sweet, and tangy dipping sauce.
ingredients_text: chicken patties, noodles, dipping sauce
instructions_text: 1. Prepare chicken patties and season. 2. Preheat air fryer. 3. Cook chicken patties in air fryer for 15 minutes. 4. Boil noodles according to package instructions. 5. Mix ingredients for dipping sauce. 6. Serve chicken patties over noodles. 7. Drizzle with dipping sauce. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Chicken Bacon Ranch Jalapeño Poppers
description: Spicy and savory jalapeño poppers filled with chicken, bacon, and a creamy ranch-infused cheese mix. Perfect for an appetizer or snack.
ingredients_text: jalapeños, chicken, bacon, ranch-infused cheese mix
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Halve the jalapeños and remove seeds. 3. Mix chicken, bacon, and cheese. 4. Fill jalapeño halves with the mixture. 5. Place on a baking sheet. 6. Bake until cheese is bubbly. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Crispy Chilli Fries
description: These crispy chilli fries are a spicy and savory delight, perfect as a snack or a delicious side. Coated in a flavorful batter and fried to golden perfection, they're tossed in a rich, tangy sauce that tantalizes your taste buds.
ingredients_text: potatoes, chili powder, flour, water, salt, oil for frying, tangy sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cut potatoes into fries. 2. Prepare a batter with flour, chili powder, and water. 3. Coat fries in the batter. 4. Heat oil in a pan. 5. Fry the coated fries until golden. 6. Drain excess oil. 7. Toss fries in tangy sauce. 8. Serve hot.

title: Buffalo Ranch Crunch Bowl
description: A satisfying and flavorful vegan bowl featuring buffalo soy curls, a crunchy slaw, and quinoa. Perfect for a nourishing meal during your follicular phase.
ingredients_text: buffalo soy curls, crunchy slaw, quinoa
instructions_text: 1. Prepare quinoa according to package instructions. 2. Cook buffalo soy curls until heated through. 3. Mix ingredients for the crunchy slaw. 4. Combine quinoa, soy curls, and slaw in a bowl. 5. Drizzle with additional buffalo sauce if desired. 6. Serve immediately or store for meal prep. 7. Enjoy during your follicular phase. 8. Garnish with fresh herbs if available.

title: Honey-Mustard-Butter Salmon With Cranberry Pecan Feta Crumble
description: A harvest/seasonal version of salmon with a crumble crust
ingredients_text: salmon, honey, mustard, butter, cranberries, pecans, feta cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix honey, mustard, and butter. 3. Coat salmon with the mixture. 4. Prepare the crumble with cranberries, pecans, and feta. 5. Spread the crumble over the salmon. 6. Bake until cooked through. 7. Let it rest before serving. 8. Serve with a side of your choice.

title: Crispy Cheesy Tostadas
description: Crispy cheesy tostadas with beans, cheese, and fresh toppings.
ingredients_text: tostadas, beans, cheese, fresh toppings
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven. 2. Prepare tostadas by baking or frying until crispy. 3. Spread beans on each tostada. 4. Top with cheese. 5. Bake until cheese melts. 6. Add fresh toppings. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your crispy cheesy tostadas.

title: Cilantro Lime Pasta Salad
description: A colorful and refreshing pasta salad with fresh corn, tomatoes, onion, and cilantro tossed in a creamy and zesty cilantro-lime dressing. The perfect dish for a summer gathering.
ingredients_text: pasta, fresh corn, tomatoes, onion, cilantro, creamy cilantro-lime dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Drain and rinse under cold water. 3. In a large bowl, combine cooked pasta, corn, tomatoes, onion, and cilantro. 4. In a separate bowl, mix the cilantro-lime dressing. 5. Pour dressing over the pasta salad. 6. Toss until well combined. 7. Chill in the refrigerator for 15 minutes. 8. Serve cold.

title: Guacamole Chicken Salad
description: Everything you love about guacamole packed into a delicious, healthy, high-protein chicken salad. Creamy, zesty & loaded with flavor, perfect for easy lunches during the week!
ingredients_text: chicken breast, avocado, lime juice, cilantro, red onion, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken breast until fully cooked. 2. Let it cool and shred. 3. In a bowl, mash avocado and mix with lime juice. 4. Add shredded chicken, chopped cilantro, diced red onion, salt, and pepper. 5. Mix until well combined. 6. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 7. Enjoy as a salad or in wraps. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Tortilla-Crusted Buffalo Chicken Caesar Salad
description: A delightful fusion of buffalo chicken and Caesar salad, featuring crispy tortilla-crusted chicken drizzled with homemade buffalo sauce, served over a bed of romaine lettuce with garlicky Caesar dressing.
ingredients_text: tortilla chips, chicken breast, buffalo sauce, romaine lettuce, Caesar dressing, garlic
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and prepare baking sheet. 2. Coat chicken in buffalo sauce and crush tortilla chips. 3. Dredge chicken in tortilla chips and bake until crispy. 4. Chop romaine lettuce and place in a bowl. 5. Drizzle Caesar dressing over lettuce. 6. Slice crispy chicken and place on top. 7. Drizzle more buffalo sauce if desired. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Seared Miso Chicken in Ginger Broth
description: A seemingly complex dish made simple with seared miso-marinated chicken served over ginger-infused broth and rice. Finished with garlic chili crunch for an added depth of flavor.
ingredients_text: miso-marinated chicken, ginger-infused broth, rice, garlic chili crunch
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken in miso for at least 30 minutes. 2. Sear chicken in a pan until golden brown. 3. Prepare ginger-infused broth in a separate pot. 4. Cook rice according to package instructions. 5. Combine seared chicken with broth. 6. Serve over rice. 7. Top with garlic chili crunch. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Summery Pork Chop
description: A perfectly fried pork chop with heirloom tomatoes and wild ramps. This dish is fatty, fresh, acidic, and salty, offering a balance of crunch and softness. Perfect for showcasing quality bone-in pork chops and seasonal produce.
ingredients_text: bone-in pork chops, heirloom tomatoes, wild ramps
instructions_text: 1. Season the pork chops with salt and pepper. 2. Heat oil in a frying pan over medium-high heat. 3. Fry the pork chops until golden brown and cooked through. 4. Remove and let rest. 5. In the same pan, sauté wild ramps until tender. 6. Slice heirloom tomatoes. 7. Serve pork chops topped with ramps and tomatoes. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Coconut Chicken Thighs with Peanut Salsa & Sticky Rice
description: An easy-to-make Thai-inspired dish featuring tender coconut-marinated chicken thighs paired with a fresh and flavorful peanut salsa served over sticky rice.
ingredients_text: coconut-marinated chicken thighs, peanut salsa, sticky rice
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken thighs in coconut milk. 2. Grill chicken until cooked through. 3. Prepare sticky rice according to package instructions. 4. Make peanut salsa by mixing peanuts with fresh ingredients. 5. Serve grilled chicken over sticky rice. 6. Top with peanut salsa. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Fennel Orange Salad with Burrata
description: A visually stunning salad with a delightful blend of thinly sliced fennel, juicy oranges, creamy burrata, and pickled onions. Perfect for a refreshing and exciting appetizer or side dish.
ingredients_text: fennel, oranges, burrata, pickled onions
instructions_text: 1. Thinly slice the fennel. 2. Peel and segment the oranges. 3. Arrange fennel and orange segments on a plate. 4. Tear burrata and place on top. 5. Add pickled onions. 6. Drizzle with olive oil. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Chicken Street Corn Salad
description: This vibrant Chicken Street Corn Salad combines nourishing fresh vegetables, creamy avocado, feta cheese, and chicken, all tossed in a delicious smoky chipotle dressing. Perfect for any summer cookout!
ingredients_text: chicken, fresh vegetables, avocado, feta cheese, smoky chipotle dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook the chicken until fully cooked. 2. Grill or boil corn until tender. 3. Chop fresh vegetables and avocado. 4. In a bowl, combine chicken, corn, vegetables, and avocado. 5. Crumble feta cheese on top. 6. Drizzle with smoky chipotle dressing. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

title: Loaded Hummus Appetizer
description: This loaded hummus appetizer is both delicious and healthy, perfect for gatherings. It's rich in protein and can be customized with your favorite toppings. Serve with pita, bread, or crackers!
ingredients_text: hummus, assorted toppings, pita, bread, crackers
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the hummus base. 2. Spread hummus on a serving platter. 3. Add your favorite toppings. 4. Drizzle with olive oil if desired. 5. Serve with pita, bread, or crackers. 6. Enjoy at gatherings. 7. Customize toppings as preferred. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Marinated Heirlooms + Ricotta Toast
description: If you’ve got some soon-to-spoil tomatoes—or some freshies from the market—this is the dish to make. It does not disappoint and really lets the tomatoes shine. It’s just the start of tomato season, and a few heirlooms have been popping up at the market this week, so grab a couple and treat yourself. Also, if you can, find yourself some vincotto vinegar. It’s a great pantry staple that elevates a dish so easily. It’s similar to balsamic in taste and texture but vincotto is the rolls royce of dark vinegars.
ingredients_text: heirloom tomatoes, ricotta cheese, vincotto vinegar, bread
instructions_text: 1. Slice heirloom tomatoes. 2. Spread ricotta on toasted bread. 3. Arrange tomato slices on top. 4. Drizzle with vincotto vinegar. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy fresh. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: 20-Minute Bang Bang Salmon Bowls
description: A quick and easy dinner featuring broiled salmon, tangy cucumber salad, and a yogurt-based bang bang sauce served over jasmine rice.
ingredients_text: salmon, cucumber, yogurt, bang bang sauce, jasmine rice
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the broiler. 2. Season salmon and place on a baking sheet. 3. Broil salmon for 10-12 minutes until cooked. 4. Prepare cucumber salad. 5. Mix yogurt with bang bang sauce ingredients. 6. Cook jasmine rice according to package instructions. 7. Assemble bowls with rice, salmon, salad, and sauce. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Watermelon, Cucumber, And Feta Salad
description: This watermelon cucumber feta salad is the ultimate summer refresher — sweet, salty, and creamy with a bright citrus-herb dressing that ties it all together. Perfect for cookouts, poolside snacks, or anytime you want to impress with minimal effort.
ingredients_text: watermelon, cucumber, feta cheese, citrus juice, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Cube the watermelon and cucumber. 2. Crumble the feta cheese. 3. In a bowl, combine watermelon, cucumber, and feta. 4. Whisk together citrus juice and herbs for dressing. 5. Drizzle dressing over salad. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Chill in the refrigerator for 10 minutes. 8. Serve cold.

title: One Pot White Chicken Chili Mac And Cheese
description: A delicious combination of spicy saucy chicken chili and creamy cheesy mac and cheese, perfect for feeding family and friends.
ingredients_text: chicken, chili, mac and cheese, cheese, spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken in a pot until browned. 2. Add chili spices and mix well. 3. Stir in cooked macaroni. 4. Add cheese and mix until melted. 5. Simmer until heated through. 6. Serve hot. 7. Garnish with additional cheese if desired. 8. Enjoy with family and friends.

title: Thai Watermelon Lime Peanut Prawn Salad
description: A refreshing and vibrant summer salad featuring watermelon, prawns, and a zesty lime dressing. Ideal for a light lunch or as a side dish at a barbecue.
ingredients_text: watermelon, prawns, lime, peanuts, dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cut watermelon into cubes. 2. Cook prawns until pink. 3. Mix watermelon and prawns in a bowl. 4. Squeeze lime juice over the mixture. 5. Add chopped peanuts. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Serve chilled. 8. Enjoy as a light lunch or side dish.

title: Ultimate Brie Mashed Potatoes
description: The most luxurious mashed potato that exists… brie baked mashed potato! The epitome of indulgent, hearty comfort food.
ingredients_text: potatoes, brie cheese, butter, cream, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Boil potatoes until tender. 2. Drain and return to pot. 3. Add brie, butter, and cream. 4. Mash until smooth. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Transfer to a baking dish. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Serve warm.

title: Spinach Salad with Bacon & Hard-Boiled Eggs
description: A refreshing spinach salad that's perfect for spring, featuring crispy bacon, hard-boiled eggs, tomatoes, red onion, and creamy avocado all drizzled with a tangy red wine vinaigrette.
ingredients_text: spinach, bacon, hard-boiled eggs, tomatoes, red onion, avocado, red wine vinaigrette
instructions_text: 1. Cook bacon until crispy. 2. Hard-boil eggs and slice. 3. In a bowl, combine spinach, tomatoes, and red onion. 4. Add crispy bacon and sliced eggs. 5. Dice avocado and add to the salad. 6. Drizzle with red wine vinaigrette. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Lemon Pepper Parmesan Chicken Cutlets with Tomato Mozzarella Olive Salad
description: A perfect dish for warm weather, featuring crispy lemon pepper parmesan chicken cutlets topped with a refreshing tomato, mozzarella, and olive salad with Ken's Italian Dressing.
ingredients_text: chicken cutlets, lemon pepper, parmesan cheese, tomatoes, mozzarella cheese, olives, Ken's Italian Dressing
instructions_text: 1. Season chicken cutlets with lemon pepper and coat with parmesan cheese. 2. Heat oil in a pan and fry the chicken cutlets until golden brown. 3. In a bowl, combine diced tomatoes, mozzarella, and olives. 4. Drizzle with Ken's Italian Dressing and toss gently. 5. Serve the crispy chicken cutlets topped with the salad. 6. Enjoy warm as a refreshing lunch. 7. Optionally, garnish with fresh herbs. 8. Pair with a side of crusty bread if desired.

title: Giant Halloumi, Spring Onion & Sweetcorn Fritter
description: A giant sweetcorn fritter loaded with halloumi and spring onions. This one-pan wonder is easy to prepare and full of flavor. No need for batch cooking; simply pour the batter into the pan, cook, and flip. Serve with your choice of toppings like a fried egg, avocado, and a drizzle of hot honey.
ingredients_text: sweetcorn, halloumi, spring onions, eggs, flour, baking powder, salt, pepper, hot honey, avocado
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix sweetcorn, halloumi, spring onions, eggs, flour, baking powder, salt, and pepper. 2. Heat a pan over medium heat. 3. Pour the batter into the pan. 4. Cook until golden brown, then flip. 5. Cook the other side until golden. 6. Serve with toppings like a fried egg and avocado. 7. Drizzle with hot honey. 8. Enjoy your giant fritter!

title: Smashed Pea and Edamame Dip
description: A zesty and fresh dip packed full of protein and flavor, topped with chili crisp and toasted sesame seeds.
ingredients_text: smashed peas, edamame, chili crisp, toasted sesame seeds
instructions_text: 1. Cook edamame and peas until tender. 2. Drain and cool. 3. Blend peas and edamame until smooth. 4. Stir in chili crisp. 5. Transfer to a serving bowl. 6. Top with toasted sesame seeds. 7. Serve with crackers or veggies. 8. Enjoy as a zesty dip.

title: Spicy-Ish Chicken Rice Noodle Bowls
description: "@kalejunkie NEW! Spicy-ish Chicken Rice Noodle Bowls, packed with protein and veggies. The slightly spicy broth complements the rice noodles perfectly. Enjoy this dish fresh or as leftovers!"
ingredients_text: rice noodles, chicken, assorted veggies, broth, spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice noodles according to package instructions. 2. In a pot, prepare the broth with spices. 3. Add chicken to the broth and cook until done. 4. Incorporate assorted veggies into the broth. 5. Combine cooked noodles with the broth mixture. 6. Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired. 7. Enjoy fresh or store for leftovers. 8. Reheat before serving if using leftovers.

title: Banh Mi Bowls
description: Our favorite weeknight dinner, these Banh Mi bowls feature savory ground chicken in a flavorful sauce, complemented by fresh veggies and a spicy sriracha mayo drizzle.
ingredients_text: ground chicken, fresh veggies, sriracha mayo
instructions_text: 1. Cook ground chicken in a skillet until browned. 2. Prepare the flavorful sauce and mix with the chicken. 3. Chop fresh veggies. 4. Assemble bowls with chicken and veggies. 5. Drizzle with spicy sriracha mayo. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Sheet Pan Salmon With Sesame, Soy, & Ginger
