description: A quick and easy one-pan dinner featuring sesame-soy glazed salmon with roasted broccoli, perfect for a healthy meal packed with protein and healthy fats.
ingredients_text: salmon fillets, sesame oil, soy sauce, ginger, broccoli
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. In a bowl, mix sesame oil, soy sauce, and grated ginger. 3. Place salmon on a sheet pan and brush with the glaze. 4. Add broccoli around the salmon. 5. Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes. 6. Check for doneness; salmon should flake easily. 7. Serve hot, drizzled with remaining glaze. 8. Enjoy your healthy meal!

title: Soy Sauce Fried Eggs
description: This recipe for Soy Sauce Fried Eggs is a simple yet flavorful twist on traditional fried eggs, made aromatic and crunchy with soy sauce, aromatics, and a hint of chili. Serve it over rice, noodles, or toast for an unforgettable meal!
ingredients_text: eggs, soy sauce, aromatics, chili, rice or noodles or toast
instructions_text: 1. Heat oil in a pan. 2. Crack eggs into the pan. 3. Fry until edges are crispy. 4. Drizzle soy sauce over the eggs. 5. Add aromatics and chili. 6. Cook for another minute. 7. Serve over rice, noodles, or toast. 8. Enjoy your flavorful meal!

title: French Onion Green Bean Casserole
description: A from-scratch, no canned soup green bean casserole with cozy French onion flavor. An elevated Thanksgiving side dish that still feels classic, and it’s perfect for make-ahead prep.
ingredients_text: green beans, French onion, breadcrumbs, cheese, garlic, onion, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Sauté onions and garlic in butter until caramelized. 3. Blanch green beans until tender. 4. Mix green beans with onion mixture and cheese. 5. Transfer to a baking dish and top with breadcrumbs. 6. Bake until golden and bubbly. 7. Let cool slightly before serving. 8. Enjoy as a side dish.

title: Mashed Potato Casserole
description: Mashed potato casserole is the ultimate holiday side dish. It's creamy, fluffy, and oh so cheesy. The recipe begins with classic mashed potatoes, infused with milk and butter with fresh thyme and bay leaves.
ingredients_text: mashed potatoes, milk, butter, fresh thyme, bay leaves, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare classic mashed potatoes. 3. Mix in milk, butter, thyme, and bay leaves. 4. Transfer to a baking dish. 5. Top with cheese. 6. Bake until golden and bubbly. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Summertime Watermelon Peach Salad
description: A refreshing summer salad featuring sweet peaches and juicy watermelon, paired with a lime vinaigrette and topped with mint and feta.
ingredients_text: sweet peaches, juicy watermelon, lime vinaigrette, mint, feta
instructions_text: 1. Cut peaches and watermelon into bite-sized pieces. 2. In a bowl, combine the fruits. 3. Drizzle with lime vinaigrette. 4. Toss gently to combine. 5. Top with crumbled feta and fresh mint. 6. Serve chilled. 7. Enjoy as a refreshing summer dish.

title: Sweet Italian Sausage & Broccoli Rabe Orecchiette
description: ✨Sweet Italian Sausage & Broccoli Rabe Orecchiette✨ I was craving something healthy and decided to make this classic. The chicken stock adds so much flavor and helps to remove the bitterness of the broccoli rabe. And I used lots and lots of parm 🧀🥦 Full recipe at the link in my bio!
ingredients_text: sweet Italian sausage, broccoli rabe, orecchiette, chicken stock, parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook orecchiette according to package instructions. 2. In a skillet, cook sweet Italian sausage until browned. 3. Add chopped broccoli rabe to the skillet and sauté. 4. Pour in chicken stock and simmer to reduce bitterness. 5. Combine cooked orecchiette with the sausage and broccoli rabe. 6. Stir in grated parmesan cheese. 7. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 8. Serve warm and enjoy!

title: Cheesy Beef Mushroom Pita & Tzatziki
description: A delicious and hearty dish featuring beef, mushrooms, and a blend of cheeses served in warm pita bread with fresh tzatziki sauce.
ingredients_text: beef, mushrooms, cheese blend, pita bread, tzatziki sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook beef in a skillet until browned. 2. Add mushrooms and sauté until tender. 3. Mix in cheese until melted. 4. Warm pita bread in the oven. 5. Fill pita with beef and mushroom mixture. 6. Serve with fresh tzatziki sauce. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your hearty lunch!

title: Jack-O'-Lantern Sandwich Cookies
description: Pumpkin spice sugar cookies get sandwiched together with a cream cheese frosting for a perfect fall dessert. Carve a Jack-O'-Lantern into them for an adorable Halloween treat everyone will love.
ingredients_text: pumpkin spice, sugar, cream cheese, flour, butter, eggs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix pumpkin spice and sugar. 3. Cream butter and sugar together. 4. Add eggs and mix well. 5. Gradually add flour and spices. 6. Shape into cookies and bake. 7. Cool cookies. 8. Sandwich with cream cheese frosting.

title: JalapeñO Popper Creamy Cauliflower Rice With Crispy Air Fried Chicken
description: Enjoy this lower-carb dish that combines creamy jalapeño popper-inspired cauliflower rice topped with crispy air-fried chicken. It's a delightful blend of flavors and textures that's sure to please!
ingredients_text: cauliflower rice, jalapeños, cream cheese, chicken, breadcrumbs, spices
instructions_text: 1. Prepare cauliflower rice and mix with cream cheese and jalapeños. 2. Season chicken and coat with breadcrumbs. 3. Preheat air fryer. 4. Cook chicken in air fryer until crispy. 5. Serve chicken over creamy cauliflower rice. 6. Garnish with additional jalapeños if desired. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Flan de Baileys
description: Este flan combina lo clásico con un toque inesperado, tiene la textura delicada de un postre casero con un sabor cremoso de licor que transforma lo cotidiano en algo especial.
ingredients_text: Baileys, eggs, sugar, milk, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Whisk eggs and sugar together. 3. Add milk and Baileys, mix well. 4. Pour mixture into a baking dish. 5. Bake in a water bath for 90 minutes. 6. Let cool, then refrigerate. 7. Serve chilled. 8. Enjoy your creamy flan.

title: Gochujang Egg Rice Pancake
description: A savory and spicy pancake made with rice, eggs, and gochujang for a flavorful brunch or breakfast treat.
ingredients_text: rice, eggs, gochujang
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice and let it cool. 2. In a bowl, mix rice, eggs, and gochujang. 3. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. 4. Pour the mixture into the pan, spreading it evenly. 5. Cook until golden brown on one side. 6. Flip and cook the other side until golden. 7. Remove from pan and slice. 8. Serve warm.

title: Loaded Pea, Leek & Zucchini Soup
description: This nourishing Loaded Pea, Leek & Zucchini Soup is a high protein vegetarian dish that doesn’t skimp on flavor. Perfect for making ahead, taking to work, or freezing for longer storage!
ingredients_text: peas, leeks, zucchini, vegetable broth, salt, pepper, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Heat olive oil in a pot. 2. Sauté leeks until soft. 3. Add zucchini and peas, cook for a few minutes. 4. Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a boil. 5. Simmer for 10 minutes. 6. Blend the soup until smooth. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve warm.

title: Gazpacho de Aguacate
description: Una sopa fría refrescante hecha con aguacate, pepino y un toque picante de jalapeño. Perfecta para una comida ligera y deliciosa.
ingredients_text: avocado, cucumber, jalapeño
instructions_text: 1. Blend avocado, cucumber, and jalapeño until smooth. 2. Chill in the refrigerator. 3. Serve cold. 4. Garnish with additional cucumber if desired.

title: Cilantro Lime Salmon With Avocado Salsa
description: Easy, delicious and packed with flavor! This salmon dish is one of our go-to meals during the week! Featuring salmon fillets baked in a tangy cilantro-lime sauce then topped with a zesty, creamy avocado salsa. It’s a simple and healthy meal ready in less than 30 minutes!
ingredients_text: salmon fillets, cilantro, lime juice, avocado, onion, tomato, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). 2. In a bowl, mix cilantro, lime juice, salt, and pepper. 3. Place salmon fillets in a baking dish and pour the cilantro-lime mixture over them. 4. Bake for 20 minutes or until cooked through. 5. While salmon is baking, prepare avocado salsa by combining diced avocado, onion, tomato, lime juice, salt, and pepper. 6. Remove salmon from the oven and let it rest. 7. Top the salmon with avocado salsa before serving. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Frozen Carajillo
description: This Frozen Carajillo is an irresistible blend of rich, smooth vanilla ice cream and bold espresso, elevated with aromatic vanilla liqueur and the unique warmth of Teremana Tequila Reposado. It's a luxurious, adults-only treat that brings a playful twist to your classic coffee cocktail.
ingredients_text: vanilla ice cream, espresso, vanilla liqueur, Teremana Tequila Reposado
instructions_text: 1. Brew espresso and let it cool. 2. In a blender, combine vanilla ice cream, cooled espresso, vanilla liqueur, and tequila. 3. Blend until smooth. 4. Taste and adjust sweetness if necessary. 5. Pour into glasses. 6. Garnish with coffee beans or chocolate shavings if desired. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your frozen treat!

title: Corn Cucumber Tomato Salad
description: This vibrant Corn Cucumber Tomato Salad is a perfect summer salad that’s refreshing, juicy, and loaded with seasonal flavors. It's served with a spicy agave lime vinaigrette, making it an easy, plant-based highlight for any barbecue, potluck, or meal prep.
ingredients_text: corn, cucumber, tomato, agave, lime, spices
instructions_text: 1. In a large bowl, combine corn, cucumber, and tomato. 2. In a separate bowl, whisk together agave, lime juice, and spices. 3. Pour the vinaigrette over the salad. 4. Toss gently to combine. 5. Let it sit for a few minutes to marinate. 6. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 7. Enjoy as a side dish or light meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Thanksgiving Sweet Potato Gratin
description: Sweet potatoes layered with cheese and a herby cream sauce, baked until golden brown and bubbly.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, cheese, herby cream sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Slice sweet potatoes. 3. Layer sweet potatoes with cheese. 4. Pour herby cream sauce over layers. 5. Cover with foil and bake. 6. Remove foil and bake until golden. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

title: Honey Mustard Chicken Salad Sandwich
description: A flavorful chicken salad sandwich with honey, mustard, banana peppers, arugula, and freshly shaved Parmesan. Great for using leftover turkey.
ingredients_text: chicken, honey, mustard, banana peppers, arugula, Parmesan, bread
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken and let it cool. 2. In a bowl, mix honey and mustard. 3. Shred the chicken and add to the bowl. 4. Stir in banana peppers and arugula. 5. Spread the mixture on bread. 6. Top with shaved Parmesan. 7. Close the sandwich and cut in half. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Cauliflower Salad With Lemon-Dill-Caper Dressing
description: A flavorful roasted cauliflower salad topped with feta, sun-dried tomatoes, and a sweet & zesty lemon-dill-caper dressing using high-quality oils.
ingredients_text: cauliflower, feta cheese, sun-dried tomatoes, lemon, dill, capers, high-quality oils
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking sheet. 2. Cut cauliflower into florets and toss with oil. 3. Roast cauliflower until golden. 4. Prepare the dressing by mixing lemon, dill, and capers. 5. Combine roasted cauliflower with feta and sun-dried tomatoes. 6. Drizzle dressing over the salad. 7. Toss gently to combine. 8. Serve warm or at room temperature.

title: Classic Potato Salad
description: A classic all-American potato salad with tender potatoes, crunchy celery, and briny dill pickles.
ingredients_text: tender potatoes, crunchy celery, briny dill pickles
instructions_text: 1. Boil the potatoes until tender. 2. Chop the celery and dill pickles. 3. In a bowl, combine potatoes, celery, and pickles. 4. Mix in mayonnaise and season with salt and pepper. 5. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes. 6. Serve cold. 7. Garnish with fresh dill if desired. 8. Enjoy your classic potato salad.

title: Charred Corn And Zucchini Orzo Salad
description: This easy orzo salad is packed with summer veggies and a bright lemon vinaigrette.
ingredients_text: orzo, corn, zucchini, lemon, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook orzo according to package instructions. 2. Grill corn and zucchini until charred. 3. In a bowl, combine cooked orzo, corn, and zucchini. 4. Whisk together lemon juice and olive oil. 5. Pour vinaigrette over salad. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Toss to combine. 8. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

title: Best Steak & Eggs Recipe
description: Steak & Eggs is a classic dish, perfect for any meal, any day—here's the best way to make it.
ingredients_text: steak, eggs, salt, pepper, oil
instructions_text: 1. Season the steak with salt and pepper. 2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. 3. Cook the steak to desired doneness. 4. Remove steak and let it rest. 5. In the same skillet, crack eggs and cook to preference. 6. Slice the steak. 7. Serve steak with eggs on the side. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Roasted Red Pepper & Farmers Cheese Pasta Salad
description: A refreshing pasta salad with roasted red peppers, farmers cheese, fresh basil, and a tangy balsamic vinaigrette, perfect for summer BBQs.
ingredients_text: pasta, roasted red peppers, farmers cheese, fresh basil, balsamic vinaigrette
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Roast red peppers until charred. 3. In a bowl, combine cooked pasta, chopped roasted peppers, and farmers cheese. 4. Add fresh basil and balsamic vinaigrette. 5. Toss gently to combine. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Chill in the refrigerator for 15 minutes. 8. Serve cold.

title: Giant Club Sandwich
description: With the state of the world right now I feel like making a club sandwich is the most responsibility I can take on at the moment. Here’s how you can birth a sandwich too. This giant club sandwich is perfect for a hearty meal, loaded with flavorful grilled chicken, crispy bacon, fresh vegetables, and a hint of tarragon in the mayo. Serve it with salty crisps and a cold Coke for the perfect finish.
ingredients_text: grilled chicken, crispy bacon, fresh vegetables, tarragon mayo, salty crisps, Coke
instructions_text: 1. Grill the chicken until cooked through. 2. Cook the bacon until crispy. 3. Prepare the tarragon mayo. 4. Layer grilled chicken, bacon, and vegetables on bread. 5. Spread tarragon mayo on each layer. 6. Assemble the sandwich. 7. Serve with salty crisps. 8. Enjoy with a cold Coke.

title: Vegan Zucchini Toast
description: A simple and healthy vegan breakfast with air-fried zucchini piled on sourdough toast, topped with a spicy kick.
ingredients_text: zucchini, sourdough bread, spices
instructions_text: 1. Preheat air fryer. 2. Slice zucchini and season with spices. 3. Air-fry zucchini until tender. 4. Toast sourdough bread. 5. Pile air-fried zucchini on toast. 6. Add additional toppings if desired. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your healthy breakfast.

title: Vegetarian Corn Carbonara
description: CORN CARBONARA made with @peteandgerrys organic free range eggs #PeteAndGerrysPartner— far from the traditional, this vegetarian version of the classic, sans meat, uses sweet, caramelized corn kernels for a smoky and complex flavor foundation. The result is a perfectly summery pasta: quick, luscious and packed with flavor thanks to the delicious @peteandgerrys eggs.
ingredients_text: pasta, corn kernels, organic free range eggs, salt, pepper, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat olive oil and add corn kernels. 3. Sauté until caramelized. 4. In a bowl, whisk eggs with salt and pepper. 5. Combine cooked pasta with corn and egg mixture. 6. Toss until creamy. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your vegetarian corn carbonara!

title: One-Pan Caprese Chicken Bites
description: A bright and flavorful one-pan dish featuring juicy chicken, burst cherry tomatoes, melted mozzarella, and a savory balsamic glaze.
ingredients_text: juicy chicken, burst cherry tomatoes, melted mozzarella, savory balsamic glaze
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Arrange chicken bites in a pan. 3. Add cherry tomatoes around the chicken. 4. Top with mozzarella. 5. Drizzle with balsamic glaze. 6. Bake until chicken is cooked through. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Healthy Rice Paper Egg Wrap
description: A quick and healthy rice paper egg wrap that combines the freshness of cilantro and carrots with scallions wrapped in a crispy rice paper shell, perfect for a light meal or snack.
ingredients_text: rice paper, eggs, cilantro, carrots, scallions
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the rice paper according to package instructions. 2. Scramble the eggs in a pan. 3. Chop cilantro, carrots, and scallions. 4. Lay the rice paper flat. 5. Add scrambled eggs and vegetables to the center. 6. Fold the rice paper over the filling. 7. Serve immediately or chill for later. 8. Enjoy as a light meal or snack.

title: Greek Split Pea Spread
description: Originally, this Greek spread called fava (which is similar to hummus) was made out of fava beans—hence its name. With time, the beans were replaced with dried yellow split peas grown in Santorini, considered the best of their kind because of the island’s volcanic soil. The peas are rich in plant-based protein, nutritious fiber, vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants. If you buy the dried peas in a sealed package, choose one with an expiration date as far out as possible, and if you buy the peas in bulk, be sure there is high turnover at the store. The cooking time for dried peas that aren’t fresh is much longer, and they have an off-putting aftertaste.
ingredients_text: dried yellow split peas, water, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Rinse the split peas and soak them in water. 2. Boil the peas in fresh water until tender. 3. Drain the peas and let them cool. 4. Blend the peas with olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and pepper until smooth. 5. Adjust seasoning to taste. 6. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 7. Store in an airtight container in the fridge. 8. Enjoy as a spread or dip.

title: Greek Eggplant Spread
description: The Greeks consider this dish a salad, but its consistency is much more akin to a spread. There are dozens of variations on melitzanosalata in Balkan cuisine, but this version is authentically Greek. Roasting the eggplant over an open fire makes all the difference in this recipe, giving the salad its characteristic deep charred flavor. The roasted eggplant is then chopped by hand (never in a food processor!) to retain a chunky texture, ensuring that every bite has a slightly different mouthfeel than the one before.
ingredients_text: eggplant, olive oil, garlic, lemon juice, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Roast the eggplant over an open fire until charred. 2. Let it cool, then peel off the skin. 3. Chop the roasted eggplant by hand. 4. Mix in olive oil, minced garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper. 5. Adjust seasoning to taste. 6. Serve as a spread with bread or crackers. 7. Store leftovers in the refrigerator. 8. Enjoy with fresh vegetables.

title: Fried Squash Blossom "Mozzarella Sticks"
description: Squash blossoms are a true gift of summer. They're only around for a brief moment during the season, so whenever I see them at the market, I scoop them up and make something special. Fried squash blossoms are often filled with creamy cheeses like ricotta, as we are doing here, but in this case, the ricotta is used merely as a binder for the shredded mozzarella. The end result is a mash-up of a classic, creamy, cheese-filled blossom and a stringy, pull-y mozzarella stick. Truly a delight! I have included a simple tomato sauce recipe here for dipping, but warm up your favorite store-bought marinara to make this even quicker and easier if you'd like.
ingredients_text: squash blossoms, ricotta cheese, shredded mozzarella, tomato sauce
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the squash blossoms by cleaning and removing the stems. 2. In a bowl, mix ricotta and shredded mozzarella. 3. Stuff each blossom with the cheese mixture. 4. Heat oil in a frying pan. 5. Dip stuffed blossoms in batter and fry until golden. 6. Serve with tomato sauce for dipping. 7. Optionally, warm up store-bought marinara. 8. Enjoy your fried mozzarella sticks!

title: Crunchy Miso Salmon Bites
description: These miso salmon bites are cooked under the broiler in 8 minutes, resulting in a crunchy outside and a melt-in-your-mouth texture. Serve with cooked rice and chives for a quick and delicious dinner.
ingredients_text: salmon, miso paste, chives, rice
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the broiler. 2. Prepare the miso paste and coat the salmon bites. 3. Place salmon under the broiler. 4. Cook for 8 minutes until crunchy. 5. Serve with cooked rice. 6. Garnish with chives. 7. Enjoy your meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Mashed Sweet Potatoes With Aleppo Pepper And Crème Fraîche
description: Roasted sweet potatoes mashed with a flavorful butter mixture and crème fraîche, seasoned with Aleppo pepper.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, butter, crème fraîche, Aleppo pepper, salt
instructions_text: 1. Roast sweet potatoes until tender. 2. Mash the roasted sweet potatoes. 3. In a pan, melt butter and mix with Aleppo pepper. 4. Stir the butter mixture into the mashed sweet potatoes. 5. Add crème fraîche and mix well. 6. Season with salt to taste. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your flavorful dish.

title: Creamy Lemon White Bean & Rice Soup
description: A vegetarian spin on Greek Avgolemono soup made with white beans. The creaminess is achieved by whisking eggs together with lemon and broth, adding thickness and brightness to the soup.
ingredients_text: white beans, rice, eggs, lemon, broth, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. In a pot, combine white beans and broth. 3. Whisk eggs and lemon juice in a bowl. 4. Gradually add hot broth to egg mixture, whisking constantly. 5. Stir the egg mixture into the pot with beans. 6. Add cooked rice and season with salt and pepper. 7. Heat gently until thickened. 8. Serve warm.

title: Sweet Peach + Beet Salad
description: A refreshing summer salad with earthy beets and juicy peaches, topped with creamy stracciatella. Perfect for a cool, nutritious meal during a heatwave.
ingredients_text: beets, peaches, stracciatella, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Roast the beets until tender. 2. Let the beets cool and peel them. 3. Slice the beets and peaches. 4. Arrange the beets and peaches on a plate. 5. Top with stracciatella. 6. Drizzle with olive oil. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve chilled.

title: The Best Thanksgiving Sandwich
description: A delicious fall sandwich & a great way to use up extra turkey and cranberry sauce on Thanksgiving!
ingredients_text: turkey, cranberry sauce, bread, lettuce, mayonnaise, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Toast the bread. 2. Layer turkey and cranberry sauce on one slice. 3. Add lettuce. 4. Spread mayonnaise on another slice. 5. Close the sandwich. 6. Cut in half. 7. Serve with extra cranberry sauce. 8. Enjoy your Thanksgiving flavors!

title: Salmon Tacos with Avocado Crema
description: These fully-loaded fish tacos feature smoky-sweet spice-rubbed salmon, a simple avocado-jalapeño cream, pickled red onion, and shredded cabbage for crunch. Nutritious and brimming with bold, fresh flavors.
ingredients_text: salmon, avocado, jalapeño, pickled red onion, shredded cabbage, spices
instructions_text: 1. Rub salmon with spices and grill until cooked. 2. Blend avocado and jalapeño to make crema. 3. Prepare pickled red onion. 4. Shred cabbage. 5. Assemble tacos with salmon, crema, onion, and cabbage. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your flavorful tacos. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Lemon Blueberry Cheesecake Cookies
description: Tastes like cheesecake and summer sunshine!
ingredients_text: flour, sugar, butter, cream cheese, lemon juice, blueberries, eggs, baking powder, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cream together butter and sugar. 3. Add cream cheese and lemon juice, mix well. 4. Fold in flour, baking powder, and blueberries. 5. Scoop dough onto baking sheets. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Let cool on wire racks. 8. Serve and enjoy!

title: Burrata Frita Con Ensalada De Durazno
description: BURRATA FRITA CON ENSALA DE DURAZNO🍑✨ Es la entrada perfecta para este verano!! Queda deliciosa😍 aquí te dejo la receta👇🏻💛
ingredients_text: burrata cheese, peaches, salad greens, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Heat oil in a pan. 2. Coat burrata in flour and fry until golden. 3. Slice peaches. 4. Toss salad greens with olive oil, salt, and pepper. 5. Arrange salad on a plate. 6. Place fried burrata on top. 7. Garnish with peach slices. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Cherry Tomato Bruschetta Pasta Salad
description: Bruschetta, but make it pasta salad! Marinated cherry tomatoes, mozzarella and basil add the perfect summery flavor to this pasta. It tastes exactly like tomato bruschetta but with pasta!
ingredients_text: pasta, cherry tomatoes, mozzarella, basil, olive oil, balsamic vinegar, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a bowl, combine cherry tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil. 3. Drizzle with olive oil and balsamic vinegar. 4. Season with salt and pepper. 5. Toss cooked pasta with the tomato mixture. 6. Let it marinate for 10 minutes. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your refreshing pasta salad!

title: Simple Angel Hair Pasta
description: A quick and easy angel hair pasta dish with a luscious butter and blistered cherry tomato sauce. Perfect for a summer meal.
ingredients_text: angel hair pasta, butter, cherry tomatoes, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Boil water and cook angel hair pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, melt butter over medium heat. 3. Add blistered cherry tomatoes and sauté until soft. 4. Season with salt and pepper. 5. Drain pasta and add to the pan. 6. Toss to combine. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: One-Pot Tomato Chicken Garlic Pasta
description: Comforting and easy One-Pot Tomato Chicken Garlic Pasta — full of juicy chicken, garlicky tomato goodness, and creamy pasta all made in one pan!
ingredients_text: pasta, chicken, tomatoes, garlic, cream
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken in a pot until browned. 2. Add garlic and sauté until fragrant. 3. Stir in tomatoes and pasta. 4. Pour in water or broth. 5. Bring to a boil, then simmer until pasta is cooked. 6. Stir in cream for richness. 7. Season to taste. 8. Serve hot.

title: Caramelized Onion and Garlic Spaghetti
description: Caramelized Onion and Garlic Spaghetti, creamy, savory, and satisfying in every bite.
ingredients_text: spaghetti, onions, garlic, cream, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat olive oil and sauté onions until caramelized. 3. Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant. 4. Stir in cream and season with salt and pepper. 5. Combine cooked spaghetti with the sauce. 6. Toss well to coat. 7. Serve warm. 8. Garnish with herbs if desired.

title: Creamiest Oven-Baked Eggs With Boursin Cheese
description: Enjoy the creamiest, most delicious eggs enriched with Boursin cheese and fresh greens. Baked to perfection in the oven, this dish is quick, easy, and loaded with flavor.
ingredients_text: eggs, Boursin cheese, fresh greens
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Whisk eggs in a bowl. 3. Stir in Boursin cheese and chopped greens. 4. Pour mixture into a baking dish. 5. Bake until set and golden. 6. Let cool slightly. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your creamy baked eggs.

title: Juicy Baked Salmon With Sun-Dried Tomatoes, Feta, And Capers
description: Tender, melt-in-your-mouth salmon fillets topped with a vibrant Mediterranean-inspired mixture of tangy sun-dried tomatoes, creamy crumbled feta, briny capers, and zesty lemon. The result is a perfectly juicy, succulent fish that’s bursting with savory, herby goodness.
ingredients_text: salmon fillets, sun-dried tomatoes, feta cheese, capers, lemon
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). 2. Place salmon fillets on a baking sheet. 3. Top with sun-dried tomatoes, crumbled feta, and capers. 4. Squeeze lemon juice over the top. 5. Season with salt and pepper. 6. Bake for 20-25 minutes until salmon is cooked through. 7. Remove from oven and let rest for a few minutes. 8. Serve warm.

title: Pea, Zucchini & Goat’S Cheese Fritters
description: A delightful and versatile dish, perfect for brunch, lunch, dinner or to be made ahead for lunchboxes and picnics!
ingredients_text: peas, zucchini, goat's cheese, flour, eggs, salt, pepper, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Grate zucchini and squeeze out excess moisture. 2. In a bowl, mix peas, zucchini, goat's cheese, flour, and eggs. 3. Season with salt, pepper, and herbs. 4. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. 5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture into the pan. 6. Fry until golden brown on both sides. 7. Remove and drain on paper towels. 8. Serve warm or at room temperature.

title: Spicy Potatoes & Crispy Chickpeas
description: This delicious, vegetarian dish combines spicy chickpeas and crispy potatoes, served with creamy labne and fresh arugula. It's perfect accompanied by pita bread or chips.
ingredients_text: spicy chickpeas, crispy potatoes, creamy labne, fresh arugula, pita bread or chips
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and prepare baking sheets. 2. Season chickpeas and potatoes with spices. 3. Bake potatoes until crispy. 4. Roast chickpeas until golden. 5. Serve potatoes and chickpeas with labne. 6. Garnish with arugula. 7. Accompany with pita bread or chips. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: High Protein Chilli Cheese Toasts
description: High Protein Chilli Cheese Toasts. If you need a quick healthy high-protein toast idea, you have to try these chilli cheese cottage cheese toasts. Inspired by a popular Indian street food, they are addictive and make the best quick breakfast, lunch, or snack.
ingredients_text: cottage cheese, bread, chili powder, cheese, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the grill. 2. Mix cottage cheese with chili powder, salt, and pepper. 3. Spread the mixture on bread slices. 4. Top with cheese. 5. Grill until cheese melts. 6. Remove from grill. 7. Cut into pieces. 8. Serve warm.

title: Spicy Feta Butterbean & Chicken Prepable Salad
description: This is a prep-friendly salad inspired by the Greek dip Tirokafteri. It's spicy, saucy, and packed with nutrients, perfect for summer meals or meal prepping.
ingredients_text: feta cheese, butterbeans, chicken, spices, olive oil, herbs, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook the chicken until fully done. 2. In a bowl, mix feta cheese with spices and olive oil. 3. Add cooked chicken and butterbeans to the mixture. 4. Stir in chopped vegetables and herbs. 5. Adjust seasoning to taste. 6. Serve immediately or refrigerate for meal prep. 7. Enjoy as a salad or dip. 8. Store leftovers in an airtight container.

title: Creamy French Onion Scalloped Potatoes
description: Rich, cheesy, and bubbling with caramelized onions, this is the perfect make-ahead holiday side dish with a creamy twist.
ingredients_text: potatoes, caramelized onions, cheese, cream, butter, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Slice the potatoes and onions. 3. In a pan, caramelize the onions. 4. Layer potatoes and onions in a baking dish. 5. Pour cream and sprinkle cheese over layers. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Bake until golden and bubbly. 8. Let cool slightly before serving.

title: McChicken Sandwich
ingredients_text: chicken patties, sandwich buns, lettuce, mayonnaise, pickles
instructions_text: 1. Prepare chicken patties by seasoning and frying them. 2. Toast sandwich buns until golden. 3. Spread mayonnaise on the bottom bun. 4. Add lettuce and pickles. 5. Place the fried chicken patty on top. 6. Cover with the top bun. 7. Serve with fries or a side salad. 8. Enjoy your McChicken sandwich.

title: Stanley Tucci Pasta E Fagioli Soup
description: The viral Stanley Tucci Pasta E Fagioli Soup feels like a cozy sweater! It is beauty, it is grace. It scores a solid 9/10 in the soup stratosphere. This version includes leeks instead of celery and chickpeas instead of cannellini beans for a rich broth and thick soup base.
ingredients_text: leeks, chickpeas, broth, pasta, spices
instructions_text: 1. Sauté leeks in a pot until soft. 2. Add chickpeas and broth, bringing to a simmer. 3. Stir in pasta and cook until tender. 4. Season with spices to taste. 5. Serve hot, garnished as desired.

title: Creamy Cajun Steak Tagliatelle
description: A cozy, creamy Cajun pasta topped with perfectly seared steak — the ultimate date-night dish. Rich, spicy, comforting, and shockingly easy to make at home.
ingredients_text: tagliatelle, steak, cream, Cajun seasoning, garlic, onion, parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook tagliatelle according to package instructions. 2. Season steak with Cajun seasoning and sear in a hot pan. 3. Remove steak and let it rest. 4. In the same pan, sauté garlic and onion. 5. Add cream and parmesan, stirring until combined. 6. Toss cooked tagliatelle in the sauce. 7. Slice steak and serve on top of pasta. 8. Garnish with extra Cajun seasoning if desired.

title: Pan-Fried Tilapia with Avocado Salsa
description: A quick and flavorful pan-fried tilapia topped with fresh avocado salsa, offering a taste reminiscent of fish tacos.
ingredients_text: tilapia, avocado, lime, onion, cilantro, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Season tilapia with salt and pepper. 2. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. 3. Cook tilapia for 4-5 minutes on each side until golden. 4. In a bowl, mix diced avocado, lime juice, onion, cilantro, salt. 5. Top cooked tilapia with avocado salsa. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your meal! 8. Optional: Serve with tortillas.

title: Smashed Gnocchi Caprese Salad
description: Smashed Gnocchi Caprese Salad. Summer means all things caprese, and this smashed gnocchi salad is an absolute must. If you haven’t tried smashed gnocchi before, you’re in for a delicious crunchy treat that pairs perfectly with burst tomatoes, mozzarella, and basil. Give this one a try—it's super simple and super tasty.
ingredients_text: smashed gnocchi, burst tomatoes, mozzarella, basil
instructions_text: 1. Boil the gnocchi until they float. 2. Smash the gnocchi gently. 3. Roast burst tomatoes in the oven. 4. Combine smashed gnocchi with roasted tomatoes. 5. Add mozzarella and fresh basil. 6. Drizzle with olive oil. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve warm or at room temperature.

title: Steak Bites With Garlic Butter Rice
description: A simple beef recipe featuring bite-sized steak pieces served with garlic butter rice.
ingredients_text: bite-sized steak pieces, garlic, butter, rice
instructions_text: 1. Heat a skillet over medium heat. 2. Add steak pieces and cook until browned. 3. In a separate pot, cook rice according to package instructions. 4. In the skillet, add garlic and butter to the steak. 5. Stir until garlic is fragrant. 6. Combine cooked rice with the steak mixture. 7. Season to taste. 8. Serve warm.

title: Steak Au Poivre With Garlic Parmesan Mashed Potatoes
description: A perfect dinner to impress someone special or to enjoy a nice dinner at home, featuring a seasoned steak, creamy garlic parmesan mashed potatoes, and sautéed green beans.
ingredients_text: steak, garlic, parmesan, potatoes, green beans, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Season the steak with salt and pepper. 2. Grill the steak to desired doneness. 3. Boil potatoes until tender. 4. Mash potatoes with garlic and parmesan. 5. Sauté green beans until tender. 6. Serve steak with mashed potatoes and green beans. 7. Drizzle with any pan juices. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Creamy Garlic Butter Steak Bites
description: Delicious steak bites cooked in a creamy garlic butter sauce, featuring @rockstar.kitchen seasoning.
ingredients_text: steak bites, garlic, butter, seasoning
instructions_text: 1. Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. 2. Add butter and minced garlic, sauté until fragrant. 3. Add steak bites and season. 4. Cook until browned on all sides. 5. Pour in cream and stir to combine. 6. Simmer until sauce thickens. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your creamy garlic butter steak bites.

title: Sausage, Egg & Cheese Sliders With Breakfast Sauce
description: Delicious breakfast sliders made with sausage, egg, and cheese, served with a homemade breakfast sauce.
ingredients_text: sausage, egg, cheese, breakfast sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the sausage in a skillet. 3. Scramble the eggs in a separate pan. 4. Assemble sliders with sausage, egg, and cheese. 5. Bake until cheese is melted. 6. Prepare the breakfast sauce. 7. Serve sliders with sauce. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Steak Chimichurri Sandwich
description: This sandwich comes together with pickled onions, garlic aioli, and a golden brown ciabatta roll.
ingredients_text: ciabatta rolls, pickled onions, garlic aioli, steak
instructions_text: 1. Grill the steak to desired doneness. 2. Prepare garlic aioli. 3. Slice ciabatta rolls. 4. Assemble sandwich with steak, pickled onions, and aioli. 5. Toast the sandwich if desired. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy your meal.

title: Thai Steak Bowl
description: Bright, tangy, and packed with umami — this Thai Steak Bowl is the perfect mix of juicy steak and a zesty herb-forward sauce. Simple to make, big on flavor!
ingredients_text: juicy steak, zesty herb-forward sauce
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the steak by seasoning it. 2. Grill or cook the steak on the stovetop to desired doneness. 3. Let the steak rest before slicing. 4. Mix the ingredients for the herb-forward sauce. 5. Slice the steak thinly. 6. Assemble the bowl with steak and sauce. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your flavorful Thai Steak Bowl.

title: Italian Grinder Sliders
description: Italian Grinder Sliders!! The best little bite for a crowd. Perfect for parties or a fun dinner option. These sliders combine rich meats with a fresh grinder salad.
ingredients_text: various meats, slider buns, lettuce, tomatoes, onions, Italian dressing
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the slider buns. 3. Layer the meats on the buns. 4. Add the grinder salad on top. 5. Drizzle with Italian dressing. 6. Bake until heated through. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy with friends!

title: Cheesesteak Crescent Rolls
ingredients_text: crescent roll dough, sliced steak, cheese, bell peppers, onions
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven as per crescent roll package instructions. 2. Sauté bell peppers and onions until soft. 3. Cook sliced steak until browned. 4. Roll out crescent dough and place steak mixture inside. 5. Top with cheese and roll up. 6. Bake according to package instructions. 7. Let cool slightly before serving. 8. Enjoy warm.

title: Honey Butter Katsu Musubi
description: Honey Butter Katsu Musubi combines crispy chicken katsu with a sweet and spicy hot honey butter glaze, layered with rice and furikake, wrapped in nori for a delightful, portable snack.
ingredients_text: crispy chicken katsu, honey, butter, rice, furikake, nori
instructions_text: 1. Prepare chicken katsu by frying until crispy. 2. Mix honey and butter to create the glaze. 3. Cook rice according to package instructions. 4. Layer rice, katsu, and furikake. 5. Drizzle with honey butter glaze. 6. Wrap the layers in nori. 7. Slice into portions. 8. Serve as a portable snack.

title: Ceviche Estilo "Thai" Con Jengibre, Mango Y Coco
description: Este ceviche estilo "Thai" está lleno de sabores vibrantes y refrescantes, perfecto para disfrutar en verano. Con una mezcla de huachinango marinado en jugo de limón y naranja, combinado con mango, albahaca, néctar de coco y un toque de jengibre fresco, ofrece un delicioso equilibrio de dulce, ácido y picante.
ingredients_text: huachinango, limón, naranja, mango, albahaca, néctar de coco, jengibre fresco
instructions_text: 1. Marinate huachinango in lime and orange juice. 2. Dice mango and mix with marinated fish. 3. Add chopped basil and coconut nectar. 4. Grate fresh ginger and incorporate. 5. Mix well to combine flavors. 6. Chill in the refrigerator for 20 minutes. 7. Serve cold. 8. Garnish with additional basil if desired.

title: Chicken Avocado Sandwich
description: A delightful sandwich featuring tender marinated chicken, creamy avocado, and flavorful lemon garlic aioli, all on crispy Kaiser rolls.
ingredients_text: marinated chicken, avocado, lemon garlic aioli, Kaiser rolls
instructions_text: 1. Marinate the chicken. 2. Grill the chicken until cooked through. 3. Prepare the lemon garlic aioli. 4. Slice the avocado. 5. Toast the Kaiser rolls. 6. Assemble the sandwich with chicken, avocado, and aioli. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your delicious sandwich.

title: Comforting & Quick Baked Dumplings With Spicy Coconut Sauce
description: A comforting & quick dinner featuring baked dumplings in a spicy, creamy coconut sauce. Topped with sesame seeds, scallions, parsley, and chili crisp, this dish is perfect with rice or sautéed veggies.
ingredients_text: dumplings, spicy coconut sauce, sesame seeds, scallions, parsley, chili crisp, rice or sautéed veggies
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the dumplings. 2. Bake the dumplings until golden. 3. In a pan, heat the coconut sauce. 4. Add spices to the sauce for extra flavor. 5. Serve the dumplings topped with sauce. 6. Garnish with sesame seeds, scallions, and parsley. 7. Add chili crisp for heat. 8. Enjoy with rice or sautéed veggies.

title: Hot Honey Halloumi Pasta
description: A delicious blend of spicy and creamy flavors with hot honey halloumi and seasoned chicken, perfect for a quick and tasty meal.
ingredients_text: hot honey, halloumi, seasoned chicken, pasta
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, cook seasoned chicken until golden. 3. Add halloumi to the pan and cook until golden on both sides. 4. Combine cooked pasta with chicken and halloumi. 5. Drizzle hot honey over the pasta. 6. Toss to combine. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Spicy Chicken Caesar-Ish Salad
description: A spicy twist on the classic Caesar salad with a healthier spin, featuring juicy chicken breast, a creamy yogurt-based dressing, and a kick from pickled jalapeños. This salad maintains the classic Caesar elements while adding unique flavors and textures.
ingredients_text: juicy chicken breast, creamy yogurt-based dressing, pickled jalapeños, romaine lettuce, croutons, parmesan cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook the chicken breast until fully cooked. 2. Prepare the creamy yogurt-based dressing. 3. Toss the romaine lettuce with the dressing. 4. Add sliced chicken and pickled jalapeños. 5. Top with croutons and parmesan cheese. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your spicy twist on Caesar salad.

title: Pumpkin Butter Grilled Cheese Sandwich
description: A delicious grilled cheese sandwich stacked with tangy goat cheese, salty prosciutto, crisp apple slices, and melty muenster all on sourdough, smeared with Trader Joe’s seasonal pumpkin butter, then grilled until golden and buttery.
ingredients_text: sourdough bread, pumpkin butter, goat cheese, prosciutto, apple slices, muenster cheese
instructions_text: 1. Spread pumpkin butter on one side of each slice of sourdough. 2. Layer goat cheese, prosciutto, apple slices, and muenster on one slice. 3. Top with the other slice, buttered side out. 4. Heat a skillet over medium heat. 5. Grill the sandwich until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side. 6. Remove from heat and let cool slightly. 7. Slice in half and serve warm. 8. Enjoy your delicious grilled cheese!

title: Warm Quinoa Halloumi Salad With Crunchy Chickpeas
description: Warm Quinoa Halloumi Salad with Crunchy Chickpeas captures a mix of cozy and nourishing flavors. It's hearty, full of texture, and offers a satisfying meal experience. Perfect for any season.
ingredients_text: quinoa, halloumi cheese, chickpeas, olive oil, spices, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook quinoa according to package instructions. 2. Roast chickpeas with olive oil and spices until crunchy. 3. Grill or pan-fry halloumi until golden. 4. Combine quinoa, chickpeas, and halloumi in a bowl. 5. Add chopped vegetables. 6. Drizzle with olive oil. 7. Toss gently to mix. 8. Serve warm.

title: Viral Crispy Rice Salad With Salmon
description: A delicious and macro-friendly crispy rice salad with salmon, featuring a sweet chili sauce and fresh salad ingredients.
ingredients_text: crispy rice, salmon, sweet chili sauce, fresh salad ingredients
instructions_text: 1. Cook the rice until crispy. 2. Prepare the salmon by seasoning and cooking it. 3. Mix the crispy rice with fresh salad ingredients. 4. Drizzle sweet chili sauce over the salad. 5. Flake the salmon and add it to the salad. 6. Toss everything together gently. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your delicious salad!

title: Creamy Chicken Enchilada Skillet
description: A creamy and delicious chicken enchilada cooked in a skillet, served with a variety of toppings.
ingredients_text: chicken, enchilada sauce, cheese, tortillas, sour cream, toppings
instructions_text: 1. Cook chicken in a skillet until browned. 2. Add enchilada sauce and stir. 3. Mix in cheese until melted. 4. Layer tortillas on top. 5. Cook until heated through. 6. Serve with sour cream and toppings. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your creamy chicken enchilada.

title: Crispy Parmesan Orzo Salad With Orange Maple Vinaigrette
description: A flavorful harvest salad topped with crispy parmesan orzo and dressed with an orange maple vinaigrette. Perfect for Thanksgiving or any fall occasion.
ingredients_text: orzo, parmesan cheese, orange juice, maple syrup, olive oil, salt, pepper, mixed greens
instructions_text: 1. Cook orzo according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, bake orzo until crispy. 3. Whisk together orange juice, maple syrup, olive oil, salt, and pepper for the vinaigrette. 4. Toss mixed greens with vinaigrette. 5. Top greens with crispy orzo and parmesan. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy as a refreshing salad. 8. Perfect for Thanksgiving.

title: Crepes Di Zucchine
description: These zucchini crepes are light and delightful, perfect for a savory meal or snack. The batter is made by blending zucchini with flour, egg, and a touch of olive oil, then cooked to a gentle golden hue in a non-stick skillet.
ingredients_text: zucchini, flour, egg, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Blend zucchini, flour, egg, and olive oil to make the batter. 2. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. 3. Pour a ladle of batter into the skillet. 4. Cook until golden, about 2-3 minutes. 5. Flip and cook the other side for another 2-3 minutes. 6. Repeat with remaining batter. 7. Serve warm as a savory meal or snack. 8. Enjoy your delightful zucchini crepes!

title: Jalapeno Peach Ricotta Crostini
description: Jalapeño peach ricotta crostini appetizer with hot honey
ingredients_text: Jalapeños, peaches, ricotta cheese, hot honey, crostini
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Slice the crostini and arrange on a baking sheet. 3. Spread ricotta cheese on each slice. 4. Top with sliced jalapeños and peaches. 5. Drizzle with hot honey. 6. Bake until golden. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy as an appetizer.

title: Classic Apple Pie
description: A timeless homemade apple pie with a delicately spiced apple filling and a flaky crust. Perfect for gatherings like Thanksgiving.
ingredients_text: apples, sugar, cinnamon, nutmeg, flour, butter, salt, egg
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C). 2. Prepare the pie crust and place it in a pie dish. 3. Peel and slice the apples, then mix with sugar and spices. 4. Fill the crust with the apple mixture. 5. Cover with a top crust and cut slits for steam. 6. Bake for 45-50 minutes until golden. 7. Let cool before serving. 8. Enjoy with ice cream if desired.

title: Lemon Meringue
description: A heavenly lemon posset with meringue inspired by the spirit of Madrid.
ingredients_text: lemon juice, sugar, cream, egg yolks, egg whites
instructions_text: 1. In a saucepan, combine lemon juice, sugar, and cream. 2. Heat gently until sugar dissolves. 3. Whisk in egg yolks and cook until thickened. 4. Pour into serving dishes and chill. 5. Whip egg whites to stiff peaks. 6. Spread meringue over chilled lemon posset. 7. Bake until meringue is golden. 8. Serve chilled.

title: Upside Down Cherry Brown Butter Cornmeal Cake
description: A delightful new version of the peach cornmeal upside down cake featuring juicy summer cherries and brown butter caramel at the bottom, topped by a deliciously dense and moist brown butter corn cake.
ingredients_text: cherries, brown butter, cornmeal, sugar, eggs, flour, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the baking pan. 2. Make brown butter and pour into the pan. 3. Arrange cherries over the brown butter. 4. Mix cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. 5. Beat eggs and combine with the dry ingredients. 6. Pour the batter over the cherries. 7. Bake until golden and set. 8. Let cool before inverting onto a plate.

title: Peach Caprese Pasta Salad
description: A delightful peach caprese pasta salad that combines fresh peaches, cherry tomatoes, and mozzarella for a refreshing summer dish perfect for any occasion.
ingredients_text: fresh peaches, cherry tomatoes, mozzarella, pasta
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Drain and let cool. 3. Slice peaches and cherry tomatoes. 4. In a bowl, combine pasta, peaches, tomatoes, and mozzarella. 5. Drizzle with olive oil and season with salt and pepper. 6. Toss gently to combine. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your refreshing salad!

title: 5-Ingredient Lemon Tiramisu
description: This 5-ingredient Lemon Tiramisu is light, creamy, fruity, tangy, and zesty all in one. It's really quick and easy to make; just prepare it and leave it in the fridge overnight. A perfect dessert that is fresh and vibrant, perfect for any occasion.
ingredients_text: 5 ingredients: mascarpone cheese, lemon juice, lemon zest, ladyfinger cookies, sugar
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix mascarpone cheese, lemon juice, and lemon zest. 2. In another bowl, whip sugar with cream until soft peaks form. 3. Fold the whipped cream into the mascarpone mixture. 4. Dip ladyfinger cookies in lemon juice briefly. 5. Layer dipped cookies in a dish. 6. Spread half of the mascarpone mixture over the cookies. 7. Repeat layers with remaining cookies and mascarpone. 8. Refrigerate overnight before serving.

title: Cinnamon Peach Loaf
description: A moist and flavorful cinnamon peach loaf that combines the sweetness of peaches with the warm spice of cinnamon. Perfect for a summer dessert or afternoon snack.
ingredients_text: peaches, cinnamon, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Grease a loaf pan. 3. In a bowl, mix flour, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon. 4. In another bowl, cream butter and sugar, then add eggs. 5. Combine wet and dry ingredients, fold in peaches. 6. Pour batter into the pan. 7. Bake for 75 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean. 8. Let cool before slicing.

title: The Only Fall Pasta Salad
description: A delicious pasta salad featuring butternut squash, pecans, cranberries, and a creamy Maple Tahini dressing. Perfect for the fall season.
ingredients_text: butternut squash, pecans, cranberries, Maple Tahini dressing
instructions_text: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions. 2. Roast butternut squash until tender. 3. Toast pecans in a pan. 4. Mix cooked pasta, squash, pecans, and cranberries in a bowl. 5. Drizzle with Maple Tahini dressing. 6. Toss to combine. 7. Serve chilled or at room temperature. 8. Enjoy your fall pasta salad!

title: Sweet Potato Butter Swim Biscuits
description: Deliciously moist Sweet Potato Butter Swim Biscuits with a marshmallow glaze, perfect for the fall season.
ingredients_text: sweet potatoes, butter, flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, marshmallow glaze
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Boil and mash sweet potatoes. 3. Mix butter and sugar until creamy. 4. Add mashed sweet potatoes and mix well. 5. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt. 6. Shape dough into biscuits. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Drizzle with marshmallow glaze before serving.

title: Apricot Raspberry Cheesecake Pie
description: A delightful pie combining the silkiness of cheesecake with the vibrant flavors of apricots and raspberries.
ingredients_text: cheese, apricots, raspberries, sugar, eggs, pie crust, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the pie crust. 3. Blend cheese, sugar, and eggs until smooth. 4. Fold in apricots and raspberries. 5. Pour mixture into the crust. 6. Bake for 50 minutes. 7. Let cool before serving. 8. Enjoy your cheesecake pie.

title: Sichuan Lasagna
description: A spicy, creamy Sichuan-inspired lasagna loaded with umami flavors from a unique ragù and creamy béchamel. Perfect for those who love comfort food with a kick.
ingredients_text: lasagna noodles, ground pork, Sichuan peppercorns, garlic, onion, tomatoes, béchamel sauce, cheese, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions. 3. Prepare the ragù by sautéing garlic and onion, then adding ground pork and spices. 4. Layer noodles, ragù, and béchamel in a baking dish. 5. Repeat layers and top with cheese. 6. Bake until golden and bubbly. 7. Let it cool slightly before serving. 8. Enjoy your spicy Sichuan lasagna.

title: Low-Fat High-Protein Chocolate Mousse
description: A deliciously creamy, low-fat chocolate mousse that's high in protein and free from added sugar. Perfect for satisfying your chocolate cravings guilt-free.
ingredients_text: low-fat chocolate, protein powder, almond milk, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Blend low-fat chocolate, protein powder, almond milk, and vanilla extract until smooth. 2. Pour the mixture into serving dishes. 3. Refrigerate for at least 1 hour. 4. Serve chilled. 5. Optionally, top with berries or nuts.

title: Steak & Creamed Corn Bowl
description: Steak + cream corn bowl combines tender steak with smooth, fresh creamed corn, creating a delightful summer dish. The creamed corn offers warmth and flavor, and uses no canned ingredients, providing freshness and nutrition.
ingredients_text: steak, fresh corn, butter, cream, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cook the steak to desired doneness. 2. Remove steak and let it rest. 3. In the same pan, melt butter. 4. Add fresh corn and sauté. 5. Stir in cream, salt, and pepper. 6. Cook until thickened. 7. Slice steak and serve over creamed corn. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Easy Breakfast Quesadillas with Spinach and Feta
description: Easy Breakfast Quesadillas with Spinach and Feta are a quick and delicious way to enjoy a satisfying breakfast. They’re packed with cheesy goodness and fresh spinach, making them a nutritious and flavorful choice for a busy morning.
ingredients_text: spinach, feta cheese, tortillas, eggs, olive oil, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Heat olive oil in a skillet. 2. Sauté spinach until wilted. 3. In a bowl, whisk eggs and season with salt and pepper. 4. Pour eggs into the skillet and scramble with spinach. 5. Place a tortilla in the skillet, add egg mixture and feta, then top with another tortilla. 6. Cook until golden, then flip and cook the other side. 7. Remove from skillet and cut into wedges. 8. Serve warm.

title: Chinese Sponge Cake
description: A less sweet, bouncier, leaner crumb sponge cake similar to those sold in Chinese bakeries, often called Hong Kong cupcakes. It's best the day of, but leftovers will keep wrapped in plastic in the refrigerator for up to three days; bring to room temperature before serving.
ingredients_text: ingredients not specified in the description
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the baking pan. 3. Mix the batter ingredients. 4. Pour the batter into the pan. 5. Bake until golden. 6. Cool the cake. 7. Wrap leftovers in plastic. 8. Serve at room temperature.

title: Chocolate Tahini Sesame Cookies
description: These Chocolate Tahini Sesame Cookies are chewy and arguably my all-time favorite cookie. Think classic chocolate chunk cookie but the chocolate and tahini are swirled into the cookies and then rolled in sesame seeds.
ingredients_text: chocolate, tahini, sesame seeds, flour, sugar, butter, eggs, baking soda, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix tahini and sugar until smooth. 3. Add eggs and melted butter, then stir in chocolate chunks. 4. In another bowl, combine flour, baking soda, and salt. 5. Gradually mix dry ingredients into the wet mixture. 6. Roll dough into balls and coat in sesame seeds. 7. Place on a baking sheet and flatten slightly. 8. Bake for 12-15 minutes until golden.

title: Caramel Apple Bourbon Smash
description: A refreshing and flavorful cocktail that combines the sweetness of caramel and apple with the warmth of bourbon. Perfect for fall season.
ingredients_text: caramel syrup, apple juice, bourbon, ice
instructions_text: 1. Drizzle caramel syrup in a glass. 2. Fill the glass with ice. 3. Pour in apple juice. 4. Add bourbon. 5. Stir gently to combine. 6. Garnish with an apple slice if desired. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your refreshing cocktail!

title: Boursin Appetizer with Pistachios and Hot Honey
description: A quick and delightful appetizer featuring creamy Boursin cheese, crunchy crushed pistachios, and a drizzle of hot honey. Perfect for any gathering or even a solo treat.
ingredients_text: Boursin cheese, crushed pistachios, hot honey
instructions_text: 1. Place Boursin cheese on a serving platter. 2. Sprinkle crushed pistachios over the cheese. 3. Drizzle hot honey on top. 4. Serve with crackers or bread. 5. Enjoy as a quick appetizer.

title: Frozen Strawberry Peanut Butter S'mores Bars
description: These no-bake frozen s'mores bars are the ultimate summer treat, combining the sweetness of strawberries with the richness of peanut butter and chocolate, alongside a satisfying crunch of graham crackers.
ingredients_text: strawberries, peanut butter, chocolate, graham crackers
instructions_text: 1. Crush graham crackers and mix with melted butter. 2. Press mixture into a baking dish. 3. Layer peanut butter and sliced strawberries on top. 4. Drizzle with melted chocolate. 5. Freeze for at least 2 hours. 6. Cut into bars. 7. Serve chilled. 8. Enjoy your refreshing treat!

title: Salmon Crudo with Jalapeño and Dill
description: An easy and refreshing salmon crudo with Pompeian Extra Virgin Olive Oil, lemon juice, and a delightful mix of garnishes. Perfect for a quick summer appetizer.
ingredients_text: salmon, jalapeño, dill, Pompeian Extra Virgin Olive Oil, lemon juice
instructions_text: 1. Slice the salmon into thin pieces. 2. Finely chop the jalapeño and dill. 3. In a bowl, mix olive oil and lemon juice. 4. Arrange salmon slices on a plate. 5. Drizzle the olive oil mixture over the salmon. 6. Sprinkle jalapeño and dill on top. 7. Serve immediately as an appetizer. 8. Enjoy the refreshing flavors.

title: Coconut Cream Pie Stuffed Dates
description: A delicious and quick no-bake dessert combining the essence of coconut cream pie with the sweet chewiness of medjool dates. Perfect for satisfying your coconut cravings without any hassle.
ingredients_text: medjool dates, coconut cream, shredded coconut, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Slice the medjool dates lengthwise and remove the pits. 2. In a bowl, mix coconut cream, shredded coconut, and vanilla extract. 3. Stuff each date with the coconut cream mixture. 4. Arrange on a serving plate. 5. Chill in the refrigerator for a few minutes if desired. 6. Serve and enjoy your no-bake dessert.

title: Peach Cobbler Pizza
description: A delightful twist on the traditional peach cobbler, served as a pizza. Sourdough crust topped with caramelized peaches, a crispy sweet cobbler topping, and a drizzle of glaze.
ingredients_text: sourdough crust, caramelized peaches, crispy sweet cobbler topping, glaze
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the sourdough crust. 3. Caramelize the peaches. 4. Assemble the pizza with peaches and cobbler topping. 5. Bake until golden. 6. Drizzle with glaze. 7. Slice and serve warm. 8. Enjoy your dessert.

title: Salted Watermelon Granita With Chili + Lime
description: This Salted Watermelon Granita is simple to make, deliciously refreshing, and perfect for a hot summer day. By combining watermelon with the tangy burst of lime and a subtle hint of chili, this dessert offers a unique flavor profile that will delight your senses.
ingredients_text: watermelon, lime, chili, salt
instructions_text: 1. Cut watermelon into chunks. 2. Blend watermelon until smooth. 3. Add lime juice, chili, and salt; mix well. 4. Pour mixture into a shallow dish. 5. Freeze for at least 24 hours. 6. Scrape with a fork to create granita texture. 7. Serve in bowls or cups. 8. Garnish with lime wedges if desired.

title: Miso Black Cod
description: A delicious rendition of the iconic Nobu dish, this miso black cod recipe brings rich umami flavors to your home kitchen, perfect for an elegant dinner.
ingredients_text: black cod, miso paste, sake, mirin, sugar
instructions_text: 1. Marinate black cod in miso paste, sake, mirin, and sugar for at least 24 hours. 2. Preheat grill. 3. Remove cod from marinade and wipe off excess. 4. Grill cod for about 10 minutes, turning once. 5. Serve with steamed rice and vegetables. 6. Garnish with green onions if desired. 7. Enjoy your elegant dinner. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Old Fashioned Cake Donuts
description: With a crisp brown edge and soft inside, these Old Fashioned Cake Donuts are quick and easy to make and just like the ones you get at the donut shop!
ingredients_text: flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, nutmeg, egg, milk, butter, vanilla extract, oil for frying
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oil for frying. 2. In a bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and nutmeg. 3. In another bowl, whisk egg, milk, melted butter, and vanilla. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients until just mixed. 5. Roll out dough and cut into donut shapes. 6. Fry donuts until golden brown. 7. Drain on paper towels. 8. Serve warm or dust with powdered sugar.

title: Chicken Shawarma Chicken Salad
description: Chicken shawarma salad has been on repeat lately. High protein, low carb, tons of flavor. This is what I wish more healthy recipes felt like. It’s bold, fresh, a little tangy, and actually fills you up. It’s how I eat now. Simple ingredients, Middle Eastern and Mediterranean flavors, and meals that keep me on track without ever feeling like a diet.
ingredients_text: chicken, salad greens, tomatoes, cucumbers, tahini, lemon juice, spices
instructions_text: 1. Marinate chicken with spices and lemon juice. 2. Grill the chicken until cooked through. 3. Chop salad greens, tomatoes, and cucumbers. 4. Slice grilled chicken. 5. Combine chicken with salad ingredients. 6. Drizzle with tahini. 7. Toss to combine. 8. Serve immediately.

title: Classic Marble Loaf Cake
description: Chocolate and vanilla cake batter are swirled together to create this dense but moist classic marble loaf cake. It's topped with a dark chocolate ganache or a simple dusting of powdered sugar. The cake is rich, using cream cheese for a moist and tight crumb. Best served after a day of resting to enhance flavors.
ingredients_text: chocolate cake batter, vanilla cake batter, cream cheese, dark chocolate ganache, powdered sugar
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the loaf pan. 2. Mix the chocolate and vanilla cake batters separately. 3. Swirl the batters together in the pan. 4. Bake until a toothpick comes out clean. 5. Let the cake cool. 6. Prepare the dark chocolate ganache. 7. Top the cooled cake with ganache or powdered sugar. 8. Allow to rest before serving.

title: Coquito Cheesecake
description: If you’re a fan of the Ponche Babka (page 199), then boy, do I have a cheesecake for you. Coquito is basically Puerto Rican eggnog, a drink that feels like dessert that I have decided to turn into a dessert that feels like a drink. By the way, it’s the addition of coconut and lack of eggs that generally that makes coquito distinct from your typical eggnog.
ingredients_text: cream cheese, sugar, coconut milk, vanilla extract, graham cracker crust, cinnamon
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 325°F (160°C). 2. Beat cream cheese and sugar until smooth. 3. Add coconut milk and vanilla, mix well. 4. Pour mixture into graham cracker crust. 5. Sprinkle cinnamon on top. 6. Bake for 60 minutes. 7. Let cool, then refrigerate for at least 4 hours. 8. Serve chilled.

title: Raspberry Apricot Coffee Cake
description: A delightful Raspberry Apricot sour cream cake topped with streusel, perfect for a flavorful breakfast or afternoon treat.
ingredients_text: Raspberry, Apricot, sour cream, streusel
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the cake batter with sour cream and fruits. 3. Pour batter into a baking dish. 4. Prepare streusel topping. 5. Sprinkle streusel over the batter. 6. Bake for 30 minutes. 7. Allow to cool. 8. Serve as a breakfast or treat.

title: Potato-Crusted Quiche
description: Whip up this scrumptious Potato-Crusted Quiche for a delightful twist on a classic dish. With its crispy potato crust and savory filling, it's perfect for brunch or a light dinner.
ingredients_text: potatoes, eggs, cheese, cream, salt, pepper, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Grate potatoes and press into a pie dish to form a crust. 3. Bake the crust until golden. 4. Whisk eggs with cream, cheese, salt, and pepper. 5. Pour the egg mixture into the crust. 6. Bake until set. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Slice and serve warm.

title: Garlic Steak Bites With Boursin Crostini
description: Juicy seared steak, creamy cheese, herby pan drippings, and a sweet and tangy balsamic drizzle… it’s basically a love letter in crostini form. Don’t say I didn’t warn you when you go to hide some for yourself for later. It’s called self-care, ok!?
ingredients_text: steak, Boursin cheese, crostini, balsamic vinegar, herbs, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven for crostini. 2. Sear steak bites in a hot pan. 3. Mix pan drippings with herbs. 4. Spread Boursin cheese on crostini. 5. Drizzle balsamic over crostini. 6. Top with steak bites. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your self-care treat!

title: Chicken Alfredo Stuffed Zucchini
description: A savory delight, this Chicken Alfredo Stuffed Zucchini combines tender chicken, creamy Alfredo sauce, and melted cheese stuffed inside juicy zucchini bases for a perfect summer meal.
ingredients_text: zucchini, chicken, Alfredo sauce, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Halve the zucchinis and scoop out the insides. 3. Cook the chicken and mix with Alfredo sauce. 4. Stuff the zucchini halves with the chicken mixture. 5. Top with cheese. 6. Bake until zucchini is tender and cheese is melted. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Bacon And Egg Japanese Potato Salad
description: Japanese potato salads are defined by a mashed potato–like texture, a velvetiness richness from Kewpie mayonnaise, and the crunch of salted and squeezed-dry cucumbers. The salad is best at room temperature and can be made a day ahead.
ingredients_text: potatoes, Kewpie mayonnaise, cucumbers, bacon, eggs, salt
instructions_text: 1. Boil potatoes until tender. 2. Mash potatoes and mix with Kewpie mayonnaise. 3. Squeeze and chop cucumbers, then add to the mixture. 4. Cook bacon until crispy, chop, and mix in. 5. Hard boil eggs, chop, and fold into the salad. 6. Season with salt to taste. 7. Chill or serve at room temperature. 8. Best if made a day ahead.

title: Gazpacho Verde with Ginger Vinaigrette
description: This gazpacho is the dinner equivalent of a green smoothie for breakfast. Packed with fruits and veggies, it uses an abundance of in-season produce to create a meal that is light and delicious (something I can't always promise of my green smoothies). This no-cook soup comes together in minutes (plus chilling time) and hits all the right flavor notes for a summer meal: bright, acidic, herbaceous, and light.
ingredients_text: various in-season fruits and vegetables, ginger, vinaigrette
instructions_text: 1. Gather all fruits and vegetables. 2. Blend until smooth. 3. Chill in the refrigerator. 4. Prepare ginger vinaigrette. 5. Serve chilled. 6. Garnish if desired. 7. Enjoy as a light meal. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Banana Pudding Rice Krispy Treats
description: A delicious sweet treat combining the flavors of banana pudding with classic Rice Krispies Treats.
ingredients_text: Rice Krispies, banana pudding mix, marshmallows, butter, sliced bananas
instructions_text: 1. Melt butter and marshmallows in a pot. 2. Stir in banana pudding mix. 3. Add Rice Krispies and mix well. 4. Fold in sliced bananas. 5. Press mixture into a greased pan. 6. Let it cool and set. 7. Cut into squares. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Arroz Meloso de Pulpo y Gambones
description: A creamy, flavorful rice dish featuring tender octopus and succulent prawns, infused with saffron and a rich vegetable base. Perfect for seafood lovers wanting to explore Spanish cuisine.
ingredients_text: rice, octopus, prawns, saffron, vegetable broth, onion, garlic, bell pepper, olive oil
instructions_text: 1. Heat olive oil in a pan. 2. Sauté onion, garlic, and bell pepper until soft. 3. Add rice and stir to coat. 4. Pour in vegetable broth and saffron. 5. Add octopus and prawns. 6. Cook on low heat until rice is creamy. 7. Stir occasionally and add more broth if needed. 8. Serve warm, garnished as desired.

title: Sushi Cake De Atún
description: Un delicioso y saludable Sushi Cake de Atún, perfecto para sorprender a tus amigos con algo rápido y diferente. Esta receta permite aprovechar el arroz sobrante y preparar una cena crujiente sin freír, gracias a la maravilla de usar una wafflera.
ingredients_text: leftover rice, tuna, nori sheets, avocado, cucumber, soy sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook the leftover rice and let it cool. 2. Layer rice in a waffler. 3. Add tuna, sliced avocado, and cucumber. 4. Top with nori sheets. 5. Close the waffler and cook until crispy. 6. Remove and slice into pieces. 7. Serve with soy sauce. 8. Enjoy your sushi cake!

title: Brown Butter Churro Bites With Wild Blueberry Dipping Sauce
description: These brown butter churro bites are soft and tender on the inside, perfectly golden and crisp on the outside, and rolled in cinnamon sugar while they’re still warm. They’re served with a wild blueberry dipping sauce that’s sweet, a little tart, and ridiculously good.
ingredients_text: brown butter, churro dough, cinnamon sugar, wild blueberries, sugar, water, lemon juice
instructions_text: 1. Prepare brown butter and let it cool. 2. Make churro dough and pipe into hot oil. 3. Fry until golden and crisp. 4. Roll in cinnamon sugar. 5. Cook wild blueberries with sugar and lemon juice. 6. Blend to make dipping sauce. 7. Serve churro bites warm with blueberry sauce. 8. Enjoy your dessert!

title: Spiced Feta Chicken Meatballs
description: Delicious and fragrant chicken meatballs spiced with za’atar and mixed with feta and herbs. Perfect for meal prep or freezing.
ingredients_text: chicken, za’atar, feta, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. In a bowl, mix ground chicken with za’atar, crumbled feta, and herbs. 3. Form the mixture into meatballs. 4. Place meatballs on a baking sheet. 5. Bake until cooked through. 6. Serve warm. 7. Store leftovers in the fridge or freeze. 8. Enjoy as a meal prep option.

title: Healthier Sheet Pan Nachos
description: Healthier sheet pan nachos inspired by the viral sheet pan nachos trend
ingredients_text: tortilla chips, black beans, cheese, jalapeños, salsa, avocado
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Spread tortilla chips on a sheet pan. 3. Layer black beans, cheese, and jalapeños on top. 4. Bake for 15 minutes until cheese is melted. 5. Remove from oven and add salsa and avocado. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy your healthier nachos! 8. Optional: garnish with cilantro.

title: Smoky Chipotle Chicken Power Skillet
description: Smoky Chipotle Chicken Power Skillet If you want to make an exceptional easy weeknight meal, you need to give this a try. The chicken comes out juicy and goes perfectly with the creamy chipotle-cilantro sauce, crisp cucumber salad, and rice. I used my Kaizen protein rice here, but use whatever you like - quinoa, brown rice, regular rice, or cauli rice all work great!
ingredients_text: chicken, chipotle, cilantro, cucumber, rice
instructions_text: 1. Cook the chicken in a skillet until juicy. 2. Prepare the creamy chipotle-cilantro sauce. 3. Make a crisp cucumber salad. 4. Cook the rice or preferred grain. 5. Combine the chicken with the sauce. 6. Serve with cucumber salad and rice. 7. Enjoy your meal. 8. Store leftovers if any.

title: Gingerbread Snickerdoodle Cookies
description: Gingerbread snickerdoodle cookies with cinnamon creamcheese frosting
ingredients_text: gingerbread dough, cinnamon, cream cheese, sugar, flour, butter, eggs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare gingerbread dough. 3. Roll dough into balls and coat with cinnamon. 4. Bake cookies until golden. 5. Let cool. 6. Prepare cinnamon cream cheese frosting. 7. Frost cooled cookies. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Apple Pie Spring Rolls
description: Cinnamon apple pie spring rolls (or egg rolls) topped with powdered sugar and homemade salted caramel sauce. So easy and so fun to make!
ingredients_text: cinnamon, apples, spring roll wrappers, powdered sugar, salted caramel sauce
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oil for frying. 2. Peel and slice apples, then mix with cinnamon. 3. Fill spring roll wrappers with apple mixture and roll tightly. 4. Fry spring rolls until golden brown. 5. Drain on paper towels. 6. Dust with powdered sugar. 7. Drizzle with salted caramel sauce. 8. Serve warm.

title: Baked Strawberry Glazed Doughnut
description: Each sweet bite is perfectly soft, doughy, and topped with a creamy strawberry glaze - they do not disappoint!
ingredients_text: doughnut mix, strawberries, cream, sugar, eggs, baking powder, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Prepare the doughnut pan. 3. Mix doughnut ingredients until smooth. 4. Pour batter into the pan. 5. Bake for 15 minutes. 6. Let cool. 7. Prepare strawberry glaze. 8. Dip doughnuts in glaze and serve.

title: Rhubarb Chiffon Cake
description: Layers of light and fluffy chiffon cake, an orange maple white chocolate ganache, and a rhubarb compote make this Rhubarb Chiffon Cake light, fluffy, creamy, and tart.
ingredients_text: rhubarb, flour, sugar, eggs, orange juice, maple syrup, white chocolate, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare cake pans. 2. Make the rhubarb compote by cooking rhubarb with sugar. 3. Prepare the chiffon cake batter by mixing flour, sugar, eggs, and baking powder. 4. Bake the chiffon cake layers until fluffy. 5. Prepare the orange maple white chocolate ganache. 6. Assemble the cake with layers of chiffon, ganache, and rhubarb compote. 7. Chill the cake to set. 8. Slice and serve.

title: Arroz Con Leche De Chocolate EXTRA Cremoso
description: Arroz con leche de chocolate EXTRA cremoso. Perfectly creamy with rich chocolate and citrus notes, this is a delightful twist on the traditional dessert.
ingredients_text: rice, chocolate, milk, sugar, citrus zest
instructions_text: 1. Rinse the rice and soak it for 30 minutes. 2. In a pot, combine rice, milk, and sugar. 3. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently. 4. Add chocolate and citrus zest. 5. Continue cooking until creamy. 6. Remove from heat and let it cool. 7. Serve chilled or warm. 8. Garnish with additional chocolate if desired.

title: Lemon Meringue Pie Cheesecake
description: Graham cracker crust, fluffy lemon cheesecake, lemon curd, and torched meringue – this Lemon Meringue Pie Cheesecake is perfect for summer!
ingredients_text: Graham cracker crust, fluffy lemon cheesecake, lemon curd, torched meringue
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the graham cracker crust and press into a pie dish. 2. Bake the crust until golden. 3. Mix cream cheese, sugar, and lemon juice for the cheesecake filling. 4. Pour the filling into the crust and bake until set. 5. Spread lemon curd over the cheesecake. 6. Whip egg whites and sugar to make meringue. 7. Spread meringue over the lemon curd and torch until golden. 8. Chill before serving.

title: Tamarind Pecan Pie
description: Not to flex too much, but I made this for an event at the Culinary Institute of America in Napa and I almost had to call security because so many people came up to ask me for the recipe. To be clear: I don’t think pecan pie needs any help, but just a little tamarind and a lot less corn syrup will punch up the flavors beyond belief. It’s the best damn pecan pie I’ve ever had.
ingredients_text: pecans, tamarind, corn syrup, sugar, eggs, butter, vanilla, pie crust
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven. 2. Prepare pie crust and place in pie dish. 3. Mix tamarind, corn syrup, sugar, and eggs in a bowl. 4. Stir in melted butter and vanilla. 5. Fold in pecans. 6. Pour filling into crust. 7. Bake for 50 minutes. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Creamy Lemon Rice with Garlic Parm Salmon
description: A delightful combination of creamy lemon-infused rice paired with succulent garlic parmesan salmon, perfect for a sophisticated yet easy-to-make dinner.
ingredients_text: rice, lemon, garlic, parmesan, salmon, cream
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat oil and sauté garlic. 3. Add salmon and cook until golden. 4. Stir in cream and parmesan with the rice. 5. Add lemon juice and zest to the rice. 6. Serve salmon on top of the creamy rice. 7. Garnish with parsley if desired. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Warm Broccoli Caesar with Roasted Chickpeas
description: An elevated version of Caesar salad featuring warm roasted broccoli, Brussels sprouts, crispy bacon, and crunchy roasted chickpeas. Tossed in a creamy tahini Caesar dressing, this dish is perfect for a winter meal prep or a cozy dinner.
ingredients_text: broccoli, Brussels sprouts, bacon, roasted chickpeas, tahini, Caesar dressing
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and roast broccoli and Brussels sprouts until tender. 2. Cook bacon until crispy. 3. Prepare roasted chickpeas. 4. Toss warm vegetables with bacon and chickpeas. 5. Drizzle with tahini Caesar dressing. 6. Serve warm. 7. Enjoy as a cozy dinner. 8. Store leftovers for meal prep.

title: Cod Over Creamy Dill Sauce & Roasted Tomatoes Rice Asparagus
