description: A flavorful dish featuring cod served over a creamy dill sauce with roasted tomatoes, fragrant jasmine rice, and tender asparagus.
ingredients_text: cod, creamy dill sauce, roasted tomatoes, jasmine rice, asparagus
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven and prepare baking dish. 2. Season cod and place in dish. 3. Roast tomatoes alongside cod. 4. Cook jasmine rice according to package instructions. 5. Sauté asparagus until tender. 6. Prepare creamy dill sauce. 7. Serve cod over sauce with rice and asparagus. 8. Garnish with additional dill if desired.

title: Fried Ravioli With Vodka Dipping Sauce
description: This game day snack is a certified 10/10! Crispy, crunchy & SO addicting dipped in a homemade vodka sauce! Be sure to make plenty- these will go quick!!
ingredients_text: ravioli, oil for frying, vodka, tomato sauce, cream, garlic, onion, herbs
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the ravioli according to package instructions. 2. Heat oil in a frying pan. 3. Fry the ravioli until golden and crispy. 4. In a separate pot, combine vodka, tomato sauce, and cream. 5. Sauté garlic and onion, then add to the sauce. 6. Simmer until thickened. 7. Serve fried ravioli with vodka dipping sauce. 8. Enjoy your game day snack!

title: Mango Sticky Rice
description: A delicious and easy-to-make Asian dessert featuring sweet rice, mangoes, and a coconut sauce.
ingredients_text: sweet rice, mangoes, coconut sauce
instructions_text: 1. Cook sweet rice according to package instructions. 2. Prepare coconut sauce by mixing coconut milk with sugar and a pinch of salt. 3. Slice mangoes into thin pieces. 4. Once rice is cooked, mix with coconut sauce. 5. Serve rice in bowls topped with mango slices. 6. Drizzle additional coconut sauce on top. 7. Garnish with sesame seeds if desired. 8. Enjoy your dessert warm or chilled.

title: Blackberry Almond Cream Cake
description: A soft almond sponge, a vanilla yogurt cream, and a blackberry red currant compote, this Blackberry Almond Cream Cake is light and fluffy and not too sweet.
ingredients_text: almond flour, vanilla yogurt, blackberries, red currants, sugar, eggs, baking powder, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the baking pan. 2. Mix almond flour, sugar, and baking powder. 3. In a separate bowl, whisk eggs and butter. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients. 5. Pour batter into the pan and bake. 6. Prepare the blackberry red currant compote. 7. Let the cake cool before frosting with yogurt cream. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Strawberry Cheesecake Bars
description: Delicious and creamy strawberry cheesecake bars with a beautifully swirled strawberry reduction, a graham cracker crust, and a smooth cheesecake batter.
ingredients_text: graham cracker crust, strawberry reduction, cheesecake batter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the graham cracker crust. 3. Make the cheesecake batter. 4. Swirl in the strawberry reduction. 5. Pour the mixture into the crust. 6. Bake until set. 7. Cool completely. 8. Cut into bars and serve.

title: Rice Pudding With Amaro Soaked Raisins
description: A creamy rice pudding enhanced with the unique flavor of amaro-soaked raisins and warm spices, perfect for a chilly day.
ingredients_text: rice, amaro-soaked raisins, warm spices
instructions_text: 1. Cook rice in water until tender. 2. In a separate pot, combine milk and spices. 3. Add cooked rice to the milk mixture. 4. Stir in amaro-soaked raisins. 5. Cook until creamy. 6. Adjust sweetness if desired. 7. Serve warm or chilled. 8. Garnish with additional raisins if desired.

title: Peach Coffee Cake
description: This Peach Coffee Cake is the perfect balance of soft, buttery crumb and juicy summer sweetness. Fresh peaches are folded into a tender, cinnamon-spiced cake and topped with a golden brown streusel that adds just the right amount of crunch. Whether you serve it warm with your morning coffee or as a sweet afternoon treat, it’s the kind of cozy bake that tastes like sunshine in every bite. Bonus: it smells insanely good in the oven.
ingredients_text: fresh peaches, butter, sugar, flour, eggs, cinnamon, baking powder, streusel topping
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the cake batter by mixing butter and sugar. 3. Fold in fresh peaches and cinnamon. 4. Pour batter into a baking dish. 5. Prepare the streusel topping and sprinkle it over the batter. 6. Bake until golden brown. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm with coffee.

title: Cinnamon Crunch Peach Muffin Bread
description: Cinnamon Crunch Peach Muffin Bread. The magic is in the layers of peach jam and the cinnamon crunch on top. Like a cinnamon crunch bagel! But this is better. Each soft, sweet slice has a little cinnamon crunch with every bite. Yummmy. I will be baking these every week through August 🍑
ingredients_text: peach jam, cinnamon, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, baking powder, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. 3. In another bowl, combine eggs, melted butter, and peach jam. 4. Combine wet and dry ingredients. 5. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan. 6. Sprinkle cinnamon on top. 7. Bake for 60 minutes. 8. Let cool before slicing.

title: Maddalena Pienotta
ingredients_text: ingredients not provided
instructions_text: instructions not provided

title: One-Pot Harissa Shrimp Orzo
description: A delightful one-pot dish featuring shrimp and orzo, enhanced with harissa and complemented by fresh spinach, feta, and a touch of lemon. A quick and flavor-packed meal perfect for busy weeknights.
ingredients_text: shrimp, orzo, harissa, fresh spinach, feta, lemon
instructions_text: 1. Cook orzo according to package instructions. 2. In a large pot, heat harissa. 3. Add shrimp and cook until pink. 4. Stir in fresh spinach until wilted. 5. Mix in cooked orzo and feta. 6. Squeeze lemon juice over the dish. 7. Season with salt and pepper. 8. Serve warm.

title: Pan-Toasted Cheese Ravioli With Lemon-Arugula Salad
description: This quick and satisfying dinner features pan-toasted lemon ricotta ravioli and a refreshing arugula salad with parmesan and lemon. It's a perfect weeknight meal that brings a cozy bistro feel to your table.
ingredients_text: lemon ricotta ravioli, arugula, parmesan, lemon
instructions_text: 1. Cook the lemon ricotta ravioli according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, toast the cooked ravioli until golden brown. 3. In a bowl, combine arugula, grated parmesan, and lemon juice. 4. Toss the salad to mix well. 5. Serve the toasted ravioli with the arugula salad on the side. 6. Drizzle with additional lemon juice if desired. 7. Enjoy your cozy bistro-style meal. 8. Store leftovers in the refrigerator.

title: Strawberry Cinnamon Rolls
description: The softest, fluffiest cinnamon rolls enriched with fresh strawberries and topped with a delightful strawberry cream cheese glaze.
ingredients_text: fresh strawberries, cinnamon, cream cheese, flour, sugar, yeast, milk, egg, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Prepare the dough with flour, sugar, yeast, milk, and egg. 3. Roll out the dough and spread cinnamon and strawberries. 4. Roll the dough and cut into pieces. 5. Place in a baking dish and let rise. 6. Bake for 25-30 minutes. 7. Prepare the glaze with cream cheese and strawberries. 8. Drizzle the glaze over warm rolls before serving.

title: Greek Phyllo And Cream “Pie”
description: A sweet pastry from Thessaloniki, Greece, made of crisp, flaky phyllo and a rich, pudding-like cream filling that is thickened in part with semolina.
ingredients_text: phyllo dough, semolina, cream, sugar, vanilla, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the phyllo dough. 3. Cook semolina in milk until thick. 4. Mix in sugar and vanilla. 5. Layer phyllo in a baking dish. 6. Pour cream mixture over phyllo. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Cool and serve.

title: Grilled Octopus with Citrus Sauce
description: Delicious grilled octopus served with a vibrant citrus sauce. Perfect as a summer appetizer.
ingredients_text: octopus, citrus sauce
instructions_text: 1. Clean and prepare the octopus. 2. Marinate the octopus in citrus sauce. 3. Preheat the grill. 4. Grill the octopus until tender. 5. Slice the grilled octopus. 6. Drizzle with additional citrus sauce. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy as a summer appetizer.

title: Pumpkin Cream Cheese Muffins
description: Delicious pumpkin cream cheese muffins that taste just like the ones from Starbucks. Perfect for fall baking, they are moist, flavorful, and filled with a sweet cream cheese center.
ingredients_text: pumpkin puree, cream cheese, flour, sugar, eggs, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. In a bowl, mix pumpkin puree, sugar, and eggs. 3. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt. 4. Gradually add dry ingredients to the pumpkin mixture. 5. Fill muffin cups halfway, add cream cheese, then top with more batter. 6. Bake for 20 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean. 7. Let cool before serving. 8. Enjoy your delicious muffins!

title: Pistachio Butter Gooey Butter Cake
description: Pistachio Butter Gooey Butter Cake y’all 🩷 she’s a real good dessert and you’re gonna love her.
ingredients_text: pistachio butter, sugar, eggs, flour, baking powder, vanilla extract, salt
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mix pistachio butter and sugar. 3. Add eggs and mix well. 4. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt. 5. Fold dry ingredients into the wet mixture. 6. Pour into a greased baking dish. 7. Bake until set. 8. Let cool before serving.

title: Chocolate Chip S’Mores Cookie Skillet
description: Chocolate Chip S’mores Cookie Skillet - A delectable gluten-free and dairy-free dessert perfect for your celebrations. It features a golden-brown top and delicious flavor that will have everyone coming back for more!
ingredients_text: chocolate chips, gluten-free cookie dough, marshmallows, graham crackers
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Spread cookie dough in a skillet. 3. Sprinkle chocolate chips on top. 4. Add marshmallows and graham cracker pieces. 5. Bake until golden brown. 6. Let cool slightly. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy with friends!

title: Raspberry Cream Pie
description: If you’ve been lucky enough to have a slice of the famous Brieremere Farms pie, you know it is truly heaven. This copycat recipe is the closest you can get! Perfect for summer gatherings.
ingredients_text: raspberries, cream, sugar, pie crust, eggs, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the pie crust and bake until golden. 3. Whip cream and mix with sugar and vanilla. 4. Fold in raspberries. 5. Pour filling into the baked crust. 6. Chill in the refrigerator for several hours. 7. Slice and serve. 8. Enjoy your delicious raspberry cream pie!

title: Barbecue Ranch Enchiladas
description: Quick and flavorful barbecue ranch enchiladas that are perfect for a family dinner. Simple ingredients, easy assembly, and great for meal preps make this a family favorite.
ingredients_text: barbecue sauce, ranch dressing, tortillas, cooked chicken, cheese, onions
instructions_text: 1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Mix barbecue sauce and ranch dressing. 3. Fill tortillas with chicken and cheese. 4. Roll and place in a baking dish. 5. Pour sauce over enchiladas. 6. Top with remaining cheese. 7. Bake for 20 minutes. 8. Serve hot with onions on top.

title: Butter Pecan Tres Leches Cake
description: An eggless and dairy-free twist on the classic Tres Leches Cake, featuring a buttery pecan sponge soaked in a luscious triple milk mixture, topped with whipped vegan cream and a dusting of pecans for a delightful crunch.
ingredients_text: buttery pecan sponge, triple milk mixture, whipped vegan cream, pecans
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare the baking pan. 2. Make the buttery pecan sponge batter. 3. Bake the sponge until golden. 4. Soak the baked sponge in the triple milk mixture. 5. Chill the cake to absorb the milk. 6. Top with whipped vegan cream. 7. Dust with pecans. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Mashed Plantains With Fried Eggs
description: A classic Dominican breakfast of mashed plantains topped with fried eggs, red onions, and avocado. This dish is a popular choice for a hearty and flavorful start to the day.
ingredients_text: mashed plantains, fried eggs, red onions, avocado
instructions_text: 1. Boil plantains until soft. 2. Mash the plantains until smooth. 3. In a pan, fry the eggs to your liking. 4. Slice the red onions and avocado. 5. Serve the mashed plantains topped with fried eggs, onions, and avocado. 6. Season to taste. 7. Enjoy your hearty breakfast.

title: Forever Making Sheet Pan Meals
description: A delicious sheet pan meal with sausage, peppers, and potatoes, topped with a 3-ingredient sauce, roasted lemon, and fresh herbs. Easy to make with minimal cleanup.
ingredients_text: sausage, peppers, potatoes, 3-ingredient sauce, lemon, fresh herbs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Chop sausage, peppers, and potatoes. 3. Arrange on a sheet pan. 4. Drizzle with sauce. 5. Add lemon slices. 6. Roast in the oven. 7. Garnish with fresh herbs. 8. Serve warm.

title: Chocolate Chip Zucchini Bread
description: A delightful twist on traditional zucchini bread, this version incorporates chocolate chips for extra sweetness and flavor. It's an easy and healthy dessert you'll want to make again and again!
ingredients_text: zucchini, chocolate chips, flour, sugar, eggs, baking powder, salt, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). 2. Grate the zucchini and squeeze out excess moisture. 3. In a bowl, mix zucchini, sugar, eggs, and vanilla. 4. In another bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. 5. Gradually add dry ingredients to the wet mixture. 6. Fold in chocolate chips. 7. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan. 8. Bake for 75 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean.

title: The Harvest Broccoli Salad
description: The Harvest Broccoli Salad you have been begging for is here!! Highly recommend making this for a side dish or even meal prep it for the week.
ingredients_text: broccoli, beans, dressing, nuts, seeds, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Cook broccoli until tender. 2. Prepare dressing. 3. Combine broccoli, beans, and dressing. 4. Add nuts and seeds. 5. Mix well. 6. Top with cheese. 7. Chill before serving. 8. Serve as a side or meal prep.

title: Creamy Tomato Basil Chicken
description: A delicious and easy-to-make chicken dish cooked in a creamy tomato basil sauce, perfect for a quick meal.
ingredients_text: chicken, creamy tomato basil sauce
instructions_text: 1. Heat a skillet over medium heat. 2. Add chicken and cook until browned. 3. Pour in creamy tomato basil sauce. 4. Simmer for 15 minutes. 5. Stir occasionally. 6. Cook until chicken is fully cooked. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Spicy Garlic Lemon Butter Shrimp With Parmesan Corn Polenta
description: Spicy Garlic Lemon Butter Shrimp with Parmesan Corn Polenta. This recipe never fails. It’s easy, but the yummiest too! The sweet corn polenta always surprises everyone, it is so good!
ingredients_text: shrimp, garlic, lemon, butter, corn, polenta, parmesan
instructions_text: 1. Cook polenta according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, melt butter and sauté garlic until fragrant. 3. Add shrimp and cook until pink. 4. Squeeze lemon juice over shrimp. 5. Stir in cooked polenta and parmesan. 6. Season with salt and pepper. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Cashew Chicken
description: A spicy and savory chicken dish with cashew nuts, bell pepper, onion, and a variety of seasonings.
ingredients_text: chicken, cashew nuts, bell pepper, onion, variety of seasonings
instructions_text: 1. Heat oil in a pan. 2. Sauté onion until translucent. 3. Add chicken and cook until browned. 4. Stir in bell pepper and cashew nuts. 5. Add seasonings and mix well. 6. Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes. 7. Serve hot. 8. Enjoy your spicy cashew chicken.

title: Honey Mustard Chicken Salad Sandwich
description: A delicious sandwich made with honey mustard chicken salad, complete with salt & pepper crisps.
ingredients_text: honey, mustard, cooked chicken, salt, pepper, bread, crisps
instructions_text: 1. In a bowl, mix honey and mustard. 2. Add shredded cooked chicken and mix well. 3. Season with salt and pepper. 4. Spread the chicken salad on bread. 5. Top with another slice of bread. 6. Serve with salt & pepper crisps. 7. Cut the sandwich in half. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Cranberry Cinnamon Sour
description: This festive cocktail is as cozy as it is vibrant — the perfect balance of tart cranberry and warm cinnamon. It’s a great sip before Thanksgiving and Christmas.
ingredients_text: cranberry juice, cinnamon, sugar, ice
instructions_text: 1. In a shaker, combine cranberry juice, sugar, and cinnamon. 2. Add ice and shake well. 3. Strain into a glass. 4. Garnish with a cinnamon stick. 5. Serve chilled. 6. Enjoy your festive cocktail!

title: Guava Lemon Bars
description: These Guava Lemon Bars combine the zesty brightness of lemons with the tropical sweetness of guava, layered on a buttery shortbread crust for a delightful treat.
ingredients_text: guava, lemon, butter, sugar, flour, eggs
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the shortbread crust and press into a baking dish. 3. Mix guava and lemon juice for the filling. 4. Whisk eggs and sugar, then combine with the fruit mixture. 5. Pour filling over the crust. 6. Bake until set. 7. Cool completely before slicing. 8. Serve chilled or at room temperature.

title: Mont Blanc With A Citrus Twist
description: A delightful coffee beverage featuring a citrus twist and the balanced sweetness of the Living Mermaid coffee blend.
ingredients_text: Living Mermaid coffee blend, citrus twist
instructions_text: 1. Brew the Living Mermaid coffee blend. 2. Add citrus twist to the brewed coffee. 3. Stir well to combine. 4. Serve in cups. 5. Enjoy your delightful coffee beverage.

title: Rosca De Palomitas Con Chocolate
description: Hay sabores que te llevan directo a la niñez, y esta rosca de palomitas con chocolate es uno de ellos.
ingredients_text: popcorn, chocolate
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Melt chocolate. 3. Mix popcorn with melted chocolate. 4. Shape into a ring. 5. Place on a baking sheet. 6. Bake until set. 7. Let cool. 8. Serve and enjoy.

title: Chocolate Cream Pie With Cookie Crust, Caramel, And Flaky Salt
description: A celebration of rich chocolate, flaky salt, and high quality dairy, produced right here in Ontario.
ingredients_text: cookie crust, rich chocolate, caramel, flaky salt, high quality dairy
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the cookie crust. 2. Melt chocolate and mix with dairy. 3. Pour chocolate mixture into crust. 4. Drizzle caramel on top. 5. Sprinkle flaky salt. 6. Chill in the refrigerator for several hours. 7. Slice and serve. 8. Enjoy your dessert!

title: One-Pan Coconut Dal With Poached Eggs
description: This One-Pan Coconut Dal with Poached Eggs recipe is as nourishing as it is delicious. Packed with iron, protein, good fats & low GI, it’s an affordable, healthy & easy meal perfect for mornings, lunch, or dinner!
ingredients_text: coconut milk, lentils, eggs, spices, vegetables
instructions_text: 1. Cook lentils in coconut milk until tender. 2. Add spices and vegetables, stir well. 3. Simmer for a few minutes. 4. Poach eggs in the mixture. 5. Serve hot. 6. Garnish with herbs if desired. 7. Enjoy for breakfast, lunch, or dinner.

title: Chimichurri Steak Bites with Garlic Mashed Potatoes
description: Savor the delightful combination of seared ribeye steak cubes with a zesty chimichurri sauce, served alongside creamy garlic mashed Yukon gold potatoes.
ingredients_text: ribeye steak, chimichurri sauce, Yukon gold potatoes, garlic, butter, cream, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Cut ribeye steak into cubes. 2. Season with salt and pepper. 3. Sear steak cubes in a hot pan until browned. 4. Prepare chimichurri sauce and toss with steak. 5. Boil Yukon gold potatoes until tender. 6. Mash potatoes with garlic, butter, and cream. 7. Serve steak bites with chimichurri alongside garlic mashed potatoes. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Hot Honey Chicken & Sweetcorn Salsa
description: Sticky honey chicken thighs, a punchy sweetcorn salsa and chewy giant couscous to soak it all up. Sweet, spicy, salty & fresh - a summer banger.
ingredients_text: chicken thighs, honey, sweetcorn, giant couscous
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Coat chicken thighs in honey and season. 3. Bake chicken until sticky. 4. Prepare giant couscous according to package. 5. Mix sweetcorn with spices for salsa. 6. Serve chicken over couscous with salsa. 7. Garnish as desired. 8. Enjoy your meal.

title: Garlic Chili Udon
description: A simple and flavorful udon recipe with garlic and chili flakes
ingredients_text: udon noodles, garlic, chili flakes, olive oil, salt
instructions_text: 1. Boil udon noodles according to package instructions. 2. In a pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. 3. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. 4. Stir in chili flakes and cook for 1 minute. 5. Drain udon and add to the pan. 6. Toss to combine and season with salt. 7. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes. 8. Serve hot.

title: Double-Tomato Focaccia
description: A no-knead focaccia with tomatoes two ways: a healthy smear of brick red tomato paste under blistered, juicy cherry tomatoes.
ingredients_text: brick red tomato paste, cherry tomatoes
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the dough without kneading. 3. Spread tomato paste on the dough. 4. Top with cherry tomatoes. 5. Let it rise. 6. Bake until golden and blistered. 7. Cool slightly. 8. Slice and serve.

title: Crispy Toasted-Cheese Black Bean Quesadillas
description: A delicious quesadilla recipe with a layer of lacy, cheesy goodness. The cheese is built directly into the recipe by crusting one side of each quesadilla. Served with sour cream and hot sauce.
ingredients_text: black beans, cheese, tortillas, sour cream, hot sauce
instructions_text: 1. Heat a skillet over medium heat. 2. Spread black beans on a tortilla. 3. Sprinkle cheese on top and cover with another tortilla. 4. Cook until the bottom is crispy, then flip. 5. Cook until the other side is golden. 6. Remove and slice into wedges. 7. Serve with sour cream and hot sauce. 8. Enjoy your crispy quesadillas.

title: Upside Down Jalapeño Cornbread
description: A spicy, sweet, and sticky upside down jalapeño cornbread. This savory cake is sure to not disappoint.
ingredients_text: jalapeños, cornmeal, flour, sugar, baking powder, milk, eggs, butter
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Prepare the jalapeños and arrange them in a baking dish. 3. Mix dry ingredients in a bowl. 4. In another bowl, whisk wet ingredients. 5. Combine wet and dry ingredients. 6. Pour the batter over jalapeños. 7. Bake until golden. 8. Let cool, then invert to serve.

title: Chocolate Caramel Pecan Brownies
description: Everything you could want and need in a fall brownie! These are packed full of flavor and are so easy to make!
ingredients_text: chocolate, caramel, pecans, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, vanilla extract
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven and prepare a baking dish. 2. Melt chocolate and butter together. 3. Mix in sugar and eggs until smooth. 4. Stir in flour and vanilla extract. 5. Fold in pecans and caramel. 6. Pour batter into the dish. 7. Bake until set. 8. Allow to cool before cutting into squares.

title: Apple Snacking Cake
description: This apple snacking cake is made in one bowl, is so easy and delicious to create, and is festive and perfect for fall!
ingredients_text: apples, flour, sugar, eggs, butter, baking powder, cinnamon
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. In a bowl, mix the dry ingredients. 3. Add the wet ingredients and mix until combined. 4. Fold in the chopped apples. 5. Pour the batter into a greased pan. 6. Bake for 55 minutes. 7. Allow to cool before serving. 8. Enjoy your cake!

title: Pumpkin Spice French Toast Pudding With Autumn Coffee
description: For autumn lovers: pumpkin spice French toast pudding, accompanied by a delicious coffee with Pumpkin Spice Coffee Mate, a seasonal, creamy and spectacular flavor that will only be available for a limited time, if you love autumn you will love it.
ingredients_text: pumpkin spice, bread, eggs, milk, sugar, coffee, Pumpkin Spice Coffee Mate
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Whisk together eggs, milk, sugar, and pumpkin spice. 3. Tear bread into pieces and soak in the mixture. 4. Transfer to a baking dish. 5. Bake until set. 6. Brew coffee and mix with Pumpkin Spice Coffee Mate. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your autumn dessert.

title: Crispy Chicken Tacos With Pico De Gallo And Spicy Taco Sauce
description: Delicious crispy chicken tacos served with fresh pico de gallo and a spicy taco sauce for an extra kick. Enjoy this flavorful dish that brings together smoky chicken, fresh toppings, and a creamy sauce.
ingredients_text: crispy chicken, pico de gallo, spicy taco sauce, tortillas
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the crispy chicken by frying until golden. 2. Make pico de gallo by chopping tomatoes, onions, and cilantro. 3. Mix ingredients for spicy taco sauce. 4. Warm tortillas in a pan. 5. Assemble tacos with chicken, pico de gallo, and sauce. 6. Serve immediately. 7. Enjoy with your favorite sides. 8. Store leftovers in the fridge.

title: Super Green Orzo With Roasted Salmon
description: Super Green Orzo with Roasted Salmon: Perfect summer recipe and great for meal prep. Takes 20 minutes to come together, high in protein and utterly delicious.
ingredients_text: orzo, salmon, olive oil, garlic, spinach, lemon juice, salt, pepper
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). 2. Season salmon with olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper. 3. Roast salmon for 15-20 minutes. 4. Cook orzo according to package instructions. 5. Sauté spinach in a pan until wilted. 6. Combine cooked orzo, spinach, and lemon juice. 7. Serve orzo topped with roasted salmon. 8. Enjoy your meal!

title: Smashed Zucchini With Pesto & Burrata
description: This Smashed Zucchini with Pesto & Burrata is deceivingly simple and quick to make. The tender-crisp zucchini gets a slightly caramelized char under the broiler and is smashed to fully absorb the salty, herbiness of the pesto, which gets a light, bright upgrade from lemon juice.
ingredients_text: zucchini, pesto, burrata, lemon juice
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the broiler. 2. Slice zucchini and place on a baking sheet. 3. Broil until tender and slightly charred. 4. Smash the zucchini to absorb flavors. 5. Drizzle with pesto and lemon juice. 6. Top with burrata. 7. Serve warm. 8. Enjoy your dish!

title: Pull Apart Garlic Bread
ingredients_text: bread, garlic, butter, parsley, cheese
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). 2. Slice the bread into sections without cutting all the way through. 3. Mix melted butter, minced garlic, and chopped parsley. 4. Pour the mixture into the bread crevices. 5. Stuff cheese between the slices. 6. Wrap in foil and bake for 25 minutes. 7. Unwrap and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes until golden. 8. Serve warm and enjoy.

title: Classic Tomato Toast With Mayonnaise And Chives
description: Let the flavors of perfect summer tomatoes shine on this simple-is-best toast.
ingredients_text: summer tomatoes, mayonnaise, chives, bread
instructions_text: 1. Toast the bread until golden. 2. Spread mayonnaise on the toast. 3. Slice the summer tomatoes. 4. Arrange tomato slices on top of the toast. 5. Sprinkle with chopped chives. 6. Season with salt and pepper to taste. 7. Serve immediately. 8. Enjoy your simple summer delight.

title: Grill-Roasted Sweet And Sour Peppers With Feta And Herbs
description: Silky, smoky grill-roasted sweet peppers with a sweet and sour dressing, toasted nuts, and crumbled feta. Serve at room temperature or lightly chilled as a side to kebabs or roasted lamb or chicken, or as a part of a meze spread, with flatbread alongside.
ingredients_text: sweet peppers, feta cheese, nuts, herbs, sweet and sour dressing, flatbread
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the grill. 2. Roast the sweet peppers until charred. 3. Prepare the sweet and sour dressing. 4. Toast the nuts until golden. 5. Crumble the feta cheese. 6. Combine roasted peppers, nuts, feta, and herbs. 7. Drizzle with dressing. 8. Serve at room temperature or chilled.

title: Best Chocolate Pecan Cinnamon Rolls
description: These rich, decadent, and perfectly soft cinnamon rolls are loaded with chocolate, pecans, and, of course, plenty of cinnamon flavor.
ingredients_text: chocolate, pecans, cinnamon, dough
instructions_text: 1. Prepare the dough and let it rise. 2. Roll out the dough and spread chocolate and cinnamon mixture. 3. Sprinkle with chopped pecans. 4. Roll the dough tightly and cut into rolls. 5. Place rolls in a baking dish and let rise again. 6. Bake until golden brown. 7. Allow to cool slightly. 8. Serve warm and enjoy.

title: Single Serve Chocolate, Raspberry Banana Cake
description: An easy, healthy and delicious single serve chocolate, raspberry banana cake
ingredients_text: chocolate, raspberries, banana, egg
instructions_text: 1. Preheat the oven. 2. Mash the banana in a bowl. 3. Mix in chocolate and raspberries. 4. Add the egg and combine well. 5. Pour the mixture into a baking dish. 6. Bake for 30 minutes. 7. Let cool slightly. 8. Serve warm.

A sprinkling of Aleppo pepper and fresh herbs ties it all together beautifully.

description: Part 6 of my soup series and it just might be my favorite!!

title: Chipotle Halloumi Tacos

title: Roasted Tomato Soup
description: I love to make this soup in early fall when the weather has just started to cool off and the last of the tomatoes are still lingering at the farmers' market. To make sure the star ingredient really shines through, I use freshly roasted tomatoes, canned tomatoes, and tomato paste. Although this soup is delicious on its own, the Smoked Gouda Grilled Cheese Croutons (page 215) will take it over the top. Make a batch while the tomatoes are roasting and serve them on top. You may not need a full tablespoon of sugar if your tomatoes are sweet, so start by adding just a little bit, taste, and add more as needed.

title: Greek Beet And Yogurt Salad
description: Sweet beets cooked until tender, then diced, enveloped in a velvety yogurt sauce, and garnished with crunchy, earthy walnuts. This salad can be part of your meze spread or is an excellent accompaniment to main dishes, especially fish. You can prepare it ahead of time and store it in the refrigerator, but take it out about 30 minutes before serving so it won’t be too cold. It’s best to use medium-sized beets, which have a deeper, more concentrated flavor than large ones.

title: Butter Bean, Sungold, And Smashed Cucumber Salad
description: When sungold tomato season rolls around, I find myself tossing them in just about any dish I can. They truly are the jewels of summer! Marinating the sungolds and smashed cucumbers slightly ahead of time gives them a chance to release a bit of their juices, making a lovely, flavorful base for the salad. I find the easiest way to smash the cucumbers is by placing my knife flat on top of the cucumber and smashing down with my palm, as you would crush a garlic clove. I call for celery vinegar here (TART Vinegar makes one) because I find it adds such a special touch to this salad. However, red wine vinegar is lovely, too, and a more readily available swap. There will be quite a bit of delicious liquid that forms at the bottom of the bowl as the salad sits, perfect for dipping into with a chunk of focaccia (see page 226).

title: Traditional Greek Salad
description: This Greek salad is a true summer classic, loaded with the best flavors of the Mediterranean. The name horiatiki comes from the Greek word for “village,” and while similar salads have been around since the 1800s, the modern version with feta didn’t appear until the 1960s. Back then, taverna owners in Athens added a block of feta to dodge government-set salad prices, which made this dish a star. Today, it’s all about using perfectly ripe, juicy tomatoes—if you can’t find them, it’s worth waiting. In Greece, the salad is always served with bread to soak up every last drop of those amazing juices, a tradition known as papara.

title: Egg Noodle Beef Stir Fry
description: Egg Noodle Beef Stir Fry, my signature dish are all of my stir fry noodles, I can’t let you miss this!

title: Crustless Sweet Potato Quiche With Smoked Salmon
description: Looking for a nutritious, satisfying meal that supports your weight-loss journey and pleases the whole family? This crustless quiche is packed with protein, fiber, and healthy fats, making it a perfect balanced option for lunch, dinner, or meal prep. With a naturally gluten-free sweet potato crust, this flourless quiche is flavor-packed and is also a fantastic low-point meal option!

title: Quesito y Guayaba
description: A delicious Puerto Rican pastry featuring a blend of sweet cream cheese and guava paste, wrapped in flaky puff pastry.

title: Sour Cream And Onion Smashed Potatoes
description: Sour Cream and Onion Smashed Potatoes. This might sound different, but cooking the potatoes in beer or even just water until they are fork tender is the secret to a really good SMASHED potato. The edges get extra crispy. Serve with homemade sour cream and onion dip. Like chips + dip, but better.

title: Carbonara Fried Rice
description: A delightful fusion of classic carbonara flavors with fried rice.

title: Chicken Shawarma With Creamy Garlic Sauce
description: Chicken Shawarma with Creamy Garlic Sauce is an absolute delight! The sauce is so good you'll lick the bowl clean! Serve with pita bread and a refreshing tomato cucumber slaw.

title: Chicken Tzatziki Avocado Salad
description: A vibrant, Greek-inspired salad perfect for warm weather. Enjoy seasoned roasted chicken tossed with a creamy lemon tahini dressing, avocado, feta, and tzatziki sauce.

title: One Pan Creamy Lemon Garlic Chicken Gnocchi
description: One pan creamy lemon garlic chicken gnocchi! This one's a yes-make on weeknights when you’re craving springtime cozy but want it quick. The chicken takes a quick crisp in a pan and gets paired with spinach in a peppery lemon-garlic sauce for a balanced meal that requires minimal clean-up.

title: Beef Bulgogi Lettuce Wraps
description: Bulgogi is one of the most flavorful quick and easy dishes you'll ever make! Made with thin, marinated slices of beef and then cooked quickly over high heat, you'll have dinner ready in no time!

title: Fiery Yet Creamy Firecracker Ramen
description: A noodle soup to stir your soul this cosy season with bursts of flavours that are spicy, savoury, rich in umami and creamy. Tailor to your liking with adjustable spice levels and toppings.

title: Caramelized Onion Pistachio Chickpea Pasta
description: A flavorful combination of silky caramelized onions, nutty pistachios, and hearty chickpeas, inspired by Southern Italian cuisine. This simple yet delectable pasta dish brings together crunchy and creamy elements for a satisfying meal.

title: One-Pan Sun-Dried Tomato Pesto Pasta With Italian Sausage And Peas
description: A delicious and easy-to-make one-pan pasta dish featuring sun-dried tomato walnut pesto, Italian sausage, and peas. Perfect for a quick weeknight meal.

title: Classic Corn And Crab Chowder
description: This classic Corn and Crab Chowder is delicious and decadent and a perfect use for seasonal summer corn. The sweetness of the corn and the crab combined with the saltiness of the bacon creates something truly magical. If you don’t want the bacon, just leave it out!

title: Roasted Butternut Squash Quinoa Salad with Creamy Ginger Dressing
description: A delightful and healthy salad featuring roasted butternut squash, quinoa, dried cranberries, and a creamy ginger dressing. Perfect as a side or a light main dish.

title: Spicy Lobster Capellini
description: One of our all time summer faves! Capellini tossed in tomato-brandy cream sauce with fresh lobster and spicy Calabrian chili for a kick! I just love the flavor the brandy adds to this dish - trust me on this one!

title: Monte Cristo Croissant Breakfast Casserole
description: Buttery croissants, savory ham, melty gruyere, plus creamy pockets of havarti baked right inside. Perfect and EASY for holiday brunch.

title: Chicken Meatballs with Lemony Couscous and Cucumber Salad
description: A delightful and light spring dinner featuring spiced feta chicken meatballs paired with lemony couscous with asparagus, arugula, and feta, accompanied by a refreshing cucumber and onion salad.

title: Turkey, Zucchini & White Bean Skillet Dinner
description: An easy and flavorful Turkey, Zucchini & White Bean Skillet Dinner perfect for busy weeknights. This dish is rich in dietary fiber, high-quality protein, and antioxidant-rich vegetables, and comes together in just one pan.

title: Viral Chicken Caesar Smash Tacos
description: A delightful fusion of chicken smash tacos and Caesar salad, these Viral Chicken Caesar Smash Tacos offer a unique and flavorful culinary experience.

title: Grandpa’s Eggy Rice
description: A nostalgic dish from my grandpa's kitchen, this simple yet comforting recipe blends eggs with freshly cooked rice, enriched with soy sauce and topped with furikake.

title: Key Lime Pie Bars
description: An easy and addictive treat with a perfect balance of tangy and sweet flavors, these Key Lime Pie Bars are a delightful twist on the classic pie.

title: Pistachio & Blackberry Olive Oil Cake
description: A luscious dairy-free pistachio olive oil cake filled with sweet blackberry preserves and a fluffy, salted blackberry thyme buttercream.

title: Strawberry Matcha Crepe Cake
description: A beautiful and flavorful crepe cake made with a simple pancake mix and transformed with matcha and strawberries. Perfect for those who want a stunning cake without extensive baking skills.

title: Viral Trader Joe's Lobster Bisque Pasta
description: A quick and impressive dish using Trader Joe's lobster bisque and shrimp for a creamy, seafood-infused pasta meal.

title: Lemongrass Chili Shrimp
description: Bright and flavorful lemongrass chili shrimp perfect for a quick grill session, served alongside rice, grilled steak, and a big salad for a delightful dinner.

title: Caesar Tortellini Pasta Salad
description: This Caesar Salad, revamped with tortellini, offers a creamy and tangy experience without anchovies. The addition of tortellini enhances the flavor and texture of this pasta salad, making it a delicious and satisfying dish perfect for any occasion.

title: Fluffy Lemon Ricotta Pancakes
description: Fluffy Lemon Ricotta Pancakes are a quick and delicious breakfast or dessert option. The pancakes are made with ricotta cheese and lemon, making them fluffy and tangy. They can be served with optional toppings like fresh berries, honey or maple syrup, and whipped cream.

title: Rice Paper Breakfast Wrap
description: Creamy, crunchy, spicy and loaded with all the good things between those crispy rice paper folds! This is a breakfast you’ll be making on repeat for lunch/dinner too.

title: Cornbread Casserole
description: A delicious and hearty cornbread casserole, perfect for Thanksgiving or Friendsgiving. This recipe was introduced by the author's mother-in-law and has become one of their favorite recipes.

title: White Lasagna with Greens, Gruyere, & Garlic
description: A healthy and delicious white lasagna featuring nutritious spinach, a creamy bechamel sauce, and flavorful gruyere or mozzarella cheese.

title: Raspberry Almond Croissant Bread Pudding
description: A heavenly dessert made with flaky croissants soaked in a vanilla custard, filled with almond frangipane and raspberry preserves. Perfectly golden and crispy outside, warm and soft inside.

title: Springtime Lemon Olive Oil Cake
description: Light and refreshing lemon olive oil cake, perfect for a springtime treat, topped with homemade whipped cream.

title: Healthy Vegan Date Walnut Cake
description: A delicious and healthy vegan cake made with wholesome ingredients like dates and walnuts, topped with a sweet tahini maple drizzle.

title: Zucchini Waffles
description: Crispy on the outside, cheesy & tender on the inside, this savory waffle recipe is out of this world.

title: Cheese Stuffed Garlic Butter Rolls
description: Cheese stuffed Garlic butter rolls

title: Gingerbread French Toast Bake
description: Brunch idea for the holidays: Gingerbread French Toast Bake. It’s easy to make and so delicious, crispy on the outside and soft on the inside!

title: Thousand Layer Apple Cake
description: A heavenly French-style apple cake with layers of thinly sliced apples in a simple, creamy batter.

title: Higher Protein Sheet Pan Strawberry Shortcake
description: This easy and delicious strawberry shortcake is packed with protein and healthy fats from Greek yogurt and almond flour. Perfect for summer gatherings, it's a spongy, low-sugar treat that's simple to prepare in a sheet pan.

title: Cheddar Bay Butter Swim Biscuits
description: These Cheddar Bay Butter Swim Biscuits are warm and soft, melting in your mouth with a delicious cheesy flavor. Perfectly baked with a savory garlic butter finish.

title: Avocado Peach & Burrata Summer Toast
description: This toast is one of my favorites to eat in the summer. It’s soooo good! Use lots of olive oil and flaky salt for this toast—and thank me later. It’s creamy, juicy, salty, sweet… just summer on a slice of sourdough.

title: Vodka Sauce Lasagna
description: This lasagna recipe features a homemade vodka sauce and is layered with a rich cheese filling. It's baked to perfection and is the best lasagna ever made.

title: Orange Chipotle Honeynut Cabbage Salad
description: Orange Chipotle Honeynut Cabbage Salad, because cabbage is my current budget favorite vegetable and I can turn it into a fall sunset in a bowl

title: Creamy Lemon White Bean & Rice Soup
description: A thick and creamy vegetarian spin on Greek Avgolemono soup, enriched with white beans and rice, and brightened by lemon and fresh herbs.

title: Creamy Bacon & Parmesan Pasta
description: Creamy bacon and parmesan pasta, perfect for a mid-week meal! Ready in just 20 minutes, this dish is rich, hearty and sure to satisfy. It's made with pasta, smoked bacon lardons, and a creamy parmesan sauce, garnished with fresh parsley.

title: Apple Crumble Cheesecake
description: A delicious combination of apple crumble and cheesecake with a Biscoff cookie crust, apple filling, and a crumble topping. Finished with a drizzle of salted caramel.

title: Mediterranean Kale, Avocado, and Chicken Salad
description: A nutritious and flavorful salad combining marinated chicken thighs, massaged kale, creamy avocado, and Mediterranean toppings with a zesty dressing.

title: Churro Cheesecake
description: A rich and creamy cheesecake with a cinnamon-sugar kick, wrapped in golden crescent dough. Perfect for satisfying any sweet tooth, especially on Father's Day.

title: Pear, Almond & Honey Loaf
description: A delightful loaf that combines the sweetness of pears and honey with the nutty flavor of almonds. Perfect for breakfast, tea, or dessert, it’s a versatile and delicious treat.

title: Brown Butter Matcha Brookies
description: A delightful fusion of rich chocolate chip cookies and earthy matcha brownies, perfect for indulgent dessert moments.

title: Rice Paper Sushi Wrap
description: Rice paper sushi wrap✨ A delightful and healthy alternative to traditional sushi, perfect for a quick meal or appetizer. Enjoy the crisp crunch of cucumber and creamy avocado wrapped in rice paper and nori, coated with toasted sesame seeds for extra flavor.

title: Pecan Brownie Pie
description: Fudgey brownie meets buttery pecan for the perfect marriage of chocolate and caramel flavour. A buttery pastry base filled with gooey brownie topped with crunchy caramelised pecans.

title: French Toast Casserole With Cream Cheese Icing
description: A cozy Christmas casserole perfect for prepping the night before, featuring a delicious French toast base topped with cream cheese icing and fresh berries.

title: Strawberry, Pistachio & Rosewater Whipped Cottage Cheese Tart
description: A light and delightful tart combining the freshness of strawberries with crunchy pistachios and fragrant rosewater, all atop a crispy puff pastry base.

title: Chocolate Dipped Peanut Butter Oatmeal Cookies
description: Delicious vegan peanut butter oatmeal cookies dipped in rich dark chocolate. A perfect treat for any time of the day.

title: Shrimp Linguine with Burst Tomatoes & Parsley
description: A 20-minute Shrimp Linguine made with cherry tomatoes, white wine, garlic, chili, and parsley. This simple Italian pasta dish is fresh, delicious and easy to prepare.

title: Spice Roast Fish With Cottage Cheese & Grain Salad
description: This Spice Roast Fish with Loaded Cottage Cheese & Grain Salad packs so much deliciousness & nourishment into a meal with the lightly spiced fish resting on a creamy, crunchy loaded cottage cheese with finely sliced veggies, pickles, & herbs.

title: Broccoli Cheddar Soup Pasta
description: Broccoli cheddar soup meets mac & cheese in this healthy(ish) creamy one-pot pasta. Just one pot and 30 minutes stand between you and dinner tonight.

title: Toasted Coconut Pecan Bread Pudding
description: A deliciously sweet and nutty bread pudding combined with toasted coconut and pecans. Perfect for a cozy dessert or indulgent breakfast.

title: Peri Peri Chicken and Rice
description: Spice up your dinner with this mouthwatering Peri Peri Chicken and Rice! This dish features tender, marinated chicken thighs coated in a zesty and spicy Peri Peri sauce made from fresh chilies, garlic, and aromatic spices. Baked to perfection, the chicken is juicy on the inside with a crispy skin on the outside. Served atop fluffy, seasoned rice infused with bell peppers and a hint of chicken seasoning, this meal is bursting with vibrant colors and tastes.

title: Spicy Caramelized Onion & Mushroom Grilled Cheese Omelette
description: This omelette is the ultimate breakfast/brunch/dinner/late-night snack, loaded with flavorful ingredients between golden brown slices of bread. The combination of caramelised onions, mushrooms, spinach, and melty cheese makes it a must-try dish.

title: High Protein Spinach & Artichoke Dip
description: A high protein spinach and artichoke dip, perfect side dish for the Holiday season. This recipe is brought to you by @lainiecooks_ and @simplyorganicfoods.

title: Caramelized Banana and Date Yogurt Delight
description: An innovative twist on a viral caramelized banana and date dessert, transformed into a delicious yogurt breakfast with added walnuts for crunch.

title: Gelatina Vampiro
description: A refreshing and spicy dessert made with hibiscus and coconut water, offering a delightful blend of sweet, tangy, and mild heat. Perfect for satisfying those sweet and spicy cravings.

title: Lemon Pie Ice Cream
description: A creamy and refreshing lemon pie ice cream with added collagen for a healthy twist. Perfect for a guilt-free dessert with skin benefits.

title: Sweet Potato Mango Sticky Rice
description: A vibrant and nutritious plant-based sticky rice dish featuring sweet potato and mango. This gluten-free recipe is easy to prepare in a rice cooker, perfect for a healthy dessert or snack.

title: Garbanzos with Prawns and Spinach
description: A quick and delicious meal combining the rich flavors of garbanzo beans, prawns, and fresh spinach. Perfect for when you're short on time but crave something tasty.

title: Crispy Chicken Tacos
description: Enjoy delicious sheet pan crispy chicken tacos, perfect for an easy, healthy, and quick weeknight dinner!

title: Miso Butter Japanese Sweet Potato
description: A deliciously savory-sweet dish combining miso butter with baked Japanese sweet potatoes, finished with optional mozzarella topping for extra meltiness.

title: Fall Nourish Bowl
description: Roasted spiced crunchy chickpeas, pumpkin, brussels sprouts, kale and pomegranate over creamy hummus.

title: Strawberry Coconut Banana Bread
description: A moist and delicious banana bread with coconut flakes and fresh strawberries. Perfect for breakfast or a snack!

title: Oreo Ice Cream Sandwiches
description: A creamy and crunchy summer treat featuring rich Oreo crumb crust and smooth ice cream filling. Perfect for cooling down on a hot day.

title: Cocada Cake
description: A delightful coconut cake that's crispy on the outside and fudgy on the inside. Perfect when served hot with a scoop of ice cream.

title: Matcha Cheesecake Chia Pudding
description: A delightful plant-based chia pudding with the flavors of matcha cheesecake. Packed with fiber and antioxidants, this dish is both healthy and delicious.

title: Cucumber Salad with Crispy Quinoa & Lemon Vinaigrette
description: This refreshing cucumber salad is elevated with crispy quinoa and a tangy lemon vinaigrette, topped with feta for an extra layer of flavor. Perfect for a light and tasty meal.

title: Chicken Caesar Tortellini Pasta Salad
description: A delightful gluten-free chicken caesar tortellini pasta salad, perfect for a simple summer lunch or dinner. This dish combines the freshness of romaine, the heartiness of rotisserie chicken, and a no-mayo caesar dressing.

title: Butter Chicken
description: Butter chicken, a classic and deliciously creamy Indian dish made by cooking marinated chicken pieces in a rich, flavorful gravy.

title: Ham, Egg And Cheese Croissant Casserole
description: Welcome to my cozy Christmas Casserole Series part 1! A delicious ham, egg and cheese croissant casserole.

title: Molten Omelet
description: Brace yourself for the fluffiest, easiest, least-stressful, and most ooey-gooey omelet you've ever tasted. By blending silken tofu into the eggs, you create creamy, fluffy curds that leave you with a perfectly blond French-style omelet. The molten interior is a mix of sour cream and fontina cheese that spills out as you cut in. Use any melting cheese you'd like, though the funky fontina does a pretty good job.

title: Orange Chicken Meatballs
description: A healthier spin on the classic orange chicken, transformed into flavorful meatballs glazed in a sticky, zesty sauce. Ready in under 30 minutes for a quick and delicious weeknight dinner.

title: Baked Feta Turkey Meatballs & Quinoa
description: This one-pan meal features turkey meatballs baked with feta and datterino tomatoes to create a creamy sauce, served over quinoa. It's a balanced, easy-to-make dish perfect for a quick dinner or meal prep.

title: Roasted Broccoli, White Bean & Parmesan Salad With Lemon-Caper-Parmesan Dressing
description: A delicious and textured salad featuring roasted broccoli, white beans, and parmesan, all dressed in a perfectly tangy lemon-caper-Parmesan dressing. A healthy and flavorful option perfect for any meal.

title: Apple Cinnamon Oatmeal Cookies
description: Apple Cinnamon Oatmeal Cookies with a cinnamon glaze

title: Savory Avocado Flatbread with Beans & Herbs
description: A protein-packed, fiber-rich avocado flatbread featuring savory beans, sautéed scallions, and fresh herbs, perfect for a deliciously satisfying breakfast.

title: Blueberry Lemon Cheesecake Cookies
description: Soft & chewy lemon sugar cookies, with jammy blueberries throughout, stuffed with a creamy vanilla cheesecake filling. They’re chewy, buttery, full of fresh blueberry flavor, and taste just like blueberry lemon cheesecake in cookie form!

title: Spicy Lamb, Mint & Feta Kebabs
description: Juicy and spicy lamb kebabs with refreshing mint and rich feta cheese, prepared on a sheet pan in just 15 minutes. Perfect for a quick and delicious meal.

title: BBQ Chuck Roast
description: A simple to make gluten-free and dairy-free BBQ chuck roast that melts in your mouth, offering an outdoor-like slow-cooked BBQ flavor without a grill or smoker.

title: 15-Minute Breakfast Or Brunch Frittata
description: 15-Minute Breakfast or Brunch Frittata From me to you: a simple and delicious recipe! 🍴✨ From you: lots of hearts and sweet comments! 😍💬 Share your thoughts below and don’t forget to like this video to spread the love for tasty food! 🥰

title: Pumpkin Pie Cookies
description: Cozy, chewy pumpkin pie cookies with a perfect crisp edge and a soft, gooey middle filled with warm spices. Made with coconut milk for a delicious, creamy texture without any dairy.

title: Choco Chip Pancakes
description: Fluffy and delicious pancakes studded with sweet chocolate chips, perfect for a comforting breakfast or brunch.

title: Blueberry Custard Pie
description: A luscious blueberry custard pie with a crumbly topping, perfect for any occasion.

title: Raspberry White Chocolate Scones
description: Homemade scones that capture the sensation of being in a bakery. The perfect spring flavor with a delicate balance between sweet white chocolate and tart raspberries.

title: 4th of July Fruit Sugar Cookie Pizza
description: A simple and festive dessert idea for the 4th of July, featuring a sugar cookie base topped with white icing, blueberries, strawberries, and cool whip.

title: Bundt Pancake Cake
description: A delightful twist on breakfast, turning pancake batter into a delicious Bundt cake. Serve warm and enjoy the dessert-like treat in the morning.

title: Crispy Gnocchi With Bacon, Peas, Spinach & Cream
description: Crispy Gnocchi with Bacon, Peas, Spinach & Cream | Gnocchi is a versatile kitchen staple perfect for quick home cooking. This recipe elevates gnocchi by crisping it up and adds delicious flavors with bacon, peas, spinach, and a creamy sauce.

title: Frosted Gingerbread Cookie Bars
description: It’s officially November & time for all the holiday bakes- like these frosted gingerbread cookie bars. One of the most popular recipes from last year (for very good reason).

title: Apple Pie Oatmeal
description: Warm and cozy apple pie-flavored oatmeal, perfect for a hearty breakfast as the apple season begins.
